authors_text: Changyeon Kim,Jongjin Park,Jinwoo Shin,Honglak Lee,Pieter Abbeel,Kimin Lee
title: Preference Transformer: Modeling Human Preferences using Transformers for RL
title_zh: 偏好变压器：使用强化学习变压器模拟人类偏好
abstract: Preference-based reinforcement learning (RL) provides a framework to train agents using human preferences between two behaviors. However, preference-based RL has been challenging to scale since it requires a large amount of human feedback to learn a reward function aligned with human intent. In this paper, we present Preference Transformer, a neural architecture that models human preferences using transformers. Unlike prior approaches assuming human judgment is based on the Markovian rewards which contribute to the decision equally, we introduce a new preference model based on the weighted sum of non-Markovian rewards. We then design the proposed preference model using a transformer architecture that stacks causal and bidirectional self-attention layers. We demonstrate that Preference Transformer can solve a variety of control tasks using real human preferences, while prior approaches fail to work. We also show that Preference Transformer can induce a well-specified reward and attend to critical events in the trajectory by automatically capturing the temporal dependencies in human decision-making. Code is available on the project website: https://sites.google.com/view/preference-transformer.
summary: Preference-based reinforcement learning (RL) provides a framework to train agents using human preferences between two behaviors. However, preference-based RL has been challenging to scale since it requires a large amount of human feedback to learn a reward function aligned with human intent. In this paper, we present Preference Transformer, a neural architecture that models human preferences using transformers. Unlike prior approaches assuming human judgment is based on the Markovian rewards which contribute to the decision equally, we introduce a new preference model based on the weighted sum of non-Markovian rewards. We then design the proposed preference model using a transformer architecture that stacks causal and bidirectional self-attention layers. We demonstrate that Preference Transformer can solve a variety of control tasks using real human preferences, while prior approaches fail to work. We also show that Preference Transformer can induce a well-specified reward and attend to critical events in the trajectory by automatically capturing the temporal dependencies in human decision-making. Code is available on the project website: https://sites.google.com/view/preference-transformer.
abstract_zh: 基于偏好的强化学习（RL）提供了一个框架，可以利用人类在两种行为之间的偏好来训练智能体。然而，基于偏好的强化学习一直难以扩展，因为它需要大量的人类反馈来学习与人类意图一致的奖励函数。在本文中，我们提出了 Preference Transformer，这是一种使用 Transformer 模拟人类偏好的神经架构。与假设人类判断基于对决策有同等贡献的马尔可夫奖励的先前方法不同，我们引入了一种基于非马尔可夫奖励的加权和的新偏好模型。然后，我们使用堆叠因果层和双向自注意力层的变压器架构来设计所提出的偏好模型。我们证明 Preference Transformer 可以使用真实的人类偏好来解决各种控制任务，而之前的方法则无法奏效。我们还表明，偏好转换器可以通过自动捕获人类决策中的时间依赖性来诱导明确指定的奖励并关注轨迹中的关键事件。代码可在项目网站上找到：https://sites.google.com/view/preference-transformer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Preference Transformer，利用Transformer架构建模人类偏好，以解决基于偏好的强化学习（RL）中因依赖大量人工反馈而导致的扩展性难题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于偏好的RL方法假设人类判断基于等权重的马尔可夫奖励，难以捕捉复杂决策中的时间依赖性和关键事件，导致模型扩展性差且与人类意图对齐困难。
AI.method: 设计Preference Transformer架构，通过加权非马尔可夫奖励建模人类偏好，并结合因果自注意力与双向自注意力层，自动捕捉轨迹中的时间依赖性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型能成功解决多种控制任务，利用真实人类偏好生成明确奖励函数并聚焦关键事件，而传统方法无法实现。
AI.conclusion: Preference Transformer通过Transformer架构有效建模人类偏好，解决了传统方法的扩展性问题，为基于少量人工反馈的RL提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sreelekha Guggilam,Varun Chandola,Abani Patra
title: Large Deviations for Accelerating Neural Networks Training
title_zh: 加速神经网络训练的大偏差
abstract: Artificial neural networks (ANNs) require tremendous amount of data to train on. However, in classification models, most data features are often similar which can lead to increase in training time without significant improvement in the performance. Thus, we hypothesize that there could be a more efficient way to train an ANN using a better representative sample. For this, we propose the LAD Improved Iterative Training (LIIT), a novel training approach for ANN using large deviations principle to generate and iteratively update training samples in a fast and efficient setting. This is exploratory work with extensive opportunities for future work. The thesis presents this ongoing research work with the following contributions from this study: (1) We propose a novel ANN training method, LIIT, based on the large deviations theory where additional dimensionality reduction is not needed to study high dimensional data. (2) The LIIT approach uses a Modified Training Sample (MTS) that is generated and iteratively updated using a LAD anomaly score based sampling strategy. (3) The MTS sample is designed to be well representative of the training data by including most anomalous of the observations in each class. This ensures distinct patterns and features are learnt with smaller samples. (4) We study the classification performance of the LIIT trained ANNs with traditional batch trained counterparts.
summary: Artificial neural networks (ANNs) require tremendous amount of data to train on. However, in classification models, most data features are often similar which can lead to increase in training time without significant improvement in the performance. Thus, we hypothesize that there could be a more efficient way to train an ANN using a better representative sample. For this, we propose the LAD Improved Iterative Training (LIIT), a novel training approach for ANN using large deviations principle to generate and iteratively update training samples in a fast and efficient setting. This is exploratory work with extensive opportunities for future work. The thesis presents this ongoing research work with the following contributions from this study: (1) We propose a novel ANN training method, LIIT, based on the large deviations theory where additional dimensionality reduction is not needed to study high dimensional data. (2) The LIIT approach uses a Modified Training Sample (MTS) that is generated and iteratively updated using a LAD anomaly score based sampling strategy. (3) The MTS sample is designed to be well representative of the training data by including most anomalous of the observations in each class. This ensures distinct patterns and features are learnt with smaller samples. (4) We study the classification performance of the LIIT trained ANNs with traditional batch trained counterparts.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络 (ANN) 需要大量数据进行训练。然而，在分类模型中，大多数数据特征通常是相似的，这可能导致训练时间增加，而性能却没有显着提高。因此，我们假设可能存在一种更有效的方法来使用更具代表性的样本来训练人工神经网络。为此，我们提出了 LAD 改进迭代训练（LIIT），这是一种新颖的 ANN 训练方法，使用大偏差原理在快速高效的设置中生成和迭代更新训练样本。这是一项探索性工作，为未来的工作提供了广泛的机会。本文介绍了这项正在进行的研究工作，其中包括以下贡献：（1）我们提出了一种新颖的 ANN 训练方法 LIIT，基于大偏差理论，不需要额外的降维来研究高维数据。 (2) LIIT 方法使用修改训练样本 (MTS)，该样本是使用基于 LAD 异常分数的采样策略生成和迭代更新的。 (3) MTS 样本被设计为通过包含每个类别中最异常的观察结果来很好地代表训练数据。这确保了用较小的样本学习不同的模式和特征。 (4) 我们研究了 LIIT 训练的 ANN 与传统批量训练的 ANN 的分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大偏差理论的新型神经网络训练方法LIIT，通过生成和迭代更新代表性训练样本以提高训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络训练需要大量数据且特征相似性导致训练耗时，而性能提升有限，因此需要更高效的样本选择方法。
AI.method: 提出LIIT方法，利用大偏差原理生成修改训练样本（MTS），通过LAD异常得分策略迭代更新样本，确保包含各分类中最异常的观测值以捕捉特征差异。
AI.result: 实验对比了LIIT训练的神经网络与传统批量训练模型的分类性能，验证了该方法在少量样本下仍能保持有效性的初步结果。
AI.conclusion: LIIT方法为高维数据训练提供了无需降维的新思路，但作为探索性研究，未来需进一步优化算法并扩展应用场景。

authors_text: Kunyu Peng,David Schneider,Alina Roitberg,Kailun Yang,Jiaming Zhang,Chen Deng,Kaiyu Zhang,M. Saquib Sarfraz,Rainer Stiefelhagen
title: Towards Activated Muscle Group Estimation in the Wild
title_zh: 野外估计激活肌群
comment: Accepted to ACM MM 2024. The database and code can be found at https://github.com/KPeng9510/MuscleMap
comments: Accepted to ACM MM 2024. The database and code can be found at https://github.com/KPeng9510/MuscleMap
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the new task of video-based Activated Muscle Group Estimation (AMGE) aiming at identifying active muscle regions during physical activity in the wild. To this intent, we provide the MuscleMap dataset featuring >15K video clips with 135 different activities and 20 labeled muscle groups. This dataset opens the vistas to multiple video-based applications in sports and rehabilitation medicine under flexible environment constraints. The proposed MuscleMap dataset is constructed with YouTube videos, specifically targeting High-Intensity Interval Training (HIIT) physical exercise in the wild. To make the AMGE model applicable in real-life situations, it is crucial to ensure that the model can generalize well to numerous types of physical activities not present during training and involving new combinations of activated muscles. To achieve this, our benchmark also covers an evaluation setting where the model is exposed to activity types excluded from the training set. Our experiments reveal that the generalizability of existing architectures adapted for the AMGE task remains a challenge. Therefore, we also propose a new approach, TransM3E, which employs a multi-modality feature fusion mechanism between both the video transformer model and the skeleton-based graph convolution model with novel cross-modal knowledge distillation executed on multi-classification tokens. The proposed method surpasses all popular video classification models when dealing with both, previously seen and new types of physical activities. The database and code can be found at https://github.com/KPeng9510/MuscleMap.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the new task of video-based Activated Muscle Group Estimation (AMGE) aiming at identifying active muscle regions during physical activity in the wild. To this intent, we provide the MuscleMap dataset featuring >15K video clips with 135 different activities and 20 labeled muscle groups. This dataset opens the vistas to multiple video-based applications in sports and rehabilitation medicine under flexible environment constraints. The proposed MuscleMap dataset is constructed with YouTube videos, specifically targeting High-Intensity Interval Training (HIIT) physical exercise in the wild. To make the AMGE model applicable in real-life situations, it is crucial to ensure that the model can generalize well to numerous types of physical activities not present during training and involving new combinations of activated muscles. To achieve this, our benchmark also covers an evaluation setting where the model is exposed to activity types excluded from the training set. Our experiments reveal that the generalizability of existing architectures adapted for the AMGE task remains a challenge. Therefore, we also propose a new approach, TransM3E, which employs a multi-modality feature fusion mechanism between both the video transformer model and the skeleton-based graph convolution model with novel cross-modal knowledge distillation executed on multi-classification tokens. The proposed method surpasses all popular video classification models when dealing with both, previously seen and new types of physical activities. The database and code can be found at https://github.com/KPeng9510/MuscleMap.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了基于视频的激活肌肉群估计（AMGE）的新任务，旨在识别野外身体活动期间的活跃肌肉区域。为此，我们提供了 MuscleMap 数据集，其中包含超过 15K 的视频剪辑，其中包含 135 种不同的活动和 20 个标记的肌肉群。该数据集为灵活的环境限制下运动和康复医学中的多种基于视频的应用打开了前景。拟议的 MuscleMap 数据集是用 YouTube 视频构建的，专门针对野外高强度间歇训练 (HIIT) 体育锻炼。为了使 AMGE 模型适用于现实生活中，至关重要的是确保该模型能够很好地推广到训练期间不存在的多种类型的身体活动以及涉及激活肌肉的新组合。为了实现这一目标，我们的基准还涵盖了一个评估设置，其中模型暴露于训练集中排除的活动类型。我们的实验表明，适用于 AMGE 任务的现有架构的通用性仍然是一个挑战。因此，我们还提出了一种新方法 TransM3E，它在视频转换器模型和基于骨架的图卷积模型之间采用多模态特征融合机制，并在多分类标记上执行新颖的跨模态知识蒸馏。在处理以前见过的和新类型的身体活动时，所提出的方法超越了所有流行的视频分类模型。数据库和代码可以在 https://github.com/KPeng9510/MuscleMap 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视频的激活肌肉群估计（AMGE）方法，通过构建MuscleMap数据集和TransM3E模型，解决真实环境中体力活动肌肉激活区域识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在未见过的活动类型和肌肉组合场景下泛化能力不足，需开发适应复杂真实环境的AMGE方法以支持运动和康复医学应用。
AI.method: 构建包含135种活动的MuscleMap数据集，提出TransM3E方法，融合视频Transformer与骨架图卷积模型，通过跨模态知识蒸馏实现多模态特征融合。
AI.result: TransM3E在已见和新活动类型上均优于主流视频分类模型，验证了方法在真实环境中的泛化有效性。
AI.conclusion: MuscleMap数据集和TransM3E方法为视频驱动的肌肉激活分析提供了新基准，推动了运动科学与医疗康复领域的应用发展。

search_text: Towards Activated Muscle Group Estimation in the Wild 野外估计激活肌群 In this paper, we tackle the new task of video-based Activated Muscle Group Estimation (AMGE) aiming at identifying active muscle regions during physical activity in the wild. To this intent, we provide the MuscleMap dataset featuring >15K video clips with 135 different activities and 20 labeled muscle groups. This dataset opens the vistas to multiple video-based applications in sports and rehabilitation medicine under flexible environment constraints. The proposed MuscleMap dataset is constructed with YouTube videos, specifically targeting High-Intensity Interval Training (HIIT) physical exercise in the wild. To make the AMGE model applicable in real-life situations, it is crucial to ensure that the model can generalize well to numerous types of physical activities not present during training and involving new combinations of activated muscles. To achieve this, our benchmark also covers an evaluation setting where the model is exposed to activity types excluded from the training set. Our experiments reveal that the generalizability of existing architectures adapted for the AMGE task remains a challenge. Therefore, we also propose a new approach, TransM3E, which employs a multi-modality feature fusion mechanism between both the video transformer model and the skeleton-based graph convolution model with novel cross-modal knowledge distillation executed on multi-classification tokens. The proposed method surpasses all popular video classification models when dealing with both, previously seen and new types of physical activities. The database and code can be found at https://github.com/KPeng9510/MuscleMap. 在本文中，我们解决了基于视频的激活肌肉群估计（AMGE）的新任务，旨在识别野外身体活动期间的活跃肌肉区域。为此，我们提供了 MuscleMap 数据集，其中包含超过 15K 的视频剪辑，其中包含 135 种不同的活动和 20 个标记的肌肉群。该数据集为灵活的环境限制下运动和康复医学中的多种基于视频的应用打开了前景。拟议的 MuscleMap 数据集是用 YouTube 视频构建的，专门针对野外高强度间歇训练 (HIIT) 体育锻炼。为了使 AMGE 模型适用于现实生活中，至关重要的是确保该模型能够很好地推广到训练期间不存在的多种类型的身体活动以及涉及激活肌肉的新组合。为了实现这一目标，我们的基准还涵盖了一个评估设置，其中模型暴露于训练集中排除的活动类型。我们的实验表明，适用于 AMGE 任务的现有架构的通用性仍然是一个挑战。因此，我们还提出了一种新方法 TransM3E，它在视频转换器模型和基于骨架的图卷积模型之间采用多模态特征融合机制，并在多分类标记上执行新颖的跨模态知识蒸馏。在处理以前见过的和新类型的身体活动时，所提出的方法超越了所有流行的视频分类模型。数据库和代码可以在 https://github.com/KPeng9510/MuscleMap 找到。 本文提出一种基于视频的激活肌肉群估计（AMGE）方法，通过构建MuscleMap数据集和TransM3E模型，解决真实环境中体力活动肌肉激活区域识别问题。 Kunyu Peng,David Schneider,Alina Roitberg,Kailun Yang,Jiaming Zhang,Chen Deng,Kaiyu Zhang,M. authors_text: Sarvesh Mayilvahanan,Akshay Sarvesh,Swaminathan Gopalswamy
title: Reshaping Viscoelastic-String Path-Planner (RVP)
title_zh: 重塑粘弹性弦路径规划器 (RVP)
abstract: We present Reshaping Viscoelastic-String Path-Planner a Path Planner that reshapes a desired Global Plan for a Robotic Vehicle based on sensor observations of the Environment. We model the path to be a viscoelastic string with shape preserving tendencies, approximated by a connected series of Springs, Masses, and Dampers. The resultant path is then reshaped according to the forces emanating from the obstacles until an equilibrium is reached. The reshaped path remains close in shape to the original path because of Anchor Points that connect to the discrete masses through springs. The final path is the resultant equilibrium configuration of the Spring-Mass-Damper network. Two key concepts enable RVP (i) Virtual Obstacle Forces that push the Spring-Mass-Damper system away from the original path and (ii) Anchor points in conjunction with the Spring-Mass-Damper network that attempts to retain the path shape. We demonstrate the results in simulation and compare it's performance with an existing Reshaping Local Planner that also takes a Global Plan and reshapes it according to sensor based observations of the environment.
summary: We present Reshaping Viscoelastic-String Path-Planner a Path Planner that reshapes a desired Global Plan for a Robotic Vehicle based on sensor observations of the Environment. We model the path to be a viscoelastic string with shape preserving tendencies, approximated by a connected series of Springs, Masses, and Dampers. The resultant path is then reshaped according to the forces emanating from the obstacles until an equilibrium is reached. The reshaped path remains close in shape to the original path because of Anchor Points that connect to the discrete masses through springs. The final path is the resultant equilibrium configuration of the Spring-Mass-Damper network. Two key concepts enable RVP (i) Virtual Obstacle Forces that push the Spring-Mass-Damper system away from the original path and (ii) Anchor points in conjunction with the Spring-Mass-Damper network that attempts to retain the path shape. We demonstrate the results in simulation and compare it's performance with an existing Reshaping Local Planner that also takes a Global Plan and reshapes it according to sensor based observations of the environment.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了重塑粘弹性弦路径规划器（Reshaping Viscoelastic-String Path-Planner），它是一种路径规划器，可根据传感器对环境的观测来重塑机器人车辆所需的全局规划。我们将路径建模为具有形状保持倾向的粘弹性弦，由一系列连接的弹簧、质量和阻尼器近似。然后根据障碍物发出的力重新调整所得路径的形状，直到达到平衡。由于锚点通过弹簧连接到离散质量，因此重新成形的路径在形状上仍接近原始路径。最终路径是弹簧-质量-阻尼器网络的最终平衡配置。 RVP 有两个关键概念：(i) 虚拟障碍力，将弹簧-质量-阻尼器系统推离原始路径；(ii) 锚点与弹簧-质量-阻尼器网络结合，尝试保持路径形状。我们在模拟中展示了结果，并将其性能与现有的重塑局部规划器进行比较，该规划器也采用全局规划并根据基于传感器的环境观察对其进行重塑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于粘弹性弦模型的路径规划器RVP，通过传感器观测数据动态调整机器人全局路径，平衡路径形状保持与障碍物避让。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法在动态环境中难以兼顾路径形状保持与实时避障需求，需开发能自适应环境变化且保持路径连续性的新方法。
AI.method: 将路径建模为由弹簧、质量块和阻尼器组成的粘弹性弦网络，通过虚拟障碍物力场驱动系统达到平衡状态，结合锚点约束保持原始路径形状。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了RVP在动态障碍物场景下优于现有重规划方法，能生成更平滑且符合原始路径形态的可行路径。
AI.conclusion: RVP通过物理模拟机制有效实现了路径形状保持与动态避障的平衡，为复杂环境下的机器人导航提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yang Li,Yuichi Tanaka
title: Attention-based Graph Convolution Fusing Latent Structures and Multiple Features for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于注意力的图卷积融合了图神经网络的潜在结构和多种特征
abstract: We present an attention-based spatial graph convolution (AGC) for graph neural networks (GNNs). Existing AGCs focus on only using node-wise features and utilizing one type of attention function when calculating attention weights. Instead, we propose two methods to improve the representational power of AGCs by utilizing 1) structural information in a high-dimensional space and 2) multiple attention functions when calculating their weights. The first method computes a local structure representation of a graph in a high-dimensional space. The second method utilizes multiple attention functions simultaneously in one AGC. Both approaches can be combined. We also propose a GNN for the classification of point clouds and that for the prediction of point labels in a point cloud based on the proposed AGC. According to experiments, the proposed GNNs perform better than existing methods. Our codes open at https://github.com/liyang-tuat/SFAGC.
summary: We present an attention-based spatial graph convolution (AGC) for graph neural networks (GNNs). Existing AGCs focus on only using node-wise features and utilizing one type of attention function when calculating attention weights. Instead, we propose two methods to improve the representational power of AGCs by utilizing 1) structural information in a high-dimensional space and 2) multiple attention functions when calculating their weights. The first method computes a local structure representation of a graph in a high-dimensional space. The second method utilizes multiple attention functions simultaneously in one AGC. Both approaches can be combined. We also propose a GNN for the classification of point clouds and that for the prediction of point labels in a point cloud based on the proposed AGC. According to experiments, the proposed GNNs perform better than existing methods. Our codes open at https://github.com/liyang-tuat/SFAGC.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于图神经网络（GNN）的基于注意力的空间图卷积（AGC）。现有的 AGC 只专注于使用节点特征，并在计算注意力权重时利用一种类型的注意力函数。相反，我们提出了两种方法来提高 AGC 的表示能力，即在计算权重时利用 1）高维空间中的结构信息和 2）多个注意函数。第一种方法计算高维空间中图的局部结构表示。第二种方法在一个 AGC 中同时利用多个注意力功能。两种方法可以结合起来。我们还提出了一种用于点云分类的 GNN，以及基于所提出的 AGC 的点云中点标签的预测。根据实验，所提出的 GNN 比现有方法表现更好。我们的代码在 https://github.com/liyang-tuat/SFAGC 开放。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的注意力图卷积方法，通过融合高维结构信息和多种注意力机制增强图神经网络的表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力图卷积方法仅依赖节点特征和单一注意力函数，难以充分捕捉图结构的复杂性与多样性。
AI.method: 设计两种改进方案：1）构建高维空间的局部结构表示；2）在单个AGC中同时使用多种注意力函数。结合两种方法并开发点云分类与标签预测的GNN模型。
AI.result: 实验验证所提GNN在点云任务中优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 融合结构信息与多注意力机制的AGC有效提升了图神经网络的性能，为点云分析提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的注意力图卷积方法，通过融合高维结构信息和多种注意力机制增强图神经网络的表示能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有注意力图卷积方法仅依赖节点特征和单一注意力函数，难以充分捕捉图结构的复杂性与多样性。
ai_content.method: 设计两种改进方案：1）构建高维空间的局部结构表示；2）在单个AGC中同时使用多种注意力函数。结合两种方法并开发点云分类与标签预测的GNN模型。
ai_content.result: 实验验证所提GNN在点云任务中优于现有方法，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 融合结构信息与多注意力机制的AGC有效提升了图神经网络的性能，为点云分析提供新思路。

search_text: Attention-based Graph Convolution Fusing Latent Structures and Multiple Features for Graph Neural Networks 基于注意力的图卷积融合了图神经网络的潜在结构和多种特征 We present an attention-based spatial graph convolution (AGC) for graph neural networks (GNNs). Existing AGCs focus on only using node-wise features and utilizing one type of attention function when calculating attention weights. Instead, we propose two methods to improve the representational power of AGCs by utilizing 1) structural information in a high-dimensional space and 2) multiple attention functions when calculating their weights. The first method computes a local structure representation of a graph in a high-dimensional space. The second method utilizes multiple attention functions simultaneously in one AGC. Both approaches can be combined. We also propose a GNN for the classification of point clouds and that for the prediction of point labels in a point cloud based on the proposed AGC. According to experiments, the proposed GNNs perform better than existing methods. Our codes open at https://github.com/liyang-tuat/SFAGC. 我们提出了一种用于图神经网络（GNN）的基于注意力的空间图卷积（AGC）。现有的 AGC 只专注于使用节点特征，并在计算注意力权重时利用一种类型的注意力函数。相反，我们提出了两种方法来提高 AGC 的表示能力，即在计算权重时利用 1）高维空间中的结构信息和 2）多个注意函数。第一种方法计算高维空间中图的局部结构表示。第二种方法在一个 AGC 中同时利用多个注意力功能。两种方法可以结合起来。我们还提出了一种用于点云分类的 GNN，以及基于所提出的 AGC 的点云中点标签的预测。根据实验，所提出的 GNN 比现有方法表现更好。我们的代码在 https://github.com/liyang-tuat/SFAGC 开放。 本文提出一种改进的注意力图卷积方法，通过融合高维结构信息和多种注意力机制增强图神经网络的表示能力。 Yang Li,Yuichi Tanaka cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Azam Asilian Bidgoli,Shahryar Rahnamayan,Taher Dehkharghanian,Abtin Riasatian,H. R. Tizhoosh
title: Evolutionary Computation in Action: Feature Selection for Deep Embedding Spaces of Gigapixel Pathology Images
title_zh: 进化计算实际应用：十亿像素病理图像深度嵌入空间的特征选择
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation, vol. 27, no. 1, pp. 52-66, Feb. 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation, vol. 27, no. 1, pp. 52-66, Feb. 2023
abstract: One of the main obstacles of adopting digital pathology is the challenge of efficient processing of hyperdimensional digitized biopsy samples, called whole slide images (WSIs). Exploiting deep learning and introducing compact WSI representations are urgently needed to accelerate image analysis and facilitate the visualization and interpretability of pathology results in a postpandemic world. In this paper, we introduce a new evolutionary approach for WSI representation based on large-scale multi-objective optimization (LSMOP) of deep embeddings. We start with patch-based sampling to feed KimiaNet , a histopathology-specialized deep network, and to extract a multitude of feature vectors. Coarse multi-objective feature selection uses the reduced search space strategy guided by the classification accuracy and the number of features. In the second stage, the frequent features histogram (FFH), a novel WSI representation, is constructed by multiple runs of coarse LSMOP. Fine evolutionary feature selection is then applied to find a compact (short-length) feature vector based on the FFH and contributes to a more robust deep-learning approach to digital pathology supported by the stochastic power of evolutionary algorithms. We validate the proposed schemes using The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) images in terms of WSI representation, classification accuracy, and feature quality. Furthermore, a novel decision space for multicriteria decision making in the LSMOP field is introduced. Finally, a patch-level visualization approach is proposed to increase the interpretability of deep features. The proposed evolutionary algorithm finds a very compact feature vector to represent a WSI (almost 14,000 times smaller than the original feature vectors) with 8% higher accuracy compared to the codes provided by the state-of-the-art methods.

In the second stage, the frequent features histogram (FFH), a novel WSI representation, is constructed by multiple runs of coarse LSMOP. Fine evolutionary feature selection is then applied to find a compact (short-length) feature vector based on the FFH and contributes to a more robust deep-learning approach to digital pathology supported by the stochastic power of evolutionary algorithms. We validate the proposed schemes using The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) images in terms of WSI representation, classification accuracy, and feature quality. Furthermore, a novel decision space for multicriteria decision making in the LSMOP field is introduced. Finally, a patch-level visualization approach is proposed to increase the interpretability of deep features. The proposed evolutionary algorithm finds a very compact feature vector to represent a WSI (almost 14,000 times smaller than the original feature vectors) with 8% higher accuracy compared to the codes provided by the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 采用数字病理学的主要障碍之一是高效处理超维数字化活检样本（称为全切片图像（WSI））的挑战。迫切需要利用深度学习并引入紧凑的 WSI 表示来加速图像分析并促进大流行后世界病理结果的可视化和可解释性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于深度嵌入的大规模多目标优化（LSMOP）的 WSI 表示的新进化方法。我们从基于补丁的采样开始，为 KimiaNet（一个组织病理学专用深度网络）提供数据，并提取大量特征向量。粗略的多目标特征选择使用以分类精度和特征数量为指导的减少搜索空间策略。在第二阶段，频繁特征直方图（FFH）是一种新颖的 WSI 表示，通过多次粗略 LSMOP 运行构建。然后应用精细进化特征选择来寻找基于 FFH 的紧凑（短长度）特征向量，并有助于在进化算法的随机能力的支持下，为数字病理学提供更稳健的深度学习方法。我们使用癌症基因组图谱 (TCGA) 图像在 WSI 表示、分类准确性和特征质量方面验证了所提出的方案。此外，还引入了 LSMOP 领域中用于多标准决策的新颖决策空间。最后，提出了一种补丁级可视化方法来增加深层特征的可解释性。所提出的进化算法找到了一个非常紧凑的特征向量来表示 WSI（几乎比原始特征向量小 14,000 倍），与最先进的方法提供的代码相比，精度提高了 8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化计算的特征选择方法，用于生成更紧凑的全切片病理图像（WSI）深度嵌入表示，以提高分类准确率和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 数字病理学面临处理高维全切片图像（WSI）的效率挑战，现有方法难以兼顾特征表示的紧凑性与分类性能，需引入高效优化策略。
AI.method: 分两阶段进行多目标优化：1）通过粗粒度特征选择（基于分类精度和特征数量）构建频繁特征直方图（FFH）；2）利用进化算法从FFH中提取紧凑特征向量，结合KimiaNet网络提取病理特征。
AI.result: 在TCGA数据集上实现WSI表示压缩14000倍，分类准确率较现有方法提升8%，并提出多准则决策空间与图像级可视化方法增强可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了进化算法在病理图像特征选择中的有效性，为数字病理学提供了高效、可解释的深度学习解决方案。

authors_text: Bo Zhou,Yingda Xia,Jiawen Yao,Le Lu,Jingren Zhou,Chi Liu,James S. Duncan,Ling Zhang
title: Meta-information-aware Dual-path Transformer for Differential Diagnosis of Multi-type Pancreatic Lesions in Multi-phase CT
title_zh: 元信息感知双路变压器在多时相CT中鉴别诊断多型胰腺病变
comment: Accepted at Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
comments: Accepted at Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
abstract: Pancreatic cancer is one of the leading causes of cancer-related death. Accurate detection, segmentation, and differential diagnosis of the full taxonomy of pancreatic lesions, i.e., normal, seven major types of lesions, and other lesions, is critical to aid the clinical decision-making of patient management and treatment. However, existing works focus on segmentation and classification for very specific lesion types (PDAC) or groups. Moreover, none of the previous work considers using lesion prevalence-related non-imaging patient information to assist the differential diagnosis. To this end, we develop a meta-information-aware dual-path transformer and exploit the feasibility of classification and segmentation of the full taxonomy of pancreatic lesions. Specifically, the proposed method consists of a CNN-based segmentation path (S-path) and a transformer-based classification path (C-path). The S-path focuses on initial feature extraction by semantic segmentation using a UNet-based network. The C-path utilizes both the extracted features and meta-information for patient-level classification based on stacks of dual-path transformer blocks that enhance the modeling of global contextual information. A large-scale multi-phase CT dataset of 3,096 patients with pathology-confirmed pancreatic lesion class labels, voxel-wise manual annotations of lesions from radiologists, and patient meta-information, was collected for training and evaluations. Our results show that our method can enable accurate classification and segmentation of the full taxonomy of pancreatic lesions, approaching the accuracy of the radiologist's report and significantly outperforming previous baselines. Results also show that adding the common meta-information, i.e., gender and age, can boost the model's performance, thus demonstrating the importance of meta-information for aiding pancreatic disease diagnosis.
summary: Pancreatic cancer is one of the leading causes of cancer-related death. Accurate detection, segmentation, and differential diagnosis of the full taxonomy of pancreatic lesions, i.e., normal, seven major types of lesions, and other lesions, is critical to aid the clinical decision-making of patient management and treatment. However, existing works focus on segmentation and classification for very specific lesion types (PDAC) or groups. Moreover, none of the previous work considers using lesion prevalence-related non-imaging patient information to assist the differential diagnosis. To this end, we develop a meta-information-aware dual-path transformer and exploit the feasibility of classification and segmentation of the full taxonomy of pancreatic lesions. Specifically, the proposed method consists of a CNN-based segmentation path (S-path) and a transformer-based classification path (C-path). The S-path focuses on initial feature extraction by semantic segmentation using a UNet-based network. The C-path utilizes both the extracted features and meta-information for patient-level classification based on stacks of dual-path transformer blocks that enhance the modeling of global contextual information. A large-scale multi-phase CT dataset of 3,096 patients with pathology-confirmed pancreatic lesion class labels, voxel-wise manual annotations of lesions from radiologists, and patient meta-information, was collected for training and evaluations. Our results show that our method can enable accurate classification and segmentation of the full taxonomy of pancreatic lesions, approaching the accuracy of the radiologist's report and significantly outperforming previous baselines. Results also show that adding the common meta-information, i.e., gender and age, can boost the model's performance, thus demonstrating the importance of meta-information for aiding pancreatic disease diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 胰腺癌是癌症相关死亡的主要原因之一。胰腺病变的完整分类（即正常病变、七大类型病变和其他病变）的准确检测、分割和鉴别诊断对于辅助患者管理和治疗的临床决策至关重要。然而，现有的工作侧重于非常特定的病变类型 (PDAC) 或组的分割和分类。此外，之前的工作都没有考虑使用病变患病率相关的非影像学患者信息来辅助鉴别诊断。为此，我们开发了一种元信息感知的双路径变压器，并利用胰腺病变完整分类的分类和分割的可行性。具体来说，所提出的方法由基于 CNN 的分割路径（S 路径）和基于转换器的分类路径（C 路径）组成。 S 路径侧重于使用基于 UNet 的网络通过语义分割进行初始特征提取。 C 路径利用提取的特征和元信息进行基于双路径变压器块堆栈的患者级分类，增强全局上下文信息的建模。收集了 3,096 名患者的大规模多相 CT 数据集，其中包含病理学确认的胰腺病变类别标签、放射科医生对病变的体素手动注释以及患者元信息，用于训练和评估。我们的结果表明，我们的方法可以对胰腺病变的完整分类进行准确的分类和分割，接近放射科医生报告的准确性，并显着优于以前的基线。结果还表明，添加常见的元信息，即性别和年龄，可以提高模型的性能，从而证明元信息对于辅助胰腺疾病诊断的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合元信息的双路径Transformer模型，用于多期CT下胰腺多类型病变的分割与鉴别诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有研究局限于特定病变类型的分割与分类，且未利用性别、年龄等非影像元信息，难以实现全面的胰腺病变诊断。
AI.method: 设计包含CNN分割路径（UNet）和Transformer分类路径的双路径网络，通过元信息增强全局上下文建模，利用大规模多期CT数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 方法在分类与分割任务上达到放射科医生水平，显著优于基线模型；加入性别、年龄等元信息可提升诊断性能。
AI.conclusion: 元信息辅助的双路径Transformer有效提升了胰腺病变的多任务诊断能力，为临床决策提供支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合元信息的双路径Transformer模型，用于多期CT下胰腺多类型病变的分割与鉴别诊断。

search_text: Meta-information-aware Dual-path Transformer for Differential Diagnosis of Multi-type Pancreatic Lesions in Multi-phase CT 元信息感知双路变压器在多时相CT中鉴别诊断多型胰腺病变 Pancreatic cancer is one of the leading causes of cancer-related death. Accurate detection, segmentation, and differential diagnosis of the full taxonomy of pancreatic lesions, i.e., normal, seven major types of lesions, and other lesions, is critical to aid the clinical decision-making of patient management and treatment. However, existing works focus on segmentation and classification for very specific lesion types (PDAC) or groups. Moreover, none of the previous work considers using lesion prevalence-related non-imaging patient information to assist the differential diagnosis. To this end, we develop a meta-information-aware dual-path transformer and exploit the feasibility of classification and segmentation of the full taxonomy of pancreatic lesions. Specifically, the proposed method consists of a CNN-based segmentation path (S-path) and a transformer-based classification path (C-path). The S-path focuses on initial feature extraction by semantic segmentation using a UNet-based network. The C-path utilizes both the extracted features and meta-information for patient-level classification based on stacks of dual-path transformer blocks that enhance the modeling of global contextual information. A large-scale multi-phase CT dataset of 3,096 patients with pathology-confirmed pancreatic lesion class labels, voxel-wise manual annotations of lesions from radiologists, and patient meta-information, was collected for training and evaluations. Our results show that our method can enable accurate classification and segmentation of the full taxonomy of pancreatic lesions, approaching the accuracy of the radiologist's report and significantly outperforming previous baselines. Results also show that adding the common meta-information, i.e., gender and age, can boost the model's performance, thus demonstrating the importance of meta-information for aiding pancreatic disease diagnosis. 胰腺癌是癌症相关死亡的主要原因之一。胰腺病变的完整分类（即正常病变、七大类型病变和其他病变）的准确检测、分割和鉴别诊断对于辅助患者管理和治疗的临床决策至关重要。然而，现有的工作侧重于非常特定的病变类型 (PDAC) 或组的分割和分类。此外，之前的工作都没有考虑使用病变患病率相关的非影像学患者信息来辅助鉴别诊断。为此，我们开发了一种元信息感知的双路径变压器，并利用胰腺病变完整分类的分类和分割的可行性。具体来说，所提出的方法由基于 CNN 的分割路径（S 路径）和基于转换器的分类路径（C 路径）组成。 S 路径侧重于使用基于 UNet 的网络通过语义分割进行初始特征提取。 C 路径利用提取的特征和元信息进行基于双路径变压器块堆栈的患者级分类，增强全局上下文信息的建模。收集了 3,096 名患者的大规模多相 CT 数据集，其中包含病理学确认的胰腺病变类别标签、放射科医生对病变的体素手动注释以及患者元信息，用于训练和评估。我们的结果表明，我们的方法可以对胰腺病变的完整分类进行准确的分类和分割，接近放射科医生报告的准确性，并显着优于以前的基线。结果还表明，添加常见的元信息，即性别和年龄，可以提高模型的性能，从而证明元信息对于辅助胰腺疾病诊断的重要性。 本文提出一种结合元信息的双路径Transformer模型，用于多期CT下胰腺多类型病变的分割与鉴别诊断。 Bo Zhou,Yingda Xia,Jiawen Yao,Le Lu,Jingren Zhou,Chi Liu,James S. Duncan,Ling Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaoyong Lu,Yaping Yan,Bin Kang,Songlin Du
title: ParaFormer: Parallel Attention Transformer for Efficient Feature Matching
title_zh: ParaFormer：用于高效特征匹配的并行注意力变压器
abstract: Heavy computation is a bottleneck limiting deep-learningbased feature matching algorithms to be applied in many realtime applications. However, existing lightweight networks optimized for Euclidean data cannot address classical feature matching tasks, since sparse keypoint based descriptors are expected to be matched. This paper tackles this problem and proposes two concepts: 1) a novel parallel attention model entitled ParaFormer and 2) a graph based U-Net architecture with attentional pooling. First, ParaFormer fuses features and keypoint positions through the concept of amplitude and phase, and integrates self- and cross-attention in a parallel manner which achieves a win-win performance in terms of accuracy and efficiency. Second, with U-Net architecture and proposed attentional pooling, the ParaFormer-U variant significantly reduces computational complexity, and minimize performance loss caused by downsampling. Sufficient experiments on various applications, including homography estimation, pose estimation, and image matching, demonstrate that ParaFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining high efficiency. The efficient ParaFormer-U variant achieves comparable performance with less than 50% FLOPs of the existing attention-based models.
summary: Heavy computation is a bottleneck limiting deep-learningbased feature matching algorithms to be applied in many realtime applications. However, existing lightweight networks optimized for Euclidean data cannot address classical feature matching tasks, since sparse keypoint based descriptors are expected to be matched. This paper tackles this problem and proposes two concepts: 1) a novel parallel attention model entitled ParaFormer and 2) a graph based U-Net architecture with attentional pooling. First, ParaFormer fuses features and keypoint positions through the concept of amplitude and phase, and integrates self- and cross-attention in a parallel manner which achieves a win-win performance in terms of accuracy and efficiency. Second, with U-Net architecture and proposed attentional pooling, the ParaFormer-U variant significantly reduces computational complexity, and minimize performance loss caused by downsampling. Sufficient experiments on various applications, including homography estimation, pose estimation, and image matching, demonstrate that ParaFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining high efficiency. The efficient ParaFormer-U variant achieves comparable performance with less than 50% FLOPs of the existing attention-based models.
abstract_zh: 繁重的计算是限制基于深度学习的特征匹配算法在许多实时应用中应用的瓶颈。然而，针对欧几里德数据优化的现有轻量级网络无法解决经典的特征匹配任务，因为预计将匹配基于稀疏关键点的描述符。本文解决了这个问题，并提出了两个概念：1）一种名为 ParaFormer 的新型并行注意力模型；2）一种基于图的具有注意力池的 U-Net 架构。首先，ParaFormer通过幅度和相位的概念融合特征和关键点位置，以并行的方式整合自注意力和交叉注意力，实现了准确性和效率的双赢。其次，借助 U-Net 架构和提出的注意力池，ParaFormer-U 变体显着降低了计算复杂性，并最大限度地减少了下采样造成的性能损失。对各种应用（包括单应性估计、姿态估计和图像匹配）的充分实验表明，ParaFormer 在保持高效率的同时实现了最先进的性能。高效的 ParaFormer-U 变体以低于现有基于注意力的模型 50% 的失败率实现了可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ParaFormer和ParaFormer-U架构，解决深度学习特征匹配算法在实时应用中的计算瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有轻量网络无法处理基于稀疏关键点的特征匹配任务，需在保持精度的同时提升计算效率。
AI.method: 设计并行注意力模型ParaFormer（融合幅值相位信息）和带注意力池化的U-Net结构（ParaFormer-U），通过并行自/跨注意力机制与图结构优化计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在单应性估计、姿态估计等任务中达到SOTA性能，ParaFormer-U在低于50% FLOPs情况下保持性能损失最小。
AI.conclusion: ParaFormer通过并行注意力机制与网络结构创新，在精度与效率间取得平衡，适用于实时特征匹配场景。

authors_text: Maryam Jameela,Gunho Sohn
title: Spatial Layout Consistency for 3D Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 3D 语义分割的空间布局一致性
comment: 12th IAPR International Workshop on Pattern Recognition in Remote Sensing, ICPR 2022
comments: 12th IAPR International Workshop on Pattern Recognition in Remote Sensing, ICPR 2022
abstract: Due to the aged nature of much of the utility network infrastructure, developing a robust and trustworthy computer vision system capable of inspecting it with minimal human intervention has attracted considerable research attention. The airborne laser terrain mapping (ALTM) system quickly becomes the central data collection system among the numerous available sensors. Its ability to penetrate foliage with high-powered energy provides wide coverage and achieves survey-grade ranging accuracy. However, the post-data acquisition process for classifying the ALTM's dense and irregular point clouds is a critical bottleneck that must be addressed to improve efficiency and accuracy. We introduce a novel deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) technique for achieving voxel-based semantic segmentation of the ALTM's point clouds. The suggested deep learning method, Semantic Utility Network (SUNet) is a multi-dimensional and multi-resolution network. SUNet combines two networks: one classifies point clouds at multi-resolution with object categories in three dimensions and another predicts two-dimensional regional labels distinguishing corridor regions from non-corridors. A significant innovation of the SUNet is that it imposes spatial layout consistency on the outcomes of voxel-based and regional segmentation results. The proposed multi-dimensional DCNN combines hierarchical context for spatial layout embedding with a coarse-to-fine strategy. We conducted a comprehensive ablation study to test SUNet's performance using 67 km x 67 km of utility corridor data at a density of 5pp/m2. Our experiments demonstrated that SUNet's spatial layout consistency and a multi-resolution feature aggregation could significantly improve performance, outperforming the SOTA baseline network and achieving a good F1 score for pylon 89%, ground 99%, vegetation 99% and powerline 98% classes.
summary: Due to the aged nature of much of the utility network infrastructure, developing a robust and trustworthy computer vision system capable of inspecting it with minimal human intervention has attracted considerable research attention. The airborne laser terrain mapping (ALTM) system quickly becomes the central data collection system among the numerous available sensors. Its ability to penetrate foliage with high-powered energy provides wide coverage and achieves survey-grade ranging accuracy. However, the post-data acquisition process for classifying the ALTM's dense and irregular point clouds is a critical bottleneck that must be addressed to improve efficiency and accuracy. We introduce a novel deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) technique for achieving voxel-based semantic segmentation of the ALTM's point clouds. The suggested deep learning method, Semantic Utility Network (SUNet) is a multi-dimensional and multi-resolution network. SUNet combines two networks: one classifies point clouds at multi-resolution with object categories in three dimensions and another predicts two-dimensional regional labels distinguishing corridor regions from non-corridors. A significant innovation of the SUNet is that it imposes spatial layout consistency on the outcomes of voxel-based and regional segmentation results. The proposed multi-dimensional DCNN combines hierarchical context for spatial layout embedding with a coarse-to-fine strategy. We conducted a comprehensive ablation study to test SUNet's performance using 67 km x 67 km of utility corridor data at a density of 5pp/m2. Our experiments demonstrated that SUNet's spatial layout consistency and a multi-resolution feature aggregation could significantly improve performance, outperforming the SOTA baseline network and achieving a good F1 score for pylon 89%, ground 99%, vegetation 99% and powerline 98% classes.
abstract_zh: 由于大部分公用事业网络基础设施老化，开发一种强大且值得信赖的计算机视觉系统，能够以最少的人工干预对其进行检查，引起了相当多的研究关注。机载激光地形测绘 (ALTM) 系统迅速成为众多可用传感器中的中央数据收集系统。它能够利用高能能量穿透树叶，提供广泛的覆盖范围并实现测量级测距精度。然而，用于对 ALTM 密集且不规则点云进行分类的数据采集后过程是一个关键瓶颈，必须解决才能提高效率和准确性。我们引入了一种新颖的深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 技术，用于实现 ALTM 点云的基于体素的语义分割。建议的深度学习方法语义效用网络（SUNet）是一种多维、多分辨率网络。 SUNet 结合了两个网络：一个网络以多分辨率对点云进行分类，并在三维空间中对对象类别进行分类，另一个网络则预测区分走廊区域和非走廊区域的二维区域标签。 SUNet 的一个重大创新是它对基于体素和区域分割结果的结果强加了空间布局一致性。所提出的多维 DCNN 将空间布局嵌入的分层上下文与从粗到细的策略相结合。我们进行了一项全面的消融研究，使用密度为 5pp/m2 的 67 km x 67 km 公用设施走廊数据来测试 SUNet 的性能。我们的实验表明，SUNet 的空间布局一致性和多分辨率特征聚合可以显着提高性能，优于 SOTA 基线网络，并在塔架 89%、地面 99%、植被 99% 和电力线 98% 类别上获得良好的 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间布局一致性的三维语义分割方法SUNet，用于提高机载激光地形测绘点云数据的分类效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于基础设施老化需要自动化检测系统，但现有ALTM点云数据的分类效率低且准确率不足，亟需改进分割方法。
AI.method: 设计多维多分辨率网络SUNet，结合体素级分割与二维区域标签预测，通过空间布局一致性约束提升结果，采用分层上下文嵌入与粗到细策略。
AI.result: 在67km²数据集上，SUNet对杆塔、地面、植被和电线类别的F1分数分别达到89%、99%、99%和98%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SUNet通过空间布局一致性约束和多分辨率特征聚合显著提升分割性能，为电力设施检测提供有效解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 在67km²数据集上，SUNet对杆塔、地面、植被和电线类别的F1分数分别达到89%、99%、99%和98%，优于现有方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: SUNet通过空间布局一致性约束和多分辨率特征聚合显著提升分割性能，为电力设施检测提供有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间布局一致性的三维语义分割方法SUNet，用于提高机载激光地形测绘点云数据的分类效率和准确性。
motivation: 由于基础设施老化需要自动化检测系统，但现有ALTM点云数据的分类效率低且准确率不足，亟需改进分割方法。
method: 设计多维多分辨率网络SUNet，结合体素级分割与二维区域标签预测，通过空间布局一致性约束提升结果，采用分层上下文嵌入与粗到细策略。
result: 在67km²数据集上，SUNet对杆塔、地面、植被和电线类别的F1分数分别达到89%、99%、99%和98%，优于现有方法。
conclusion: SUNet通过空间布局一致性约束和多分辨率特征聚合显著提升分割性能，为电力设施检测提供有效解决方案。
search_text: Spatial Layout Consistency for 3D Semantic Segmentation 3D 语义分割的空间布局一致性 Due to the aged nature of much of the utility network infrastructure, developing a robust and trustworthy computer vision system capable of inspecting it with minimal human intervention has attracted considerable research attention. The airborne laser terrain mapping (ALTM) system quickly becomes the central data collection system among the numerous available sensors. Its ability to penetrate foliage with high-powered energy provides wide coverage and achieves survey-grade ranging accuracy. However, the post-data acquisition process for classifying the ALTM's dense and irregular point clouds is a critical bottleneck that must be addressed to improve efficiency and accuracy. We introduce a novel deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) technique for achieving voxel-based semantic segmentation of the ALTM's point clouds. The suggested deep learning method, Semantic Utility Network (SUNet) is a multi-dimensional and multi-resolution network. SUNet combines two networks: one classifies point clouds at multi-resolution with object categories in three dimensions and another predicts two-dimensional regional labels distinguishing corridor regions from non-corridors. A significant innovation of the SUNet is that it imposes spatial layout consistency on the outcomes of voxel-based and regional segmentation results. The proposed multi-dimensional DCNN combines hierarchical context for spatial layout embedding with a coarse-to-fine strategy. We conducted a comprehensive ablation study to test SUNet's performance using 67 km x 67 km of utility corridor data at a density of 5pp/m2. Our experiments demonstrated that SUNet's spatial layout consistency and a multi-resolution feature aggregation could significantly improve performance, outperforming the SOTA baseline network and achieving a good F1 score for pylon 89%, ground 99%, vegetation 99% and powerline 98% classes. 由于大部分公用事业网络基础设施老化，开发一种强大且值得信赖的计算机视觉系统，能够以最少的人工干预对其进行检查，引起了相当多的研究关注。机载激光地形测绘 (ALTM) 系统迅速成为众多可用传感器中的中央数据收集系统。它能够利用高能能量穿透树叶，提供广泛的覆盖范围并实现测量级测距精度。然而，用于对 ALTM 密集且不规则点云进行分类的数据采集后过程是一个关键瓶颈，必须解决才能提高效率和准确性。我们引入了一种新颖的深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 技术，用于实现 ALTM 点云的基于体素的语义分割。建议的深度学习方法语义效用网络（SUNet）是一种多维、多分辨率网络。 SUNet 结合了两个网络：一个网络以多分辨率对点云进行分类，并在三维空间中对对象类别进行分类，另一个网络则预测区分走廊区域和非走廊区域的二维区域标签。 SUNet 的一个重大创新是它对基于体素和区域分割结果的结果强加了空间布局一致性。所提出的多维 DCNN 将空间布局嵌入的分层上下文与从粗到细的策略相结合。我们进行了一项全面的消融研究，使用密度为 5pp/m2 的 67 km x 67 km 公用设施走廊数据来测试 SUNet 的性能。我们的实验表明，SUNet 的空间布局一致性和多分辨率特征聚合可以显着提高性能，优于 SOTA 基线网络，并在塔架 89%、地面 99%、植被 99% 和电力线 98% 类别上获得良好的 F1 分数。 本文提出一种基于空间布局一致性的三维语义分割方法SUNet，用于提高机载激光地形测绘点云数据的分类效率和准确性。 Maryam Jameela,Gunho Sohn cs.CV

authors_text: Yinzhen Xu,Weikang Wan,Jialiang Zhang,Haoran Liu,Zikang Shan,Hao Shen,Ruicheng Wang,Haoran Geng,Yijia Weng,Jiayi Chen,Tengyu Liu,Li Yi,He Wang
title: UniDexGrasp: Universal Robotic Dexterous Grasping via Learning Diverse Proposal Generation and Goal-Conditioned Policy
title_zh: UniDexGrasp：通过学习多样化的提案生成和目标条件策略来实现通用机器人灵巧抓取
abstract: In this work, we tackle the problem of learning universal robotic dexterous grasping from a point cloud observation under a table-top setting. The goal is to grasp and lift up objects in high-quality and diverse ways and generalize across hundreds of categories and even the unseen. Inspired by successful pipelines used in parallel gripper grasping, we split the task into two stages: 1) grasp proposal (pose) generation and 2) goal-conditioned grasp execution. For the first stage, we propose a novel probabilistic model of grasp pose conditioned on the point cloud observation that factorizes rotation from translation and articulation. Trained on our synthesized large-scale dexterous grasp dataset, this model enables us to sample diverse and high-quality dexterous grasp poses for the object point cloud.For the second stage, we propose to replace the motion planning used in parallel gripper grasping with a goal-conditioned grasp policy, due to the complexity involved in dexterous grasping execution. Note that it is very challenging to learn this highly generalizable grasp policy that only takes realistic inputs without oracle states. We thus propose several important innovations, including state canonicalization, object curriculum, and teacher-student distillation. Integrating the two stages, our final pipeline becomes the first to achieve universal generalization for dexterous grasping, demonstrating an average success rate of more than 60\% on thousands of object instances, which significantly outperforms all baselines, meanwhile showing only a minimal generalization gap.
summary: In this work, we tackle the problem of learning universal robotic dexterous grasping from a point cloud observation under a table-top setting. The goal is to grasp and lift up objects in high-quality and diverse ways and generalize across hundreds of categories and even the unseen. Inspired by successful pipelines used in parallel gripper grasping, we split the task into two stages: 1) grasp proposal (pose) generation and 2) goal-conditioned grasp execution. For the first stage, we propose a novel probabilistic model of grasp pose conditioned on the point cloud observation that factorizes rotation from translation and articulation. Trained on our synthesized large-scale dexterous grasp dataset, this model enables us to sample diverse and high-quality dexterous grasp poses for the object point cloud.For the second stage, we propose to replace the motion planning used in parallel gripper grasping with a goal-conditioned grasp policy, due to the complexity involved in dexterous grasping execution. Note that it is very challenging to learn this highly generalizable grasp policy that only takes realistic inputs without oracle states. We thus propose several important innovations, including state canonicalization, object curriculum, and teacher-student distillation. Integrating the two stages, our final pipeline becomes the first to achieve universal generalization for dexterous grasping, demonstrating an average success rate of more than 60\% on thousands of object instances, which significantly outperforms all baselines, meanwhile showing only a minimal generalization gap.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了从桌面设置下的点云观察中学习通用机器人灵巧抓取的问题。目标是以高质量和多样化的方式抓取和举起物体，并概括数百个类别，甚至是看不见的物体。受到并行夹具抓取中使用的成功管道的启发，我们将任务分为两个阶段：1）抓取建议（姿势）生成和 2）目标条件抓取执行。对于第一阶段，我们提出了一种以点云观察为条件的新颖的抓取姿势概率模型，该模型将平移和关节的旋转分解。在我们合成的大规模灵巧抓取数据集上进行训练，该模型使我们能够为对象点云采样多样化且高质量的灵巧抓取姿势。对于第二阶段，由于灵巧抓取执行涉及的复杂性，我们建议用目标条件抓取策略替换并行夹具抓取中使用的运动规划。请注意，学习这种高度通用的掌握策略非常具有挑战性，该策略仅采用实际输入而无需预言机状态。因此，我们提出了几项重要的创新，包括状态规范化、对象课程和师生蒸馏。整合这两个阶段，我们的最终管道成为第一个实现灵巧抓取的通用泛化的管道，在数千个对象实例上显示出超过 60% 的平均成功率，显着优于所有基线，同时仅显示出最小的泛化差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniDexGrasp方法，通过学习多样化抓取提案生成和目标条件策略，实现机器人通用灵巧抓取。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在复杂场景下实现跨类别物体的通用灵巧抓取，且难以处理未见过的物体类型。
AI.method: 将任务分为两阶段：1) 基于点云观测的抓取提案生成（旋转-平移解耦的概率模型）；2) 目标条件策略执行（引入状态规范化、物体课程学习和师生蒸馏技术）。
AI.result: 在数千个物体实例上实现平均60%以上的成功率，显著优于基线方法且泛化差距极小。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现跨数百类物体的通用灵巧抓取，通过分阶段设计与技术创新有效解决了复杂抓取任务的泛化难题。

authors_text: Xiaohai Hu,Aparajit Venkatesh,Yusen Wan,Guiliang Zheng,Neel Jawale,Navneet Kaur,Xu Chen,Paul Birkmeyer
title: Learning to Detect Slip through Tactile Estimation of the Contact Force Field and its Entropy
title_zh: 学习通过接触力场及其熵的触觉估计来检测滑动
abstract: Detection of slip during object grasping and manipulation plays a vital role in object handling. Existing solutions primarily rely on visual information to devise a strategy for grasping. However, for robotic systems to attain a level of proficiency comparable to humans, especially in consistently handling and manipulating unfamiliar objects, integrating artificial tactile sensing is increasingly essential. We introduce a novel physics-informed, data-driven approach to detect slip continuously in real time. We employ the GelSight Mini, an optical tactile sensor, attached to custom-designed grippers to gather tactile data. Our work leverages the inhomogeneity of tactile sensor readings during slip events to develop distinctive features and formulates slip detection as a classification problem. To evaluate our approach, we test multiple data-driven models on 10 common objects under different loading conditions, textures, and materials. Our results show that the best classification algorithm achieves a high average accuracy of 95.61%. We further illustrate the practical application of our research in dynamic robotic manipulation tasks, where our real-time slip detection and prevention algorithm is implemented.
summary: Detection of slip during object grasping and manipulation plays a vital role in object handling. Existing solutions primarily rely on visual information to devise a strategy for grasping. However, for robotic systems to attain a level of proficiency comparable to humans, especially in consistently handling and manipulating unfamiliar objects, integrating artificial tactile sensing is increasingly essential. We introduce a novel physics-informed, data-driven approach to detect slip continuously in real time. We employ the GelSight Mini, an optical tactile sensor, attached to custom-designed grippers to gather tactile data. Our work leverages the inhomogeneity of tactile sensor readings during slip events to develop distinctive features and formulates slip detection as a classification problem. To evaluate our approach, we test multiple data-driven models on 10 common objects under different loading conditions, textures, and materials. Our results show that the best classification algorithm achieves a high average accuracy of 95.61%. We further illustrate the practical application of our research in dynamic robotic manipulation tasks, where our real-time slip detection and prevention algorithm is implemented.
abstract_zh: 物体抓取和操作过程中的滑动检测在物体处理中起着至关重要的作用。现有的解决方案主要依靠视觉信息来设计抓取策略。然而，为了使机器人系统达到与人类相当的熟练程度，特别是在持续处理和操纵不熟悉的物体方面，集成人工触觉传感变得越来越重要。我们引入了一种新颖的基于物理的数据驱动方法来实时连续检测滑动。我们使用 GelSight Mini（一种光学触觉传感器）连接到定制设计的夹具上来收集触觉数据。我们的工作利用滑动事件期间触觉传感器读数的不均匀性来开发独特的特征，并将滑动检测制定为分类问题。为了评估我们的方法，我们在不同的负载条件、纹理和材料下对 10 个常见对象测试了多个数据驱动模型。我们的结果表明，最好的分类算法达到了 95.61% 的高平均准确率。我们进一步说明了我们的研究在动态机器人操纵任务中的实际应用，其中实现了我们的实时滑动检测和预防算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于触觉估计接触力场及其熵的实时滑动检测方法，通过触觉传感器数据实现机器人抓取与操作中的滑动识别。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取策略过度依赖视觉信息，难以应对未知物体的复杂操作需求，需通过触觉感知提升机器人操作鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用GelSight Mini光学触觉传感器采集数据，利用滑动时触觉信号非均匀性构建特征，将滑动检测建模为分类问题并测试多种数据驱动算法。
AI.result: 在10种物体不同材质/纹理条件下，最佳分类模型达到95.61%平均准确率，并成功应用于动态机器人操作任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人提供了可靠实时滑动检测方案，验证了触觉感知在提升操作安全性与适应性中的关键作用。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于触觉估计接触力场及其熵的实时滑动检测方法，通过触觉传感器数据实现机器人抓取与操作中的滑动识别。
motivation: 现有抓取策略过度依赖视觉信息，难以应对未知物体的复杂操作需求，需通过触觉感知提升机器人操作鲁棒性。
method: 采用GelSight Mini光学触觉传感器采集数据，利用滑动时触觉信号非均匀性构建特征，将滑动检测建模为分类问题并测试多种数据驱动算法。
result: 在10种物体不同材质/纹理条件下，最佳分类模型达到95.61%平均准确率，并成功应用于动态机器人操作任务。
conclusion: 该方法为机器人提供了可靠实时滑动检测方案，验证了触觉感知在提升操作安全性与适应性中的关键作用。
search_text: Learning to Detect Slip through Tactile Estimation of the Contact Force Field and its Entropy 学习通过接触力场及其熵的触觉估计来检测滑动 Detection of slip during object grasping and manipulation plays a vital role in object handling. Existing solutions primarily rely on visual information to devise a strategy for grasping. However, for robotic systems to attain a level of proficiency comparable to humans, especially in consistently handling and manipulating unfamiliar objects, integrating artificial tactile sensing is increasingly essential. We introduce a novel physics-informed, data-driven approach to detect slip continuously in real time. We employ the GelSight Mini, an optical tactile sensor, attached to custom-designed grippers to gather tactile data. Our work leverages the inhomogeneity of tactile sensor readings during slip events to develop distinctive features and formulates slip detection as a classification problem. To evaluate our approach, we test multiple data-driven models on 10 common objects under different loading conditions, textures, and materials. Our results show that the best classification algorithm achieves a high average accuracy of 95.61%. We further illustrate the practical application of our research in dynamic robotic manipulation tasks, where our real-time slip detection and prevention algorithm is implemented. 物体抓取和操作过程中的滑动检测在物体处理中起着至关重要的作用。现有的解决方案主要依靠视觉信息来设计抓取策略。然而，为了使机器人系统达到与人类相当的熟练程度，特别是在持续处理和操纵不熟悉的物体方面，集成人工触觉传感变得越来越重要。我们引入了一种新颖的基于物理的数据驱动方法来实时连续检测滑动。我们使用 GelSight Mini（一种光学触觉传感器）连接到定制设计的夹具上来收集触觉数据。我们的工作利用滑动事件期间触觉传感器读数的不均匀性来开发独特的特征，并将滑动检测制定为分类问题。为了评估我们的方法，我们在不同的负载条件、纹理和材料下对 10 个常见对象测试了多个数据驱动模型。我们的结果表明，最好的分类算法达到了 95.61% 的高平均准确率。我们进一步说明了我们的研究在动态机器人操纵任务中的实际应用，其中实现了我们的实时滑动检测和预防算法。 本文提出一种基于触觉估计接触力场及其熵的实时滑动检测方法，通过触觉传感器数据实现机器人抓取与操作中的滑动识别。 Xiaohai Hu,Aparajit Venkatesh,Yusen Wan,Guiliang Zheng,Neel Jawale,Navneet Kaur,Xu Chen,Paul Birkmeyer cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Edward Small,Yueqing Xuan,Danula Hettiachchi,Kacper Sokol
title: Helpful, Misleading or Confusing: How Humans Perceive Fundamental Building Blocks of Artificial Intelligence Explanations
title_zh: 有用、误导或令人困惑：人类如何看待人工智能解释的基本构建模块
comment: Accepted to Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI) Workshop at CHI 2023
comments: Accepted to Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI) Workshop at CHI 2023
abstract: Explainable artificial intelligence techniques are developed at breakneck speed, but suitable evaluation approaches lag behind. With explainers becoming increasingly complex and a lack of consensus on how to assess their utility, it is challenging to judge the benefit and effectiveness of different explanations. To address this gap, we take a step back from sophisticated predictive algorithms and instead look into explainability of simple decision-making models. In this setting, we aim to assess how people perceive comprehensibility of their different representations such as mathematical formulation, graphical representation and textual summarisation (of varying complexity and scope). This allows us to capture how diverse stakeholders -- engineers, researchers, consumers, regulators and the like -- judge intelligibility of fundamental concepts that more elaborate artificial intelligence explanations are built from. This position paper charts our approach to establishing appropriate evaluation methodology as well as a conceptual and practical framework to facilitate setting up and executing relevant user studies.
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence techniques are developed at breakneck speed, but suitable evaluation approaches lag behind. With explainers becoming increasingly complex and a lack of consensus on how to assess their utility, it is challenging to judge the benefit and effectiveness of different explanations. To address this gap, we take a step back from sophisticated predictive algorithms and instead look into explainability of simple decision-making models. In this setting, we aim to assess how people perceive comprehensibility of their different representations such as mathematical formulation, graphical representation and textual summarisation (of varying complexity and scope). This allows us to capture how diverse stakeholders -- engineers, researchers, consumers, regulators and the like -- judge intelligibility of fundamental concepts that more elaborate artificial intelligence explanations are built from. This position paper charts our approach to establishing appropriate evaluation methodology as well as a conceptual and practical framework to facilitate setting up and executing relevant user studies.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能技术正在以极快的速度发展，但合适的评估方法却滞后。随着解释器变得越来越复杂，并且在如何评估其效用方面缺乏共识，判断不同解释的好处和有效性具有挑战性。为了解决这一差距，我们从复杂的预测算法中退一步，转而研究简单决策模型的可解释性。在这种情况下，我们的目标是评估人们如何看待不同表示的可理解性，例如数学公式、图形表示和文本摘要（不同的复杂性和范围）。这使我们能够了解不同的利益相关者——工程师、研究人员、消费者、监管机构等——如何判断基本概念的可理解性，而更详细的人工智能解释是根据这些概念构建的。本立场文件阐述了我们建立适当的评估方法以及概念和实践框架的方法，以促进建立和执行相关的用户研究。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估人类对人工智能解释基本构建块（如数学公式、图形表示和文本摘要）的可理解性感知。
AI.motivation: 可解释人工智能技术发展迅速，但缺乏有效的评估方法，难以判断不同解释的有效性。
AI.method: 通过研究简单决策模型的可解释性，分析不同形式表示（数学、图形、文本）的复杂性和范围对多样利益相关者的可理解性影响。
AI.result: 提出了一种评估方法和框架，用于设计和执行相关用户研究，以衡量基础AI概念的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为建立评估人工智能解释有效性的方法论提供了概念和实践基础，有助于未来研究的开展。

authors_text: Soumi Chaki,David Weinberg,Ayca Özcelikkale
title: Communication Trade-offs in Federated Learning of Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 尖峰神经网络联邦学习中的通信权衡
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are biologically inspired alternatives to conventional Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). Despite promising preliminary results, the trade-offs in the training of SNNs in a distributed scheme are not well understood. Here, we consider SNNs in a federated learning setting where a high-quality global model is created by aggregating multiple local models from the clients without sharing any data. We investigate federated learning for training multiple SNNs at clients when two mechanisms reduce the uplink communication cost: i) random masking of the model updates sent from the clients to the server; and ii) client dropouts where some clients do not send their updates to the server. We evaluated the performance of the SNNs using a subset of the Spiking Heidelberg digits (SHD) dataset. The results show that a trade-off between the random masking and the client drop probabilities is crucial to obtain a satisfactory performance for a fixed number of clients.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are biologically inspired alternatives to conventional Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). Despite promising preliminary results, the trade-offs in the training of SNNs in a distributed scheme are not well understood. Here, we consider SNNs in a federated learning setting where a high-quality global model is created by aggregating multiple local models from the clients without sharing any data. We investigate federated learning for training multiple SNNs at clients when two mechanisms reduce the uplink communication cost: i) random masking of the model updates sent from the clients to the server; and ii) client dropouts where some clients do not send their updates to the server. We evaluated the performance of the SNNs using a subset of the Spiking Heidelberg digits (SHD) dataset. The results show that a trade-off between the random masking and the client drop probabilities is crucial to obtain a satisfactory performance for a fixed number of clients.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是传统人工神经网络 (ANN) 的受生物学启发的替代品。尽管初步结果很有希望，但分布式方案中 SNN 训练的权衡尚不清楚。在这里，我们考虑联邦学习环境中的 SNN，其中通过聚合来自客户端的多个本地模型来创建高质量的全局模型，而不共享任何数据。当两种机制降低上行链路通信成本时，我们研究了在客户端训练多个 SNN 的联合学习：i）从客户端发送到服务器的模型更新的随机屏蔽； ii) 客户端丢失，其中某些客户端不将其更新发送到服务器。我们使用尖峰海德堡数字 (SHD) 数据集的子集评估了 SNN 的性能。结果表明，随机屏蔽和客户端丢弃概率之间的权衡对于为固定数量的客户端获得满意的性能至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了联邦学习中脉冲神经网络（SNN）的通信权衡问题，通过随机掩码和客户端退出机制降低上行通信成本。
AI.motivation: 尽管脉冲神经网络（SNN）具有生物启发性，但其在分布式训练中的通信效率与模型性能的权衡尚未明确，需探索联邦学习框架下的优化方法。
AI.method: 在联邦学习设置中，采用随机掩码（遮蔽模型更新）和客户端退出（部分客户端不发送更新）两种机制，结合SHD数据集评估SNN性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，在固定客户端数量下，随机掩码概率与客户端退出概率的平衡对模型性能至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习中SNN的通信效率优化需协调随机掩码与客户端退出策略，以实现性能与通信成本的平衡。

authors_text: Mohammad Khishe,Mokhtar Mohammadi,Tarik A. Rashid,Hoger Mahmud,Seyedali Mirjalili
title: Evolving Deep Neural Network by Customized Moth Flame Optimization Algorithm for Underwater Targets Recognition
title_zh: 通过定制的飞蛾火焰优化算法进化深度神经网络用于水下目标识别
abstract: This chapter proposes using the Moth Flame Optimization (MFO) algorithm for finetuning a Deep Neural Network to recognize different underwater sonar datasets. Same as other models evolved by metaheuristic algorithms, premature convergence, trapping in local minima, and failure to converge in a reasonable time are three defects MFO confronts in solving problems with high-dimension search space. Spiral flying is the key component of the MFO as it determines how the moths adjust their positions in relation to flames; thereby, the shape of spiral motions can regulate the transition behavior between the exploration and exploitation phases. Therefore, this chapter investigates the efficiency of seven spiral motions with different curvatures and slopes in the performance of the MFO, especially for underwater target classification tasks. To assess the performance of the customized model, in addition to benchmark Sejnowski & Gorman's dataset, two experimental sonar datasets, i.e., the passive sonar and active datasets, are exploited. The results of MFO and its modifications are compared to four novel nature-inspired algorithms, including Heap-Based Optimizer (HBO), Chimp Optimization Algorithm (ChOA), Ant Lion Optimization (ALO), Stochastic Fractals Search (SFS), as well as the classic Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO). The results confirm that the customized MFO shows better performance than the other state-of-the-art models so that the classification rates are increased 1.5979, 0.9985, and 2.0879 for Sejnowski & Gorman, passive, and active datasets, respectively. The results also approve that time complexity is not significantly increased by using different spiral motions.
summary: This chapter proposes using the Moth Flame Optimization (MFO) algorithm for finetuning a Deep Neural Network to recognize different underwater sonar datasets. Same as other models evolved by metaheuristic algorithms, premature convergence, trapping in local minima, and failure to converge in a reasonable time are three defects MFO confronts in solving problems with high-dimension search space. Spiral flying is the key component of the MFO as it determines how the moths adjust their positions in relation to flames; thereby, the shape of spiral motions can regulate the transition behavior between the exploration and exploitation phases. Therefore, this chapter investigates the efficiency of seven spiral motions with different curvatures and slopes in the performance of the MFO, especially for underwater target classification tasks. To assess the performance of the customized model, in addition to benchmark Sejnowski & Gorman's dataset, two experimental sonar datasets, i.e., the passive sonar and active datasets, are exploited. The results of MFO and its modifications are compared to four novel nature-inspired algorithms, including Heap-Based Optimizer (HBO), Chimp Optimization Algorithm (ChOA), Ant Lion Optimization (ALO), Stochastic Fractals Search (SFS), as well as the classic Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO). The results confirm that the customized MFO shows better performance than the other state-of-the-art models so that the classification rates are increased 1.5979, 0.9985, and 2.0879 for Sejnowski & Gorman, passive, and active datasets, respectively. The results also approve that time complexity is not significantly increased by using different spiral motions.
abstract_zh: 本章建议使用飞蛾火焰优化（MFO）算法来微调深度神经网络以识别不同的水下声纳数据集。与其他由元启发式算法演化而来的模型一样，MFO在解决高维搜索空间问题时面临着三个缺陷：早熟收敛、陷入局部极小值以及无法在合理的时间内收敛。螺旋飞行是 MFO 的关键组成部分，因为它决定飞蛾如何调整其相对于火焰的位置；因此，螺旋运动的形状可以调节勘探和开采阶段之间的过渡行为。因此，本章研究了七种不同曲率和斜率的螺旋运动在 MFO 性能中的效率，特别是对于水下目标分类任务。为了评估定制模型的性能，除了对 Sejnowski 和 Gorman 的数据集进行基准测试之外，还利用了两个实验声纳数据集，即被动声纳和主动数据集。将 MFO 及其修改的结果与四种新颖的自然启发算法进行比较，包括基于堆的优化器 (HBO)、黑猩猩优化算法 (ChOA)、蚁狮优化 (ALO)、随机分形搜索 (SFS) 以及经典的粒子群优化 (PSO)。结果证实，定制的 MFO 显示出比其他最先进模型更好的性能，因此 Sejnowski & Gorman、被动和主动数据集的分类率分别提高了 1.5979、0.9985 和 2.0879。结果还证明，使用不同的螺旋运动不会显着增加时间复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种定制化的飞蛾火焰优化算法（MFO）以微调深度神经网络，用于识别不同水下声呐数据集中的目标。
AI.motivation: 传统MFO算法在处理高维搜索空间问题时存在早熟收敛、陷入局部最优和收敛时间过长等缺陷，需改进其螺旋飞行机制以提升水下目标分类性能。
AI.method: 通过研究七种不同曲率和斜率的螺旋运动对MFO算法的影响，定制化改进其探索与开发阶段的平衡，并在三个数据集上与HBO、ChOA等五种算法对比验证。
AI.result: 定制MFO在Sejnowski & Gorman、被动声呐和主动声呐数据集上的分类准确率分别提升1.5979、0.9985和2.0879，且时间复杂度无显著增加。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的MFO算法有效提升了水下目标识别的分类性能，且保持了计算效率，适用于复杂水下环境的目标识别任务。

authors_text: Jaehyun Nam,Jihoon Tack,Kyungmin Lee,Hankook Lee,Jinwoo Shin
title: STUNT: Few-shot Tabular Learning with Self-generated Tasks from Unlabeled Tables
title_zh: STUNT：使用未标记表自行生成任务的小样本表格学习
abstract: Learning with few labeled tabular samples is often an essential requirement for industrial machine learning applications as varieties of tabular data suffer from high annotation costs or have difficulties in collecting new samples for novel tasks. Despite the utter importance, such a problem is quite under-explored in the field of tabular learning, and existing few-shot learning schemes from other domains are not straightforward to apply, mainly due to the heterogeneous characteristics of tabular data. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective framework for few-shot semi-supervised tabular learning, coined Self-generated Tasks from UNlabeled Tables (STUNT). Our key idea is to self-generate diverse few-shot tasks by treating randomly chosen columns as a target label. We then employ a meta-learning scheme to learn generalizable knowledge with the constructed tasks. Moreover, we introduce an unsupervised validation scheme for hyperparameter search (and early stopping) by generating a pseudo-validation set using STUNT from unlabeled data. Our experimental results demonstrate that our simple framework brings significant performance gain under various tabular few-shot learning benchmarks, compared to prior semi- and self-supervised baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/jaehyun513/STUNT.
summary: Learning with few labeled tabular samples is often an essential requirement for industrial machine learning applications as varieties of tabular data suffer from high annotation costs or have difficulties in collecting new samples for novel tasks. Despite the utter importance, such a problem is quite under-explored in the field of tabular learning, and existing few-shot learning schemes from other domains are not straightforward to apply, mainly due to the heterogeneous characteristics of tabular data. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective framework for few-shot semi-supervised tabular learning, coined Self-generated Tasks from UNlabeled Tables (STUNT). Our key idea is to self-generate diverse few-shot tasks by treating randomly chosen columns as a target label. We then employ a meta-learning scheme to learn generalizable knowledge with the constructed tasks. Moreover, we introduce an unsupervised validation scheme for hyperparameter search (and early stopping) by generating a pseudo-validation set using STUNT from unlabeled data. Our experimental results demonstrate that our simple framework brings significant performance gain under various tabular few-shot learning benchmarks, compared to prior semi- and self-supervised baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/jaehyun513/STUNT.
abstract_zh: 使用少量标记的表格样本进行学习通常是工业机器学习应用的基本要求，因为各种表格数据的注释成本很高，或者很难为新任务收集新样本。尽管非常重要，但这个问题在表格学习领域还没有得到充分的探索，并且其他领域现有的小样本学习方案并不容易应用，这主要是由于表格数据的异构特征。在本文中，我们提出了一个简单而有效的小样本半监督表格学习框架，创造了来自未标记表的自生成任务（STUNT）。我们的关键思想是通过将随机选择的列视为目标标签来自行生成不同的小样本任务。然后，我们采用元学习方案来通过构建的任务来学习可概括的知识。此外，我们通过使用来自未标记数据的 STUNT 生成伪验证集，引入了用于超参数搜索（和早期停止）的无监督验证方案。我们的实验结果表明，与之前的半监督和自监督基线相比，我们的简单框架在各种表格少样本学习基准下带来了显着的性能提升。代码可在 https://github.com/jaehyun513/STUNT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STUNT框架，通过从无标签表格中自动生成任务，解决表格数据在少量标记样本下的学习问题。
AI.motivation: 表格数据因标注成本高且难以收集新样本，导致现有少样本学习方法难以直接应用，亟需探索适用于表格数据的少样本学习方案。
AI.method: 通过随机选择列作为目标标签生成多样化少样本任务，结合元学习框架学习通用知识，并利用无监督验证方案生成伪验证集进行超参数优化。
AI.result: 在多个表格少样本学习基准测试中，STUNT相比现有半监督和自监督方法取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: STUNT通过自生成任务和元学习有效解决了表格数据少样本学习难题，为工业场景提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Chenqi Kong,Haoliang Li,Shiqi Wang
title: Enhancing General Face Forgery Detection via Vision Transformer with Low-Rank Adaptation
title_zh: 通过具有低阶自适应的 Vision Transformer 增强一般人脸伪造检测
abstract: Nowadays, forgery faces pose pressing security concerns over fake news, fraud, impersonation, etc. Despite the demonstrated success in intra-domain face forgery detection, existing detection methods lack generalization capability and tend to suffer from dramatic performance drops when deployed to unforeseen domains. To mitigate this issue, this paper designs a more general fake face detection model based on the vision transformer(ViT) architecture. In the training phase, the pretrained ViT weights are freezed, and only the Low-Rank Adaptation(LoRA) modules are updated. Additionally, the Single Center Loss(SCL) is applied to supervise the training process, further improving the generalization capability of the model. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-arts detection performances in both cross-manipulation and cross-dataset evaluations.
summary: Nowadays, forgery faces pose pressing security concerns over fake news, fraud, impersonation, etc. Despite the demonstrated success in intra-domain face forgery detection, existing detection methods lack generalization capability and tend to suffer from dramatic performance drops when deployed to unforeseen domains. To mitigate this issue, this paper designs a more general fake face detection model based on the vision transformer(ViT) architecture. In the training phase, the pretrained ViT weights are freezed, and only the Low-Rank Adaptation(LoRA) modules are updated. Additionally, the Single Center Loss(SCL) is applied to supervise the training process, further improving the generalization capability of the model. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-arts detection performances in both cross-manipulation and cross-dataset evaluations.
abstract_zh: 如今，伪造人脸带来了假新闻、欺诈、冒充等紧迫的安全问题。尽管在域内人脸伪造检测方面取得了成功，但现有的检测方法缺乏泛化能力，并且在部署到不可预见的领域时往往会出现性能急剧下降的情况。为了缓解这个问题，本文设计了一种基于视觉变换器（ViT）架构的更通用的假脸检测模型。在训练阶段，预训练的 ViT 权重被冻结，仅更新低秩适应（LoRA）模块。此外，应用单中心损失（SCL）来监督训练过程，进一步提高模型的泛化能力。所提出的方法在交叉操作和跨数据集评估中实现了最先进的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉变换器（ViT）和低秩适应（LoRA）的人脸伪造检测方法，以增强模型的跨领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法在跨域场景下性能显著下降，缺乏泛化能力，需设计更通用的模型以应对未知领域。
AI.method: 冻结预训练ViT权重，仅更新低秩适应（LoRA）模块，并结合单中心损失（SCL）进行训练，以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在跨操作和跨数据集评估中达到最先进的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合LoRA和SCL，有效提升了模型的跨领域泛化能力，为通用人脸伪造检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Enhancing General Face Forgery Detection via Vision Transformer with Low-Rank Adaptation 通过具有低阶自适应的 Vision Transformer 增强一般人脸伪造检测 Nowadays, forgery faces pose pressing security concerns over fake news, fraud, impersonation, etc. Despite the demonstrated success in intra-domain face forgery detection, existing detection methods lack generalization capability and tend to suffer from dramatic performance drops when deployed to unforeseen domains. To mitigate this issue, this paper designs a more general fake face detection model based on the vision transformer(ViT) architecture. In the training phase, the pretrained ViT weights are freezed, and only the Low-Rank Adaptation(LoRA) modules are updated. Additionally, the Single Center Loss(SCL) is applied to supervise the training process, further improving the generalization capability of the model. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-arts detection performances in both cross-manipulation and cross-dataset evaluations. 如今，伪造人脸带来了假新闻、欺诈、冒充等紧迫的安全问题。尽管在域内人脸伪造检测方面取得了成功，但现有的检测方法缺乏泛化能力，并且在部署到不可预见的领域时往往会出现性能急剧下降的情况。为了缓解这个问题，本文设计了一种基于视觉变换器（ViT）架构的更通用的假脸检测模型。在训练阶段，预训练的 ViT 权重被冻结，仅更新低秩适应（LoRA）模块。此外，应用单中心损失（SCL）来监督训练过程，进一步提高模型的泛化能力。所提出的方法在交叉操作和跨数据集评估中实现了最先进的检测性能。 提出一种基于视觉变换器（ViT）和低秩适应（LoRA）的人脸伪造检测方法，以增强模型的跨领域泛化能力。 Chenqi Kong,Haoliang Li,Shiqi Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Sheng Zhang,Yanbo Xu,Naoto Usuyama,Hanwen Xu,Jaspreet Bagga,Robert Tinn,Sam Preston,Rajesh Rao,Mu Wei,Naveen Valluri,Cliff Wong,Andrea Tupini,Yu Wang,Matt Mazzola,Swadheen Shukla,Lars Liden,Jianfeng Gao,Angela Crabtree,Brian Piening,Carlo Bifulco,Matthew P. Lungren,Tristan Naumann,Sheng Wang,Hoifung Poon
title: BiomedCLIP: a multimodal biomedical foundation model pretrained from fifteen million scientific image-text pairs
title_zh: BiomedCLIP：根据 1500 万个科学图像文本对进行预训练的多模式生物医学基础模型
comment: The models are released at https://aka.ms/biomedclip
comments: The models are released at https://aka.ms/biomedclip
abstract: Biomedical data is inherently multimodal, comprising physical measurements and natural language narratives. A generalist biomedical AI model needs to simultaneously process different modalities of data, including text and images. Therefore, training an effective generalist biomedical model requires high-quality multimodal data, such as parallel image-text pairs. Here, we present PMC-15M, a novel dataset that is two orders of magnitude larger than existing biomedical multimodal datasets such as MIMIC-CXR, and spans a diverse range of biomedical image types. PMC-15M contains 15 million biomedical image-text pairs collected from 4.4 million scientific articles. Based on PMC-15M, we have pretrained BiomedCLIP, a multimodal foundation model, with domain-specific adaptations tailored to biomedical vision-language processing. We conducted extensive experiments and ablation studies on standard biomedical imaging tasks from retrieval to classification to visual question-answering (VQA). BiomedCLIP achieved new state-of-the-art results in a wide range of standard datasets, substantially outperforming prior approaches. Intriguingly, by large-scale pretraining on diverse biomedical image types, BiomedCLIP even outperforms state-of-the-art radiology-specific models such as BioViL in radiology-specific tasks such as RSNA pneumonia detection. In summary, BiomedCLIP is a fully open-access foundation model that achieves state-of-the-art performance on various biomedical tasks, paving the way for transformative multimodal biomedical discovery and applications. We release our models at https://aka.ms/biomedclip to facilitate future research in multimodal biomedical AI.
summary: Biomedical data is inherently multimodal, comprising physical measurements and natural language narratives. A generalist biomedical AI model needs to simultaneously process different modalities of data, including text and images. Therefore, training an effective generalist biomedical model requires high-quality multimodal data, such as parallel image-text pairs. Here, we present PMC-15M, a novel dataset that is two orders of magnitude larger than existing biomedical multimodal datasets such as MIMIC-CXR, and spans a diverse range of biomedical image types. PMC-15M contains 15 million biomedical image-text pairs collected from 4.4 million scientific articles. Based on PMC-15M, we have pretrained BiomedCLIP, a multimodal foundation model, with domain-specific adaptations tailored to biomedical vision-language processing. We conducted extensive experiments and ablation studies on standard biomedical imaging tasks from retrieval to classification to visual question-answering (VQA). BiomedCLIP achieved new state-of-the-art results in a wide range of standard datasets, substantially outperforming prior approaches. Intriguingly, by large-scale pretraining on diverse biomedical image types, BiomedCLIP even outperforms state-of-the-art radiology-specific models such as BioViL in radiology-specific tasks such as RSNA pneumonia detection. In summary, BiomedCLIP is a fully open-access foundation model that achieves state-of-the-art performance on various biomedical tasks, paving the way for transformative multimodal biomedical discovery and applications. We release our models at https://aka.ms/biomedclip to facilitate future research in multimodal biomedical AI.
abstract_zh: 生物医学数据本质上是多模式的，包括物理测量和自然语言叙述。通用生物医学人工智能模型需要同时处理不同模式的数据，包括文本和图像。因此，训练有效的通用生物医学模型需要高质量的多模态数据，例如并行图像文本对。在这里，我们提出了 PMC-15M，这是一个新颖的数据集，比现有的生物医学多模态数据集（例如 MIMIC-CXR）大两个数量级，并且涵盖了多种生物医学图像类型。 PMC-15M 包含从 440 万篇科学文章中收集的 1500 万个生物医学图像文本对。基于 PMC-15M，我们预训练了 BiomedCLIP，这是一种多模式基础模型，具有针对生物医学视觉语言处理量身定制的领域特定适应性。我们对标准生物医学成像任务进行了广泛的实验和消融研究，从检索到分类再到视觉问答（VQA）。 BiomedCLIP 在各种标准数据集中取得了最先进的结果，大大优于以前的方法。有趣的是，通过对多种生物医学图像类型进行大规模预训练，BiomedCLIP 在 RSNA 肺炎检测等放射学特定任务中甚至优于 BioViL 等最先进的放射学特定模型。总之，BiomedCLIP 是一个完全开放的基础模型，在各种生物医学任务上实现了最先进的性能，为变革性的多模式生物医学发现和应用铺平了道路。我们在 https://aka.ms/biomedclip 发布我们的模型，以促进多模式生物医学人工智能的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiomedCLIP，一个基于1500万生物医学图像-文本对预训练的多模态基础模型，用于处理生物医学领域的多模态数据。
AI.motivation: 生物医学数据具有多模态特性，现有模型在处理图像与文本联合任务时表现不足，需构建更大规模且多样化的多模态数据集以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 构建PMC-15M数据集（包含440万篇科学文献中的1500万图像-文本对），基于该数据集预训练BiomedCLIP模型，并针对生物医学视觉-语言任务进行领域适配优化。
AI.result: BiomedCLIP在多项标准生物医学任务（如图像检索、分类、视觉问答）中取得SOTA结果，甚至超越专门的放射学模型（如BioViL）在肺炎检测等任务中的表现。
AI.conclusion: BiomedCLIP作为开放获取的多模态基础模型，为生物医学领域的跨模态研究与应用提供了新范式，推动了多模态生物医学发现的变革。
