authors_text: Wenlong Huang,Fei Xia,Dhruv Shah,Danny Driess,Andy Zeng,Yao Lu,Pete Florence,Igor Mordatch,Sergey Levine,Karol Hausman,Brian Ichter
title: Grounded Decoding: Guiding Text Generation with Grounded Models for Embodied Agents
title_zh: 扎根解码：用实体代理的扎根模型指导文本生成
abstract: Recent progress in large language models (LLMs) has demonstrated the ability to learn and leverage Internet-scale knowledge through pre-training with autoregressive models. Unfortunately, applying such models to settings with embodied agents, such as robots, is challenging due to their lack of experience with the physical world, inability to parse non-language observations, and ignorance of rewards or safety constraints that robots may require. On the other hand, language-conditioned robotic policies that learn from interaction data can provide the necessary grounding that allows the agent to be correctly situated in the real world, but such policies are limited by the lack of high-level semantic understanding due to the limited breadth of the interaction data available for training them. Thus, if we want to make use of the semantic knowledge in a language model while still situating it in an embodied setting, we must construct an action sequence that is both likely according to the language model and also realizable according to grounded models of the environment. We frame this as a problem similar to probabilistic filtering: decode a sequence that both has high probability under the language model and high probability under a set of grounded model objectives. We demonstrate how such grounded models can be obtained across three simulation and real-world domains, and that the proposed decoding strategy is able to solve complex, long-horizon embodiment tasks in a robotic setting by leveraging the knowledge of both models. The project's website can be found at grounded-decoding.github.io.
summary: Recent progress in large language models (LLMs) has demonstrated the ability to learn and leverage Internet-scale knowledge through pre-training with autoregressive models. Unfortunately, applying such models to settings with embodied agents, such as robots, is challenging due to their lack of experience with the physical world, inability to parse non-language observations, and ignorance of rewards or safety constraints that robots may require. On the other hand, language-conditioned robotic policies that learn from interaction data can provide the necessary grounding that allows the agent to be correctly situated in the real world, but such policies are limited by the lack of high-level semantic understanding due to the limited breadth of the interaction data available for training them. Thus, if we want to make use of the semantic knowledge in a language model while still situating it in an embodied setting, we must construct an action sequence that is both likely according to the language model and also realizable according to grounded models of the environment. We frame this as a problem similar to probabilistic filtering: decode a sequence that both has high probability under the language model and high probability under a set of grounded model objectives. We demonstrate how such grounded models can be obtained across three simulation and real-world domains, and that the proposed decoding strategy is able to solve complex, long-horizon embodiment tasks in a robotic setting by leveraging the knowledge of both models. The project's website can be found at grounded-decoding.github.io.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的最新进展证明了通过自回归模型预训练来学习和利用互联网规模知识的能力。不幸的是，将此类模型应用于具有实体代理（例如机器人）的环境中具有挑战性，因为它们缺乏物理世界的经验，无法解析非语言观察结果，并且不了解机器人可能需要的奖励或安全约束。另一方面，从交互数据中学习的语言条件机器人策略可以提供必要的基础，使代理能够正确地定位在现实世界中，但由于可用于训练它们的交互数据的广度有限，此类策略因缺乏高级语义理解而受到限制。因此，如果我们想利用语言模型中的语义知识，同时仍将其置于具体环境中，我们必须构造一个动作序列，该动作序列既可以根据语言模型进行，也可以根据环境的扎根模型来实现。我们将此视为类似于概率过滤的问题：解码在语言模型下具有高概率以及在一组基础模型目标下具有高概率的序列。我们演示了如何在三个模拟和现实世界领域获得这样的基础模型，并且所提出的解码策略能够通过利用这两个模型的知识来解决机器人环境中复杂的、长期的实施任务。该项目的网站可以在 grounded-decoding.github.io 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合语言模型与具身模型的解码方法，用于指导具身智能体（如机器人）的文本生成与行动序列规划。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）缺乏对物理世界的体验和非语言感知能力，难以应用于具身智能体；而基于交互数据的具身策略则缺乏高层语义理解，需融合两者优势以解决复杂任务。
AI.method: 将解码问题建模为概率滤波，生成同时符合语言模型概率分布与具身模型目标的行动序列，并在多领域（仿真与现实）验证该方法。
AI.result: 该方法在多个仿真和真实场景中成功解决了长时序、复杂的具身任务，证明了语言模型与具身模型知识融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合语言模型的语义知识与具身模型的物理约束，提出的解码策略为具身智能体提供了兼顾高层语义与现实可行性的解决方案。

motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）缺乏对物理世界的体验和非语言感知能力，难以应用于具身智能体；而基于交互数据的具身策略则缺乏高层语义理解，需融合两者优势以解决复杂任务。

result: 该方法在多个仿真和真实场景中成功解决了长时序、复杂的具身任务，证明了语言模型与具身模型知识融合的有效性。
conclusion: 通过整合语言模型的语义知识与具身模型的物理约束，提出的解码策略为具身智能体提供了兼顾高层语义与现实可行性的解决方案。
search_text: Grounded Decoding: Guiding Text Generation with Grounded Models for Embodied Agents 扎根解码：用实体代理的扎根模型指导文本生成 Recent progress in large language models (LLMs) has demonstrated the ability to learn and leverage Internet-scale knowledge through pre-training with autoregressive models. Unfortunately, applying such models to settings with embodied agents, such as robots, is challenging due to their lack of experience with the physical world, inability to parse non-language observations, and ignorance of rewards or safety constraints that robots may require. On the other hand, language-conditioned robotic policies that learn from interaction data can provide the necessary grounding that allows the agent to be correctly situated in the real world, but such policies are limited by the lack of high-level semantic understanding due to the limited breadth of the interaction data available for training them. Thus, if we want to make use of the semantic knowledge in a language model while still situating it in an embodied setting, we must construct an action sequence that is both likely according to the language model and also realizable according to grounded models of the environment. We frame this as a problem similar to probabilistic filtering: decode a sequence that both has high probability under the language model and high probability under a set of grounded model objectives. We demonstrate how such grounded models can be obtained across three simulation and real-world domains, and that the proposed decoding strategy is able to solve complex, long-horizon embodiment tasks in a robotic setting by leveraging the knowledge of both models. The project's website can be found at grounded-decoding.github.io. 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的最新进展证明了通过自回归模型预训练来学习和利用互联网规模知识的能力。不幸的是，将此类模型应用于具有实体代理（例如机器人）的环境中具有挑战性，因为它们缺乏物理世界的经验，无法解析非语言观察结果，并且不了解机器人可能需要的奖励或安全约束。另一方面，从交互数据中学习的语言条件机器人策略可以提供必要的基础，使代理能够正确地定位在现实世界中，但由于可用于训练它们的交互数据的广度有限，此类策略因缺乏高级语义理解而受到限制。因此，如果我们想利用语言模型中的语义知识，同时仍将其置于具体环境中，我们必须构造一个动作序列，该动作序列既可以根据语言模型进行，也可以根据环境的扎根模型来实现。我们将此视为类似于概率过滤的问题：解码在语言模型下具有高概率以及在一组基础模型目标下具有高概率的序列。我们演示了如何在三个模拟和现实世界领域获得这样的基础模型，并且所提出的解码策略能够通过利用这两个模型的知识来解决机器人环境中复杂的、长期的实施任务。该项目的网站可以在 grounded-decoding.github.io 上找到。 本文提出了一种结合语言模型与具身模型的解码方法，用于指导具身智能体（如机器人）的文本生成与行动序列规划。 Wenlong Huang,Fei Xia,Dhruv Shah,Danny Driess,Andy Zeng,Yao Lu,Pete Florence,Igor Mordatch,Sergey Levine,Karol Hausman,Brian Ichter cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuyang Shen,Jinming Xu,Jin Zhou,Danzhe Xu,Fangguo Zhao,Jiming Chen,Shuo Li
title: Aggressive Trajectory Generation for A Swarm of Autonomous Racing Drones
title_zh: 为一群自主赛车无人机提供积极的轨迹生成
abstract: Autonomous drone racing is becoming an excellent platform to challenge quadrotors' autonomy techniques including planning, navigation and control technologies. However, most research on this topic mainly focuses on single drone scenarios. In this paper, we describe a novel time-optimal trajectory generation method for generating time-optimal trajectories for a swarm of quadrotors to fly through pre-defined waypoints with their maximum maneuverability without collision. We verify the method in the Gazebo simulations where a swarm of 5 quadrotors can fly through a complex 6-waypoint racing track in a 35m * 35m space with a top speed of 14m/s. Flight tests are performed on two quadrotors passing through 3 waypoints in a 4m * 2m flight arena to demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed method in the real world. Both simulations and real-world flight tests show that the proposed method can generate the optimal aggressive trajectories for a swarm of autonomous racing drones. The method can also be easily transferred to other types of robot swarms.
summary: Autonomous drone racing is becoming an excellent platform to challenge quadrotors' autonomy techniques including planning, navigation and control technologies. However, most research on this topic mainly focuses on single drone scenarios. In this paper, we describe a novel time-optimal trajectory generation method for generating time-optimal trajectories for a swarm of quadrotors to fly through pre-defined waypoints with their maximum maneuverability without collision. We verify the method in the Gazebo simulations where a swarm of 5 quadrotors can fly through a complex 6-waypoint racing track in a 35m * 35m space with a top speed of 14m/s. Flight tests are performed on two quadrotors passing through 3 waypoints in a 4m * 2m flight arena to demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed method in the real world. Both simulations and real-world flight tests show that the proposed method can generate the optimal aggressive trajectories for a swarm of autonomous racing drones. The method can also be easily transferred to other types of robot swarms.
abstract_zh: 自主无人机竞赛正在成为挑战四旋翼飞行器自主技术（包括规划、导航和控制技术）的绝佳平台。然而，大多数关于该主题的研究主要集中在单个无人机场景。在本文中，我们描述了一种新颖的时间最优轨迹生成方法，用于为一群四旋翼飞行器生成时间最优轨迹，使其以最大机动性飞过预定义的航路点而不会发生碰撞。我们在 Gazebo 模拟中验证了该方法，其中 5 架四旋翼飞行器可以在 35m * 35m 的空间内以 14m/s 的最高速度飞行通过复杂的 6 航点赛道。在4m*2m的飞行场地中，两台四旋翼飞行器经过3个航路点进行了飞行测试，验证了该方法在现实世界中的可行性。模拟和现实世界的飞行测试都表明，所提出的方法可以为一群自动竞赛无人机生成最佳的攻击轨迹。该方法也可以很容易地转移到其他类型的机器人群中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种为自主竞速无人机群生成时间最优轨迹的新方法，使其能在预设路标间以最大机动性飞行且不发生碰撞。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要集中在单架无人机场景，缺乏针对无人机群在复杂环境中高效避障与协同竞速的轨迹规划方法。
AI.method: 基于Gazebo仿真验证5架无人机在35m*35m空间内通过6个路标的复杂赛道性能，并通过2架无人机在4m*2m场地的实飞测试验证方法可行性。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明该方法可生成无碰撞的激进轨迹，无人机群最高时速达14m/s，且方法可迁移至其他机器人集群。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轨迹生成方法有效解决了无人机群竞速中的时间最优与避障问题，具有良好的实际应用与扩展潜力。

authors_text: Diederik P. Kingma,Ruiqi Gao
title: Understanding Diffusion Objectives as the ELBO with Simple Data Augmentation
title_zh: 将扩散目标理解为具有简单数据增强的 ELBO
abstract: To achieve the highest perceptual quality, state-of-the-art diffusion models are optimized with objectives that typically look very different from the maximum likelihood and the Evidence Lower Bound (ELBO) objectives. In this work, we reveal that diffusion model objectives are actually closely related to the ELBO. Specifically, we show that all commonly used diffusion model objectives equate to a weighted integral of ELBOs over different noise levels, where the weighting depends on the specific objective used. Under the condition of monotonic weighting, the connection is even closer: the diffusion objective then equals the ELBO, combined with simple data augmentation, namely Gaussian noise perturbation. We show that this condition holds for a number of state-of-the-art diffusion models. In experiments, we explore new monotonic weightings and demonstrate their effectiveness, achieving state-of-the-art FID scores on the high-resolution ImageNet benchmark.
summary: To achieve the highest perceptual quality, state-of-the-art diffusion models are optimized with objectives that typically look very different from the maximum likelihood and the Evidence Lower Bound (ELBO) objectives. In this work, we reveal that diffusion model objectives are actually closely related to the ELBO. Specifically, we show that all commonly used diffusion model objectives equate to a weighted integral of ELBOs over different noise levels, where the weighting depends on the specific objective used. Under the condition of monotonic weighting, the connection is even closer: the diffusion objective then equals the ELBO, combined with simple data augmentation, namely Gaussian noise perturbation. We show that this condition holds for a number of state-of-the-art diffusion models. In experiments, we explore new monotonic weightings and demonstrate their effectiveness, achieving state-of-the-art FID scores on the high-resolution ImageNet benchmark.
abstract_zh: 为了实现最高的感知质量，最先进的扩散模型进行了优化，其目标通常看起来与最大似然和证据下界 (ELBO) 目标非常不同。在这项工作中，我们揭示了扩散模型目标实际上与 ELBO 密切相关。具体来说，我们表明所有常用的扩散模型目标都相当于不同噪声水平上 ELBO 的加权积分，其中权重取决于所使用的特定目标。在单调加权的情况下，联系更加紧密：扩散目标等于 ELBO，结合简单的数据增强，即高斯噪声扰动。我们证明这个条件适用于许多最先进的扩散模型。在实验中，我们探索新的单调权重并证明其有效性，在高分辨率 ImageNet 基准上取得了最先进的 FID 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了扩散模型的目标函数实际上可以视为ELBO（证据下界）在不同噪声水平下的加权积分，并通过简单数据增强（高斯噪声扰动）建立联系。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的扩散模型使用与最大似然和ELBO目标显著不同的优化目标，缺乏理论统一性，阻碍了模型理解和改进。
AI.method: 通过数学推导证明扩散目标等价于ELBO在噪声水平上的加权积分，并在单调权重条件下结合高斯噪声增强等价于ELBO；设计新的单调权重方案进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在高分辨率ImageNet数据集上实现最先进的FID分数，验证了新权重方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型目标本质是ELBO与数据增强的结合，这一发现为模型设计提供了理论依据并提升了生成质量。

authors_text: Sami Davies,Benjamin Moseley,Sergei Vassilvitskii,Yuyan Wang
title: Predictive Flows for Faster Ford-Fulkerson
title_zh: Faster Ford-Fulkerson 的预测流程
abstract: Recent work has shown that leveraging learned predictions can improve the running time of algorithms for bipartite matching and similar combinatorial problems. In this work, we build on this idea to improve the performance of the widely used Ford-Fulkerson algorithm for computing maximum flows by seeding Ford-Fulkerson with predicted flows. Our proposed method offers strong theoretical performance in terms of the quality of the prediction. We then consider image segmentation, a common use-case of flows in computer vision, and complement our theoretical analysis with strong empirical results.
summary: Recent work has shown that leveraging learned predictions can improve the running time of algorithms for bipartite matching and similar combinatorial problems. In this work, we build on this idea to improve the performance of the widely used Ford-Fulkerson algorithm for computing maximum flows by seeding Ford-Fulkerson with predicted flows. Our proposed method offers strong theoretical performance in terms of the quality of the prediction. We then consider image segmentation, a common use-case of flows in computer vision, and complement our theoretical analysis with strong empirical results.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，利用学习到的预测可以提高二分匹配和类似组合问题算法的运行时间。在这项工作中，我们基于这一想法，通过将预测流量作为 Ford-Fulkerson 种子来提高广泛使用的 Ford-Fulkerson 算法计算最大流量的性能。我们提出的方法在预测质量方面提供了强大的理论性能。然后，我们考虑图像分割（计算机视觉中流的常见用例），并用强有力的实证结果补充我们的理论分析。

search_text: Predictive Flows for Faster Ford-Fulkerson Faster Ford-Fulkerson 的预测流程 Recent work has shown that leveraging learned predictions can improve the running time of algorithms for bipartite matching and similar combinatorial problems. In this work, we build on this idea to improve the performance of the widely used Ford-Fulkerson algorithm for computing maximum flows by seeding Ford-Fulkerson with predicted flows. Our proposed method offers strong theoretical performance in terms of the quality of the prediction. We then consider image segmentation, a common use-case of flows in computer vision, and complement our theoretical analysis with strong empirical results. 最近的工作表明，利用学习到的预测可以提高二分匹配和类似组合问题算法的运行时间。在这项工作中，我们基于这一想法，通过将预测流量作为 Ford-Fulkerson 种子来提高广泛使用的 Ford-Fulkerson 算法计算最大流量的性能。我们提出的方法在预测质量方面提供了强大的理论性能。然后，我们考虑图像分割（计算机视觉中流的常见用例），并用强有力的实证结果补充我们的理论分析。 通过预测流优化Ford-Fulkerson算法以提高最大流计算效率 Sami Davies,Benjamin Moseley,Sergei Vassilvitskii,Yuyan Wang cs.DS

authors_text: Shikha Baghel,Shreyas Ramoji,Sidharth,Ranjana H,Prachi Singh,Somil Jain,Pratik Roy Chowdhuri,Kaustubh Kulkarni,Swapnil Padhi,Deepu Vijayasenan,Sriram Ganapathy
title: DISPLACE Challenge: DIarization of SPeaker and LAnguage in Conversational Environments
title_zh: DISPLACE 挑战：对话环境中说话者和语言的数字化
abstract: In multilingual societies, social conversations often involve code-mixed speech. The current speech technology may not be well equipped to extract information from multi-lingual multi-speaker conversations. The DISPLACE challenge entails a first-of-kind task to benchmark speaker and language diarization on the same data, as the data contains multi-speaker conversations in multilingual code-mixed speech. The challenge attempts to highlight outstanding issues in speaker diarization (SD) in multilingual settings with code-mixing. Further, language diarization (LD) in multi-speaker settings also introduces new challenges, where the system has to disambiguate speaker switches with code switches. For this challenge, a natural multilingual, multi-speaker conversational dataset is distributed for development and evaluation purposes. The systems are evaluated on single-channel far-field recordings. We also release a baseline system and report the highlights of the system submissions.

AI.motivation: 现有语音技术难以处理多语言多说话人代码混合对话，需通过挑战赛推动相关技术发展。
AI.method: 构建多语言多说话人对话数据集，提供基线系统并评估不同方法。
AI.result: 发布数据集和基线系统，展示系统提交的性能亮点。
AI.conclusion: 通过挑战赛促进多语言代码混合场景下说话人及语言识别技术的研究与改进。

authors_text: Brittany Cates,Anagha Kulkarni,Sarath Sreedharan
title: Planning for Attacker Entrapment in Adversarial Settings
title_zh: 规划对抗性环境中的攻击者陷阱
abstract: In this paper, we propose a planning framework to generate a defense strategy against an attacker who is working in an environment where a defender can operate without the attacker's knowledge. The objective of the defender is to covertly guide the attacker to a trap state from which the attacker cannot achieve their goal. Further, the defender is constrained to achieve its goal within K number of steps, where K is calculated as a pessimistic lower bound within which the attacker is unlikely to suspect a threat in the environment. Such a defense strategy is highly useful in real world systems like honeypots or honeynets, where an unsuspecting attacker interacts with a simulated production system while assuming it is the actual production system. Typically, the interaction between an attacker and a defender is captured using game theoretic frameworks. Our problem formulation allows us to capture it as a much simpler infinite horizon discounted MDP, in which the optimal policy for the MDP gives the defender's strategy against the actions of the attacker. Through empirical evaluation, we show the merits of our problem formulation.
summary: In this paper, we propose a planning framework to generate a defense strategy against an attacker who is working in an environment where a defender can operate without the attacker's knowledge. The objective of the defender is to covertly guide the attacker to a trap state from which the attacker cannot achieve their goal. Further, the defender is constrained to achieve its goal within K number of steps, where K is calculated as a pessimistic lower bound within which the attacker is unlikely to suspect a threat in the environment. Such a defense strategy is highly useful in real world systems like honeypots or honeynets, where an unsuspecting attacker interacts with a simulated production system while assuming it is the actual production system. Typically, the interaction between an attacker and a defender is captured using game theoretic frameworks. Our problem formulation allows us to capture it as a much simpler infinite horizon discounted MDP, in which the optimal policy for the MDP gives the defender's strategy against the actions of the attacker. Through empirical evaluation, we show the merits of our problem formulation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个规划框架，用于生成针对攻击者的防御策略，攻击者在防御者可以在攻击者不知情的情况下进行操作的环境中工作。防御者的目标是隐蔽地引导攻击者进入陷阱状态，使攻击者无法达到目的。此外，防御者被限制在 K 步内实现其目标，其中 K 被计算为悲观下限，在该下限内攻击者不太可能怀疑环境中的威胁。这种防御策略在蜜罐或蜜网等现实系统中非常有用，在这些系统中，毫无戒心的攻击者与模拟生产系统进行交互，同时假设它是实际的生产系统。通常，攻击者和防御者之间的交互是使用博弈论框架捕获的。我们的问题表述使我们能够将其捕获为更简单的无限范围贴现 MDP，其中 MDP 的最优策略给出了防御者针对攻击者行为的策略。通过实证评估，我们展示了问题表述的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种规划框架，通过生成防御策略在对抗环境中 covertly 引导攻击者进入无法达成目标的陷阱状态。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法依赖复杂博弈论框架，而实际系统（如蜜罐）需要更简洁高效的策略来应对攻击者在K步内未察觉威胁的场景。
AI.method: 将问题建模为无限时间折扣MDP，通过计算最优策略实现防御者在K步内引导攻击者至陷阱状态的策略生成。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在对抗性场景中能有效提升防御效率，验证了问题建模的合理性与策略优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MDP框架为蜜罐等实际防御系统提供了可扩展的策略生成方案，相较传统博弈论方法更具计算简洁性。

authors_text: Jacob Piland,Adam Czajka,Christopher Sweet
title: Improving Model's Focus Improves Performance of Deep Learning-Based Synthetic Face Detectors
title_zh: 改进模型的焦点可提高基于深度学习的合成人脸检测器的性能
abstract: Deep learning-based models generalize better to unknown data samples after being guided "where to look" by incorporating human perception into training strategies. We made an observation that the entropy of the model's salience trained in that way is lower when compared to salience entropy computed for models training without human perceptual intelligence. Thus the question: does further increase of model's focus, by lowering the entropy of model's class activation map, help in further increasing the performance? In this paper we propose and evaluate several entropy-based new loss function components controlling the model's focus, covering the full range of the level of such control, from none to its "aggressive" minimization. We show, using a problem of synthetic face detection, that improving the model's focus, through lowering entropy, leads to models that perform better in an open-set scenario, in which the test samples are synthesized by unknown generative models. We also show that optimal performance is obtained when the model's loss function blends three aspects: regular classification, low-entropy of the model's focus, and human-guided saliency.
summary: Deep learning-based models generalize better to unknown data samples after being guided "where to look" by incorporating human perception into training strategies. We made an observation that the entropy of the model's salience trained in that way is lower when compared to salience entropy computed for models training without human perceptual intelligence. Thus the question: does further increase of model's focus, by lowering the entropy of model's class activation map, help in further increasing the performance? In this paper we propose and evaluate several entropy-based new loss function components controlling the model's focus, covering the full range of the level of such control, from none to its "aggressive" minimization. We show, using a problem of synthetic face detection, that improving the model's focus, through lowering entropy, leads to models that perform better in an open-set scenario, in which the test samples are synthesized by unknown generative models. We also show that optimal performance is obtained when the model's loss function blends three aspects: regular classification, low-entropy of the model's focus, and human-guided saliency.
abstract_zh: 通过将人类感知纳入训练策略，引导“往哪里看”后，基于深度学习的模型可以更好地泛化未知数据样本。我们观察到，与没有人类感知智能的模型训练计算的显着性熵相比，以这种方式训练的模型显着性熵较低。因此问题是：通过降低模型类激活图的熵来进一步增加模型的焦点是否有助于进一步提高性能？在本文中，我们提出并评估了几种控制模型焦点的基于熵的新损失函数组件，涵盖了此类控制级别的全部范围，从无到其“积极”最小化。我们利用合成人脸检测问题证明，通过降低熵来改善模型的焦点，可以使模型在开放集场景中表现更好，其中测试样本是由未知的生成模型合成的。我们还表明，当模型的损失函数融合三个方面时，可以获得最佳性能：常规分类、模型焦点的低熵和人类引导的显着性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过降低模型注意力熵值提升深度学习合成人脸检测器的性能，提出基于熵值的损失函数组件以增强模型聚焦能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在开放场景中面对未知生成模型合成的测试样本时表现不足，需通过增强模型聚焦能力提升泛化性能。
AI.method: 设计多种基于熵值的损失函数组件，从无控制到激进最小化覆盖不同控制强度，并结合常规分类、低熵注意力和人类引导显著性三方面优化损失函数。
AI.result: 实验表明降低注意力熵值可提升开放场景下的检测性能，最佳效果来自常规分类、低熵控制与人类显著性引导的损失函数融合。
AI.conclusion: 模型聚焦能力的提升（通过熵值控制）能有效增强合成人脸检测器的开放场景适应性，三要素结合的损失函数设计是关键优化方向。

search_text: Improving Model's Focus Improves Performance of Deep Learning-Based Synthetic Face Detectors 改进模型的焦点可提高基于深度学习的合成人脸检测器的性能 Deep learning-based models generalize better to unknown data samples after being guided "where to look" by incorporating human perception into training strategies. We made an observation that the entropy of the model's salience trained in that way is lower when compared to salience entropy computed for models training without human perceptual intelligence. Thus the question: does further increase of model's focus, by lowering the entropy of model's class activation map, help in further increasing the performance? In this paper we propose and evaluate several entropy-based new loss function components controlling the model's focus, covering the full range of the level of such control, from none to its "aggressive" minimization. We show, using a problem of synthetic face detection, that improving the model's focus, through lowering entropy, leads to models that perform better in an open-set scenario, in which the test samples are synthesized by unknown generative models. We also show that optimal performance is obtained when the model's loss function blends three aspects: regular classification, low-entropy of the model's focus, and human-guided saliency. 通过将人类感知纳入训练策略，引导“往哪里看”后，基于深度学习的模型可以更好地泛化未知数据样本。我们观察到，与没有人类感知智能的模型训练计算的显着性熵相比，以这种方式训练的模型显着性熵较低。因此问题是：通过降低模型类激活图的熵来进一步增加模型的焦点是否有助于进一步提高性能？在本文中，我们提出并评估了几种控制模型焦点的基于熵的新损失函数组件，涵盖了此类控制级别的全部范围，从无到其“积极”最小化。我们利用合成人脸检测问题证明，通过降低熵来改善模型的焦点，可以使模型在开放集场景中表现更好，其中测试样本是由未知的生成模型合成的。我们还表明，当模型的损失函数融合三个方面时，可以获得最佳性能：常规分类、模型焦点的低熵和人类引导的显着性。 本文通过降低模型注意力熵值提升深度学习合成人脸检测器的性能，提出基于熵值的损失函数组件以增强模型聚焦能力。 Jacob Piland,Adam Czajka,Christopher Sweet cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: William Yang,Michael Posa
title: Impact-Invariant Control: Maximizing Control Authority During Impacts
title_zh: 影响不变控制：在影响期间最大化控制权
comment: Project Website: https://impact-invariant-control.github.io/. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.06907
comments: Project Website: https://impact-invariant-control.github.io/. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.06907
abstract: When legged robots impact their environment executing dynamic motions, they undergo large changes in their velocities in a short amount of time. Measuring and applying feedback to these velocities is challenging, further complicated by uncertainty in the impact model and impact timing. This work proposes a general framework for adapting feedback control during impact by projecting the control objectives to a subspace that is invariant to the impact event. The resultant controller is robust to uncertainties in the impact event while maintaining maximum control authority over the impact-invariant subspace. We demonstrate the improved performance of the projection over other commonly used heuristics on a walking controller for a planar five-link-biped. The projection is also applied to jumping, box jumping, and running controllers for the compliant 3D bipedal robot, Cassie. The modification is easily applied to these various controllers and is a critical component to deploying on the physical robot. Code and video of the experiments are available at https://impact-invariant-control.github.io/.
summary: When legged robots impact their environment executing dynamic motions, they undergo large changes in their velocities in a short amount of time. Measuring and applying feedback to these velocities is challenging, further complicated by uncertainty in the impact model and impact timing. This work proposes a general framework for adapting feedback control during impact by projecting the control objectives to a subspace that is invariant to the impact event. The resultant controller is robust to uncertainties in the impact event while maintaining maximum control authority over the impact-invariant subspace. We demonstrate the improved performance of the projection over other commonly used heuristics on a walking controller for a planar five-link-biped. The projection is also applied to jumping, box jumping, and running controllers for the compliant 3D bipedal robot, Cassie. The modification is easily applied to these various controllers and is a critical component to deploying on the physical robot. Code and video of the experiments are available at https://impact-invariant-control.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 当腿式机器人执行动态运动时影响环境时，它们的速度会在短时间内发生巨大变化。测量和应用这些速度的反馈具有挑战性，并且由于影响模型和影响时间的不确定性而变得更加复杂。这项工作提出了一个通用框架，通过将控制目标投影到对撞击事件不变的子空间来适应撞击期间的反馈控制。由此产生的控制器对撞击事件中的不确定性具有鲁棒性，同时保持对撞击不变子空间的最大控制权限。我们在平面五连杆两足行走控制器上展示了与其他常用启发式方法相比投影性能的改进。该投影还应用于顺应性 3D 双足机器人 Cassie 的跳跃、跳箱和跑步控制器。修改很容易应用于这些不同的控制器，并且是部署在物理机器人上的关键组件。实验的代码和视频可在 https://impact-invariant-control.github.io/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种影响不变控制框架，通过将控制目标投影到与冲击事件无关的子空间，以提高腿部机器人在动态运动中的控制鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 腿部机器人在执行动态运动时，冲击会导致速度剧烈变化，传统反馈控制难以应对冲击模型不确定性和时间不确定性带来的挑战。
AI.method: 通过将控制目标投影到冲击不变子空间，设计鲁棒控制器以保持对冲击无关子空间的最大控制权，并验证其在多种控制器中的有效性。
AI.result: 在平面五连杆双足机器人和三维双足机器人Cassie的实验中，该方法优于其他启发式方法，且易于部署到物理机器人。
AI.conclusion: 冲击不变控制框架有效解决了冲击不确定性问题，为实际部署腿部机器人提供了关键控制方案。

authors_text: Jingli Shi,Weihua Li,Quan Bai,Yi Yang,Jianhua Jiang
title: Soft Prompt Guided Joint Learning for Cross-Domain Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 软提示引导联合学习进行跨域情感分析
abstract: Aspect term extraction is a fundamental task in fine-grained sentiment analysis, which aims at detecting customer's opinion targets from reviews on product or service. The traditional supervised models can achieve promising results with annotated datasets, however, the performance dramatically decreases when they are applied to the task of cross-domain aspect term extraction. Existing cross-domain transfer learning methods either directly inject linguistic features into Language models, making it difficult to transfer linguistic knowledge to target domain, or rely on the fixed predefined prompts, which is time-consuming to construct the prompts over all potential aspect term spans. To resolve the limitations, we propose a soft prompt-based joint learning method for cross domain aspect term extraction in this paper. Specifically, by incorporating external linguistic features, the proposed method learn domain-invariant representations between source and target domains via multiple objectives, which bridges the gap between domains with varied distributions of aspect terms. Further, the proposed method interpolates a set of transferable soft prompts consisted of multiple learnable vectors that are beneficial to detect aspect terms in target domain. Extensive experiments are conducted on the benchmark datasets and the experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for cross-domain aspect terms extraction.
summary: Aspect term extraction is a fundamental task in fine-grained sentiment analysis, which aims at detecting customer's opinion targets from reviews on product or service. The traditional supervised models can achieve promising results with annotated datasets, however, the performance dramatically decreases when they are applied to the task of cross-domain aspect term extraction. Existing cross-domain transfer learning methods either directly inject linguistic features into Language models, making it difficult to transfer linguistic knowledge to target domain, or rely on the fixed predefined prompts, which is time-consuming to construct the prompts over all potential aspect term spans. To resolve the limitations, we propose a soft prompt-based joint learning method for cross domain aspect term extraction in this paper. Specifically, by incorporating external linguistic features, the proposed method learn domain-invariant representations between source and target domains via multiple objectives, which bridges the gap between domains with varied distributions of aspect terms. Further, the proposed method interpolates a set of transferable soft prompts consisted of multiple learnable vectors that are beneficial to detect aspect terms in target domain. Extensive experiments are conducted on the benchmark datasets and the experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for cross-domain aspect terms extraction.
abstract_zh: 方面术语提取是细粒度情感分析中的一项基本任务，旨在从对产品或服务的评论中检测客户的意见目标。传统的监督模型可以通过带注释的数据集取得可喜的结果，但是，当它们应用于跨领域方面术语提取任务时，性能会急剧下降。现有的跨领域迁移学习方法要么直接将语言特征注入到语言模型中，这使得将语言知识迁移到目标领域变得困难，要么依赖于固定的预定义提示，这在所有潜在方面术语跨度上构建提示非常耗时。为了解决这些局限性，我们在本文中提出了一种基于软提示的跨域方面术语提取联合学习方法。具体来说，通过结合外部语言特征，所提出的方法通过多个目标学习源域和目标域之间的域不变表示，从而弥合了方面项分布不同的域之间的差距。此外，所提出的方法插入一组由多个可学习向量组成的可转移软提示，有利于检测目标域中的方面项。在基准数据集上进行了大量的实验，实验结果证明了所提出的跨域方面术语提取方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于软提示的联合学习方法，用于跨领域方面术语提取任务，以解决传统模型在跨领域场景下性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督模型依赖标注数据，在跨领域场景下表现不佳；现有迁移学习方法或难以传递语言知识，或依赖耗时的手动提示构建，无法适应不同领域。
AI.method: 通过引入外部语言特征，利用多目标学习域不变表示，并设计可学习的软提示向量集合，实现跨领域方面术语的可迁移检测。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在跨领域方面术语提取任务中优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 软提示联合学习方法有效弥合了领域间分布差异，为跨领域细粒度情感分析提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于软提示的联合学习方法，用于跨领域方面术语提取任务，以解决传统模型在跨领域场景下性能下降的问题。

search_text: Soft Prompt Guided Joint Learning for Cross-Domain Sentiment Analysis 软提示引导联合学习进行跨域情感分析 Aspect term extraction is a fundamental task in fine-grained sentiment analysis, which aims at detecting customer's opinion targets from reviews on product or service. The traditional supervised models can achieve promising results with annotated datasets, however, the performance dramatically decreases when they are applied to the task of cross-domain aspect term extraction. Existing cross-domain transfer learning methods either directly inject linguistic features into Language models, making it difficult to transfer linguistic knowledge to target domain, or rely on the fixed predefined prompts, which is time-consuming to construct the prompts over all potential aspect term spans. To resolve the limitations, we propose a soft prompt-based joint learning method for cross domain aspect term extraction in this paper. Specifically, by incorporating external linguistic features, the proposed method learn domain-invariant representations between source and target domains via multiple objectives, which bridges the gap between domains with varied distributions of aspect terms. Further, the proposed method interpolates a set of transferable soft prompts consisted of multiple learnable vectors that are beneficial to detect aspect terms in target domain. Extensive experiments are conducted on the benchmark datasets and the experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for cross-domain aspect terms extraction. 方面术语提取是细粒度情感分析中的一项基本任务，旨在从对产品或服务的评论中检测客户的意见目标。传统的监督模型可以通过带注释的数据集取得可喜的结果，但是，当它们应用于跨领域方面术语提取任务时，性能会急剧下降。现有的跨领域迁移学习方法要么直接将语言特征注入到语言模型中，这使得将语言知识迁移到目标领域变得困难，要么依赖于固定的预定义提示，这在所有潜在方面术语跨度上构建提示非常耗时。为了解决这些局限性，我们在本文中提出了一种基于软提示的跨域方面术语提取联合学习方法。具体来说，通过结合外部语言特征，所提出的方法通过多个目标学习源域和目标域之间的域不变表示，从而弥合了方面项分布不同的域之间的差距。此外，所提出的方法插入一组由多个可学习向量组成的可转移软提示，有利于检测目标域中的方面项。在基准数据集上进行了大量的实验，实验结果证明了所提出的跨域方面术语提取方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于软提示的联合学习方法，用于跨领域方面术语提取任务，以解决传统模型在跨领域场景下性能下降的问题。 Jingli Shi,Weihua Li,Quan Bai,Yi Yang,Jianhua Jiang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Vikrant Ashvinkumar,Aaron Bernstein,Nairen Cao,Christoph Grunau,Bernhard Haeupler,Yonggang Jiang,Danupon Nanongkai,Hsin Hao Su
title: Parallel, Distributed, and Quantum Exact Single-Source Shortest Paths with Negative Edge Weights
title_zh: 具有负边权重的并行、分布式和量子精确单源最短路径
abstract: This paper presents parallel, distributed and quantum algorithms for single-source shortest paths when edges can have negative weights (negative-weight SSSP). We show a framework that reduces negative-weight SSSP in all these setting to $n^{o(1)}$ calls to any SSSP algorithm that works with a virtual source. More specifically, for a graph with $m$ edges, $n$ vertices, undirected hop-diameter $D$, and polynomially bounded integer edge weights, we show randomized algorithms for negative-weight SSSP with (i) $W_{SSSP}(m,n)n^{o(1)}$ work and $S_{SSSP}(m,n)n^{o(1)}$ span, given access to an SSSP algorithm with $W_{SSSP}(m,n)$ work and $S_{SSSP}(m,n)$ span in the parallel model, (ii) $T_{SSSP}(n,D)n^{o(1)}$, given access to an SSSP algorithm that takes $T_{SSSP}(n,D)$ rounds in $\mathsf{CONGEST}$, (iii) $Q_{SSSP}(m,n)n^{o(1)}$ quantum edge queries, given access to a non-negative-weight SSSP algorithm that takes $Q_{SSSP}(m,n)$ queries in the quantum edge query model. This work builds off the recent result of [Bernstein, Nanongkai, Wulff-Nilsen, FOCS'22], which gives a near-linear time algorithm for negative-weight SSSP in the sequential setting. Using current state-of-the-art SSSP algorithms yields randomized algorithms for negative-weight SSSP with (i) $m^{1+o(1)}$ work and $n^{1/2+o(1)}$ span in the parallel model, (ii) $(n^{2/5}D^{2/5} + \sqrt{n} + D)n^{o(1)}$ rounds in $\mathsf{CONGEST}$, (iii) $m^{1/2}n^{1/2+o(1)}$ quantum queries to the adjacency list or $n^{1.5+o(1)}$ quantum queries to the adjacency matrix. Our main technical contribution is an efficient reduction for computing a low-diameter decomposition (LDD) of directed graphs to computations of SSSP with a virtual source. Efficiently computing an LDD has heretofore only been known for undirected graphs in both the parallel and distributed models.
summary: This paper presents parallel, distributed and quantum algorithms for single-source shortest paths when edges can have negative weights (negative-weight SSSP). We show a framework that reduces negative-weight SSSP in all these setting to $n^{o(1)}$ calls to any SSSP algorithm that works with a virtual source. More specifically, for a graph with $m$ edges, $n$ vertices, undirected hop-diameter $D$, and polynomially bounded integer edge weights, we show randomized algorithms for negative-weight SSSP with (i) $W_{SSSP}(m,n)n^{o(1)}$ work and $S_{SSSP}(m,n)n^{o(1)}$ span, given access to an SSSP algorithm with $W_{SSSP}(m,n)$ work and $S_{SSSP}(m,n)$ span in the parallel model, (ii) $T_{SSSP}(n,D)n^{o(1)}$, given access to an SSSP algorithm that takes $T_{SSSP}(n,D)$ rounds in $\mathsf{CONGEST}$, (iii) $Q_{SSSP}(m,n)n^{o(1)}$ quantum edge queries, given access to a non-negative-weight SSSP algorithm that takes $Q_{SSSP}(m,n)$ queries in the quantum edge query model. This work builds off the recent result of [Bernstein, Nanongkai, Wulff-Nilsen, FOCS'22], which gives a near-linear time algorithm for negative-weight SSSP in the sequential setting. Using current state-of-the-art SSSP algorithms yields randomized algorithms for negative-weight SSSP with (i) $m^{1+o(1)}$ work and $n^{1/2+o(1)}$ span in the parallel model, (ii) $(n^{2/5}D^{2/5} + \sqrt{n} + D)n^{o(1)}$ rounds in $\mathsf{CONGEST}$, (iii) $m^{1/2}n^{1/2+o(1)}$ quantum queries to the adjacency list or $n^{1.5+o(1)}$ quantum queries to the adjacency matrix. Our main technical contribution is an efficient reduction for computing a low-diameter decomposition (LDD) of directed graphs to computations of SSSP with a virtual source. Efficiently computing an LDD has heretofore only been known for undirected graphs in both the parallel and distributed models.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了当边可以具有负权重（负权重 SSSP）时单源最短路径的并行、分布式和量子算法。我们展示了一个框架，该框架可以将所有这些设置中的负权重 SSSP 减少到对任何与虚拟源配合使用的 SSSP 算法的 $n^{o(1)}$ 调用。更具体地说，对于具有 $m$ 边、$n$ 顶点、无向跳直径 $D$ 和多项式有界整数边权重的图，我们展示了负权 SSSP 的随机算法，其中 (i) $W_{SSSP}(m,n)n^{o(1)}$ 工作和 $S_{SSSP}(m,n)n^{o(1)}$ 跨度，可以访问 SSSP 算法$W_{SSSP}(m,n)$ 在并行模型中工作，$S_{SSSP}(m,n)$ 跨度，(ii) $T_{SSSP}(n,D)n^{o(1)}$，可以访问在 $\mathsf{CONGEST}$ 中进行 $T_{SSSP}(n,D)$ 轮的 SSSP 算法，(iii) $Q_{SSSP}(m,n)n^{o(1)}$ 量子边缘查询，可访问非负权重 SSSP 算法，该算法在量子边缘查询模型中采用 $Q_{SSSP}(m,n)$ 查询。这项工作建立在 [Bernstein、Nanongkai、Wulff-Nilsen、FOCS'22] 的最新结果的基础上，该结果为顺序设置中的负权 SSSP 提供了近线性时间算法。使用当前最先进的 SSSP 算法生成负权 SSSP 的随机算法，在并行模型中具有 (i) $m^{1+o(1)}$ 工作和 $n^{1/2+o(1)}$ 跨度，(ii) $(n^{2/5}D^{2/5} + \sqrt{n} + D)n^{o(1)}$ 在 $\mathsf{CONGEST}$ 中轮转， (iii) 对邻接列表进行 $m^{1/2}n^{1/2+o(1)}$ 个量子查询，或对邻接矩阵进行 $n^{1.5+o(1)}$ 个量子查询。我们的主要技术贡献是将有向图的低直径分解 (LDD) 计算有效简化为具有虚拟源的 SSSP 计算。迄今为止，仅针对并行模型和分布式模型中的无向图有效计算 LDD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用于处理负边权重的单源最短路径问题的并行、分布式和量子算法框架。
AI.motivation: 现有算法难以高效处理负权重边的单源最短路径问题，尤其在并行、分布式和量子计算模型中缺乏有效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入虚拟源点，将负权重单源最短路径问题转化为多次调用常规SSSP算法的框架，并提出高效计算有向图低直径分解的新方法。
AI.result: 实现了工作量$ m^{1+o(1)} $、跨度$ n^{1/2+o(1)} $的并行算法，$ (n^{2/5}D^{2/5} + \\sqrt{n} + D)n^{o(1)} $轮次的分布式算法，以及$ m^{1/2}n^{1/2+o(1)} $量子查询的量子算法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为不同计算模型下的负权重单源最短路径问题提供了统一解决方案，并改进了有向图低直径分解的计算效率。

authors_text: Philipp Klumpp,Pooja Chitkara,Leda Sarı,Prashant Serai,Jilong Wu,Irina-Elena Veliche,Rongqing Huang,Qing He
title: Synthetic Cross-accent Data Augmentation for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于自动语音识别的合成交叉口音数据增强
abstract: The awareness for biased ASR datasets or models has increased notably in recent years. Even for English, despite a vast amount of available training data, systems perform worse for non-native speakers. In this work, we improve an accent-conversion model (ACM) which transforms native US-English speech into accented pronunciation. We include phonetic knowledge in the ACM training to provide accurate feedback about how well certain pronunciation patterns were recovered in the synthesized waveform. Furthermore, we investigate the feasibility of learned accent representations instead of static embeddings. Generated data was then used to train two state-of-the-art ASR systems. We evaluated our approach on native and non-native English datasets and found that synthetically accented data helped the ASR to better understand speech from seen accents. This observation did not translate to unseen accents, and it was not observed for a model that had been pre-trained exclusively with native speech.
summary: The awareness for biased ASR datasets or models has increased notably in recent years. Even for English, despite a vast amount of available training data, systems perform worse for non-native speakers. In this work, we improve an accent-conversion model (ACM) which transforms native US-English speech into accented pronunciation. We include phonetic knowledge in the ACM training to provide accurate feedback about how well certain pronunciation patterns were recovered in the synthesized waveform. Furthermore, we investigate the feasibility of learned accent representations instead of static embeddings. Generated data was then used to train two state-of-the-art ASR systems. We evaluated our approach on native and non-native English datasets and found that synthetically accented data helped the ASR to better understand speech from seen accents. This observation did not translate to unseen accents, and it was not observed for a model that had been pre-trained exclusively with native speech.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对有偏见的 ASR 数据集或模型的认识显着提高。即使对于英语，尽管有大量可用的训练数据，但系统对于非母语人士来说表现较差。在这项工作中，我们改进了口音转换模型（ACM），该模型将美国英语母语语音转换为带口音的发音。我们将语音知识纳入 ACM 训练中，以提供有关合成波形中某些发音模式恢复程度的准确反馈。此外，我们研究了学习的口音表示而不是静态嵌入的可行性。然后生成的数据被用来训练两个最先进的 ASR 系统。我们在母语和非母语英语数据集上评估了我们的方法，发现合成口音数据有助于 ASR 更好地理解所见口音的语音。这一观察结果并没有转化为看不见的口音，并且对于仅用母语语音进行预训练的模型也没有观察到这一现象。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出通过合成跨口音数据增强自动语音识别（ASR）系统，以改善非母语者语音识别效果。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR系统在非母语者语音识别上表现较差，需通过数据增强技术提升模型对不同口音的适应能力。
AI.method: 改进口音转换模型（ACM），结合语音学知识优化合成发音质量，并采用动态口音表示替代静态嵌入生成训练数据。
AI.result: 合成口音数据提升了ASR对已见过口音的识别效果，但对未见过口音无效，且母语预训练模型未观察到此效果。
AI.conclusion: 合成跨口音数据可增强ASR对特定口音的适应性，但需进一步研究以提升对未知口音的泛化能力。

search_text: Synthetic Cross-accent Data Augmentation for Automatic Speech Recognition 用于自动语音识别的合成交叉口音数据增强 The awareness for biased ASR datasets or models has increased notably in recent years. Even for English, despite a vast amount of available training data, systems perform worse for non-native speakers. In this work, we improve an accent-conversion model (ACM) which transforms native US-English speech into accented pronunciation. We include phonetic knowledge in the ACM training to provide accurate feedback about how well certain pronunciation patterns were recovered in the synthesized waveform. Furthermore, we investigate the feasibility of learned accent representations instead of static embeddings. Generated data was then used to train two state-of-the-art ASR systems. We evaluated our approach on native and non-native English datasets and found that synthetically accented data helped the ASR to better understand speech from seen accents. This observation did not translate to unseen accents, and it was not observed for a model that had been pre-trained exclusively with native speech. 近年来，人们对有偏见的 ASR 数据集或模型的认识显着提高。即使对于英语，尽管有大量可用的训练数据，但系统对于非母语人士来说表现较差。在这项工作中，我们改进了口音转换模型（ACM），该模型将美国英语母语语音转换为带口音的发音。我们将语音知识纳入 ACM 训练中，以提供有关合成波形中某些发音模式恢复程度的准确反馈。此外，我们研究了学习的口音表示而不是静态嵌入的可行性。然后生成的数据被用来训练两个最先进的 ASR 系统。我们在母语和非母语英语数据集上评估了我们的方法，发现合成口音数据有助于 ASR 更好地理解所见口音的语音。这一观察结果并没有转化为看不见的口音，并且对于仅用母语语音进行预训练的模型也没有观察到这一现象。 本论文提出通过合成跨口音数据增强自动语音识别（ASR）系统，以改善非母语者语音识别效果。 Philipp Klumpp,Pooja Chitkara,Leda Sarı,Prashant Serai,Jilong Wu,Irina-Elena Veliche,Rongqing Huang,Qing He cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Arpita Biswas,Jackson A. Killian,Paula Rodriguez Diaz,Susobhan Ghosh,Milind Tambe
title: Fairness for Workers Who Pull the Arms: An Index Based Policy for Allocation of Restless Bandit Tasks
title_zh: 拉动手臂的工人的公平性：基于指数的强盗任务分配策略
comment: 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023), 10 pages
comments: 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023), 10 pages
abstract: Motivated by applications such as machine repair, project monitoring, and anti-poaching patrol scheduling, we study intervention planning of stochastic processes under resource constraints. This planning problem has previously been modeled as restless multi-armed bandits (RMAB), where each arm is an intervention-dependent Markov Decision Process. However, the existing literature assumes all intervention resources belong to a single uniform pool, limiting their applicability to real-world settings where interventions are carried out by a set of workers, each with their own costs, budgets, and intervention effects. In this work, we consider a novel RMAB setting, called multi-worker restless bandits (MWRMAB) with heterogeneous workers. The goal is to plan an intervention schedule that maximizes the expected reward while satisfying budget constraints on each worker as well as fairness in terms of the load assigned to each worker. Our contributions are two-fold: (1) we provide a multi-worker extension of the Whittle index to tackle heterogeneous costs and per-worker budget and (2) we develop an index-based scheduling policy to achieve fairness. Further, we evaluate our method on various cost structures and show that our method significantly outperforms other baselines in terms of fairness without sacrificing much in reward accumulated.
summary: Motivated by applications such as machine repair, project monitoring, and anti-poaching patrol scheduling, we study intervention planning of stochastic processes under resource constraints. This planning problem has previously been modeled as restless multi-armed bandits (RMAB), where each arm is an intervention-dependent Markov Decision Process. However, the existing literature assumes all intervention resources belong to a single uniform pool, limiting their applicability to real-world settings where interventions are carried out by a set of workers, each with their own costs, budgets, and intervention effects. In this work, we consider a novel RMAB setting, called multi-worker restless bandits (MWRMAB) with heterogeneous workers. The goal is to plan an intervention schedule that maximizes the expected reward while satisfying budget constraints on each worker as well as fairness in terms of the load assigned to each worker. Our contributions are two-fold: (1) we provide a multi-worker extension of the Whittle index to tackle heterogeneous costs and per-worker budget and (2) we develop an index-based scheduling policy to achieve fairness. Further, we evaluate our method on various cost structures and show that our method significantly outperforms other baselines in terms of fairness without sacrificing much in reward accumulated.
abstract_zh: 在机器维修、项目监控和反偷猎巡逻调度等应用的推动下，我们研究了资源约束下随机过程的干预规划。这个规划问题之前被建模为不安定的多臂老虎机（RMAB），其中每个臂都是一个依赖于干预的马尔可夫决策过程。然而，现有文献假设所有干预资源都属于一个统一的池，这限制了它们在现实环境中的适用性，在现实世界中，干预措施是由一组工作人员进行的，每个工作人员都有自己的成本、预算和干预效果。在这项工作中，我们考虑了一种新颖的 RMAB 设置，称为具有异构工人的多工人不安强盗 (MWRMAB)。目标是规划一个干预计划，使预期奖励最大化，同时满足每个工人的预算限制以及分配给每个工人的负载的公平性。我们的贡献有两个方面：(1) 我们提供 Whittle 索引的多工作人员扩展，以解决异构成本和每个工作人员的预算问题；(2) 我们开发基于索引的调度策略以实现公平。此外，我们在各种成本结构上评估我们的方法，并表明我们的方法在公平性方面显着优于其他基线，而无需牺牲太多累积的奖励。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在多工人异构环境下，如何在满足预算约束的同时实现公平的任务分配，提出基于Whittle指数的调度策略以解决休息型多臂老虎机问题。
AI.motivation: 现有休息型多臂老虎机（RMAB）模型假设干预资源来自单一统一池，无法适应现实场景中工人具有不同成本、预算和干预效果的异构特性。
AI.method: 提出多工人休息型老虎机（MWRMAB）模型，扩展Whittle指数以处理异构工人成本与预算约束，并设计基于指数的调度策略实现负载公平性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种成本结构下显著优于其他基线，在保证累积奖励不下降的前提下有效提升工人负载公平性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的指数扩展方法为异构工人环境下的干预调度提供了兼顾公平性与效率的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

title: Improved Segmentation of Deep Sulci in Cortical Gray Matter Using a Deep Learning Framework Incorporating Laplace's Equation
title_zh: 使用结合拉普拉斯方程的深度学习框架改进皮质灰质深脑沟的分割
comment: Accepted at the 28th biennial international conference on Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
comments: Accepted at the 28th biennial international conference on Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
abstract: When developing tools for automated cortical segmentation, the ability to produce topologically correct segmentations is important in order to compute geometrically valid morphometry measures. In practice, accurate cortical segmentation is challenged by image artifacts and the highly convoluted anatomy of the cortex itself. To address this, we propose a novel deep learning-based cortical segmentation method in which prior knowledge about the geometry of the cortex is incorporated into the network during the training process. We design a loss function which uses the theory of Laplace's equation applied to the cortex to locally penalize unresolved boundaries between tightly folded sulci. Using an ex vivo MRI dataset of human medial temporal lobe specimens, we demonstrate that our approach outperforms baseline segmentation networks, both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: When developing tools for automated cortical segmentation, the ability to produce topologically correct segmentations is important in order to compute geometrically valid morphometry measures. In practice, accurate cortical segmentation is challenged by image artifacts and the highly convoluted anatomy of the cortex itself. To address this, we propose a novel deep learning-based cortical segmentation method in which prior knowledge about the geometry of the cortex is incorporated into the network during the training process. We design a loss function which uses the theory of Laplace's equation applied to the cortex to locally penalize unresolved boundaries between tightly folded sulci. Using an ex vivo MRI dataset of human medial temporal lobe specimens, we demonstrate that our approach outperforms baseline segmentation networks, both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 在开发自动皮质分割工具时，生成拓扑正确的分割的能力对于计算几何有效的形态测量测量非常重要。在实践中，准确的皮质分割受到图像伪影和皮质本身高度复杂的解剖结构的挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的皮层分割方法，其中有关皮层几何形状的先验知识在训练过程中被纳入网络中。我们设计了一个损失函数，它使用应用于皮层的拉普拉斯方程理论来局部惩罚紧密折叠的脑沟之间未解决的边界。使用人类内侧颞叶标本的离体 MRI 数据集，我们证明我们的方法在数量和质量上都优于基线分割网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合拉普拉斯方程的深度学习框架，用于改进皮层灰质深沟的分割。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法在处理图像伪影和复杂皮层结构时存在挑战，需拓扑正确分割以确保形态测量准确性。
AI.method: 设计结合拉普拉斯方程的损失函数，局部惩罚未解决的沟回边界，并在训练中融入皮层几何先验知识。
AI.result: 在离体MRI数据集上验证，定量和定性结果均优于基线分割网络。
AI.conclusion: 结合几何先验知识的深度学习方法能有效提升皮层分割准确性，尤其在处理复杂解剖结构时表现更优。

result: 在离体MRI数据集上验证，定量和定性结果均优于基线分割网络。
conclusion: 结合几何先验知识的深度学习方法能有效提升皮层分割准确性，尤其在处理复杂解剖结构时表现更优。
search_text: Improved Segmentation of Deep Sulci in Cortical Gray Matter Using a Deep Learning Framework Incorporating Laplace's Equation 使用结合拉普拉斯方程的深度学习框架改进皮质灰质深脑沟的分割 When developing tools for automated cortical segmentation, the ability to produce topologically correct segmentations is important in order to compute geometrically valid morphometry measures. In practice, accurate cortical segmentation is challenged by image artifacts and the highly convoluted anatomy of the cortex itself. To address this, we propose a novel deep learning-based cortical segmentation method in which prior knowledge about the geometry of the cortex is incorporated into the network during the training process. We design a loss function which uses the theory of Laplace's equation applied to the cortex to locally penalize unresolved boundaries between tightly folded sulci. Using an ex vivo MRI dataset of human medial temporal lobe specimens, we demonstrate that our approach outperforms baseline segmentation networks, both quantitatively and qualitatively. 在开发自动皮质分割工具时，生成拓扑正确的分割的能力对于计算几何有效的形态测量测量非常重要。在实践中，准确的皮质分割受到图像伪影和皮质本身高度复杂的解剖结构的挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的皮层分割方法，其中有关皮层几何形状的先验知识在训练过程中被纳入网络中。我们设计了一个损失函数，它使用应用于皮层的拉普拉斯方程理论来局部惩罚紧密折叠的脑沟之间未解决的边界。使用人类内侧颞叶标本的离体 MRI 数据集，我们证明我们的方法在数量和质量上都优于基线分割网络。 本文提出了一种结合拉普拉斯方程的深度学习框架，用于改进皮层灰质深沟的分割。 Sadhana Ravikumar,Ranjit Ittyerah,Sydney Lim,Long Xie,Sandhitsu Das,Pulkit Khandelwal,Laura E. M. Wisse,Madigan L. Bedard,John L. Robinson,Terry Schuck,Murray Grossman,John Q. Trojanowski,Edward B. Lee,M. Dylan Tisdall,Karthik Prabhakaran,John A. Detre,David J. Irwin,Winifred Trotman,Gabor Mizsei,Emilio Artacho-Pérula,Maria Mercedes Iñiguez de Onzono Martin,Maria del Mar Arroyo Jiménez,Monica Muñoz,Francisco Javier Molina Romero,Maria del Pilar Marcos Rabal, et al. authors_text: Yuri Faenza,Chengyue He,Jay Sethuraman
title: Scarf's algorithm and stable marriages
title_zh: 围巾算法与稳定婚姻
abstract: Scarf's algorithm gives a pivoting procedure to find a special vertex -- a dominating vertex -- in down-monotone polytopes. This paper studies the behavior of Scarf's algorithm when employed to find stable matchings in bipartite graphs. First, it proves that Scarf's algorithm can be implemented to run in polynomial time, showing the first positive result on its runtime in significant settings. Second, it shows an infinite family of instances where, no matter the pivoting rule and runtime, Scarf's algorithm outputs a matching from an exponentially small subset of all stable matchings, thus showing a structural weakness of the approach.
summary: Scarf's algorithm gives a pivoting procedure to find a special vertex -- a dominating vertex -- in down-monotone polytopes. This paper studies the behavior of Scarf's algorithm when employed to find stable matchings in bipartite graphs. First, it proves that Scarf's algorithm can be implemented to run in polynomial time, showing the first positive result on its runtime in significant settings. Second, it shows an infinite family of instances where, no matter the pivoting rule and runtime, Scarf's algorithm outputs a matching from an exponentially small subset of all stable matchings, thus showing a structural weakness of the approach.
abstract_zh: Scarf 的算法给出了一个旋转过程，用于在下单调多胞形中查找特殊顶点（主导顶点）。本文研究了 Scarf 算法在二部图中寻找稳定匹配时的行为。首先，它证明了 Scarf 的算法可以在多项式时间内运行，在重要设置下显示其运行时的第一个积极结果。其次，它显示了无限的实例系列，其中无论旋转规则和运行时间如何，Scarf 的算法都会从所有稳定匹配的指数小子集中输出匹配，从而显示该方法的结构弱点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究Scarf算法在求解二分图稳定匹配问题中的应用，分析其时间复杂度及算法局限性。
AI.motivation: Scarf算法在下单调多面体中寻找支配顶点的效率尚无明确理论支持，而稳定匹配问题作为经典组合优化问题，需探索新算法的有效性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明Scarf算法在稳定匹配问题中的多项式时间可行性，并构造无限实例验证其输出匹配的分布特性。
AI.result: 首次证明Scarf算法在稳定匹配场景下的多项式时间复杂度，同时发现其输出匹配仅来自所有稳定匹配的指数小子集。
AI.conclusion: Scarf算法在稳定匹配问题中具有理论价值，但存在结构性局限，需结合其他方法改进匹配多样性。

authors_text: Eric Sun,Jinyu Li,Yuxuan Hu,Yimeng Zhu,Long Zhou,Jian Xue,Peidong Wang,Linquan Liu,Shujie Liu,Edward Lin,Yifan Gong
title: Building High-accuracy Multilingual ASR with Gated Language Experts and Curriculum Training
title_zh: 与门控语言专家和课程培训一起构建高精度多语言 ASR
abstract: We propose gated language experts and curriculum training to enhance multilingual transformer transducer models without requiring language identification (LID) input from users during inference. Our method incorporates a gating mechanism and LID loss, enabling transformer experts to learn language-specific information. By combining gated transformer experts with shared transformer layers, we construct multilingual transformer blocks and utilize linear experts to effectively regularize the joint network. The curriculum training scheme leverages LID to guide the gated experts in improving their respective language performance. Experimental results on a bilingual task involving English and Spanish demonstrate significant improvements, with average relative word error reductions of 12.5% and 7.3% compared to the baseline bilingual and monolingual models, respectively. Notably, our method achieves performance comparable to the upper-bound model trained and inferred with oracle LID. Extending our approach to trilingual, quadrilingual, and pentalingual models reveals similar advantages to those observed in the bilingual models, highlighting its ease of extension to multiple languages.
summary: We propose gated language experts and curriculum training to enhance multilingual transformer transducer models without requiring language identification (LID) input from users during inference. Our method incorporates a gating mechanism and LID loss, enabling transformer experts to learn language-specific information. By combining gated transformer experts with shared transformer layers, we construct multilingual transformer blocks and utilize linear experts to effectively regularize the joint network. The curriculum training scheme leverages LID to guide the gated experts in improving their respective language performance. Experimental results on a bilingual task involving English and Spanish demonstrate significant improvements, with average relative word error reductions of 12.5% and 7.3% compared to the baseline bilingual and monolingual models, respectively. Notably, our method achieves performance comparable to the upper-bound model trained and inferred with oracle LID. Extending our approach to trilingual, quadrilingual, and pentalingual models reveals similar advantages to those observed in the bilingual models, highlighting its ease of extension to multiple languages.
abstract_zh: 我们建议门控语言专家和课程培训来增强多语言变压器传感器模型，而无需用户在推理过程中输入语言识别（LID）。我们的方法结合了门控机制和 LID 损失，使 Transformer 专家能够学习特定于语言的信息。通过将门控变压器专家与共享变压器层相结合，我们构建了多语言变压器块，并利用线性专家来有效地规范联合网络。课程培训计划利用LID来指导门控专家提高各自的语言表现。涉及英语和西班牙语的双语任务的实验结果显示出显着的改进，与基线双语和单语模型相比，平均相对单词错误分别减少了 12.5% 和 7.3%。值得注意的是，我们的方法实现了与使用 oracle LID 训练和推断的上限模型相当的性能。将我们的方法扩展到三语、四语和五语模型，显示出与双语模型中观察到的类似优点，突出了其易于扩展到多种语言。

AI.tldr: 提出门控语言专家和课程训练方法，提升多语言语音识别（ASR）系统的准确性，无需语言识别（LID）输入。
AI.motivation: 传统多语言ASR依赖语言识别（LID）输入，增加复杂性且可能影响性能，需探索无需LID的高效多语言建模方法。
AI.method: 结合门控机制与LID损失，通过共享Transformer层和线性专家构建多语言块，并利用课程训练引导专家逐步优化各语言性能。
AI.result: 双语任务中相对词错误率降低12.5%（对比双语基线）和7.3%（对比单语模型），性能接近理想LID模型；扩展至多语种效果一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需LID即可实现高性能多语言ASR，结构灵活易扩展，为多语种语音识别提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Odelia Melamed,Gilad Yehudai,Gal Vardi
title: Adversarial Examples Exist in Two-Layer ReLU Networks for Low Dimensional Linear Subspaces
title_zh: 低维线性子空间的两层 ReLU 网络中存在对抗性示例
abstract: Despite a great deal of research, it is still not well-understood why trained neural networks are highly vulnerable to adversarial examples. In this work we focus on two-layer neural networks trained using data which lie on a low dimensional linear subspace. We show that standard gradient methods lead to non-robust neural networks, namely, networks which have large gradients in directions orthogonal to the data subspace, and are susceptible to small adversarial $L_2$-perturbations in these directions. Moreover, we show that decreasing the initialization scale of the training algorithm, or adding $L_2$ regularization, can make the trained network more robust to adversarial perturbations orthogonal to the data.
summary: Despite a great deal of research, it is still not well-understood why trained neural networks are highly vulnerable to adversarial examples. In this work we focus on two-layer neural networks trained using data which lie on a low dimensional linear subspace. We show that standard gradient methods lead to non-robust neural networks, namely, networks which have large gradients in directions orthogonal to the data subspace, and are susceptible to small adversarial $L_2$-perturbations in these directions. Moreover, we show that decreasing the initialization scale of the training algorithm, or adding $L_2$ regularization, can make the trained network more robust to adversarial perturbations orthogonal to the data.
abstract_zh: 尽管进行了大量研究，但仍然不清楚为什么经过训练的神经网络非常容易受到对抗性例子的影响。在这项工作中，我们重点关注使用低维线性子空间上的数据训练的两层神经网络。我们表明，标准梯度方法会导致非鲁棒神经网络，即在与数据子空间正交的方向上具有大梯度的网络，并且容易受到这些方向上的小对抗性 $L_2$ 扰动。此外，我们表明，减少训练算法的初始化规模，或添加 $L_2$ 正则化，可以使训练后的网络对与数据正交的对抗性扰动更加鲁棒。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在低维线性子空间中训练的两层ReLU网络为何容易受到对抗样本攻击的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究，但训练后的神经网络为何对对抗样本高度脆弱仍未被充分理解，特别是在低维数据子空间场景下。
AI.method: 通过分析标准梯度下降方法在低维数据子空间中的训练过程，研究网络梯度方向与对抗扰动的关系，并验证初始化尺度和L2正则化对鲁棒性的影响。
AI.result: 发现标准梯度方法会导致网络在数据子空间正交方向上产生大梯度，从而对微小对抗扰动敏感；减小初始化尺度或添加L2正则化可提升正交方向的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 对抗样本的产生与网络在数据子空间正交方向的梯度特性相关，通过调整训练参数可有效增强模型鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了在低维线性子空间中训练的两层ReLU网络为何容易受到对抗样本攻击的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究，但训练后的神经网络为何对对抗样本高度脆弱仍未被充分理解，特别是在低维数据子空间场景下。
ai_content.method: 通过分析标准梯度下降方法在低维数据子空间中的训练过程，研究网络梯度方向与对抗扰动的关系，并验证初始化尺度和L2正则化对鲁棒性的影响。
ai_content.result: 发现标准梯度方法会导致网络在数据子空间正交方向上产生大梯度，从而对微小对抗扰动敏感；减小初始化尺度或添加L2正则化可提升正交方向的鲁棒性。
ai_content.conclusion: 对抗样本的产生与网络在数据子空间正交方向的梯度特性相关，通过调整训练参数可有效增强模型鲁棒性。

search_text: Adversarial Examples Exist in Two-Layer ReLU Networks for Low Dimensional Linear Subspaces 低维线性子空间的两层 ReLU 网络中存在对抗性示例 Despite a great deal of research, it is still not well-understood why trained neural networks are highly vulnerable to adversarial examples. In this work we focus on two-layer neural networks trained using data which lie on a low dimensional linear subspace. We show that standard gradient methods lead to non-robust neural networks, namely, networks which have large gradients in directions orthogonal to the data subspace, and are susceptible to small adversarial $L_2$-perturbations in these directions. Moreover, we show that decreasing the initialization scale of the training algorithm, or adding $L_2$ regularization, can make the trained network more robust to adversarial perturbations orthogonal to the data. 尽管进行了大量研究，但仍然不清楚为什么经过训练的神经网络非常容易受到对抗性例子的影响。在这项工作中，我们重点关注使用低维线性子空间上的数据训练的两层神经网络。我们表明，标准梯度方法会导致非鲁棒神经网络，即在与数据子空间正交的方向上具有大梯度的网络，并且容易受到这些方向上的小对抗性 $L_2$ 扰动。此外，我们表明，减少训练算法的初始化规模，或添加 $L_2$ 正则化，可以使训练后的网络对与数据正交的对抗性扰动更加鲁棒。 本文研究了在低维线性子空间中训练的两层ReLU网络为何容易受到对抗样本攻击的问题。 Odelia Melamed,Gilad Yehudai,Gal Vardi cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Christian Marius Lillelund,Henrik Bagger Jensen,Christian Fischer Pedersen
title: Cloud K-SVD for Image Denoising
title_zh: 用于图像去噪的 Cloud K-SVD
abstract: Cloud K-SVD is a dictionary learning algorithm that can train at multiple nodes and hereby produce a mutual dictionary to represent low-dimensional geometric structures in image data. We present a novel application of the algorithm as we use it to recover both noiseless and noisy images from overlapping patches. We implement a node network in Kubernetes using Docker containers to facilitate Cloud K-SVD. Results show that Cloud K-SVD can recover images approximately and remove quantifiable amounts of noise from benchmark gray-scaled images without sacrificing accuracy in recovery; we achieve an SSIM index of 0.88, 0.91 and 0.95 between clean and recovered images for noise levels ($μ$ = 0, $σ^{2}$ = 0.01, 0.005, 0.001), respectively, which is similar to SOTA in the field. Cloud K-SVD is evidently able to learn a mutual dictionary across multiple nodes and remove AWGN from images. The mutual dictionary can be used to recover a specific image at any of the nodes in the network.
summary: Cloud K-SVD is a dictionary learning algorithm that can train at multiple nodes and hereby produce a mutual dictionary to represent low-dimensional geometric structures in image data. We present a novel application of the algorithm as we use it to recover both noiseless and noisy images from overlapping patches. We implement a node network in Kubernetes using Docker containers to facilitate Cloud K-SVD. Results show that Cloud K-SVD can recover images approximately and remove quantifiable amounts of noise from benchmark gray-scaled images without sacrificing accuracy in recovery; we achieve an SSIM index of 0.88, 0.91 and 0.95 between clean and recovered images for noise levels ($μ$ = 0, $σ^{2}$ = 0.01, 0.005, 0.001), respectively, which is similar to SOTA in the field. Cloud K-SVD is evidently able to learn a mutual dictionary across multiple nodes and remove AWGN from images. The mutual dictionary can be used to recover a specific image at any of the nodes in the network.
abstract_zh: Cloud K-SVD 是一种字典学习算法，可以在多个节点上进行训练，从而生成互字典来表示图像数据中的低维几何结构。我们提出了该算法的一种新颖应用，因为我们使用它从重叠的补丁中恢复无噪声和噪声图像。我们使用 Docker 容器在 Kubernetes 中实现节点网络，以促进 Cloud K-SVD。结果表明，Cloud K-SVD 可以近似地恢复图像，并从基准灰度图像中去除可量化的噪声，而不会牺牲恢复的准确性；我们在干净图像和恢复图像之间的噪声水平（$μ$ = 0、$σ^{2}$ = 0.01、0.005、0.001）之间分别实现了 0.88、0.91 和 0.95 的 SSIM 指数，这与该领域的 SOTA 类似。 Cloud K-SVD 显然能够学习跨多个节点的互字典并从图像中删除 AWGN。互字典可用于恢复网络中任何节点上的特定图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Cloud K-SVD的图像去噪方法，通过分布式节点网络学习共享字典以恢复图像。
AI.motivation: 传统单节点字典学习难以高效处理大规模图像数据，且难以在去噪时保持高精度，需探索分布式学习框架提升性能。
AI.method: 在Kubernetes中部署Docker容器构建节点网络，利用Cloud K-SVD算法跨节点训练共享字典，通过重叠图像块恢复噪声图像。
AI.result: 在不同噪声水平下（μ=0, σ²=0.01/0.005/0.001）实现SSIM指数分别为0.88、0.91和0.95，接近领域SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: Cloud K-SVD能有效跨节点学习共享字典，实现高效去噪且保持高精度，共享字典可支持网络中任一节点恢复图像。

authors_text: András Kornai,Michael Bukatin,Zsolt Zombori
title: Safety without alignment
title_zh: 无需对准即可安全
abstract: Currently, the dominant paradigm in AI safety is alignment with human values. Here we describe progress on developing an alternative approach to safety, based on ethical rationalism (Gewirth:1978), and propose an inherently safe implementation path via hybrid theorem provers in a sandbox. As AGIs evolve, their alignment may fade, but their rationality can only increase (otherwise more rational ones will have a significant evolutionary advantage) so an approach that ties their ethics to their rationality has clear long-term advantages.
summary: Currently, the dominant paradigm in AI safety is alignment with human values. Here we describe progress on developing an alternative approach to safety, based on ethical rationalism (Gewirth:1978), and propose an inherently safe implementation path via hybrid theorem provers in a sandbox. As AGIs evolve, their alignment may fade, but their rationality can only increase (otherwise more rational ones will have a significant evolutionary advantage) so an approach that ties their ethics to their rationality has clear long-term advantages.
abstract_zh: 目前，人工智能安全的主导范式是与人类价值观保持一致。在这里，我们描述了基于伦理理性主义（Gewirth：1978）开发替代安全方法的进展，并通过沙箱中的混合定理证明器提出了一种本质安全的实施路径。随着 AGI 的发展，它们的一致性可能会消失，但它们的理性只会增加（否则更理性的将具有显着的进化优势），因此将其道德与理性联系起来的方法具有明显的长期优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种不依赖人类价值观对齐的AI安全方法，基于伦理理性主义理论，通过混合定理证明器在沙盒中实现固有安全机制。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的AI安全范式存在对齐失效风险，而AGI的理性能力将随进化持续增强，需建立与理性绑定的伦理框架以确保长期安全。
AI.method: 采用伦理理性主义理论框架，设计基于混合定理证明器的沙盒系统，通过形式化验证确保AI行为符合理性推导的伦理准则。
AI.result: 构建了理论可行的安全实现路径，证明基于理性的伦理约束在AGI进化中具有稳定性优势，但需进一步工程化验证。
AI.conclusion: 将伦理与理性绑定的路径比传统对齐方法更具长期可靠性，为AGI安全提供了新的理论方向和实现可能性。

authors_text: Shengju Qian,Huiwen Chang,Yuanzhen Li,Zizhao Zhang,Jiaya Jia,Han Zhang
title: StraIT: Non-autoregressive Generation with Stratified Image Transformer
title_zh: StraIT：使用分层图像转换器的非自回归生成
abstract: We propose Stratified Image Transformer(StraIT), a pure non-autoregressive(NAR) generative model that demonstrates superiority in high-quality image synthesis over existing autoregressive(AR) and diffusion models(DMs). In contrast to the under-exploitation of visual characteristics in existing vision tokenizer, we leverage the hierarchical nature of images to encode visual tokens into stratified levels with emergent properties. Through the proposed image stratification that obtains an interlinked token pair, we alleviate the modeling difficulty and lift the generative power of NAR models. Our experiments demonstrate that StraIT significantly improves NAR generation and out-performs existing DMs and AR methods while being order-of-magnitude faster, achieving FID scores of 3.96 at 256*256 resolution on ImageNet without leveraging any guidance in sampling or auxiliary image classifiers. When equipped with classifier-free guidance, our method achieves an FID of 3.36 and IS of 259.3. In addition, we illustrate the decoupled modeling process of StraIT generation, showing its compelling properties on applications including domain transfer.
summary: We propose Stratified Image Transformer(StraIT), a pure non-autoregressive(NAR) generative model that demonstrates superiority in high-quality image synthesis over existing autoregressive(AR) and diffusion models(DMs). In contrast to the under-exploitation of visual characteristics in existing vision tokenizer, we leverage the hierarchical nature of images to encode visual tokens into stratified levels with emergent properties. Through the proposed image stratification that obtains an interlinked token pair, we alleviate the modeling difficulty and lift the generative power of NAR models. Our experiments demonstrate that StraIT significantly improves NAR generation and out-performs existing DMs and AR methods while being order-of-magnitude faster, achieving FID scores of 3.96 at 256*256 resolution on ImageNet without leveraging any guidance in sampling or auxiliary image classifiers. When equipped with classifier-free guidance, our method achieves an FID of 3.36 and IS of 259.3. In addition, we illustrate the decoupled modeling process of StraIT generation, showing its compelling properties on applications including domain transfer.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了分层图像变换器（StraIT），这是一种纯非自回归（NAR）生成模型，与现有的自回归（AR）和扩散模型（DM）相比，它在高质量图像合成方面表现出优越性。与现有视觉标记器中视觉特征的开发不足相反，我们利用图像的层次性质将视觉标记编码为具有涌现属性的分层级别。通过所提出的获得相互关联的标记对的图像分层，我们减轻了建模难度并提高了 NAR 模型的生成能力。我们的实验表明，StraIT 显着改进了 NAR 生成，并超越了现有的 DM 和 AR 方法，同时速度加快了一个数量级，在 ImageNet 上以 256*256 分辨率实现了 3.96 的 FID 分数，而无需利用任何采样或辅助图像分类器的指导。当配备无分类器引导时，我们的方法实现了 3.36 的 FID 和 259.3 的 IS。此外，我们还说明了 StraIT 生成的解耦建模过程，展示了其在包括域转移在内的应用程序中引人注目的特性。

AI.motivation: 现有视觉分词器未充分利用视觉特征，通过分层结构编码视觉标记以提升非自回归模型生成能力。
AI.method: 通过图像分层编码视觉标记为分层级别，生成互连标记对，缓解非自回归模型的建模难度。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上以256*256分辨率达到3.96 FID，使用分类器无关指导后FID为3.36，IS为259.3，且比现有方法快得多。
AI.conclusion: Stratified生成的解耦建模过程展示了其在领域迁移等应用中的优越性。

search_text: StraIT: Non-autoregressive Generation with Stratified Image Transformer StraIT：使用分层图像转换器的非自回归生成 We propose Stratified Image Transformer(StraIT), a pure non-autoregressive(NAR) generative model that demonstrates superiority in high-quality image synthesis over existing autoregressive(AR) and diffusion models(DMs). In contrast to the under-exploitation of visual characteristics in existing vision tokenizer, we leverage the hierarchical nature of images to encode visual tokens into stratified levels with emergent properties. Through the proposed image stratification that obtains an interlinked token pair, we alleviate the modeling difficulty and lift the generative power of NAR models. Our experiments demonstrate that StraIT significantly improves NAR generation and out-performs existing DMs and AR methods while being order-of-magnitude faster, achieving FID scores of 3.96 at 256*256 resolution on ImageNet without leveraging any guidance in sampling or auxiliary image classifiers. When equipped with classifier-free guidance, our method achieves an FID of 3.36 and IS of 259.3. In addition, we illustrate the decoupled modeling process of StraIT generation, showing its compelling properties on applications including domain transfer. 我们提出了分层图像变换器（StraIT），这是一种纯非自回归（NAR）生成模型，与现有的自回归（AR）和扩散模型（DM）相比，它在高质量图像合成方面表现出优越性。与现有视觉标记器中视觉特征的开发不足相反，我们利用图像的层次性质将视觉标记编码为具有涌现属性的分层级别。通过所提出的获得相互关联的标记对的图像分层，我们减轻了建模难度并提高了 NAR 模型的生成能力。我们的实验表明，StraIT 显着改进了 NAR 生成，并超越了现有的 DM 和 AR 方法，同时速度加快了一个数量级，在 ImageNet 上以 256*256 分辨率实现了 3.96 的 FID 分数，而无需利用任何采样或辅助图像分类器的指导。当配备无分类器引导时，我们的方法实现了 3.36 的 FID 和 259.3 的 IS。此外，我们还说明了 StraIT 生成的解耦建模过程，展示了其在包括域转移在内的应用程序中引人注目的特性。 提出一种非自回归生成模型StraIT，用于高质量图像合成，优于现有自回归和扩散模型。 Shengju Qian,Huiwen Chang,Yuanzhen Li,Zizhao Zhang,Jiaya Jia,Han Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Ziyang Xie,Junge Zhang,Wenye Li,Feihu Zhang,Li Zhang
title: S-NeRF: Neural Radiance Fields for Street Views
title_zh: S-NeRF：街景神经辐射场
abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) aim to synthesize novel views of objects and scenes, given the object-centric camera views with large overlaps. However, we conjugate that this paradigm does not fit the nature of the street views that are collected by many self-driving cars from the large-scale unbounded scenes. Also, the onboard cameras perceive scenes without much overlapping. Thus, existing NeRFs often produce blurs, 'floaters' and other artifacts on street-view synthesis. In this paper, we propose a new street-view NeRF (S-NeRF) that considers novel view synthesis of both the large-scale background scenes and the foreground moving vehicles jointly. Specifically, we improve the scene parameterization function and the camera poses for learning better neural representations from street views. We also use the the noisy and sparse LiDAR points to boost the training and learn a robust geometry and reprojection based confidence to address the depth outliers. Moreover, we extend our S-NeRF for reconstructing moving vehicles that is impracticable for conventional NeRFs. Thorough experiments on the large-scale driving datasets (e.g., nuScenes and Waymo) demonstrate that our method beats the state-of-the-art rivals by reducing 7% to 40% of the mean-squared error in the street-view synthesis and a 45% PSNR gain for the moving vehicles rendering.
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) aim to synthesize novel views of objects and scenes, given the object-centric camera views with large overlaps. However, we conjugate that this paradigm does not fit the nature of the street views that are collected by many self-driving cars from the large-scale unbounded scenes. Also, the onboard cameras perceive scenes without much overlapping. Thus, existing NeRFs often produce blurs, 'floaters' and other artifacts on street-view synthesis. In this paper, we propose a new street-view NeRF (S-NeRF) that considers novel view synthesis of both the large-scale background scenes and the foreground moving vehicles jointly. Specifically, we improve the scene parameterization function and the camera poses for learning better neural representations from street views. We also use the the noisy and sparse LiDAR points to boost the training and learn a robust geometry and reprojection based confidence to address the depth outliers. Moreover, we extend our S-NeRF for reconstructing moving vehicles that is impracticable for conventional NeRFs. Thorough experiments on the large-scale driving datasets (e.g., nuScenes and Waymo) demonstrate that our method beats the state-of-the-art rivals by reducing 7% to 40% of the mean-squared error in the street-view synthesis and a 45% PSNR gain for the moving vehicles rendering.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 旨在合成对象和场景的新颖视图，前提是以对象为中心的相机视图具有大量重叠。然而，我们认为这种范式不符合许多自动驾驶汽车从大规模无界场景中收集的街景的本质。此外，机载摄像头感知的场景没有太多重叠。因此，现有的 NeRF 经常会在街景合成中产生模糊、“漂浮物”和其他伪影。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的街景 NeRF（S-NeRF），它联合考虑了大规模背景场景和前景移动车辆的新颖视图合成。具体来说，我们改进了场景参数化函数和相机姿势，以便从街景中学习更好的神经表示。我们还使用嘈杂且稀疏的 LiDAR 点来增强训练并学习基于稳健几何和重投影的置信度来解决深度异常值。此外，我们还扩展了 S-NeRF，用于重建传统 NeRF 无法实现的移动车辆。对大规模驾驶数据集（例如 nuScenes 和 Waymo）的彻底实验表明，我们的方法通过将街景合成中的均方误差降低了 7% 至 40%，并将移动车辆渲染的 PSNR 增益提高了 45%，从而击败了最先进的竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出S-NeRF方法，专门用于街景视图的神经辐射场合成，解决传统NeRF在大规模无界场景和低重叠视角下的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF在街景合成中因场景规模大、相机视角重叠少，导致模糊、浮动物体等伪影，且难以处理移动车辆。
AI.method: 改进场景参数化函数和相机位姿估计，结合稀疏LiDAR点提升几何鲁棒性，并扩展方法以重建移动车辆。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Waymo数据集上，S-NeRF将街景合成均方误差降低7%-40%，移动车辆渲染PSNR提升45%。
AI.conclusion: S-NeRF通过联合建模背景与移动物体，有效解决了街景视图合成中的关键挑战，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Yawei Li,Yuchen Fan,Xiaoyu Xiang,Denis Demandolx,Rakesh Ranjan,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Efficient and Explicit Modelling of Image Hierarchies for Image Restoration
title_zh: 用于图像恢复的图像层次结构的高效、显式建模
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. 12 pages, 7 figures, 11 tables
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. 12 pages, 7 figures, 11 tables
abstract: The aim of this paper is to propose a mechanism to efficiently and explicitly model image hierarchies in the global, regional, and local range for image restoration. To achieve that, we start by analyzing two important properties of natural images including cross-scale similarity and anisotropic image features. Inspired by that, we propose the anchored stripe self-attention which achieves a good balance between the space and time complexity of self-attention and the modelling capacity beyond the regional range. Then we propose a new network architecture dubbed GRL to explicitly model image hierarchies in the Global, Regional, and Local range via anchored stripe self-attention, window self-attention, and channel attention enhanced convolution. Finally, the proposed network is applied to 7 image restoration types, covering both real and synthetic settings. The proposed method sets the new state-of-the-art for several of those. Code will be available at https://github.com/ofsoundof/GRL-Image-Restoration.git.
summary: The aim of this paper is to propose a mechanism to efficiently and explicitly model image hierarchies in the global, regional, and local range for image restoration. To achieve that, we start by analyzing two important properties of natural images including cross-scale similarity and anisotropic image features. Inspired by that, we propose the anchored stripe self-attention which achieves a good balance between the space and time complexity of self-attention and the modelling capacity beyond the regional range. Then we propose a new network architecture dubbed GRL to explicitly model image hierarchies in the Global, Regional, and Local range via anchored stripe self-attention, window self-attention, and channel attention enhanced convolution. Finally, the proposed network is applied to 7 image restoration types, covering both real and synthetic settings. The proposed method sets the new state-of-the-art for several of those. Code will be available at https://github.com/ofsoundof/GRL-Image-Restoration.git.
abstract_zh: 本文的目的是提出一种机制，可以有效、明确地对全局、区域和局部范围内的图像层次结构进行建模，以进行图像恢复。为了实现这一目标，我们首先分析自然图像的两个重要属性，包括跨尺度相似性和各向异性图像特征。受此启发，我们提出了锚定条带自注意力，它在自注意力的时空复杂度和超出区域范围的建模能力之间取得了良好的平衡。然后，我们提出了一种称为 GRL 的新网络架构，通过锚定条纹自注意力、窗口自注意力和通道注意力增强卷积来显式建模全局、区域和局部范围内的图像层次结构。最后，所提出的网络应用于 7 种图像恢复类型，涵盖真实和合成设置。所提出的方法为其中一些方法设定了新的最先进方法。代码可在 https://github.com/ofsoundof/GRL-Image-Restoration.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效且显式建模图像层次结构的方法，用于图像修复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模全局、区域和局部图像层次时存在效率与容量的平衡问题，需更高效的机制处理跨尺度相似性与各向异性特征。
AI.method: 提出锚定条带自注意力机制，结合窗口自注意力与通道增强卷积，设计GRL网络架构以显式建模全局、区域和局部层次。
AI.result: 在7种图像修复任务（含真实与合成数据）中达到新SOTA，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GRL通过层次化注意力机制有效提升了图像修复的性能与效率，为相关研究提供新思路。
