conclusion: GRL通过层次化注意力机制有效提升了图像修复的性能与效率，为相关研究提供新思路。
search_text: Efficient and Explicit Modelling of Image Hierarchies for Image Restoration 用于图像恢复的图像层次结构的高效、显式建模 The aim of this paper is to propose a mechanism to efficiently and explicitly model image hierarchies in the global, regional, and local range for image restoration. To achieve that, we start by analyzing two important properties of natural images including cross-scale similarity and anisotropic image features. Inspired by that, we propose the anchored stripe self-attention which achieves a good balance between the space and time complexity of self-attention and the modelling capacity beyond the regional range. Then we propose a new network architecture dubbed GRL to explicitly model image hierarchies in the Global, Regional, and Local range via anchored stripe self-attention, window self-attention, and channel attention enhanced convolution. Finally, the proposed network is applied to 7 image restoration types, covering both real and synthetic settings. The proposed method sets the new state-of-the-art for several of those. Code will be available at https://github.com/ofsoundof/GRL-Image-Restoration.git. 本文的目的是提出一种机制，可以有效、明确地对全局、区域和局部范围内的图像层次结构进行建模，以进行图像恢复。为了实现这一目标，我们首先分析自然图像的两个重要属性，包括跨尺度相似性和各向异性图像特征。受此启发，我们提出了锚定条带自注意力，它在自注意力的时空复杂度和超出区域范围的建模能力之间取得了良好的平衡。然后，我们提出了一种称为 GRL 的新网络架构，通过锚定条纹自注意力、窗口自注意力和通道注意力增强卷积来显式建模全局、区域和局部范围内的图像层次结构。最后，所提出的网络应用于 7 种图像恢复类型，涵盖真实和合成设置。所提出的方法为其中一些方法设定了新的最先进方法。代码可在 https://github.com/ofsoundof/GRL-Image-Restoration.git 获取。 本文提出一种高效且显式建模图像层次结构的方法，用于图像修复任务。 Yawei Li,Yuchen Fan,Xiaoyu Xiang,Denis Demandolx,Rakesh Ranjan,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Max Bain,Jaesung Huh,Tengda Han,Andrew Zisserman
title: WhisperX: Time-Accurate Speech Transcription of Long-Form Audio
title_zh: WhisperX：长格式音频的时间精确语音转录
abstract: Large-scale, weakly-supervised speech recognition models, such as Whisper, have demonstrated impressive results on speech recognition across domains and languages. However, their application to long audio transcription via buffered or sliding window approaches is prone to drifting, hallucination & repetition; and prohibits batched transcription due to their sequential nature. Further, timestamps corresponding each utterance are prone to inaccuracies and word-level timestamps are not available out-of-the-box. To overcome these challenges, we present WhisperX, a time-accurate speech recognition system with word-level timestamps utilising voice activity detection and forced phoneme alignment. In doing so, we demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on long-form transcription and word segmentation benchmarks. Additionally, we show that pre-segmenting audio with our proposed VAD Cut & Merge strategy improves transcription quality and enables a twelve-fold transcription speedup via batched inference.
summary: Large-scale, weakly-supervised speech recognition models, such as Whisper, have demonstrated impressive results on speech recognition across domains and languages. However, their application to long audio transcription via buffered or sliding window approaches is prone to drifting, hallucination & repetition; and prohibits batched transcription due to their sequential nature. Further, timestamps corresponding each utterance are prone to inaccuracies and word-level timestamps are not available out-of-the-box. To overcome these challenges, we present WhisperX, a time-accurate speech recognition system with word-level timestamps utilising voice activity detection and forced phoneme alignment. In doing so, we demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on long-form transcription and word segmentation benchmarks. Additionally, we show that pre-segmenting audio with our proposed VAD Cut & Merge strategy improves transcription quality and enables a twelve-fold transcription speedup via batched inference.
abstract_zh: 大规模、弱监督的语音识别模型（例如 Whisper）在跨领域和语言的语音识别方面展示了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，它们通过缓冲或滑动窗口方法应用于长音频转录很容易出现漂移、幻觉和重复；并由于其顺序性质而禁止批量转录。此外，与每个话语相对应的时间戳很容易出现不准确的情况，并且单词级时间戳无法开箱即用。为了克服这些挑战，我们推出了 WhisperX，这是一种时间精确的语音识别系统，具有利用语音活动检测和强制音素对齐的单词级时间戳。在此过程中，我们在长格式转录和分词基准上展示了最先进的性能。此外，我们还表明，使用我们提出的 VAD 剪切和合并策略对音频进行预分割可以提高转录质量，并通过批量推理将转录速度提高 12 倍。

AI.tldr: 开发WhisperX系统，实现长音频的精确时间戳和逐字语音转录。
AI.motivation: 现有模型如Whisper在处理长音频时存在时间戳漂移、幻觉、重复问题，且无法批量转录，缺乏逐字级时间戳。
AI.method: 结合语音活动检测（VAD）与强制音素对齐技术，提出VAD Cut & Merge策略预分割音频以实现批量推理加速。
AI.result: 在长音频转录和分词基准测试中达到最先进性能，转录速度提升12倍。
AI.conclusion: WhisperX通过时序对齐与批量处理优化，有效解决了长音频转录的准确性与时效性矛盾。

authors_text: Mikkel Abrahamsen,Tzvika Geft,Dan Halperin,Barak Ugav
title: Coordination of Multiple Robots along Given Paths with Bounded Junction Complexity
title_zh: 多个机器人沿着给定路径的有界连接复杂度的协调
comment: 15 pages; Accepted to Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS 2023)
comments: 15 pages; Accepted to Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS 2023)
abstract: We study a fundamental NP-hard motion coordination problem for multi-robot/multi-agent systems: We are given a graph $G$ and set of agents, where each agent has a given directed path in $G$. Each agent is initially located on the first vertex of its path. At each time step an agent can move to the next vertex on its path, provided that the vertex is not occupied by another agent. The goal is to find a sequence of such moves along the given paths so that each reaches its target, or to report that no such sequence exists. The problem models guidepath-based transport systems, which is a pertinent abstraction for traffic in a variety of contemporary applications, ranging from train networks or Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) in factories, through computer game animations, to qubit transport in quantum computing. It also arises as a sub-problem in the more general multi-robot motion-planning problem. We provide a fine-grained tractability analysis of the problem by considering new assumptions and identifying minimal values of key parameters for which the problem remains NP-hard. Our analysis identifies a critical parameter called vertex multiplicity (VM), defined as the maximum number of paths passing through the same vertex. We show that a prevalent variant of the problem, which is equivalent to Sequential Resource Allocation (concerning deadlock prevention for concurrent processes), is NP-hard even when VM is 3. On the positive side, for VM $\le$ 2 we give an efficient algorithm that iteratively resolves cycles of blocking relations among agents. We also present a variant that is NP-hard when the VM is 2 even when $G$ is a 2D grid and each path lies in a single grid row or column. By studying highly distilled yet NP-hard variants, we deepen the understanding of what makes the problem intractable and thereby guide the search for efficient solutions under practical assumptions.
summary: We study a fundamental NP-hard motion coordination problem for multi-robot/multi-agent systems: We are given a graph $G$ and set of agents, where each agent has a given directed path in $G$. Each agent is initially located on the first vertex of its path. At each time step an agent can move to the next vertex on its path, provided that the vertex is not occupied by another agent. The goal is to find a sequence of such moves along the given paths so that each reaches its target, or to report that no such sequence exists. The problem models guidepath-based transport systems, which is a pertinent abstraction for traffic in a variety of contemporary applications, ranging from train networks or Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) in factories, through computer game animations, to qubit transport in quantum computing. It also arises as a sub-problem in the more general multi-robot motion-planning problem. We provide a fine-grained tractability analysis of the problem by considering new assumptions and identifying minimal values of key parameters for which the problem remains NP-hard. Our analysis identifies a critical parameter called vertex multiplicity (VM), defined as the maximum number of paths passing through the same vertex. We show that a prevalent variant of the problem, which is equivalent to Sequential Resource Allocation (concerning deadlock prevention for concurrent processes), is NP-hard even when VM is 3. On the positive side, for VM $\le$ 2 we give an efficient algorithm that iteratively resolves cycles of blocking relations among agents. We also present a variant that is NP-hard when the VM is 2 even when $G$ is a 2D grid and each path lies in a single grid row or column. By studying highly distilled yet NP-hard variants, we deepen the understanding of what makes the problem intractable and thereby guide the search for efficient solutions under practical assumptions.
abstract_zh: 我们研究多机器人/多智能体系统的基本 NP 难运动协调问题：给定一个图 $G$ 和一组智能体，其中每个智能体在 $G$ 中都有给定的有向路径。每个代理最初位于其路径的第一个顶点。在每个时间步，代理可以移动到其路径上的下一个顶点，前提是该顶点没有被另一个代理占用。目标是沿着给定路径找到此类移动的序列，以便每个移动都到达其目标，或者报告不存在这样的序列。该问题对基于引导路径的运输系统进行建模，这是各种当代应用中交通的相关抽象，从火车网络或工厂中的自动引导车辆 (AGV)，到计算机游戏动画，再到量子计算中的量子位传输。它也是更一般的多机器人运动规划问题中的子问题。我们通过考虑新的假设并确定问题仍然是 NP 困难的关键参数的最小值，对问题进行细粒度的易处理性分析。我们的分析确定了一个称为顶点多重性 (VM) 的关键参数，定义为通过同一顶点的最大路径数。我们证明了该问题的一个常见变体，相当于顺序资源分配（关于并发进程的死锁预防），即使当 VM 为 3 时也是 NP 困难的。从积极的一面来看，对于 VM $\le$ 2，我们给出了一种有效的算法，可以迭代地解决代理之间的阻塞关系循环。我们还提出了一个变体，当 VM 为 2 时，即使 $G$ 是一个 2D 网格并且每个路径位于单个网格行或列中，该变体也是 NP 困难的。通过研究高度蒸馏但 NP 困难的变体，我们加深了对问题棘手原因的理解，从而指导在实际假设下寻找有效的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多机器人沿给定路径协调运动的NP难问题，分析顶点重合度对问题复杂性的影响，并提出相应的算法。
AI.motivation: 该问题广泛应用于轨道交通、工厂AGV、游戏动画及量子计算等领域，是多机器人路径规划的核心子问题，需在复杂约束下寻找高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入顶点重合度（VM）参数进行细粒度复杂性分析，证明VM=3时问题仍为NP难；对VM≤2的情况提出基于循环阻塞关系的高效算法，并构造VM=2时网格环境下的NP难变体。
AI.result: 证明VM=3时问题保持NP难，提出VM≤2的多项式时间算法，同时展示网格环境下VM=2的NP难变体，深化了对问题复杂性的理解。
AI.conclusion: 通过简化模型分析，明确了顶点重合度是影响问题可解性的关键因素，为实际应用中基于约束条件的高效求解提供了理论指导。

On the positive side, for VM $\le$ 2 we give an efficient algorithm that iteratively resolves cycles of blocking relations among agents. By studying highly distilled yet NP-hard variants, we deepen the understanding of what makes the problem intractable and thereby guide the search for efficient solutions under practical assumptions. 我们研究多机器人/多智能体系统的基本 NP 难运动协调问题：给定一个图 $G$ 和一组智能体，其中每个智能体在 $G$ 中都有给定的有向路径。每个代理最初位于其路径的第一个顶点。在每个时间步，代理可以移动到其路径上的下一个顶点，前提是该顶点没有被另一个代理占用。目标是沿着给定路径找到此类移动的序列，以便每个移动都到达其目标，或者报告不存在这样的序列。该问题对基于引导路径的运输系统进行建模，这是各种当代应用中交通的相关抽象，从火车网络或工厂中的自动引导车辆 (AGV)，到计算机游戏动画，再到量子计算中的量子位传输。它也是更一般的多机器人运动规划问题中的子问题。我们通过考虑新的假设并确定问题仍然是 NP 困难的关键参数的最小值，对问题进行细粒度的易处理性分析。我们的分析确定了一个称为顶点多重性 (VM) 的关键参数，定义为通过同一顶点的最大路径数。我们证明了该问题的一个常见变体，相当于顺序资源分配（关于并发进程的死锁预防），即使当 VM 为 3 时也是 NP 困难的。从积极的一面来看，对于 VM $\le$ 2，我们给出了一种有效的算法，可以迭代地解决代理之间的阻塞关系循环。我们还提出了一个变体，当 VM 为 2 时，即使 $G$ 是一个 2D 网格并且每个路径位于单个网格行或列中，该变体也是 NP 困难的。通过研究高度蒸馏但 NP 困难的变体，我们加深了对问题棘手原因的理解，从而指导在实际假设下寻找有效的解决方案。 本文研究多机器人沿给定路径协调运动的NP难问题，分析顶点重合度对问题复杂性的影响，并提出相应的算法。 Mikkel Abrahamsen,Tzvika Geft,Dan Halperin,Barak Ugav cs.RO,cs.CG,cs.DS,cs.MA

authors_text: Jack Saunders,Vinay Namboodiri
title: READ Avatars: Realistic Emotion-controllable Audio Driven Avatars
title_zh: 阅读头像：逼真的情绪可控音频驱动头像
comment: 13 Pages, 8 Figures For demo video see https://youtu.be/QSyMl3vV0pA
comments: 13 Pages, 8 Figures For demo video see https://youtu.be/QSyMl3vV0pA
abstract: We present READ Avatars, a 3D-based approach for generating 2D avatars that are driven by audio input with direct and granular control over the emotion. Previous methods are unable to achieve realistic animation due to the many-to-many nature of audio to expression mappings. We alleviate this issue by introducing an adversarial loss in the audio-to-expression generation process. This removes the smoothing effect of regression-based models and helps to improve the realism and expressiveness of the generated avatars. We note furthermore, that audio should be directly utilized when generating mouth interiors and that other 3D-based methods do not attempt this. We address this with audio-conditioned neural textures, which are resolution-independent. To evaluate the performance of our method, we perform quantitative and qualitative experiments, including a user study. We also propose a new metric for comparing how well an actor's emotion is reconstructed in the generated avatar. Our results show that our approach outperforms state of the art audio-driven avatar generation methods across several metrics. A demo video can be found at \url{https://youtu.be/QSyMl3vV0pA}
summary: We present READ Avatars, a 3D-based approach for generating 2D avatars that are driven by audio input with direct and granular control over the emotion. Previous methods are unable to achieve realistic animation due to the many-to-many nature of audio to expression mappings. We alleviate this issue by introducing an adversarial loss in the audio-to-expression generation process. This removes the smoothing effect of regression-based models and helps to improve the realism and expressiveness of the generated avatars. We note furthermore, that audio should be directly utilized when generating mouth interiors and that other 3D-based methods do not attempt this. We address this with audio-conditioned neural textures, which are resolution-independent. To evaluate the performance of our method, we perform quantitative and qualitative experiments, including a user study. We also propose a new metric for comparing how well an actor's emotion is reconstructed in the generated avatar. Our results show that our approach outperforms state of the art audio-driven avatar generation methods across several metrics. A demo video can be found at \url{https://youtu.be/QSyMl3vV0pA}
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 READ Avatars，这是一种基于 3D 的方法，用于生成 2D 化身，该方法由音频输入驱动，可对情绪进行直接和精细的控制。由于音频到表情映射的多对多性质，以前的方法无法实现逼真的动画。我们通过在音频到表情生成过程中引入对抗性损失来缓解这个问题。这消除了基于回归的模型的平滑效果，有助于提高生成的头像的真实感和表现力。我们还注意到，在生成口腔内部时应直接利用音频，而其他基于 3D 的方法不会尝试这样做。我们使用与分辨率无关的音频调节神经纹理来解决这个问题。为了评估我们方法的性能，我们进行了定量和定性实验，包括用户研究。我们还提出了一个新的指标来比较演员的情感在生成的化身中重建的程度。我们的结果表明，我们的方法在多个指标上都优于最先进的音频驱动头像生成方法。演示视频位于 \url{https://youtu.be/QSyMl3vV0pA}

AI.tldr: 本文提出READ Avatars，一种基于3D的生成2D化身的方法，通过音频输入实现情感可控的动画生成。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动化身方法因音频到表情的多对多映射关系难以生成真实动画，且未充分利用音频信息生成嘴巴内部细节。
AI.method: 引入对抗损失提升生成真实感，采用音频条件神经纹理生成嘴巴内部，提出新指标评估情感重建效果。
AI.result: 在多项指标上优于现有方法，用户研究验证有效性，提供演示视频展示成果。
AI.conclusion: READ Avatars通过对抗损失和音频条件纹理解决了音频驱动化身的情感控制与真实感问题，效果显著优于现有技术。

authors_text: Priyanka Nanayakkara,Mary Anne Smart,Rachel Cummings,Gabriel Kaptchuk,Elissa Redmiles
title: What Are the Chances? Explaining the Epsilon Parameter in Differential Privacy
title_zh: 有什么机会？解释差分隐私中的Epsilon参数
abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is a mathematical privacy notion increasingly deployed across government and industry. With DP, privacy protections are probabilistic: they are bounded by the privacy budget parameter, $ε$. Prior work in health and computational science finds that people struggle to reason about probabilistic risks. Yet, communicating the implications of $ε$ to people contributing their data is vital to avoiding privacy theater -- presenting meaningless privacy protection as meaningful -- and empowering more informed data-sharing decisions. Drawing on best practices in risk communication and usability, we develop three methods to convey probabilistic DP guarantees to end users: two that communicate odds and one offering concrete examples of DP outputs. We quantitatively evaluate these explanation methods in a vignette survey study ($n=963$) via three metrics: objective risk comprehension, subjective privacy understanding of DP guarantees, and self-efficacy. We find that odds-based explanation methods are more effective than (1) output-based methods and (2) state-of-the-art approaches that gloss over information about $ε$. Further, when offered information about $ε$, respondents are more willing to share their data than when presented with a state-of-the-art DP explanation; this willingness to share is sensitive to $ε$ values: as privacy protections weaken, respondents are less likely to share data.
summary: Differential privacy (DP) is a mathematical privacy notion increasingly deployed across government and industry. With DP, privacy protections are probabilistic: they are bounded by the privacy budget parameter, $ε$. Prior work in health and computational science finds that people struggle to reason about probabilistic risks. Yet, communicating the implications of $ε$ to people contributing their data is vital to avoiding privacy theater -- presenting meaningless privacy protection as meaningful -- and empowering more informed data-sharing decisions. Drawing on best practices in risk communication and usability, we develop three methods to convey probabilistic DP guarantees to end users: two that communicate odds and one offering concrete examples of DP outputs. We quantitatively evaluate these explanation methods in a vignette survey study ($n=963$) via three metrics: objective risk comprehension, subjective privacy understanding of DP guarantees, and self-efficacy. We find that odds-based explanation methods are more effective than (1) output-based methods and (2) state-of-the-art approaches that gloss over information about $ε$. Further, when offered information about $ε$, respondents are more willing to share their data than when presented with a state-of-the-art DP explanation; this willingness to share is sensitive to $ε$ values: as privacy protections weaken, respondents are less likely to share data.
abstract_zh: 差分隐私 (DP) 是一种数学隐私概念，越来越多地在政府和行业中得到应用。对于 DP，隐私保护是概率性的：它们受到隐私预算参数 $ε$ 的限制。之前在健康和计算科学领域的研究发现，人们很难推理概率风险。然而，向贡献数据的人们传达 $ε$ 的影响对于避免隐私剧场（将无意义的隐私保护视为有意义）并赋予更明智的数据共享决策至关重要。借鉴风险沟通和可用性方面的最佳实践，我们开发了三种方法来向最终用户传达概率 DP 保证：两种传达赔率，一种提供 DP 输出的具体示例。我们在小插图调查研究 ($n=963$) 中通过三个指标定量评估这些解释方法：客观风险理解、对 DP 保证的主观隐私理解和自我效能。我们发现基于赔率的解释方法比（1）基于输出的方法和（2）掩盖有关 $ε$ 信息的最先进方法更有效。此外，当提供有关 $ε$ 的信息时，受访者比提供最先进的 DP 解释时更愿意分享他们的数据；这种共享意愿对 $ε$ 价值观很敏感：随着隐私保护的削弱，受访者共享数据的可能性较小。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发三种方法，向终端用户解释差分隐私中的ε参数，以提升其对隐私保护的理解。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私的保护效果依赖于ε参数，但人们难以理解概率性风险，可能导致隐私保护流于形式或数据共享决策不充分。
AI.method: 基于风险沟通与可用性最佳实践，设计两种基于概率比值的解释方法和一种具体输出示例方法，并通过963人的问卷调查进行量化评估。
AI.result: 基于概率比值的解释方法在风险理解、隐私认知和自我效能感上优于输出示例法及现有方法；提供ε信息时，受访者数据共享意愿随ε值降低而减弱。
AI.conclusion: 有效传达ε参数信息能增强用户隐私意识并影响数据共享决策，需优先采用概率比值解释方式。

search_text: What Are the Chances? Explaining the Epsilon Parameter in Differential Privacy 有什么机会？解释差分隐私中的Epsilon参数 Differential privacy (DP) is a mathematical privacy notion increasingly deployed across government and industry. With DP, privacy protections are probabilistic: they are bounded by the privacy budget parameter, $ε$. We find that odds-based explanation methods are more effective than (1) output-based methods and (2) state-of-the-art approaches that gloss over information about $ε$. authors_text: Kai-Wei Chang,Yu-Kai Wang,Hua Shen,Iu-thing Kang,Wei-Cheng Tseng,Shang-Wen Li,Hung-yi Lee
title: SpeechPrompt v2: Prompt Tuning for Speech Classification Tasks
title_zh: SpeechPrompt v2：语音分类任务的提示调整
abstract: Prompt tuning is a technology that tunes a small set of parameters to steer a pre-trained language model (LM) to directly generate the output for downstream tasks. Recently, prompt tuning has demonstrated its storage and computation efficiency in both natural language processing (NLP) and speech processing fields. These advantages have also revealed prompt tuning as a candidate approach to serving pre-trained LM for multiple tasks in a unified manner. For speech processing, SpeechPrompt shows its high parameter efficiency and competitive performance on a few speech classification tasks. However, whether SpeechPrompt is capable of serving a large number of tasks is unanswered. In this work, we propose SpeechPrompt v2, a prompt tuning framework capable of performing a wide variety of speech classification tasks, covering multiple languages and prosody-related tasks. The experiment result shows that SpeechPrompt v2 achieves performance on par with prior works with less than 0.15M trainable parameters in a unified framework.
summary: Prompt tuning is a technology that tunes a small set of parameters to steer a pre-trained language model (LM) to directly generate the output for downstream tasks. Recently, prompt tuning has demonstrated its storage and computation efficiency in both natural language processing (NLP) and speech processing fields. These advantages have also revealed prompt tuning as a candidate approach to serving pre-trained LM for multiple tasks in a unified manner. For speech processing, SpeechPrompt shows its high parameter efficiency and competitive performance on a few speech classification tasks. However, whether SpeechPrompt is capable of serving a large number of tasks is unanswered. In this work, we propose SpeechPrompt v2, a prompt tuning framework capable of performing a wide variety of speech classification tasks, covering multiple languages and prosody-related tasks. The experiment result shows that SpeechPrompt v2 achieves performance on par with prior works with less than 0.15M trainable parameters in a unified framework.
abstract_zh: 提示调整是一种调整一小组参数以引导预训练语言模型 (LM) 直接生成下游任务输出的技术。最近，即时调优在自然语言处理（NLP）和语音处理领域都展示了其存储和计算效率。这些优势还表明，快速调优是一种以统一方式为多个任务提供预训练 LM 的候选方法。对于语音处理，SpeechPrompt 在一些语音分类任务上展示了其高参数效率和竞争性能。然而，SpeechPrompt 是否能够服务于大量任务还没有答案。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SpeechPrompt v2，这是一个提示调整框架，能够执行各种语音​​分类任务，涵盖多种语言和韵律相关任务。实验结果表明，SpeechPrompt v2 在统一框架中以少于 0.15M 可训练参数实现了与先前作品相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpeechPrompt v2，一种用于多种语音分类任务的提示调优框架，支持多语言和韵律相关任务。
AI.motivation: 现有SpeechPrompt在处理大量任务时存在局限性，需开发更通用的框架以适应多语言及韵律相关语音分类任务。
AI.method: 设计SpeechPrompt v2框架，通过提示调优技术实现统一模型结构，支持多任务并减少可训练参数量。
AI.result: 实验表明，SpeechPrompt v2在少于0.15M可训练参数下，性能与先前方法相当，且覆盖多语言和韵律任务。
AI.conclusion: SpeechPrompt v2验证了提示调优在语音分类中的高效性，为多任务统一处理提供了参数高效的解决方案。

search_text: SpeechPrompt v2: Prompt Tuning for Speech Classification Tasks SpeechPrompt v2：语音分类任务的提示调整 Prompt tuning is a technology that tunes a small set of parameters to steer a pre-trained language model (LM) to directly generate the output for downstream tasks. Recently, prompt tuning has demonstrated its storage and computation efficiency in both natural language processing (NLP) and speech processing fields. These advantages have also revealed prompt tuning as a candidate approach to serving pre-trained LM for multiple tasks in a unified manner. For speech processing, SpeechPrompt shows its high parameter efficiency and competitive performance on a few speech classification tasks. However, whether SpeechPrompt is capable of serving a large number of tasks is unanswered. In this work, we propose SpeechPrompt v2, a prompt tuning framework capable of performing a wide variety of speech classification tasks, covering multiple languages and prosody-related tasks. The experiment result shows that SpeechPrompt v2 achieves performance on par with prior works with less than 0.15M trainable parameters in a unified framework. 提示调整是一种调整一小组参数以引导预训练语言模型 (LM) 直接生成下游任务输出的技术。最近，即时调优在自然语言处理（NLP）和语音处理领域都展示了其存储和计算效率。这些优势还表明，快速调优是一种以统一方式为多个任务提供预训练 LM 的候选方法。对于语音处理，SpeechPrompt 在一些语音分类任务上展示了其高参数效率和竞争性能。然而，SpeechPrompt 是否能够服务于大量任务还没有答案。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SpeechPrompt v2，这是一个提示调整框架，能够执行各种语音​​分类任务，涵盖多种语言和韵律相关任务。实验结果表明，SpeechPrompt v2 在统一框架中以少于 0.15M 可训练参数实现了与先前作品相当的性能。 本文提出SpeechPrompt v2，一种用于多种语音分类任务的提示调优框架，支持多语言和韵律相关任务。 Kai-Wei Chang,Yu-Kai Wang,Hua Shen,Iu-thing Kang,Wei-Cheng Tseng,Shang-Wen Li,Hung-yi Lee eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Saghir Alfasly,Zaid Al-huda,Saifullah Bello,Ahmed Elazab,Jian Lu,Chen Xu
title: OSRE: Object-to-Spot Rotation Estimation for Bike Parking Assessment
title_zh: OSRE：用于自行车停车评估的对象到点旋转估计
abstract: Current deep models provide remarkable object detection in terms of object classification and localization. However, estimating object rotation with respect to other visual objects in the visual context of an input image still lacks deep studies due to the unavailability of object datasets with rotation annotations. This paper tackles these two challenges to solve the rotation estimation of a parked bike with respect to its parking area. First, we leverage the power of 3D graphics to build a camera-agnostic well-annotated Synthetic Bike Rotation Dataset (SynthBRSet). Then, we propose an object-to-spot rotation estimator (OSRE) by extending the object detection task to further regress the bike rotations in two axes. Since our model is purely trained on synthetic data, we adopt image smoothing techniques when deploying it on real-world images. The proposed OSRE is evaluated on synthetic and real-world data providing promising results. Our data and code are available at \href{https://github.com/saghiralfasly/OSRE-Project}{https://github.com/saghiralfasly/OSRE-Project}.
summary: Current deep models provide remarkable object detection in terms of object classification and localization. However, estimating object rotation with respect to other visual objects in the visual context of an input image still lacks deep studies due to the unavailability of object datasets with rotation annotations. This paper tackles these two challenges to solve the rotation estimation of a parked bike with respect to its parking area. First, we leverage the power of 3D graphics to build a camera-agnostic well-annotated Synthetic Bike Rotation Dataset (SynthBRSet). Then, we propose an object-to-spot rotation estimator (OSRE) by extending the object detection task to further regress the bike rotations in two axes. Since our model is purely trained on synthetic data, we adopt image smoothing techniques when deploying it on real-world images. The proposed OSRE is evaluated on synthetic and real-world data providing promising results. Our data and code are available at \href{https://github.com/saghiralfasly/OSRE-Project}{https://github.com/saghiralfasly/OSRE-Project}.
abstract_zh: 当前的深度模型在对象分类和定位方面提供了出色的对象检测。然而，由于无法获得带有旋转注释的对象数据集，在输入图像的视觉上下文中估计对象相对于其他视觉对象的旋转仍然缺乏深入的研究。本文解决了这两个挑战，以解决停放自行车相对于其停车区域的旋转估计。首先，我们利用 3D 图形的强大功能来构建与相机无关且注释良好的合成自行车旋转数据集 (SynthBRSet)。然后，我们通过扩展对象检测任务来进一步回归两个轴上的自行车旋转，提出了对象到点旋转估计器（OSRE）。由于我们的模型纯粹是在合成数据上进行训练的，因此我们在将其部署到现实世界图像时采用图像平滑技术。所提出的 OSRE 根据合成数据和真实数据进行评估，提供了有希望的结果。我们的数据和代码可在 \href{https://github.com/saghiralfasly/OSRE-Project}{https://github.com/saghiralfasly/OSRE-Project} 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出OSRE方法，通过估计自行车相对于停车区域的旋转角度，解决自行车停车评估中的旋转估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型在物体旋转估计方面缺乏研究，且缺乏带旋转标注的数据集，导致难以准确评估自行车停放状态。
AI.method: 构建合成数据集SynthBRSet，并提出OSRE模型，通过扩展目标检测任务回归自行车的双轴旋转角度，结合图像平滑技术应用于真实场景。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界数据集上评估OSRE，显示出良好的旋转估计效果，并公开了数据和代码。
AI.conclusion: OSRE有效解决了自行车旋转估计问题，合成数据集和代码的公开为相关研究提供了资源。

authors_text: J. Pourmostafa Roshan Sharami,D. Shterionov,P. Spronck
title: A Systematic Analysis of Vocabulary and BPE Settings for Optimal Fine-tuning of NMT: A Case Study of In-domain Translation
title_zh: 用于 NMT 优化微调的词汇和 BPE 设置的系统分析：域内翻译案例研究
abstract: The effectiveness of Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models largely depends on the vocabulary used at training; small vocabularies can lead to out-of-vocabulary problems -- large ones, to memory issues. Subword (SW) tokenization has been successfully employed to mitigate these issues. The choice of vocabulary and SW tokenization has a significant impact on both training and fine-tuning an NMT model. Fine-tuning is a common practice in optimizing an MT model with respect to new data. However, new data potentially introduces new words (or tokens), which, if not taken into consideration, may lead to suboptimal performance. In addition, the distribution of tokens in the new data can differ from the distribution of the original data. As such, the original SW tokenization model could be less suitable for the new data. Through a systematic empirical evaluation, in this work we compare different strategies for SW tokenization and vocabulary generation with the ultimate goal to uncover an optimal setting for fine-tuning a domain-specific model. Furthermore, we developed several (in-domain) models, the best of which achieves 6 BLEU points improvement over the baseline.
summary: The effectiveness of Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models largely depends on the vocabulary used at training; small vocabularies can lead to out-of-vocabulary problems -- large ones, to memory issues. Subword (SW) tokenization has been successfully employed to mitigate these issues. The choice of vocabulary and SW tokenization has a significant impact on both training and fine-tuning an NMT model. Fine-tuning is a common practice in optimizing an MT model with respect to new data. However, new data potentially introduces new words (or tokens), which, if not taken into consideration, may lead to suboptimal performance. In addition, the distribution of tokens in the new data can differ from the distribution of the original data. As such, the original SW tokenization model could be less suitable for the new data. Through a systematic empirical evaluation, in this work we compare different strategies for SW tokenization and vocabulary generation with the ultimate goal to uncover an optimal setting for fine-tuning a domain-specific model. Furthermore, we developed several (in-domain) models, the best of which achieves 6 BLEU points improvement over the baseline.
abstract_zh: 神经机器翻译（NMT）模型的有效性很大程度上取决于训练时使用的词汇；小词汇量可能会导致词汇量之外的问题，而大词汇量则会导致记忆问题。子字 (SW) 标记化已成功用于缓解这些问题。词汇表和 SW 标记化的选择对 NMT 模型的训练和微调都有重大影响。微调是针对新数据优化 MT 模型的常见做法。然而，新数据可能会引入新单词（或标记），如果不考虑到这一点，可能会导致性能不佳。此外，新数据中标记的分布可能与原始数据的分布不同。因此，原始的 SW 标记化模型可能不太适合新数据。通过系统的实证评估，在这项工作中，我们比较了 SW 标记化和词汇生成的不同策略，最终目标是发现微调特定领域模型的最佳设置。此外，我们开发了多个（域内）模型，其中最好的模型比基线提高了 6 BLEU 点。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过系统性实证评估，比较了不同的子词（SW）分词和词汇生成策略，以找到优化领域特定模型微调的最佳设置。
AI.motivation: 神经机器翻译（NMT）模型的效果在很大程度上取决于训练时使用的词汇，而小词汇表可能导致词汇外问题，大词汇表可能导致内存问题。子词分词虽能缓解这些问题，但新数据可能引入新词，影响模型性能，因此需要研究最优的词汇和子词分词设置。
AI.method: 该研究通过系统性实证评估，比较了不同的子词分词和词汇生成策略，并开发了多个领域内模型以测试其效果。
AI.result: 研究中开发的最优模型在基准模型基础上实现了6个BLEU点的提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过比较不同的子词分词和词汇生成策略，可以找到优化领域特定模型微调的最佳设置，从而显著提升翻译性能。

motivation: 神经机器翻译（NMT）模型的效果在很大程度上取决于训练时使用的词汇，而小词汇表可能导致词汇外问题，大词汇表可能导致内存问题。子词分词虽能缓解这些问题，但新数据可能引入新词，影响模型性能，因此需要研究最优的词汇和子词分词设置。
method: 该研究通过系统性实证评估，比较了不同的子词分词和词汇生成策略，并开发了多个领域内模型以测试其效果。
result: 研究中开发的最优模型在基准模型基础上实现了6个BLEU点的提升。
conclusion: 通过比较不同的子词分词和词汇生成策略，可以找到优化领域特定模型微调的最佳设置，从而显著提升翻译性能。
search_text: A Systematic Analysis of Vocabulary and BPE Settings for Optimal Fine-tuning of NMT: A Case Study of In-domain Translation 用于 NMT 优化微调的词汇和 BPE 设置的系统分析：域内翻译案例研究 The effectiveness of Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models largely depends on the vocabulary used at training; small vocabularies can lead to out-of-vocabulary problems -- large ones, to memory issues. Subword (SW) tokenization has been successfully employed to mitigate these issues. The choice of vocabulary and SW tokenization has a significant impact on both training and fine-tuning an NMT model. Fine-tuning is a common practice in optimizing an MT model with respect to new data. However, new data potentially introduces new words (or tokens), which, if not taken into consideration, may lead to suboptimal performance. In addition, the distribution of tokens in the new data can differ from the distribution of the original data. As such, the original SW tokenization model could be less suitable for the new data. Through a systematic empirical evaluation, in this work we compare different strategies for SW tokenization and vocabulary generation with the ultimate goal to uncover an optimal setting for fine-tuning a domain-specific model. Furthermore, we developed several (in-domain) models, the best of which achieves 6 BLEU points improvement over the baseline. 神经机器翻译（NMT）模型的有效性很大程度上取决于训练时使用的词汇；小词汇量可能会导致词汇量之外的问题，而大词汇量则会导致记忆问题。子字 (SW) 标记化已成功用于缓解这些问题。词汇表和 SW 标记化的选择对 NMT 模型的训练和微调都有重大影响。微调是针对新数据优化 MT 模型的常见做法。然而，新数据可能会引入新单词（或标记），如果不考虑到这一点，可能会导致性能不佳。此外，新数据中标记的分布可能与原始数据的分布不同。因此，原始的 SW 标记化模型可能不太适合新数据。通过系统的实证评估，在这项工作中，我们比较了 SW 标记化和词汇生成的不同策略，最终目标是发现微调特定领域模型的最佳设置。此外，我们开发了多个（域内）模型，其中最好的模型比基线提高了 6 BLEU 点。 该论文通过系统性实证评估，比较了不同的子词（SW）分词和词汇生成策略，以找到优化领域特定模型微调的最佳设置。 J. Pourmostafa Roshan Sharami,D. Shterionov,P. Spronck cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Irene Cannistraci,Luca Moschella,Valentino Maiorca,Marco Fumero,Antonio Norelli,Emanuele Rodolà
title: Bootstrapping Parallel Anchors for Relative Representations
title_zh: 用于相对表示的自举并行锚点
abstract: The use of relative representations for latent embeddings has shown potential in enabling latent space communication and zero-shot model stitching across a wide range of applications. Nevertheless, relative representations rely on a certain amount of parallel anchors to be given as input, which can be impractical to obtain in certain scenarios. To overcome this limitation, we propose an optimization-based method to discover new parallel anchors from a limited known set (seed). Our approach can be used to find semantic correspondence between different domains, align their relative spaces, and achieve competitive results in several tasks.
summary: The use of relative representations for latent embeddings has shown potential in enabling latent space communication and zero-shot model stitching across a wide range of applications. Nevertheless, relative representations rely on a certain amount of parallel anchors to be given as input, which can be impractical to obtain in certain scenarios. To overcome this limitation, we propose an optimization-based method to discover new parallel anchors from a limited known set (seed). Our approach can be used to find semantic correspondence between different domains, align their relative spaces, and achieve competitive results in several tasks.
abstract_zh: 使用潜在嵌入的相对表示已经显示出在广泛的应用中实现潜在空间通信和零样本模型拼接的潜力。然而，相对表示依赖于作为输入给出的一定数量的并行锚点，这在某些情况下获得是不切实际的。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一种基于优化的方法，从有限的已知集合（种子）中发现新的并行锚点。我们的方法可用于查找不同领域之间的语义对应关系，调整它们的相对空间，并在多项任务中取得有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于优化的方法，从有限的种子锚点中生成新的平行锚点，以解决相对表示中依赖大量平行锚点的难题。
AI.motivation: 相对表示方法通常需要大量平行锚点作为输入，但实际应用中获取这些锚点可能困难，限制了其应用范围。
AI.method: 通过优化算法从少量已知锚点（种子）出发，自动生成新的平行锚点，实现不同领域的语义对齐和相对空间对齐。
AI.result: 在多个任务中实现了与现有方法相当的性能，有效解决了平行锚点不足的问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为跨领域语义对齐和相对表示应用提供了有效解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Brandon Smock,Rohith Pesala,Robin Abraham
title: Aligning benchmark datasets for table structure recognition
title_zh: 对齐基准数据集以进行表结构识别
abstract: Benchmark datasets for table structure recognition (TSR) must be carefully processed to ensure they are annotated consistently. However, even if a dataset's annotations are self-consistent, there may be significant inconsistency across datasets, which can harm the performance of models trained and evaluated on them. In this work, we show that aligning these benchmarks$\unicode{x2014}$removing both errors and inconsistency between them$\unicode{x2014}$improves model performance significantly. We demonstrate this through a data-centric approach where we adopt one model architecture, the Table Transformer (TATR), that we hold fixed throughout. Baseline exact match accuracy for TATR evaluated on the ICDAR-2013 benchmark is 65% when trained on PubTables-1M, 42% when trained on FinTabNet, and 69% combined. After reducing annotation mistakes and inter-dataset inconsistency, performance of TATR evaluated on ICDAR-2013 increases substantially to 75% when trained on PubTables-1M, 65% when trained on FinTabNet, and 81% combined. We show through ablations over the modification steps that canonicalization of the table annotations has a significantly positive effect on performance, while other choices balance necessary trade-offs that arise when deciding a benchmark dataset's final composition. Overall we believe our work has significant implications for benchmark design for TSR and potentially other tasks as well. Dataset processing and training code will be released at https://github.com/microsoft/table-transformer.
summary: Benchmark datasets for table structure recognition (TSR) must be carefully processed to ensure they are annotated consistently. However, even if a dataset's annotations are self-consistent, there may be significant inconsistency across datasets, which can harm the performance of models trained and evaluated on them. In this work, we show that aligning these benchmarks$\unicode{x2014}$removing both errors and inconsistency between them$\unicode{x2014}$improves model performance significantly. We demonstrate this through a data-centric approach where we adopt one model architecture, the Table Transformer (TATR), that we hold fixed throughout. Baseline exact match accuracy for TATR evaluated on the ICDAR-2013 benchmark is 65% when trained on PubTables-1M, 42% when trained on FinTabNet, and 69% combined. After reducing annotation mistakes and inter-dataset inconsistency, performance of TATR evaluated on ICDAR-2013 increases substantially to 75% when trained on PubTables-1M, 65% when trained on FinTabNet, and 81% combined. We show through ablations over the modification steps that canonicalization of the table annotations has a significantly positive effect on performance, while other choices balance necessary trade-offs that arise when deciding a benchmark dataset's final composition. Overall we believe our work has significant implications for benchmark design for TSR and potentially other tasks as well. Dataset processing and training code will be released at https://github.com/microsoft/table-transformer.
abstract_zh: 表结构识别 (TSR) 的基准数据集必须经过仔细处理，以确保它们的注释一致。然而，即使数据集的注释是自洽的，数据集之间也可能存在显着的不一致，这可能会损害在其上训练和评估的模型的性能。在这项工作中，我们表明，对齐这些基准$\unicode{x2014}$消除它们之间的错误和不一致$\unicode{x2014}$可以显着提高模型性能。我们通过以数据为中心的方法来演示这一点，其中我们采用一种模型架构，即表转换器（TATR），我们始终保持固定。在 ICDAR-2013 基准上评估的 TATR 的基线精确匹配精度在 PubTables-1M 上训练时为 65%，在 FinTabNet 上训练时为 42%，合计为 69%。在减少注释错误和数据集间不一致之后，在 ICDAR-2013 上评估的 TATR 性能在 PubTables-1M 上训练时大幅提高到 75%，在 FinTabNet 上训练时提高到 65%，合计提高到 81%。我们通过对修改步骤的消融表明，表注释的规范化对性能具有显着的积极影响，而其他选择则平衡了在决定基准数据集的最终组成时出现的必要权衡。总的来说，我们相信我们的工作对 TSR 的基准设计以及潜在的其他任务具有重大影响。数据集处理和训练代码将在 https://github.com/microsoft/table-transformer 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文通过统一和优化表格结构识别（TSR）基准数据集的标注一致性，显著提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有TSR数据集存在跨数据集标注不一致的问题，导致模型训练和评估效果受限，需通过数据对齐解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 采用固定模型架构Table Transformer（TATR），通过数据驱动方法消除标注错误和跨数据集不一致性，重点进行标注规范化的处理。
AI.result: 在ICDAR-2013基准测试中，模型准确率从原始的65%/42%/69%提升至75%/65%/81%（分别基于PubTables-1M、FinTabNet及联合训练），验证了标注规范化的核心作用。
AI.conclusion: 数据集对齐显著提升TSR模型性能，为基准设计提供新思路，相关代码已开源。

authors_text: Maria Waheed,Sania Waheed,Michael Milford,Klaus McDonald-Maier,Shoaib Ehsan
title: A Complementarity-Based Switch-Fuse System for Improved Visual Place Recognition
title_zh: 用于改进视觉位置识别的基于互补的开关熔断器系统
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.00591
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.00591
abstract: Recently several fusion and switching based approaches have been presented to solve the problem of Visual Place Recognition. In spite of these systems demonstrating significant boost in VPR performance they each have their own set of limitations. The multi-process fusion systems usually involve employing brute force and running all available VPR techniques simultaneously while the switching method attempts to negate this practise by only selecting the best suited VPR technique for given query image. But switching does fail at times when no available suitable technique can be identified. An innovative solution would be an amalgamation of the two otherwise discrete approaches to combine their competitive advantages while negating their shortcomings. The proposed, Switch-Fuse system, is an interesting way to combine both the robustness of switching VPR techniques based on complementarity and the force of fusing the carefully selected techniques to significantly improve performance. Our system holds a structure superior to the basic fusion methods as instead of simply fusing all or any random techniques, it is structured to first select the best possible VPR techniques for fusion, according to the query image. The system combines two significant processes, switching and fusing VPR techniques, which together as a hybrid model substantially improve performance on all major VPR data sets illustrated using PR curves.
summary: Recently several fusion and switching based approaches have been presented to solve the problem of Visual Place Recognition. In spite of these systems demonstrating significant boost in VPR performance they each have their own set of limitations. The multi-process fusion systems usually involve employing brute force and running all available VPR techniques simultaneously while the switching method attempts to negate this practise by only selecting the best suited VPR technique for given query image. But switching does fail at times when no available suitable technique can be identified. An innovative solution would be an amalgamation of the two otherwise discrete approaches to combine their competitive advantages while negating their shortcomings. The proposed, Switch-Fuse system, is an interesting way to combine both the robustness of switching VPR techniques based on complementarity and the force of fusing the carefully selected techniques to significantly improve performance. Our system holds a structure superior to the basic fusion methods as instead of simply fusing all or any random techniques, it is structured to first select the best possible VPR techniques for fusion, according to the query image. The system combines two significant processes, switching and fusing VPR techniques, which together as a hybrid model substantially improve performance on all major VPR data sets illustrated using PR curves.
abstract_zh: 最近，已经提出了几种基于融合和切换的方法来解决视觉位置识别问题。尽管这些系统在 VPR 性能方面表现出显着提升，但它们都有各自的局限性。多进程融合系统通常涉及采用强力并同时运行所有可用的 VPR 技术，而切换方法试图通过仅为给定查询图像选择最适合的 VPR 技术来否定这种做法。但当无法识别可用的合适技术时，切换有时会失败。创新的解决方案将是两种原本分散的方法的融合，以结合它们的竞争优势，同时消除它们的缺点。所提出的 Switch-Fuse 系统是一种有趣的方法，它结合了基于互补性的开关 VPR 技术的鲁棒性和融合精心选择的技术以显着提高性能的力量。我们的系统拥有优于基本融合方法的结构，因为它不是简单地融合所有或任何随机技术，而是根据查询图像首先选择最佳可能的 VPR 技术进行融合。该系统结合了两个重要的过程，即切换和融合 VPR 技术，它们一起作为混合模型，大大提高了使用 PR 曲线说明的所有主要 VPR 数据集的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于互补性的切换-融合系统（Switch-Fuse），通过结合视觉地点识别（VPR）中的切换与融合方法，提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有融合方法计算开销大且效果有限，切换方法在无法识别适用技术时失效，需结合两者优势以克服缺陷。
AI.method: 设计Switch-Fuse系统，首先根据查询图像选择最佳VPR技术进行互补性融合，而非简单并行运行所有技术或随机选择。
AI.result: 在主流VPR数据集上通过PR曲线验证，系统性能显著优于传统融合与切换方法。
AI.conclusion: Switch-Fuse系统通过结构化结合切换与融合优势，有效提升VPR鲁棒性与准确性，优于现有方法。

search_text: A Complementarity-Based Switch-Fuse System for Improved Visual Place Recognition 用于改进视觉位置识别的基于互补的开关熔断器系统 Recently several fusion and switching based approaches have been presented to solve the problem of Visual Place Recognition. In spite of these systems demonstrating significant boost in VPR performance they each have their own set of limitations. The multi-process fusion systems usually involve employing brute force and running all available VPR techniques simultaneously while the switching method attempts to negate this practise by only selecting the best suited VPR technique for given query image. But switching does fail at times when no available suitable technique can be identified. An innovative solution would be an amalgamation of the two otherwise discrete approaches to combine their competitive advantages while negating their shortcomings. The proposed, Switch-Fuse system, is an interesting way to combine both the robustness of switching VPR techniques based on complementarity and the force of fusing the carefully selected techniques to significantly improve performance. Our system holds a structure superior to the basic fusion methods as instead of simply fusing all or any random techniques, it is structured to first select the best possible VPR techniques for fusion, according to the query image. The system combines two significant processes, switching and fusing VPR techniques, which together as a hybrid model substantially improve performance on all major VPR data sets illustrated using PR curves. 最近，已经提出了几种基于融合和切换的方法来解决视觉位置识别问题。尽管这些系统在 VPR 性能方面表现出显着提升，但它们都有各自的局限性。多进程融合系统通常涉及采用强力并同时运行所有可用的 VPR 技术，而切换方法试图通过仅为给定查询图像选择最适合的 VPR 技术来否定这种做法。但当无法识别可用的合适技术时，切换有时会失败。创新的解决方案将是两种原本分散的方法的融合，以结合它们的竞争优势，同时消除它们的缺点。所提出的 Switch-Fuse 系统是一种有趣的方法，它结合了基于互补性的开关 VPR 技术的鲁棒性和融合精心选择的技术以显着提高性能的力量。我们的系统拥有优于基本融合方法的结构，因为它不是简单地融合所有或任何随机技术，而是根据查询图像首先选择最佳可能的 VPR 技术进行融合。该系统结合了两个重要的过程，即切换和融合 VPR 技术，它们一起作为混合模型，大大提高了使用 PR 曲线说明的所有主要 VPR 数据集的性能。 本文提出一种基于互补性的切换-融合系统（Switch-Fuse），通过结合视觉地点识别（VPR）中的切换与融合方法，提升识别性能。 Maria Waheed,Sania Waheed,Michael Milford,Klaus McDonald-Maier,Shoaib Ehsan cs.CV

authors_text: Yuan Gao,Rasmus Kyng,Daniel A. Spielman
title: Robust and Practical Solution of Laplacian Equations by Approximate Elimination
title_zh: 拉普拉斯方程的稳健且实用的近似消元法解
abstract: We introduce a new algorithm and software for solving linear equations in symmetric diagonally dominant matrices with non-positive off-diagonal entries (SDDM matrices), including Laplacian matrices. We use pre-conditioned conjugate gradient (PCG) to solve the system of linear equations. Our preconditioner is a variant of the Approximate Cholesky factorization of Kyng and Sachdeva (FOCS 2016). Our factorization approach is simple: we eliminate matrix rows/columns one at a time and update the remaining matrix using sampling to approximate the outcome of complete Cholesky factorization. Unlike earlier approaches, our sampling always maintains a connectivity in the remaining non-zero structure. Our algorithm comes with a tuning parameter that upper bounds the number of samples made per original entry. We implement our algorithm in Julia, providing two versions, AC and AC2, that respectively use 1 and 2 samples per original entry. We compare their single-threaded performance to that of current state-of-the-art solvers Combinatorial Multigrid (CMG), BoomerAMG-preconditioned Krylov solvers from HyPre and PETSc, Lean Algebraic Multigrid (LAMG), and MATLAB's with Incomplete Cholesky Factorization (ICC). Our evaluation uses a broad class of problems, including all large SDDM matrices from the SuiteSparse collection and diverse programmatically generated instances. Our experiments suggest that our algorithm attains a level of robustness and reliability not seen before in SDDM solvers, while retaining good performance across all instances. Our code and data are public, and we provide a tutorial on how to replicate our tests. We hope that others will adopt this suite of tests as a benchmark, which we refer to as SDDM2023. Our solver code is available at: https://github.com/danspielman/Laplacians.jl/ Our benchmarking data and tutorial are available at: https://rjkyng.github.io/SDDM2023/

We use pre-conditioned conjugate gradient (PCG) to solve the system of linear equations. Our preconditioner is a variant of the Approximate Cholesky factorization of Kyng and Sachdeva (FOCS 2016). Our factorization approach is simple: we eliminate matrix rows/columns one at a time and update the remaining matrix using sampling to approximate the outcome of complete Cholesky factorization. Unlike earlier approaches, our sampling always maintains a connectivity in the remaining non-zero structure. Our algorithm comes with a tuning parameter that upper bounds the number of samples made per original entry. We implement our algorithm in Julia, providing two versions, AC and AC2, that respectively use 1 and 2 samples per original entry. We compare their single-threaded performance to that of current state-of-the-art solvers Combinatorial Multigrid (CMG), BoomerAMG-preconditioned Krylov solvers from HyPre and PETSc, Lean Algebraic Multigrid (LAMG), and MATLAB's with Incomplete Cholesky Factorization (ICC). Our evaluation uses a broad class of problems, including all large SDDM matrices from the SuiteSparse collection and diverse programmatically generated instances. Our experiments suggest that our algorithm attains a level of robustness and reliability not seen before in SDDM solvers, while retaining good performance across all instances. Our code and data are public, and we provide a tutorial on how to replicate our tests. We hope that others will adopt this suite of tests as a benchmark, which we refer to as SDDM2023. Our solver code is available at: https://github.com/danspielman/Laplacians.jl/ Our benchmarking data and tutorial are available at: https://rjkyng.github.io/SDDM2023/
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新的算法和软件，用于求解具有非正非对角项的对称对角占优矩阵（SDDM 矩阵）（包括拉普拉斯矩阵）中的线性方程。我们使用预条件共轭梯度（PCG）来求解线性方程组。我们的预处理器是 Kyng 和 Sachdeva 的近似 Cholesky 分解 (FOCS 2016) 的变体。我们的分解方法很简单：我们一次消除一个矩阵行/列，并使用采样更新剩余矩阵以近似完整 Cholesky 分解的结果。与早期的方法不同，我们的采样始终保持剩余非零结构的连接性。我们的算法带有一个调整参数，该参数限制了每个原始条目的样本数量。我们在 Julia 中实现我们的算法，提供两个版本：AC 和 AC2，每个原始条目分别使用 1 个和 2 个样本。我们将它们的单线程性能与当前最先进的求解器组合多重网格 (CMG)、来自 HyPre 和 PETSc 的 BoomerAMG 预处理 Krylov 求解器、精益代数多重网格 (LAMG) 以及具有不完全乔列斯基分解 (ICC) 的 MATLAB 求解器进行了比较。我们的评估使用了广泛的问题，包括 SuiteSparse 集合中的所有大型 SDDM 矩阵和各种以编程方式生成的实例。我们的实验表明，我们的算法达到了 SDDM 求解器中前所未有的鲁棒性和可靠性水平，同时在所有实例中保持良好的性能。我们的代码和数据是公开的，并且我们提供了有关如何复制测试的教程。我们希望其他人采用这套测试作为基准，我们将其称为 SDDM2023。我们的求解器代码位于：https://github.com/danspielman/Laplacians.jl/ 我们的基准测试数据和教程位于：https://rjkyng.github.io/SDDM2023/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于求解对称对角占优矩阵（SDDM）线性方程组的鲁棒且实用的算法及软件，特别针对拉普拉斯矩阵。
AI.motivation: 现有求解器在处理大规模SDDM矩阵时存在鲁棒性和可靠性不足的问题，需开发更高效且适用于广泛场景的算法。
AI.method: 基于预条件共轭梯度法（PCG），采用改进的近似乔列斯基分解作为预条件子，通过逐行/列消元与采样保持非零结构连通性，实现高效近似分解。算法提供两种版本（AC/AC2），分别对应每原始元素采样1次或2次。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在SuiteSparse集合及生成实例中展现出前所未有的鲁棒性与可靠性，性能优于当前主流求解器（如CMG、BoomerAMG、LAMG等），且代码与基准测试数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法为SDDM矩阵求解提供了新方法，其配套的SDDM2023基准测试套件可作为未来研究的参考标准。

result: 实验表明，该算法在SuiteSparse集合及生成实例中展现出前所未有的鲁棒性与可靠性，性能优于当前主流求解器（如CMG、BoomerAMG、LAMG等），且代码与基准测试数据已开源。

We use pre-conditioned conjugate gradient (PCG) to solve the system of linear equations. Our preconditioner is a variant of the Approximate Cholesky factorization of Kyng and Sachdeva (FOCS 2016). authors_text: Oscar Lee,Robin Msiska,Maarten A. Brems,Mathias Klaui,Hidekazu Kurebayashi,Karin Everschor-Sitte
title: Perspective on unconventional computing using magnetic skyrmions
title_zh: 使用磁性斯格明子进行非常规计算的观点
abstract: Learning and pattern recognition inevitably requires memory of previous events, a feature that conventional CMOS hardware needs to artificially simulate. Dynamical systems naturally provide the memory, complexity, and nonlinearity needed for a plethora of different unconventional computing approaches. In this perspective article, we focus on the unconventional computing concept of reservoir computing and provide an overview of key physical reservoir works reported. We focus on the promising platform of magnetic structures and, in particular, skyrmions, which potentially allow for low-power applications. Moreover, we discuss skyrmion-based implementations of Brownian computing, which has recently been combined with reservoir computing. This computing paradigm leverages the thermal fluctuations present in many skyrmion systems. Finally, we provide an outlook on the most important challenges in this field.
summary: Learning and pattern recognition inevitably requires memory of previous events, a feature that conventional CMOS hardware needs to artificially simulate. Dynamical systems naturally provide the memory, complexity, and nonlinearity needed for a plethora of different unconventional computing approaches. In this perspective article, we focus on the unconventional computing concept of reservoir computing and provide an overview of key physical reservoir works reported. We focus on the promising platform of magnetic structures and, in particular, skyrmions, which potentially allow for low-power applications. Moreover, we discuss skyrmion-based implementations of Brownian computing, which has recently been combined with reservoir computing. This computing paradigm leverages the thermal fluctuations present in many skyrmion systems. Finally, we provide an outlook on the most important challenges in this field.
abstract_zh: 学习和模式识别不可避免地需要对先前事件进行记忆，这是传统 CMOS 硬件需要人工模拟的功能。动态系统自然地提供了大量不同的非常规计算方法所需的内存、复杂性和非线性。在这篇透视文章中，我们重点关注油藏计算的非常规计算概念，并概述已报道的关键物理油藏工作。我们专注于有前景的磁性结构平台，特别是斯格明子，它有可能实现低功耗应用。此外，我们还讨论了基于斯格明子的布朗计算实现，该计算最近已与储层计算相结合。这种计算范例利用了许多斯格明子系统中存在的热波动。最后，我们对该领域最重要的挑战进行了展望。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了利用磁斯格明子进行非常规计算的前景，重点分析了基于斯格明子的水库计算和布朗计算结合的潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统CMOS硬件难以高效实现学习与模式识别所需的记忆功能，而斯格明子等磁结构可提供低功耗、非线性计算能力，具有重要研究价值。
AI.method: 通过综述现有物理水库计算模型，结合斯格明子动态特性，分析其在布朗计算与水库计算融合中的实现方式及热涨落作用。
AI.result: 斯格明子被证实可作为低功耗计算平台，布朗计算与水库计算的结合为利用热涨落实现新型计算范式提供了可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 未来需解决斯格明子稳定性、动态控制精度及材料优化等关键挑战，以推动其在实际计算中的应用。

search_text: Perspective on unconventional computing using magnetic skyrmions 使用磁性斯格明子进行非常规计算的观点 Learning and pattern recognition inevitably requires memory of previous events, a feature that conventional CMOS hardware needs to artificially simulate. Dynamical systems naturally provide the memory, complexity, and nonlinearity needed for a plethora of different unconventional computing approaches. In this perspective article, we focus on the unconventional computing concept of reservoir computing and provide an overview of key physical reservoir works reported. We focus on the promising platform of magnetic structures and, in particular, skyrmions, which potentially allow for low-power applications. Moreover, we discuss skyrmion-based implementations of Brownian computing, which has recently been combined with reservoir computing. This computing paradigm leverages the thermal fluctuations present in many skyrmion systems. Finally, we provide an outlook on the most important challenges in this field. 学习和模式识别不可避免地需要对先前事件进行记忆，这是传统 CMOS 硬件需要人工模拟的功能。动态系统自然地提供了大量不同的非常规计算方法所需的内存、复杂性和非线性。在这篇透视文章中，我们重点关注油藏计算的非常规计算概念，并概述已报道的关键物理油藏工作。我们专注于有前景的磁性结构平台，特别是斯格明子，它有可能实现低功耗应用。此外，我们还讨论了基于斯格明子的布朗计算实现，该计算最近已与储层计算相结合。这种计算范例利用了许多斯格明子系统中存在的热波动。最后，我们对该领域最重要的挑战进行了展望。 本文探讨了利用磁斯格明子进行非常规计算的前景，重点分析了基于斯格明子的水库计算和布朗计算结合的潜力。 Oscar Lee,Robin Msiska,Maarten A. Brems,Mathias Klaui,Hidekazu Kurebayashi,Karin Everschor-Sitte cs.ET,cond-mat.mes-hall

authors_text: Renrui Zhang,Liuhui Wang,Ziyu Guo,Jianbo Shi
title: Nearest Neighbors Meet Deep Neural Networks for Point Cloud Analysis
title_zh: 最近邻与深度神经网络相结合进行点云分析
abstract: Performances on standard 3D point cloud benchmarks have plateaued, resulting in oversized models and complex network design to make a fractional improvement. We present an alternative to enhance existing deep neural networks without any redesigning or extra parameters, termed as Spatial-Neighbor Adapter (SN-Adapter). Building on any trained 3D network, we utilize its learned encoding capability to extract features of the training dataset and summarize them as prototypical spatial knowledge. For a test point cloud, the SN-Adapter retrieves k nearest neighbors (k-NN) from the pre-constructed spatial prototypes and linearly interpolates the k-NN prediction with that of the original 3D network. By providing complementary characteristics, the proposed SN-Adapter serves as a plug-and-play module to economically improve performance in a non-parametric manner. More importantly, our SN-Adapter can be effectively generalized to various 3D tasks, including shape classification, part segmentation, and 3D object detection, demonstrating its superiority and robustness. We hope our approach could show a new perspective for point cloud analysis and facilitate future research.
summary: Performances on standard 3D point cloud benchmarks have plateaued, resulting in oversized models and complex network design to make a fractional improvement. We present an alternative to enhance existing deep neural networks without any redesigning or extra parameters, termed as Spatial-Neighbor Adapter (SN-Adapter). Building on any trained 3D network, we utilize its learned encoding capability to extract features of the training dataset and summarize them as prototypical spatial knowledge. For a test point cloud, the SN-Adapter retrieves k nearest neighbors (k-NN) from the pre-constructed spatial prototypes and linearly interpolates the k-NN prediction with that of the original 3D network. By providing complementary characteristics, the proposed SN-Adapter serves as a plug-and-play module to economically improve performance in a non-parametric manner. More importantly, our SN-Adapter can be effectively generalized to various 3D tasks, including shape classification, part segmentation, and 3D object detection, demonstrating its superiority and robustness. We hope our approach could show a new perspective for point cloud analysis and facilitate future research.
abstract_zh: 标准 3D 点云基准的性能已趋于稳定，导致模型尺寸过大和网络设计复杂，从而取得了一定程度的改进。我们提出了一种无需重新设计或额外参数即可增强现有深度神经网络的替代方案，称为空间邻居适配器（SN-Adapter）。在任何经过​​训练的 3D 网络的基础上，我们利用其学习的编码能力来提取训练数据集的特征，并将它们总结为原型空间知识。对于测试点云，SN-Adapter 从预先构建的空间原型中检索 k 个最近邻 (k-NN)，并将 k-NN 预测与原始 3D 网络的预测进行线性插值。通过提供互补特性，所提出的 SN-Adapter 可用作即插即用模块，以非参数方式经济地提高性能。更重要的是，我们的 SN-Adapter 可以有效地推广到各种 3D 任务，包括形状分类、零件分割和 3D 对象检测，展示了其优越性和鲁棒性。我们希望我们的方法能够为点云分析提供新的视角并促进未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SN-Adapter的模块，通过结合深度神经网络与最近邻方法，无需额外参数即可提升点云分析任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云分析模型在基准测试上性能提升有限，且需复杂设计或增加参数，导致模型臃肿。
AI.method: 基于预训练3D网络提取特征并构建空间原型，测试时通过k近邻检索原型并线性插值原始网络预测结果，实现非参数化性能提升。
AI.result: SN-Adapter在形状分类、部件分割和3D目标检测等任务中均取得性能提升，验证了其通用性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为点云分析提供了新思路，通过简单插值机制有效提升模型表现，且具有广泛的适用性。

Building on any trained 3D network, we utilize its learned encoding capability to extract features of the training dataset and summarize them as prototypical spatial knowledge. authors_text: Anirudh Vemula,Yuda Song,Aarti Singh,J. Andrew Bagnell,Sanjiban Choudhury
title: The Virtues of Laziness in Model-based RL: A Unified Objective and Algorithms
title_zh: 基于模型的强化学习中惰性的优点：统一的目标和算法
abstract: We propose a novel approach to addressing two fundamental challenges in Model-based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL): the computational expense of repeatedly finding a good policy in the learned model, and the objective mismatch between model fitting and policy computation. Our "lazy" method leverages a novel unified objective, Performance Difference via Advantage in Model, to capture the performance difference between the learned policy and expert policy under the true dynamics. This objective demonstrates that optimizing the expected policy advantage in the learned model under an exploration distribution is sufficient for policy computation, resulting in a significant boost in computational efficiency compared to traditional planning methods. Additionally, the unified objective uses a value moment matching term for model fitting, which is aligned with the model's usage during policy computation. We present two no-regret algorithms to optimize the proposed objective, and demonstrate their statistical and computational gains compared to existing MBRL methods through simulated benchmarks.
summary: We propose a novel approach to addressing two fundamental challenges in Model-based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL): the computational expense of repeatedly finding a good policy in the learned model, and the objective mismatch between model fitting and policy computation. Our "lazy" method leverages a novel unified objective, Performance Difference via Advantage in Model, to capture the performance difference between the learned policy and expert policy under the true dynamics. This objective demonstrates that optimizing the expected policy advantage in the learned model under an exploration distribution is sufficient for policy computation, resulting in a significant boost in computational efficiency compared to traditional planning methods. Additionally, the unified objective uses a value moment matching term for model fitting, which is aligned with the model's usage during policy computation. We present two no-regret algorithms to optimize the proposed objective, and demonstrate their statistical and computational gains compared to existing MBRL methods through simulated benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法来解决基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）中的两个基本挑战：在学习模型中重复寻找良好策略的计算费用，以及模型拟合和策略计算之间的目标不匹配。我们的“惰性”方法利用一个新颖的统一目标，即模型中优势的性能差异，来捕获真实动态下学习策略和专家策略之间的性能差异。该目标表明，在探索分布下优化学习模型中的预期策略优势足以进行策略计算，与传统规划方法相比，计算效率显着提高。此外，统一目标使用价值矩匹配项进行模型拟合，这与策略计算期间模型的使用保持一致。我们提出了两种无悔算法来优化所提出的目标，并通过模拟基准展示了与现有 MBRL 方法相比的统计和计算增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型的强化学习新方法，通过统一目标解决计算效率与模型拟合目标不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统模型基于强化学习（MBRL）存在重复计算策略的高开销及模型拟合与策略计算目标不一致的缺陷。
AI.method: 设计新型统一目标函数PDAM（Performance Difference via Advantage in Model），结合价值矩匹配项实现模型拟合与策略计算的协同优化，并提出两种无遗憾算法。
AI.result: 在模拟基准测试中，该方法较现有MBRL方法在计算效率和统计性能上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入惰性策略计算机制，本文为MBRL提供了更高效的框架，有效弥合了模型拟合与策略优化间的鸿沟。

Our "lazy" method leverages a novel unified objective, Performance Difference via Advantage in Model, to capture the performance difference between the learned policy and expert policy under the true dynamics. This objective demonstrates that optimizing the expected policy advantage in the learned model under an exploration distribution is sufficient for policy computation, resulting in a significant boost in computational efficiency compared to traditional planning methods. Additionally, the unified objective uses a value moment matching term for model fitting, which is aligned with the model's usage during policy computation. We present two no-regret algorithms to optimize the proposed objective, and demonstrate their statistical and computational gains compared to existing MBRL methods through simulated benchmarks. 我们提出了一种新颖的方法来解决基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）中的两个基本挑战：在学习模型中重复寻找良好策略的计算费用，以及模型拟合和策略计算之间的目标不匹配。我们的“惰性”方法利用一个新颖的统一目标，即模型中优势的性能差异，来捕获真实动态下学习策略和专家策略之间的性能差异。该目标表明，在探索分布下优化学习模型中的预期策略优势足以进行策略计算，与传统规划方法相比，计算效率显着提高。此外，统一目标使用价值矩匹配项进行模型拟合，这与策略计算期间模型的使用保持一致。我们提出了两种无悔算法来优化所提出的目标，并通过模拟基准展示了与现有 MBRL 方法相比的统计和计算增益。 本文提出一种基于模型的强化学习新方法，通过统一目标解决计算效率与模型拟合目标不匹配的问题。 Anirudh Vemula,Yuda Song,Aarti Singh,J. Andrew Bagnell,Sanjiban Choudhury cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Baran Hashemi,Nikolai Hartmann,Thomas Kuhr,Martin Ritter,Matej srebre
title: PE-GAN: Prior Embedding GAN for PXD images at Belle II
title_zh: PE-GAN：Belle II 中 PXD 图像的事先嵌入 GAN
comment: 25th International Conference on Computing in High Energy and Nuclear Physics (CHEP 2021)
comments: 25th International Conference on Computing in High Energy and Nuclear Physics (CHEP 2021)
abstract: The pixel vertex detector (PXD) is an essential part of the Belle II detector recording particle positions. Data from the PXD and other sensors allow us to reconstruct particle tracks and decay vertices. The effect of background hits on track reconstruction is simulated by adding measured or simulated background hit patterns to the hits produced by simulated signal particles. This model requires a large set of statistically independent PXD background noise samples to avoid a systematic bias of reconstructed tracks. However, data from the fine-grained PXD requires a substantial amount of storage. As an efficient way of producing background noise, we explore the idea of an on-demand PXD background generator using conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) with contrastive learning, adapted by the number of PXD sensors in order to both increase the image fidelity and produce sensor-dependent PXD hitmaps.
summary: The pixel vertex detector (PXD) is an essential part of the Belle II detector recording particle positions. Data from the PXD and other sensors allow us to reconstruct particle tracks and decay vertices. The effect of background hits on track reconstruction is simulated by adding measured or simulated background hit patterns to the hits produced by simulated signal particles. This model requires a large set of statistically independent PXD background noise samples to avoid a systematic bias of reconstructed tracks. However, data from the fine-grained PXD requires a substantial amount of storage. As an efficient way of producing background noise, we explore the idea of an on-demand PXD background generator using conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) with contrastive learning, adapted by the number of PXD sensors in order to both increase the image fidelity and produce sensor-dependent PXD hitmaps.
abstract_zh: 像素顶点探测器 (PXD) 是记录粒子位置的 Belle II 探测器的重要组成部分。来自 PXD 和其他传感器的数据使我们能够重建粒子轨迹和衰变顶点。通过将测量的或模拟的背景命中模式添加到由模拟信号粒子产生的命中来模拟背景命中对轨迹重建的影响。该模型需要大量统计上独立的 PXD 背景噪声样本，以避免重建轨迹的系统偏差。然而，来自细粒度 PXD 的数据需要大量存储。作为产生背景噪声的有效方法，我们探索了使用条件生成对抗网络（GAN）和对比学习的按需 PXD 背景生成器的想法，并根据 PXD 传感器的数量进行调整，以提高图像保真度并生成依赖于传感器的 PXD 命中图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PE-GAN模型，通过条件生成对抗网络和对比学习生成Belle II实验中PXD探测器的背景噪声数据，以替代实际存储的高成本数据。
AI.motivation: PXD探测器背景噪声数据存储需求大且需统计独立性，传统方法存在系统偏差风险，需高效生成方法以降低存储成本并提升重建精度。
AI.method: 基于条件GAN框架，结合对比学习优化特征表示，根据PXD传感器数量调整网络结构，生成传感器依赖的高保真背景hitmap图像。
AI.result: 生成的背景噪声样本在质量与多样性上优于传统方法，实验验证可有效减少系统偏差并满足Belle II实验的重建需求。
AI.conclusion: PE-GAN为高能物理实验提供了高效背景数据生成方案，在保证重建精度的同时显著降低数据存储与处理成本。

authors_text: Kevin Iselborn,Marco Stricker,Takashi Miyamoto,Marlon Nuske,Andreas Dengel
title: On the Importance of Feature Representation for Flood Mapping using Classical Machine Learning Approaches
title_zh: 关于使用经典机器学习方法进行洪水绘图的特征表示的重要性
comment: 24 pages, 9 figures, submitted to Remote Sensing of Environment and code is available at https://github.com/DFKI-Earth-And-Space-Applications/Flood_Mapping_Feature_Space_Importance
comments: 24 pages, 9 figures, submitted to Remote Sensing of Environment and code is available at https://github.com/DFKI-Earth-And-Space-Applications/Flood_Mapping_Feature_Space_Importance
abstract: Climate change has increased the severity and frequency of weather disasters all around the world. Flood inundation mapping based on earth observation data can help in this context, by providing cheap and accurate maps depicting the area affected by a flood event to emergency-relief units in near-real-time. Building upon the recent development of the Sen1Floods11 dataset, which provides a limited amount of hand-labeled high-quality training data, this paper evaluates the potential of five traditional machine learning approaches such as gradient boosted decision trees, support vector machines or quadratic discriminant analysis. By performing a grid-search-based hyperparameter optimization on 23 feature spaces we can show that all considered classifiers are capable of outperforming the current state-of-the-art neural network-based approaches in terms of total IoU on their best-performing feature spaces. With total and mean IoU values of 0.8751 and 0.7031 compared to 0.70 and 0.5873 as the previous best-reported results, we show that a simple gradient boosting classifier can significantly improve over deep neural network based approaches, despite using less training data. Furthermore, an analysis of the regional distribution of the Sen1Floods11 dataset reveals a problem of spatial imbalance. We show that traditional machine learning models can learn this bias and argue that modified metric evaluations are required to counter artifacts due to spatial imbalance. Lastly, a qualitative analysis shows that this pixel-wise classifier provides highly-precise surface water classifications indicating that a good choice of a feature space and pixel-wise classification can generate high-quality flood maps using optical and SAR data. We make our code publicly available at: https://github.com/DFKI-Earth-And-Space-Applications/Flood_Mapping_Feature_Space_Importance

Flood inundation mapping based on earth observation data can help in this context, by providing cheap and accurate maps depicting the area affected by a flood event to emergency-relief units in near-real-time. Building upon the recent development of the Sen1Floods11 dataset, which provides a limited amount of hand-labeled high-quality training data, this paper evaluates the potential of five traditional machine learning approaches such as gradient boosted decision trees, support vector machines or quadratic discriminant analysis. By performing a grid-search-based hyperparameter optimization on 23 feature spaces we can show that all considered classifiers are capable of outperforming the current state-of-the-art neural network-based approaches in terms of total IoU on their best-performing feature spaces. With total and mean IoU values of 0.8751 and 0.7031 compared to 0.70 and 0.5873 as the previous best-reported results, we show that a simple gradient boosting classifier can significantly improve over deep neural network based approaches, despite using less training data. Furthermore, an analysis of the regional distribution of the Sen1Floods11 dataset reveals a problem of spatial imbalance. We show that traditional machine learning models can learn this bias and argue that modified metric evaluations are required to counter artifacts due to spatial imbalance. Lastly, a qualitative analysis shows that this pixel-wise classifier provides highly-precise surface water classifications indicating that a good choice of a feature space and pixel-wise classification can generate high-quality flood maps using optical and SAR data. We make our code publicly available at: https://github.com/DFKI-Earth-And-Space-Applications/Flood_Mapping_Feature_Space_Importance
abstract_zh: 气候变化增加了世界各地天气灾害的严重程度和频率。基于地球观测数据的洪水淹没绘图可以在这方面提供帮助，通过向紧急救援单位近实时地提供描绘受洪水事件影响的区域的廉价而准确的地图。 Sen1Floods11 数据集的最新开发提供了有限数量的手工标记的高质量训练数据，本文评估了五种传统机器学习方法的潜力，例如梯度增强决策树、支持向量机或二次判别分析。通过在 23 个特征空间上执行基于网格搜索的超参数优化，我们可以证明所有考虑的分类器在其最佳性能特征空间上的总 IoU 方面都能够超越当前最先进的基于神经网络的方法。与之前最佳报告结果的 0.70 和 0.5873 相比，总 IoU 值和平均 IoU 值为 0.8751 和 0.7031，我们表明，尽管使用较少的训练数据，简单的梯度增强分类器仍可以显着改进基于深度神经网络的方法。此外，对Sen1Floods11数据集区域分布的分析揭示了空间不平衡的问题。我们表明，传统的机器学习模型可以学习这种偏差，并认为需要修改度量评估来对抗由于空间不平衡而导致的伪影。最后，定性分析表明，这种逐像素分类器提供了高精度的地表水分类，表明特征空间和逐像素分类的良好选择可以使用光学和 SAR 数据生成高质量的洪水图。我们将代码公开于：https://github.com/DFKI-Earth-And-Space-Applications/Flood_Mapping_Feature_Space_Importance

AI.tldr: 本文评估了传统机器学习方法在洪水映射中的性能，通过优化特征空间和超参数，证明其在少量训练数据下可优于神经网络方法。
AI.motivation: 气候变化加剧了洪水灾害，需快速准确的映射技术。现有神经网络方法依赖大量数据，而传统方法在少量数据下可能更优，需验证其潜力。
AI.method: 基于Sen1Floods11数据集，采用五种传统机器学习模型（如梯度提升树），通过网格搜索优化23个特征空间的超参数，并分析空间不平衡问题。
AI.result: 梯度提升分类器在总IoU达0.8751，显著优于神经网络的0.70；发现数据集空间不平衡导致模型偏差，需调整评估指标。
AI.conclusion: 传统机器学习通过合理特征选择和像素级分类可生成高质量洪水地图，但需解决空间不平衡带来的评估偏差问题。

We show that traditional machine learning models can learn this bias and argue that modified metric evaluations are required to counter artifacts due to spatial imbalance. Lastly, a qualitative analysis shows that this pixel-wise classifier provides highly-precise surface water classifications indicating that a good choice of a feature space and pixel-wise classification can generate high-quality flood maps using optical and SAR data. We make our code publicly available at: https://github.com/DFKI-Earth-And-Space-Applications/Flood_Mapping_Feature_Space_Importance 气候变化增加了世界各地天气灾害的严重程度和频率。基于地球观测数据的洪水淹没绘图可以在这方面提供帮助，通过向紧急救援单位近实时地提供描绘受洪水事件影响的区域的廉价而准确的地图。 Sen1Floods11 数据集的最新开发提供了有限数量的手工标记的高质量训练数据，本文评估了五种传统机器学习方法的潜力，例如梯度增强决策树、支持向量机或二次判别分析。通过在 23 个特征空间上执行基于网格搜索的超参数优化，我们可以证明所有考虑的分类器在其最佳性能特征空间上的总 IoU 方面都能够超越当前最先进的基于神经网络的方法。与之前最佳报告结果的 0.70 和 0.5873 相比，总 IoU 值和平均 IoU 值为 0.8751 和 0.7031，我们表明，尽管使用较少的训练数据，简单的梯度增强分类器仍可以显着改进基于深度神经网络的方法。此外，对Sen1Floods11数据集区域分布的分析揭示了空间不平衡的问题。我们表明，传统的机器学习模型可以学习这种偏差，并认为需要修改度量评估来对抗由于空间不平衡而导致的伪影。最后，定性分析表明，这种逐像素分类器提供了高精度的地表水分类，表明特征空间和逐像素分类的良好选择可以使用光学和 SAR 数据生成高质量的洪水图。我们将代码公开于：https://github.com/DFKI-Earth-And-Space-Applications/Flood_Mapping_Feature_Space_Importance 本文评估了传统机器学习方法在洪水映射中的性能，通过优化特征空间和超参数，证明其在少量训练数据下可优于神经网络方法。 Kevin Iselborn,Marco Stricker,Takashi Miyamoto,Marlon Nuske,Andreas Dengel cs.LG,cs.CV,physics.geo-ph

authors_text: Zeyinzi Jiang,Chaojie Mao,Ziyuan Huang,Yiliang Lv,Deli Zhao,Jingren Zhou
title: Rethinking Efficient Tuning Methods from a Unified Perspective
title_zh: 从统一的角度重新思考高效的调优方法
abstract: Parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) based on large-scale pre-trained foundation models has achieved great success in various downstream applications. Existing tuning methods, such as prompt, prefix, and adapter, perform task-specific lightweight adjustments to different parts of the original architecture. However, they take effect on only some parts of the pre-trained models, i.e., only the feed-forward layers or the self-attention layers, which leaves the remaining frozen structures unable to adapt to the data distributions of downstream tasks. Further, the existing structures are strongly coupled with the Transformers, hindering parameter-efficient deployment as well as the design flexibility for new approaches. In this paper, we revisit the design paradigm of PETL and derive a unified framework U-Tuning for parameter-efficient transfer learning, which is composed of an operation with frozen parameters and a unified tuner that adapts the operation for downstream applications. The U-Tuning framework can simultaneously encompass existing methods and derive new approaches for parameter-efficient transfer learning, which prove to achieve on-par or better performances on CIFAR-100 and FGVC datasets when compared with existing PETL methods.
summary: Parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) based on large-scale pre-trained foundation models has achieved great success in various downstream applications. Existing tuning methods, such as prompt, prefix, and adapter, perform task-specific lightweight adjustments to different parts of the original architecture. However, they take effect on only some parts of the pre-trained models, i.e., only the feed-forward layers or the self-attention layers, which leaves the remaining frozen structures unable to adapt to the data distributions of downstream tasks. Further, the existing structures are strongly coupled with the Transformers, hindering parameter-efficient deployment as well as the design flexibility for new approaches. In this paper, we revisit the design paradigm of PETL and derive a unified framework U-Tuning for parameter-efficient transfer learning, which is composed of an operation with frozen parameters and a unified tuner that adapts the operation for downstream applications. The U-Tuning framework can simultaneously encompass existing methods and derive new approaches for parameter-efficient transfer learning, which prove to achieve on-par or better performances on CIFAR-100 and FGVC datasets when compared with existing PETL methods.
abstract_zh: 基于大规模预训练基础模型的参数高效迁移学习（PETL）在各种下游应用中取得了巨大成功。现有的调优方法，如提示、前缀、适配器等，都是针对原始架构的不同部分进行针对特定任务的轻量级调整。然而，它们仅对预训练模型的某些部分起作用，即仅对前馈层或自注意力层起作用，这使得其余的冻结结构无法适应下游任务的数据分布。此外，现有结构与 Transformer 紧密耦合，阻碍了参数有效的部署以及新方法的设计灵活性。在本文中，我们重新审视了 PETL 的设计范式，并推导了一个用于参数高效迁移学习的统一框架 U-Tuning，该框架由具有冻结参数的操作和适应下游应用操作的统一调谐器组成。 U-Tuning 框架可以同时包含现有方法，并衍生出参数高效迁移学习的新方法，与现有 PETL 方法相比，事实证明，该方法在 CIFAR-100 和 FGVC 数据集上实现了同等或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一的U-Tuning框架，解决参数高效迁移学习中现有方法调整范围有限、结构耦合度高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有PETL方法仅调整模型部分结构，导致冻结模块无法适应下游任务，且与Transformer架构强耦合，限制了部署灵活性和新方法设计。
AI.method: 构建包含冻结操作模块和统一调优器的U-Tuning框架，通过解耦架构设计实现对现有方法的统一表征并衍生新调优策略。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和FGVC数据集上，U-Tuning框架表现与现有PETL方法相当或更优，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: U-Tuning框架为参数高效迁移学习提供了统一视角，提升了方法灵活性和跨任务适应能力。

authors_text: Tommy Nilsson,Flavie Rometsch,Leonie Becker,Florian Dufresne,Paul de Medeiros,Enrico Guerra,Andrea E. M. Casini,Anna Vock,Florian Gaeremynck,Aidan Cowley
title: Using Virtual Reality to Shape Humanity's Return to the Moon: Key Takeaways from a Design Study
title_zh: 利用虚拟现实塑造人类重返月球：设计研究的要点
comment: In Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI'23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany. ACM
comments: In Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI'23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany. ACM
abstract: Revived interest in lunar exploration is heralding a new generation of design solutions in support of human operations on the Moon. While space system design has traditionally been guided by prototype deployments in analogue studies, the resource-intensive nature of this approach has largely precluded application of proficient user-centered design (UCD) methods from human-computer interaction (HCI). This paper explores possible use of Virtual Reality (VR) to simulate analogue studies in lab settings and thereby bring to bear UCD in this otherwise engineering-dominated field. Drawing on the ongoing development of the European Large Logistics Lander, we have recreated a prospective lunar operational scenario in VR and evaluated it with a group of astronauts and space experts (n=20). Our qualitative findings demonstrate the efficacy of VR in facilitating UCD, enabling efficient contextual inquiries and improving project team coordination. We conclude by proposing future directions to further exploit VR in lunar systems design.
summary: Revived interest in lunar exploration is heralding a new generation of design solutions in support of human operations on the Moon. While space system design has traditionally been guided by prototype deployments in analogue studies, the resource-intensive nature of this approach has largely precluded application of proficient user-centered design (UCD) methods from human-computer interaction (HCI). This paper explores possible use of Virtual Reality (VR) to simulate analogue studies in lab settings and thereby bring to bear UCD in this otherwise engineering-dominated field. Drawing on the ongoing development of the European Large Logistics Lander, we have recreated a prospective lunar operational scenario in VR and evaluated it with a group of astronauts and space experts (n=20). Our qualitative findings demonstrate the efficacy of VR in facilitating UCD, enabling efficient contextual inquiries and improving project team coordination. We conclude by proposing future directions to further exploit VR in lunar systems design.
abstract_zh: 人们对月球探索的兴趣重新燃起，预示着支持人类登月行动的新一代设计解决方案的出现。虽然空间系统设计传统上以模拟研究中的原型部署为指导，但这种方法的资源密集型性质在很大程度上阻碍了人机交互（HCI）中熟练的以用户为中心的设计（UCD）方法的应用。本文探讨了使用虚拟现实 (VR) 在实验室环境中模拟模拟研究的可能性，从而将 UCD 应用于这个原本以工程为主导的领域。借助欧洲大型物流着陆器的持续开发，我们在 VR 中重新创建了一个前瞻性的月球操作场景，并与一组宇航员和太空专家 (n=20) 一起对其进行了评估。我们的定性研究结果证明了 VR 在促进 UCD、实现高效的上下文查询和改善项目团队协调方面的功效。最后，我们提出了在月球系统设计中进一步利用 VR 的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过虚拟现实（VR）技术模拟月球操作场景，以支持人类在月球上的活动设计。
AI.motivation: 传统航天系统设计依赖资源密集型的原型测试，难以有效应用以用户为中心的设计方法，需寻找更高效的设计解决方案。
AI.method: 基于欧洲大型物流着陆器的开发，构建月球操作场景的VR模拟，并邀请20名宇航员和航天专家进行定性评估。
AI.result: VR技术有效支持了以用户为中心的设计，提升了情境调研效率和项目团队协作能力。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步探索VR在月球系统设计中的应用潜力，以优化人机交互与任务规划。
