authors_text: Zahra Ashktorab,Benjamin Hoover,Mayank Agarwal,Casey Dugan,Werner Geyer,Hao Bang Yang,Mikhail Yurochkin
title: Fairness Evaluation in Text Classification: Machine Learning Practitioner Perspectives of Individual and Group Fairness
title_zh: 文本分类中的公平性评估：机器学习从业者对个人和群体公平性的看法
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23)
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23)
abstract: Mitigating algorithmic bias is a critical task in the development and deployment of machine learning models. While several toolkits exist to aid machine learning practitioners in addressing fairness issues, little is known about the strategies practitioners employ to evaluate model fairness and what factors influence their assessment, particularly in the context of text classification. Two common approaches of evaluating the fairness of a model are group fairness and individual fairness. We run a study with Machine Learning practitioners (n=24) to understand the strategies used to evaluate models. Metrics presented to practitioners (group vs. individual fairness) impact which models they consider fair. Participants focused on risks associated with underpredicting/overpredicting and model sensitivity relative to identity token manipulations. We discover fairness assessment strategies involving personal experiences or how users form groups of identity tokens to test model fairness. We provide recommendations for interactive tools for evaluating fairness in text classification.
summary: Mitigating algorithmic bias is a critical task in the development and deployment of machine learning models. While several toolkits exist to aid machine learning practitioners in addressing fairness issues, little is known about the strategies practitioners employ to evaluate model fairness and what factors influence their assessment, particularly in the context of text classification. Two common approaches of evaluating the fairness of a model are group fairness and individual fairness. We run a study with Machine Learning practitioners (n=24) to understand the strategies used to evaluate models. Metrics presented to practitioners (group vs. individual fairness) impact which models they consider fair. Participants focused on risks associated with underpredicting/overpredicting and model sensitivity relative to identity token manipulations. We discover fairness assessment strategies involving personal experiences or how users form groups of identity tokens to test model fairness. We provide recommendations for interactive tools for evaluating fairness in text classification.
abstract_zh: 减轻算法偏差是机器学习模型开发和部署中的一项关键任务。虽然存在一些工具包可以帮助机器学习从业者解决公平性问题，但人们对从业者用来评估模型公平性的策略以及影响其评估的因素（尤其是在文本分类的背景下）知之甚少。评估模型公平性的两种常见方法是群体公平性和个体公平性。我们与机器学习从业者 (n=24) 进行了一项研究，以了解用于评估模型的策略。向从业者提供的指标（群体公平性与个人公平性）会影响他们认为公平的模型。参与者关注与低估/高估相关的风险以及与身份代币操纵相关的模型敏感性。我们发现涉及个人经历或用户如何形成身份令牌组来测试模型公平性的公平性评估策略。我们提供用于评估文本分类公平性的交互式工具的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文研究机器学习从业者在文本分类任务中评估模型公平性的策略，重点分析群体公平性和个体公平性的应用差异。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性工具缺乏对从业者实际评估方法和影响因素的系统研究，尤其在文本分类场景中存在认知与实践差距。
AI.method: 通过问卷与访谈24名从业者，分析其使用群体/个体公平性指标时的决策逻辑，结合身份标记敏感性与预测风险进行定性研究。
AI.result: 从业者评估结果受指标类型显著影响，更关注预测偏差风险及身份特征扰动敏感性，常依赖个人经验或用户分组策略测试公平性。
AI.conclusion: 需开发支持动态指标对比与身份特征分析的交互式工具，帮助从业者更全面评估文本分类模型的公平性表现。

search_text: Fairness Evaluation in Text Classification: Machine Learning Practitioner Perspectives of Individual and Group Fairness 文本分类中的公平性评估：机器学习从业者对个人和群体公平性的看法 Mitigating algorithmic bias is a critical task in the development and deployment of machine learning models. While several toolkits exist to aid machine learning practitioners in addressing fairness issues, little is known about the strategies practitioners employ to evaluate model fairness and what factors influence their assessment, particularly in the context of text classification. Two common approaches of evaluating the fairness of a model are group fairness and individual fairness. We run a study with Machine Learning practitioners (n=24) to understand the strategies used to evaluate models. Metrics presented to practitioners (group vs. individual fairness) impact which models they consider fair. Participants focused on risks associated with underpredicting/overpredicting and model sensitivity relative to identity token manipulations. We discover fairness assessment strategies involving personal experiences or how users form groups of identity tokens to test model fairness. We provide recommendations for interactive tools for evaluating fairness in text classification. 减轻算法偏差是机器学习模型开发和部署中的一项关键任务。虽然存在一些工具包可以帮助机器学习从业者解决公平性问题，但人们对从业者用来评估模型公平性的策略以及影响其评估的因素（尤其是在文本分类的背景下）知之甚少。评估模型公平性的两种常见方法是群体公平性和个体公平性。我们与机器学习从业者 (n=24) 进行了一项研究，以了解用于评估模型的策略。向从业者提供的指标（群体公平性与个人公平性）会影响他们认为公平的模型。参与者关注与低估/高估相关的风险以及与身份代币操纵相关的模型敏感性。我们发现涉及个人经历或用户如何形成身份令牌组来测试模型公平性的公平性评估策略。我们提供用于评估文本分类公平性的交互式工具的建议。 本文研究机器学习从业者在文本分类任务中评估模型公平性的策略，重点分析群体公平性和个体公平性的应用差异。 Zahra Ashktorab,Benjamin Hoover,Mayank Agarwal,Casey Dugan,Werner Geyer,Hao Bang Yang,Mikhail Yurochkin cs.HC,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Willy Arthur Silva Reis,Denis Benevolo Pais,Valdinei Freire,Karina Valdivia Delgado
title: Forward-PECVaR Algorithm: Exact Evaluation for CVaR SSPs
title_zh: 前向 PECVaR 算法：CVaR SSP 的精确评估
abstract: The Stochastic Shortest Path (SSP) problem models probabilistic sequential-decision problems where an agent must pursue a goal while minimizing a cost function. Because of the probabilistic dynamics, it is desired to have a cost function that considers risk. Conditional Value at Risk (CVaR) is a criterion that allows modeling an arbitrary level of risk by considering the expectation of a fraction $α$ of worse trajectories. Although an optimal policy is non-Markovian, solutions of CVaR-SSP can be found approximately with Value Iteration based algorithms such as CVaR Value Iteration with Linear Interpolation (CVaRVIQ) and CVaR Value Iteration via Quantile Representation (CVaRVILI). These type of solutions depends on the algorithm's parameters such as the number of atoms and $α_0$ (the minimum $α$). To compare the policies returned by these algorithms, we need a way to exactly evaluate stationary policies of CVaR-SSPs. Although there is an algorithm that evaluates these policies, this only works on problems with uniform costs. In this paper, we propose a new algorithm, Forward-PECVaR (ForPECVaR), that evaluates exactly stationary policies of CVaR-SSPs with non-uniform costs. We evaluate empirically CVaR Value Iteration algorithms that found solutions approximately regarding their quality compared with the exact solution, and the influence of the algorithm parameters in the quality and scalability of the solutions. Experiments in two domains show that it is important to use an $α_0$ smaller than the $α$ target and an adequate number of atoms to obtain a good approximation.
summary: The Stochastic Shortest Path (SSP) problem models probabilistic sequential-decision problems where an agent must pursue a goal while minimizing a cost function. Because of the probabilistic dynamics, it is desired to have a cost function that considers risk. Conditional Value at Risk (CVaR) is a criterion that allows modeling an arbitrary level of risk by considering the expectation of a fraction $α$ of worse trajectories. Although an optimal policy is non-Markovian, solutions of CVaR-SSP can be found approximately with Value Iteration based algorithms such as CVaR Value Iteration with Linear Interpolation (CVaRVIQ) and CVaR Value Iteration via Quantile Representation (CVaRVILI). These type of solutions depends on the algorithm's parameters such as the number of atoms and $α_0$ (the minimum $α$). To compare the policies returned by these algorithms, we need a way to exactly evaluate stationary policies of CVaR-SSPs. Although there is an algorithm that evaluates these policies, this only works on problems with uniform costs. In this paper, we propose a new algorithm, Forward-PECVaR (ForPECVaR), that evaluates exactly stationary policies of CVaR-SSPs with non-uniform costs. We evaluate empirically CVaR Value Iteration algorithms that found solutions approximately regarding their quality compared with the exact solution, and the influence of the algorithm parameters in the quality and scalability of the solutions. Experiments in two domains show that it is important to use an $α_0$ smaller than the $α$ target and an adequate number of atoms to obtain a good approximation.
abstract_zh: 随机最短路径 (SSP) 问题对概率顺序决策问题进行建模，其中代理必须在最小化成本函数的同时追求目标。由于概率动态，需要有一个考虑风险的成本函数。条件风险价值 (CVaR) 是一个标准，允许通过考虑更差轨迹的一小部分 $α$ 的期望来对任意级别的风险进行建模。尽管最优策略是非马尔可夫的，但可以使用基于值迭代的算法近似找到 CVaR-SSP 的解决方案，例如使用线性插值的 CVaR 值迭代 (CVaRVIQ) 和通过分位数表示的 CVaR 值迭代 (CVaRVILI)。这些类型的解决方案取决于算法的参数，例如原子数和 $α_0$（最小 $α$）。为了比较这些算法返回的策略，我们需要一种方法来准确评估 CVaR-SSP 的固定策略。尽管有一种算法可以评估这些策略，但这仅适用于具有统一成本的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新算法，Forward-PECVaR (ForPECVaR)，它可以精确评估具有非均匀成本的 CVaR-SSP 的平稳策略。我们根据经验评估了 CVaR 值迭代算法，这些算法找到了大约与精确解相比的质量的解，以及算法参数对解的质量和可扩展性的影响。两个领域的实验表明，使用小于 $α$ 目标的 $α_0$ 和足够数量的原子以获得良好的近似值非常重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Forward-PECVaR（ForPECVaR）的新算法，用于精确评估具有非均匀成本的条件风险价值（CVaR）随机最短路径（SSP）问题中的平稳策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的CVaR-SSP求解算法（如CVaRVIQ和CVaRVILI）依赖于参数（如原子数和α₀），且无法精确评估非均匀成本问题的策略，限制了策略比较和参数优化。
AI.method: 设计ForPECVaR算法实现对CVaR-SSP平稳策略的精确评估，并通过实验对比现有近似算法的求解质量及参数对结果的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用比目标α更小的α₀和适当的原子数可提升近似效果，且ForPECVaR能有效处理非均匀成本问题的精确评估。
AI.conclusion: ForPECVaR为CVaR-SSP提供了精确评估方法，参数选择（如α₀和原子数）对近似解的质量和可扩展性具有重要影响。

authors_text: Zhi Zheng,Jin Wang,Yuze Wu,Qifeng Cai,Huan Yu,Ruibin Zhang,Jie Tu,Jun Meng,Guodong Lu,Fei Gao
title: Roller-Quadrotor: A Novel Hybrid Terrestrial/Aerial Quadrotor with Unicycle-Driven and Rotor-Assisted Turning
title_zh: 滚轮四旋翼飞行器：具有独轮车驱动和旋翼辅助转弯的新型混合陆地/空中四旋翼飞行器
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures, accepted by 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots(IROS). This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: 8 pages, 10 figures, accepted by 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots(IROS). This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: The Roller-Quadrotor is a novel quadrotor that combines the maneuverability of aerial drones with the endurance of ground vehicles. This work focuses on the design, modeling, and experimental validation of the Roller-Quadrotor. Flight capabilities are achieved through a quadrotor configuration, with four thrust-providing actuators. Additionally, rolling motion is facilitated by a unicycle-driven and rotor-assisted turning structure. By utilizing terrestrial locomotion, the vehicle can overcome rolling and turning resistance, thereby conserving energy compared to its flight mode. This innovative approach not only tackles the inherent challenges of traditional rotorcraft but also enables the vehicle to navigate through narrow gaps and overcome obstacles by taking advantage of its aerial mobility. We develop comprehensive models and controllers for the Roller-Quadrotor and validate their performance through experiments. The results demonstrate its seamless transition between aerial and terrestrial locomotion, as well as its ability to safely navigate through gaps half the size of its diameter. Moreover, the terrestrial range of the vehicle is approximately 2.8 times greater, while the operating time is about 41.2 times longer compared to its aerial capabilities. These findings underscore the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed structure and control mechanisms for efficient navigation through challenging terrains while conserving energy.

Moreover, the terrestrial range of the vehicle is approximately 2.8 times greater, while the operating time is about 41.2 times longer compared to its aerial capabilities. These findings underscore the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed structure and control mechanisms for efficient navigation through challenging terrains while conserving energy.
abstract_zh: Roller-Quadrotor 是一种新型四旋翼飞行器，结合了空中无人机的机动性和地面车辆的耐用性。这项工作的重点是滚轮四旋翼飞行器的设计、建模和实验验证。飞行能力是通过四旋翼配置实现的，具有四个提供推力的执行器。此外，独轮车驱动和转子辅助转动结构促进了滚动运动。通过利用地面运动，车辆可以克服滚动和转弯阻力，从而与飞行模式相比节省能量。这种创新方法不仅解决了传统旋翼机固有的挑战，而且使飞行器能够利用其空中机动性穿过狭窄的间隙并克服障碍。我们为滚轮四旋翼开发综合模型和控制器，并通过实验验证其性能。结果证明了它在空中和地面运动之间的无缝过渡，以及安全穿过其直径一半大小的间隙的能力。此外，与空中能力相比，该车辆的地面航程大约增加了2.8倍，而操作时间大约延长了41.2倍。这些发现强调了所提出的结构和控制机制的可行性和有效性，可以在具有挑战性的地形中有效导航，同时节省能源。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种新型的混合地面/空中四旋翼机器人Roller-Quadrotor的设计、建模与实验验证。
AI.motivation: 传统四旋翼飞行器在续航和能耗方面存在局限，而地面机器人则在灵活性和通过性上有所不足。因此，本文提出一种结合空中飞行与地面滚动能力的混合机器人，以提高其在复杂环境中的导航效率和续航能力。
AI.method: 通过四旋翼结构实现飞行能力，并采用单轮驱动和旋翼辅助转向结构实现地面滚动。同时，开发了完整的模型和控制器，并通过实验验证其性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Roller-Quadrotor能够实现空中与地面运动的无缝切换，并能通过直径一半大小的缝隙。其地面续航距离约为空中模式的2.8倍，作业时间约为41.2倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的混合结构和控制机制在复杂地形中实现高效导航和节能方面是可行且有效的。

search_text: Roller-Quadrotor: A Novel Hybrid Terrestrial/Aerial Quadrotor with Unicycle-Driven and Rotor-Assisted Turning 滚轮四旋翼飞行器：具有独轮车驱动和旋翼辅助转弯的新型混合陆地/空中四旋翼飞行器 The Roller-Quadrotor is a novel quadrotor that combines the maneuverability of aerial drones with the endurance of ground vehicles. This work focuses on the design, modeling, and experimental validation of the Roller-Quadrotor. Flight capabilities are achieved through a quadrotor configuration, with four thrust-providing actuators. Additionally, rolling motion is facilitated by a unicycle-driven and rotor-assisted turning structure. By utilizing terrestrial locomotion, the vehicle can overcome rolling and turning resistance, thereby conserving energy compared to its flight mode. This innovative approach not only tackles the inherent challenges of traditional rotorcraft but also enables the vehicle to navigate through narrow gaps and overcome obstacles by taking advantage of its aerial mobility. We develop comprehensive models and controllers for the Roller-Quadrotor and validate their performance through experiments. The results demonstrate its seamless transition between aerial and terrestrial locomotion, as well as its ability to safely navigate through gaps half the size of its diameter. Moreover, the terrestrial range of the vehicle is approximately 2.8 times greater, while the operating time is about 41.2 times longer compared to its aerial capabilities. These findings underscore the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed structure and control mechanisms for efficient navigation through challenging terrains while conserving energy. authors_text: Sarita de Berg,Tillmann Miltzow,Frank Staals
title: Towards Space Efficient Two-Point Shortest Path Queries in a Polygonal Domain
title_zh: 多边形域中空间高效的两点最短路径查询
abstract: We devise a data structure that can answer shortest path queries for two query points in a polygonal domain $P$ on $n$ vertices. For any $\varepsilon > 0$, the space complexity of the data structure is $O(n^{10+\varepsilon })$ and queries can be answered in $O(\log n)$ time. Alternatively, we can achieve a space complexity of $O(n^{9+\varepsilon })$ by relaxing the query time to $O(\log^2 n)$. This is the first improvement upon a conference paper by Chiang and Mitchell from 1999. They present a data structure with $O(n^{11})$ space complexity and $O(\log n)$ query time. Our main result can be extended to include a space-time trade-off. Specifically, we devise data structures with $O(n^{9+\varepsilon}/\hspace{1pt} \ell^{4 + O(\varepsilon )})$ space complexity and $O(\ell \log^2 n )$ query time, for any integer $1 \leq \ell \leq n$. Furthermore, we present improved data structures with $O(\log n)$ query time for the special case where we restrict one (or both) of the query points to lie on the boundary of $P$. When one of the query points is restricted to lie on the boundary, and the other query point is unrestricted, the space complexity becomes $O(n^{6+\varepsilon})$. When both query points are on the boundary, the space complexity is decreased further to $O(n^{4+\varepsilon })$, thereby improving an earlier result of Bae and Okamoto.
summary: We devise a data structure that can answer shortest path queries for two query points in a polygonal domain $P$ on $n$ vertices. For any $\varepsilon > 0$, the space complexity of the data structure is $O(n^{10+\varepsilon })$ and queries can be answered in $O(\log n)$ time. Alternatively, we can achieve a space complexity of $O(n^{9+\varepsilon })$ by relaxing the query time to $O(\log^2 n)$. This is the first improvement upon a conference paper by Chiang and Mitchell from 1999. They present a data structure with $O(n^{11})$ space complexity and $O(\log n)$ query time. Our main result can be extended to include a space-time trade-off. Specifically, we devise data structures with $O(n^{9+\varepsilon}/\hspace{1pt} \ell^{4 + O(\varepsilon )})$ space complexity and $O(\ell \log^2 n )$ query time, for any integer $1 \leq \ell \leq n$. Furthermore, we present improved data structures with $O(\log n)$ query time for the special case where we restrict one (or both) of the query points to lie on the boundary of $P$. When one of the query points is restricted to lie on the boundary, and the other query point is unrestricted, the space complexity becomes $O(n^{6+\varepsilon})$. When both query points are on the boundary, the space complexity is decreased further to $O(n^{4+\varepsilon })$, thereby improving an earlier result of Bae and Okamoto.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了一种数据结构，可以回答多边形域 $P$ 中 $n$ 个顶点上两个查询点的最短路径查询。对于任何 $\varepsilon > 0$，数据结构的空间复杂度为 $O(n^{10+\varepsilon })$，并且可以在 $O(\log n)$ 时间内回答查询。或者，我们可以通过将查询时间放宽到 $O(\log^2 n)$ 来实现 $O(n^{9+\varepsilon })$ 的空间复杂度。这是对 Jiang 和 Mitchell 1999 年的会议论文的首次改进。他们提出了一种具有 $O(n^{11})$ 空间复杂度和 $O(\log n)$ 查询时间的数据结构。我们的主要结果可以扩展到包括时空权衡。具体来说，对于任何整数 $1 \leq \ell \leq n$，我们设计的数据结构具有 $O(n^{9+\varepsilon}/\hspace{1pt} \ell^{4 + O(\varepsilon )})$ 空间复杂度和 $O(\ell \log^2 n )$ 查询时间。此外，对于我们限制一个（或两个）查询点位于 $P$ 边界上的特殊情况，我们提出了具有 $O(\log n)$ 查询时间的改进数据结构。当其中一个查询点被限制位于边界上，而另一个查询点不受限制时，空间复杂度变为$O(n^{6+\varepsilon})$。当两个查询点都在边界上时，空间复杂度进一步降低到 $O(n^{4+\varepsilon })$，从而改进了 Bae 和 Okamoto 的早期结果。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种高效的数据结构，用于在多边形域中快速回答两点之间的最短路径查询问题。
AI.motivation: 此前Chiang和Mitchell于1999年的研究提出的空间复杂度为O(n^11)的解决方案，本文旨在通过优化空间复杂度实现更高效的数据结构。
AI.method: 通过引入参数ε和ℓ调整空间与查询时间的权衡，构建支持O(n^{9+ε})空间复杂度与O(log²n)查询时间的数据结构，并针对边界点限制场景进一步优化空间复杂度。
AI.result: 实现了O(n^{10+ε})空间复杂度与O(logn)查询时间的方案，边界点限制场景下空间复杂度分别降至O(n^{6+ε})和O(n^{4+ε})，改进了Bae和Okamoto的早期结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在空间复杂度上超越1999年的研究成果，为多边形域最短路径查询提供了更优的时空权衡方案。

authors_text: Andrei Constantinescu,Roger Wattenhofer
title: Computing the Best Policy That Survives a Vote
title_zh: 计算通过投票的最佳政策
comment: Accepted by AAMAS'23; fixed typos and improved clarity
comments: Accepted by AAMAS'23; fixed typos and improved clarity
abstract: An assembly of $n$ voters needs to decide on $t$ independent binary issues. Each voter has opinions about the issues, given by a $t$-bit vector. Anscombe's paradox shows that a policy following the majority opinion in each issue may not survive a vote by the very same set of $n$ voters, i.e., more voters may feel unrepresented by such a majority-driven policy than represented. A natural resolution is to come up with a policy that deviates a bit from the majority policy but no longer gets more opposition than support from the electorate. We show that a Hamming distance to the majority policy of at most $\lfloor (t - 1) / 2 \rfloor$ can always be guaranteed, by giving a new probabilistic argument relying on structure-preserving symmetries of the space of potential policies. Unless the electorate is evenly divided between the two options on all issues, we in fact show that a policy strictly winning the vote exists within this distance bound. Our approach also leads to a deterministic polynomial-time algorithm for finding policies with the stated guarantees, answering an open problem of previous work. For odd $t$, unless we are in the pathological case described above, we also give a simpler and more efficient algorithm running in expected polynomial time with the same guarantees. We further show that checking whether distance strictly less than $\lfloor (t - 1) /2 \rfloor$ can be achieved is NP-hard, and that checking for distance at most some input $k$ is FPT with respect to several natural parameters.
summary: An assembly of $n$ voters needs to decide on $t$ independent binary issues. Each voter has opinions about the issues, given by a $t$-bit vector. Anscombe's paradox shows that a policy following the majority opinion in each issue may not survive a vote by the very same set of $n$ voters, i.e., more voters may feel unrepresented by such a majority-driven policy than represented. A natural resolution is to come up with a policy that deviates a bit from the majority policy but no longer gets more opposition than support from the electorate. We show that a Hamming distance to the majority policy of at most $\lfloor (t - 1) / 2 \rfloor$ can always be guaranteed, by giving a new probabilistic argument relying on structure-preserving symmetries of the space of potential policies. Unless the electorate is evenly divided between the two options on all issues, we in fact show that a policy strictly winning the vote exists within this distance bound. Our approach also leads to a deterministic polynomial-time algorithm for finding policies with the stated guarantees, answering an open problem of previous work. For odd $t$, unless we are in the pathological case described above, we also give a simpler and more efficient algorithm running in expected polynomial time with the same guarantees. We further show that checking whether distance strictly less than $\lfloor (t - 1) /2 \rfloor$ can be achieved is NP-hard, and that checking for distance at most some input $k$ is FPT with respect to several natural parameters.
abstract_zh: $n$ 选民组成的大会需要就 $t$ 独立的二元问题做出决定。每个选民对问题都有自己的看法，由 $t$ 位向量给出。安斯库姆悖论表明，在每个问题上遵循多数意见的政策可能无法在同一组 $n$ 选民的投票中幸存下来，即，更多的选民可能会觉得这种多数驱动的政策没有得到代表，而不是被代表。一个自然的解决方案是提出一项稍微偏离多数派政策但选民的反对不再多于支持的政策。我们证明，通过给出依赖于潜在政策空间的结构保持对称性的新概率论证，始终可以保证到多数政策的汉明距离最多为 $\lfloor (t - 1) / 2 \rfloor$。除非选民在所有问题上均分两种选择，否则我们实际上表明，在这个距离范围内存在严格赢得选票的政策。我们的方法还导致了一种确定性多项式时间算法，用于寻找具有规定保证的策略，回答了先前工作中的一个开放问题。对于奇数$t$，除非我们处于上述病态情况，否则我们还给出了一个在相同保证下在预期多项式时间内运行的更简单、更有效的算法。我们进一步表明，检查距离是否严格小于 $\lfloor (t - 1) /2 \rfloor$ 可以实现是 NP 困难的，并且检查最多某个输入 $k$ 的距离对于几个自然参数来说是 FPT。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何计算一个能在投票中获得多数支持的政策，解决Anscombe悖论中多数政策可能不被多数选民接受的问题。
AI.motivation: Anscombe悖论表明，按每个议题多数意见制定的政策可能不被多数选民接受，因此需要寻找偏离多数政策但能获得多数支持的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过概率论证结合策略空间的对称性结构，提出确定性多项式时间算法，并分析奇数t情况下的更高效算法，同时探讨距离验证的计算复杂性。
AI.result: 证明Hamming距离至多为⌊(t-1)/2⌋的政策总能存在，提供多项式时间算法，证明距离严格小于该值的判定是NP难的，且距离上限判定具有FPT性质。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多数政策的接受性问题，算法在多数场景下高效，同时明确了问题的计算复杂性边界。

search_text: Computing the Best Policy That Survives a Vote 计算通过投票的最佳政策 An assembly of $n$ voters needs to decide on $t$ independent binary issues. Each voter has opinions about the issues, given by a $t$-bit vector. Anscombe's paradox shows that a policy following the majority opinion in each issue may not survive a vote by the very same set of $n$ voters, i.e., more voters may feel unrepresented by such a majority-driven policy than represented. A natural resolution is to come up with a policy that deviates a bit from the majority policy but no longer gets more opposition than support from the electorate. We show that a Hamming distance to the majority policy of at most $\lfloor (t - 1) / 2 \rfloor$ can always be guaranteed, by giving a new probabilistic argument relying on structure-preserving symmetries of the space of potential policies. Unless the electorate is evenly divided between the two options on all issues, we in fact show that a policy strictly winning the vote exists within this distance bound. Our approach also leads to a deterministic polynomial-time algorithm for finding policies with the stated guarantees, answering an open problem of previous work. For odd $t$, unless we are in the pathological case described above, we also give a simpler and more efficient algorithm running in expected polynomial time with the same guarantees. We further show that checking whether distance strictly less than $\lfloor (t - 1) /2 \rfloor$ can be achieved is NP-hard, and that checking for distance at most some input $k$ is FPT with respect to several natural parameters. $n$ 选民组成的大会需要就 $t$ 独立的二元问题做出决定。每个选民对问题都有自己的看法，由 $t$ 位向量给出。安斯库姆悖论表明，在每个问题上遵循多数意见的政策可能无法在同一组 $n$ 选民的投票中幸存下来，即，更多的选民可能会觉得这种多数驱动的政策没有得到代表，而不是被代表。一个自然的解决方案是提出一项稍微偏离多数派政策但选民的反对不再多于支持的政策。我们证明，通过给出依赖于潜在政策空间的结构保持对称性的新概率论证，始终可以保证到多数政策的汉明距离最多为 $\lfloor (t - 1) / 2 \rfloor$。除非选民在所有问题上均分两种选择，否则我们实际上表明，在这个距离范围内存在严格赢得选票的政策。我们的方法还导致了一种确定性多项式时间算法，用于寻找具有规定保证的策略，回答了先前工作中的一个开放问题。对于奇数$t$，除非我们处于上述病态情况，否则我们还给出了一个在相同保证下在预期多项式时间内运行的更简单、更有效的算法。我们进一步表明，检查距离是否严格小于 $\lfloor (t - 1) /2 \rfloor$ 可以实现是 NP 困难的，并且检查最多某个输入 $k$ 的距离对于几个自然参数来说是 FPT。 本文研究如何计算一个能在投票中获得多数支持的政策，解决Anscombe悖论中多数政策可能不被多数选民接受的问题。 Andrei Constantinescu,Roger Wattenhofer cs.GT,cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Andrew Litteken,Lennart Maximilian Seifert,Jason Chadwick,Natalia Nottingham,Fredric T. Chong,Jonathan M. Baker
title: Qompress: Efficient Compilation for Ququarts Exploiting Partial and Mixed Radix Operations for Communication Reduction
title_zh: Qompress：Ququarts 的高效编译利用部分和混合基数运算来减少通信
comment: 14 pages, 13 figures, 1 table, to be published at ASPLOS 2023
comments: 14 pages, 13 figures, 1 table, to be published at ASPLOS 2023
abstract: Quantum computing is in an era of limited resources. Current hardware lacks high fidelity gates, long coherence times, and the number of computational units required to perform meaningful computation. Contemporary quantum devices typically use a binary system, where each qubit exists in a superposition of the $\ket{0}$ and $\ket{1}$ states. However, it is often possible to access the $\ket{2}$ or even $\ket{3}$ states in the same physical unit by manipulating the system in different ways. In this work, we consider automatically encoding two qubits into one four-state qu\emph{quart} via a \emph{compression scheme}. We use quantum optimal control to design efficient proof-of-concept gates that fully replicate standard qubit computation on these encoded qubits. We extend qubit compilation schemes to efficiently route qubits on an arbitrary mixed-radix system consisting of both qubits and ququarts, reducing communication and minimizing excess circuit execution time introduced by longer-duration ququart gates. In conjunction with these compilation strategies, we introduce several methods to find beneficial compressions, reducing circuit error due to computation and communication by up to 50\%. These methods can increase the computational space available on a limited near-term machine by up to 2x while maintaining circuit fidelity.
summary: Quantum computing is in an era of limited resources. Current hardware lacks high fidelity gates, long coherence times, and the number of computational units required to perform meaningful computation. Contemporary quantum devices typically use a binary system, where each qubit exists in a superposition of the $\ket{0}$ and $\ket{1}$ states. However, it is often possible to access the $\ket{2}$ or even $\ket{3}$ states in the same physical unit by manipulating the system in different ways. In this work, we consider automatically encoding two qubits into one four-state qu\emph{quart} via a \emph{compression scheme}. We use quantum optimal control to design efficient proof-of-concept gates that fully replicate standard qubit computation on these encoded qubits. We extend qubit compilation schemes to efficiently route qubits on an arbitrary mixed-radix system consisting of both qubits and ququarts, reducing communication and minimizing excess circuit execution time introduced by longer-duration ququart gates. In conjunction with these compilation strategies, we introduce several methods to find beneficial compressions, reducing circuit error due to computation and communication by up to 50\%. These methods can increase the computational space available on a limited near-term machine by up to 2x while maintaining circuit fidelity.
abstract_zh: 量子计算正处于资源有限的时代。当前的硬件缺乏高保真门、长相干时间以及执行有意义的计算所需的计算单元的数量。当代量子设备通常使用二进制系统，其中每个量子位都存在于 $\ket{0}$ 和 $\ket{1}$ 状态的叠加中。然而，通常可以通过以不同方式操纵系统来访问同一物理单元中的 $\ket{2}$ 甚至 $\ket{3}$ 状态。在这项工作中，我们考虑通过 \emph{压缩方案} 将两个量子位自动编码为一个四态 qu\emph{quart}。我们使用量子最优控制来设计高效的概念验证门，在这些编码的量子位上完全复制标准量子位计算。我们扩展了量子位编译方案，以在由量子位和 ququart 组成的任意混合基系统上有效地路由量子位，从而减少通信并最大限度地减少由较长持续时间的 ququart 门引入的多余电路执行时间。结合这些编译策略，我们引入了几种方法来找到有益的压缩，将由于计算和通信而导致的电路错误减少高达 50%。这些方法可以将有限的近期机器上的可用计算空间增加多达 2 倍，同时保持电路保真度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Qompress的方法，通过将两个量子比特压缩为四态ququart，并利用混合进制操作减少通信开销，从而提高量子计算效率。
AI.motivation: 当前量子硬件资源有限，二进制量子比特系统存在门保真度低、相干时间短等问题，而利用更高态数的ququart可提升硬件利用率并减少通信误差。
AI.method: 采用量子最优控制设计ququart门，扩展混合进制编译方案以支持qubit与ququart共存系统，并引入压缩策略选择方法。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法可减少高达50%的计算与通信误差，同时在有限近期量子设备上将计算空间提升至原来的2倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过ququart压缩与混合进制编译策略，有效提升了量子计算资源利用率和电路保真度，为近期量子硬件优化提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Philine Bommer,Marlene Kretschmer,Anna Hedström,Dilyara Bareeva,Marina M. -C. Höhne
title: Finding the right XAI method -- A Guide for the Evaluation and Ranking of Explainable AI Methods in Climate Science
title_zh: 寻找正确的 XAI 方法——气候科学中可解释人工智能方法的评估和排名指南
comment: 19 pages, 10 figure, accepted at AIES journal by AMS
comments: 19 pages, 10 figure, accepted at AIES journal by AMS
abstract: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) methods shed light on the predictions of machine learning algorithms. Several different approaches exist and have already been applied in climate science. However, usually missing ground truth explanations complicate their evaluation and comparison, subsequently impeding the choice of the XAI method. Therefore, in this work, we introduce XAI evaluation in the climate context and discuss different desired explanation properties, namely robustness, faithfulness, randomization, complexity, and localization. To this end, we chose previous work as a case study where the decade of annual-mean temperature maps is predicted. After training both a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) and a convolutional neural network (CNN), multiple XAI methods are applied and their skill scores in reference to a random uniform explanation are calculated for each property. Independent of the network, we find that XAI methods Integrated Gradients, layer-wise relevance propagation, and input times gradients exhibit considerable robustness, faithfulness, and complexity while sacrificing randomization performance. Sensitivity methods -- gradient, SmoothGrad, NoiseGrad, and FusionGrad, match the robustness skill but sacrifice faithfulness and complexity for randomization skill. We find architecture-dependent performance differences regarding robustness, complexity and localization skills of different XAI methods, highlighting the necessity for research task-specific evaluation. Overall, our work offers an overview of different evaluation properties in the climate science context and shows how to compare and benchmark different explanation methods, assessing their suitability based on strengths and weaknesses, for the specific research problem at hand. By that, we aim to support climate researchers in the selection of a suitable XAI method.

Independent of the network, we find that XAI methods Integrated Gradients, layer-wise relevance propagation, and input times gradients exhibit considerable robustness, faithfulness, and complexity while sacrificing randomization performance. Sensitivity methods -- gradient, SmoothGrad, NoiseGrad, and FusionGrad, match the robustness skill but sacrifice faithfulness and complexity for randomization skill. Overall, our work offers an overview of different evaluation properties in the climate science context and shows how to compare and benchmark different explanation methods, assessing their suitability based on strengths and weaknesses, for the specific research problem at hand. By that, we aim to support climate researchers in the selection of a suitable XAI method.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能（XAI）方法揭示了机器学习算法的预测。存在几种不同的方法，并且已经应用​​于气候科学。然而，通常缺少真实的解释会使它们的评估和比较变得复杂，从而阻碍 XAI 方法的选择。因此，在这项工作中，我们引入了气候背景下的 XAI 评估，并讨论了不同的期望解释属性，即鲁棒性、忠实性、随机性、复杂性和本地化。为此，我们选择以前的工作作为案例研究，其中预测了十年的年平均温度图。在训练多层感知器 (MLP) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN) 后，应用多种 XAI 方法，并针对每个属性计算其参考随机统一解释的技能得分。独立于网络，我们发现 XAI 方法集成梯度、逐层相关性传播和输入时间梯度表现出相当大的鲁棒性、忠实性和复杂性，同时牺牲了随机化性能。灵敏度方法——梯度、SmoothGrad、NoiseGrad 和 FusionGrad 与鲁棒性技能相匹配，但为了随机化技能而牺牲了忠实性和复杂性。我们发现不同 XAI 方法的鲁棒性、复杂性和本地化技能方面依赖于架构的性能差异，强调了针对特定研究任务进行评估的必要性。总体而言，我们的工作概述了气候科学背景下的不同评估属性，并展示了如何比较和基准不同的解释方法，根据优缺点评估其对于当前具体研究问题的适用性。我们的目标是支持气候研究人员选择合适的 XAI 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种在气候科学背景下评估和比较可解释人工智能（XAI）方法的框架，通过分析不同方法的稳健性、忠实度等属性，帮助研究者选择适合的XAI方法。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法缺乏地面真实解释，导致其在气候科学中的评估和比较困难，阻碍了合适方法的选择。
AI.method: 以预测年均温度地图为案例研究，训练MLP和CNN模型后应用多种XAI方法，通过计算各方法的技能分数评估其稳健性、忠实度、随机化等属性。
AI.result: 发现Integrated Gradients等方法在稳健性、忠实度和复杂度上表现较好，但随机化性能较差；敏感性方法则在随机化上表现更优但牺牲了忠实度和复杂度。不同网络结构对XAI方法的性能有影响。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了气候科学中XAI方法的评估框架，强调需根据具体研究任务选择合适方法，并突显任务特定评估的重要性。

search_text: Finding the right XAI method -- A Guide for the Evaluation and Ranking of Explainable AI Methods in Climate Science 寻找正确的 XAI 方法——气候科学中可解释人工智能方法的评估和排名指南 Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) methods shed light on the predictions of machine learning algorithms. Several different approaches exist and have already been applied in climate science. However, usually missing ground truth explanations complicate their evaluation and comparison, subsequently impeding the choice of the XAI method. Therefore, in this work, we introduce XAI evaluation in the climate context and discuss different desired explanation properties, namely robustness, faithfulness, randomization, complexity, and localization. To this end, we chose previous work as a case study where the decade of annual-mean temperature maps is predicted. After training both a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) and a convolutional neural network (CNN), multiple XAI methods are applied and their skill scores in reference to a random uniform explanation are calculated for each property. Independent of the network, we find that XAI methods Integrated Gradients, layer-wise relevance propagation, and input times gradients exhibit considerable robustness, faithfulness, and complexity while sacrificing randomization performance. Sensitivity methods -- gradient, SmoothGrad, NoiseGrad, and FusionGrad, match the robustness skill but sacrifice faithfulness and complexity for randomization skill. We find architecture-dependent performance differences regarding robustness, complexity and localization skills of different XAI methods, highlighting the necessity for research task-specific evaluation. Overall, our work offers an overview of different evaluation properties in the climate science context and shows how to compare and benchmark different explanation methods, assessing their suitability based on strengths and weaknesses, for the specific research problem at hand. By that, we aim to support climate researchers in the selection of a suitable XAI method. 可解释的人工智能（XAI）方法揭示了机器学习算法的预测。存在几种不同的方法，并且已经应用​​于气候科学。然而，通常缺少真实的解释会使它们的评估和比较变得复杂，从而阻碍 XAI 方法的选择。因此，在这项工作中，我们引入了气候背景下的 XAI 评估，并讨论了不同的期望解释属性，即鲁棒性、忠实性、随机性、复杂性和本地化。为此，我们选择以前的工作作为案例研究，其中预测了十年的年平均温度图。在训练多层感知器 (MLP) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN) 后，应用多种 XAI 方法，并针对每个属性计算其参考随机统一解释的技能得分。独立于网络，我们发现 XAI 方法集成梯度、逐层相关性传播和输入时间梯度表现出相当大的鲁棒性、忠实性和复杂性，同时牺牲了随机化性能。灵敏度方法——梯度、SmoothGrad、NoiseGrad 和 FusionGrad 与鲁棒性技能相匹配，但为了随机化技能而牺牲了忠实性和复杂性。我们发现不同 XAI 方法的鲁棒性、复杂性和本地化技能方面依赖于架构的性能差异，强调了针对特定研究任务进行评估的必要性。总体而言，我们的工作概述了气候科学背景下的不同评估属性，并展示了如何比较和基准不同的解释方法，根据优缺点评估其对于当前具体研究问题的适用性。我们的目标是支持气候研究人员选择合适的 XAI 方法。 本文介绍了一种在气候科学背景下评估和比较可解释人工智能（XAI）方法的框架，通过分析不同方法的稳健性、忠实度等属性，帮助研究者选择适合的XAI方法。 Philine Bommer,Marlene Kretschmer,Anna Hedström,Dilyara Bareeva,Marina M. -C. authors_text: Hagen Wierstorf,Johannes Wagner,Florian Eyben,Felix Burkhardt,Björn W. Schuller
title: audb -- Sharing and Versioning of Audio and Annotation Data in Python
title_zh: audb——Python 中音频和注释数据的共享和版本控制
abstract: Driven by the need for larger and more diverse datasets to pre-train and fine-tune increasingly complex machine learning models, the number of datasets is rapidly growing. audb is an open-source Python library that supports versioning and documentation of audio datasets. It aims to provide a standardized and simple user-interface to publish, maintain, and access the annotations and audio files of a dataset. To efficiently store the data on a server, audb automatically resolves dependencies between versions of a dataset and only uploads newly added or altered files when a new version is published. The library supports partial loading of a dataset and local caching for fast access. audb is a lightweight library and can be interfaced from any machine learning library. It supports the management of datasets on a single PC, within a university or company, or within a whole research community.
summary: Driven by the need for larger and more diverse datasets to pre-train and fine-tune increasingly complex machine learning models, the number of datasets is rapidly growing. audb is an open-source Python library that supports versioning and documentation of audio datasets. It aims to provide a standardized and simple user-interface to publish, maintain, and access the annotations and audio files of a dataset. To efficiently store the data on a server, audb automatically resolves dependencies between versions of a dataset and only uploads newly added or altered files when a new version is published. The library supports partial loading of a dataset and local caching for fast access. audb is a lightweight library and can be interfaced from any machine learning library. It supports the management of datasets on a single PC, within a university or company, or within a whole research community.
abstract_zh: 由于需要更大、更多样化的数据集来预训练和微调日益复杂的机器学习模型，数据集的数量正在快速增长。 audb 是一个开源 Python 库，支持音频数据集的版本控制和文档记录。它旨在提供一个标准化且简单的用户界面来发布、维护和访问数据集的注释和音频文件。为了在服务器上高效存储数据，audb 会自动解决数据集版本之间的依赖关系，并且仅在发布新版本时上传新添加或更改的文件。该库支持数据集的部分加载和本地缓存以实现快速访问。 audb 是一个轻量级库，可以与任何机器学习库进行交互。它支持在大学或公司内或整个研究社区内的单台 PC 上管理数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为audb的开源Python库，用于音频数据及其标注的版本管理和共享。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习模型复杂度的提升，对更大更多样化数据集的需求增加，但现有数据集管理工具存在版本控制和共享效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过版本化管理、依赖关系解析、增量上传和本地缓存技术，实现音频数据集的高效存储与访问，并提供标准化接口支持多种使用场景。
AI.result: audb实现了数据集的版本控制、部分加载和跨环境管理，显著提升了音频数据共享与维护的效率。
AI.conclusion: audb为音频数据管理提供了轻量级解决方案，可有效支持个人、机构及研究社区的数据协作需求。

authors_text: Xiatao Sun,Shuo Yang,Mingyan Zhou,Kunpeng Liu,Rahul Mangharam
title: MEGA-DAgger: Imitation Learning with Multiple Imperfect Experts
title_zh: MEGA-DAgger：与多个不完美专家的模仿学习
abstract: Imitation learning has been widely applied to various autonomous systems thanks to recent development in interactive algorithms that address covariate shift and compounding errors induced by traditional approaches like behavior cloning. However, existing interactive imitation learning methods assume access to one perfect expert. Whereas in reality, it is more likely to have multiple imperfect experts instead. In this paper, we propose MEGA-DAgger, a new DAgger variant that is suitable for interactive learning with multiple imperfect experts. First, unsafe demonstrations are filtered while aggregating the training data, so the imperfect demonstrations have little influence when training the novice policy. Next, experts are evaluated and compared on scenarios-specific metrics to resolve the conflicted labels among experts. Through experiments in autonomous racing scenarios, we demonstrate that policy learned using MEGA-DAgger can outperform both experts and policies learned using the state-of-the-art interactive imitation learning algorithms such as Human-Gated DAgger. The supplementary video can be found at \url{https://youtu.be/wPCht31MHrw}.
summary: Imitation learning has been widely applied to various autonomous systems thanks to recent development in interactive algorithms that address covariate shift and compounding errors induced by traditional approaches like behavior cloning. However, existing interactive imitation learning methods assume access to one perfect expert. Whereas in reality, it is more likely to have multiple imperfect experts instead. In this paper, we propose MEGA-DAgger, a new DAgger variant that is suitable for interactive learning with multiple imperfect experts. First, unsafe demonstrations are filtered while aggregating the training data, so the imperfect demonstrations have little influence when training the novice policy. Next, experts are evaluated and compared on scenarios-specific metrics to resolve the conflicted labels among experts. Through experiments in autonomous racing scenarios, we demonstrate that policy learned using MEGA-DAgger can outperform both experts and policies learned using the state-of-the-art interactive imitation learning algorithms such as Human-Gated DAgger. The supplementary video can be found at \url{https://youtu.be/wPCht31MHrw}.
abstract_zh: 由于交互式算法的最新发展，模仿学习已广泛应用于各种自主系统，这些算法解决了行为克隆等传统方法引起的协变量偏移和复合错误。然而，现有的交互式模仿学习方法假设有一位完美的专家。而在现实中，更有可能有多个不完美的专家。在本文中，我们提出了 MEGA-DAgger，一种新的 DAgger 变体，适合与多个不完美专家进行交互式学习。首先，在聚合训练数据时过滤了不安全的演示，因此不完善的演示对训练新手策略影响不大。接下来，根据特定场景的指标对专家进行评估和比较，以解决专家之间标签冲突的问题。通过自动赛车场景中的实验，我们证明使用 MEGA-DAgger 学习的策略可以优于专家和使用最先进的交互式模仿学习算法（例如 Human-Gated DAgger）学习的策略。补充视频可在 \url{https://youtu.be/wPCht31MHrw} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MEGA-DAgger方法，解决多不完美专家场景下的模仿学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式模仿学习方法依赖单一完美专家，但实际应用中更常见的是多个不完美专家，需解决其演示数据冲突与质量差异问题。
AI.method: 通过过滤不安全演示降低噪声影响，并基于场景特定指标评估专家以解决标签冲突，改进DAgger算法适应多专家场景。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶竞赛场景中，MEGA-DAgger训练的策略优于原始专家及Human-Gated DAgger等先进算法。
AI.conclusion: MEGA-DAgger有效处理多不完美专家数据，为实际自主系统提供更鲁棒的模仿学习方案。

search_text: MEGA-DAgger: Imitation Learning with Multiple Imperfect Experts MEGA-DAgger：与多个不完美专家的模仿学习 Imitation learning has been widely applied to various autonomous systems thanks to recent development in interactive algorithms that address covariate shift and compounding errors induced by traditional approaches like behavior cloning. However, existing interactive imitation learning methods assume access to one perfect expert. Whereas in reality, it is more likely to have multiple imperfect experts instead. In this paper, we propose MEGA-DAgger, a new DAgger variant that is suitable for interactive learning with multiple imperfect experts. First, unsafe demonstrations are filtered while aggregating the training data, so the imperfect demonstrations have little influence when training the novice policy. Next, experts are evaluated and compared on scenarios-specific metrics to resolve the conflicted labels among experts. Through experiments in autonomous racing scenarios, we demonstrate that policy learned using MEGA-DAgger can outperform both experts and policies learned using the state-of-the-art interactive imitation learning algorithms such as Human-Gated DAgger. The supplementary video can be found at \url{https://youtu.be/wPCht31MHrw}. 由于交互式算法的最新发展，模仿学习已广泛应用于各种自主系统，这些算法解决了行为克隆等传统方法引起的协变量偏移和复合错误。然而，现有的交互式模仿学习方法假设有一位完美的专家。而在现实中，更有可能有多个不完美的专家。在本文中，我们提出了 MEGA-DAgger，一种新的 DAgger 变体，适合与多个不完美专家进行交互式学习。首先，在聚合训练数据时过滤了不安全的演示，因此不完善的演示对训练新手策略影响不大。接下来，根据特定场景的指标对专家进行评估和比较，以解决专家之间标签冲突的问题。通过自动赛车场景中的实验，我们证明使用 MEGA-DAgger 学习的策略可以优于专家和使用最先进的交互式模仿学习算法（例如 Human-Gated DAgger）学习的策略。补充视频可在 \url{https://youtu.be/wPCht31MHrw} 找到。 本文提出MEGA-DAgger方法，解决多不完美专家场景下的模仿学习问题。 Xiatao Sun,Shuo Yang,Mingyan Zhou,Kunpeng Liu,Rahul Mangharam cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Valentin N. Hartmann,Joaquim Ortiz-Haro,Marc Toussaint
title: Efficient Path Planning In Manipulation Planning Problems by Actively Reusing Validation Effort
title_zh: 通过积极重用验证工作，在操纵规划问题中进行有效的路径规划
abstract: The path planning problems arising in manipulation planning and in task and motion planning settings are typically repetitive: the same manipulator moves in a space that only changes slightly. Despite this potential for reuse of information, few planners fully exploit the available information. To better enable this reuse, we decompose the collision checking into reusable, and non-reusable parts. We then treat the sequences of path planning problems in manipulation planning as a multiquery path planning problem. This allows the usage of planners that actively minimize planning effort over multiple queries, and by doing so, actively reuse previous knowledge. We implement this approach in EIRM* and effort ordered LazyPRM*, and benchmark it on multiple simulated robotic examples. Further, we show that the approach of decomposing collision checks additionally enables the reuse of the gained knowledge over multiple different instances of the same problem, i.e., in a multiquery manipulation planning scenario. The planners using the decomposed collision checking outperform the other planners in initial solution time by up to a factor of two while providing a similar solution quality.
summary: The path planning problems arising in manipulation planning and in task and motion planning settings are typically repetitive: the same manipulator moves in a space that only changes slightly. Despite this potential for reuse of information, few planners fully exploit the available information. To better enable this reuse, we decompose the collision checking into reusable, and non-reusable parts. We then treat the sequences of path planning problems in manipulation planning as a multiquery path planning problem. This allows the usage of planners that actively minimize planning effort over multiple queries, and by doing so, actively reuse previous knowledge. We implement this approach in EIRM* and effort ordered LazyPRM*, and benchmark it on multiple simulated robotic examples. Further, we show that the approach of decomposing collision checks additionally enables the reuse of the gained knowledge over multiple different instances of the same problem, i.e., in a multiquery manipulation planning scenario. The planners using the decomposed collision checking outperform the other planners in initial solution time by up to a factor of two while providing a similar solution quality.
abstract_zh: 操纵规划以及任务和运动规划设置中出现的路径规划问题通常是重复的：同一操纵器在仅发生轻微变化的空间中移动。尽管存在信息重用的潜力，但很少有规划者充分利用可用信息。为了更好地实现这种重用，我们将碰撞检查分解为可重用和不可重用的部分。然后，我们将操作规划中的路径规划问题序列视为多查询路径规划问题。这允许使用规划器，主动最小化多个查询的规划工作，并通过这样做，主动重用以前的知识。我们在 EIRM* 和努力订购的 LazyPRM* 中实现了这种方法，并在多个模拟机器人示例上对其进行了基准测试。此外，我们还表明，分解碰撞检查的方法还可以在同一问题的多个不同实例上重用所获得的知识，即在多查询操作规划场景中。使用分解碰撞检查的规划器在初始求解时间上比其他规划器高出两倍，同时提供相似的求解质量。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过主动复用验证努力提升机械臂路径规划效率的方法。
AI.motivation: 解决重复性路径规划中信息复用不足的问题，提升机械臂在微小环境变化下的规划效率。
AI.method: 将碰撞检查分解为可重用与不可重用部分，并将其视为多查询路径规划问题，通过EIRM*和effort ordered LazyPRM*实现主动复用。
AI.result: 在多个模拟机器人实例中，初始解时间提升最高达两倍，同时保持相似解质量。
AI.conclusion: 分解碰撞检查的方法有效提升了多查询操作规划场景下的规划效率，为未来研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Ravid Shwartz-Ziv,Randall Balestriero,Kenji Kawaguchi,Tim G. J. Rudner,Yann LeCun
title: An Information-Theoretic Perspective on Variance-Invariance-Covariance Regularization
title_zh: 方差-不变性-协方差正则化的信息论视角
abstract: Variance-Invariance-Covariance Regularization (VICReg) is a self-supervised learning (SSL) method that has shown promising results on a variety of tasks. However, the fundamental mechanisms underlying VICReg remain unexplored. In this paper, we present an information-theoretic perspective on the VICReg objective. We begin by deriving information-theoretic quantities for deterministic networks as an alternative to unrealistic stochastic network assumptions. We then relate the optimization of the VICReg objective to mutual information optimization, highlighting underlying assumptions and facilitating a constructive comparison with other SSL algorithms and derive a generalization bound for VICReg, revealing its inherent advantages for downstream tasks. Building on these results, we introduce a family of SSL methods derived from information-theoretic principles that outperform existing SSL techniques.
summary: Variance-Invariance-Covariance Regularization (VICReg) is a self-supervised learning (SSL) method that has shown promising results on a variety of tasks. However, the fundamental mechanisms underlying VICReg remain unexplored. In this paper, we present an information-theoretic perspective on the VICReg objective. We begin by deriving information-theoretic quantities for deterministic networks as an alternative to unrealistic stochastic network assumptions. We then relate the optimization of the VICReg objective to mutual information optimization, highlighting underlying assumptions and facilitating a constructive comparison with other SSL algorithms and derive a generalization bound for VICReg, revealing its inherent advantages for downstream tasks. Building on these results, we introduce a family of SSL methods derived from information-theoretic principles that outperform existing SSL techniques.
abstract_zh: 方差-不变-协方差正则化 (VICReg) 是一种自我监督学习 (SSL) 方法，已在各种任务上显示出有希望的结果。然而，VICReg 的基本机制仍未被探索。在本文中，我们提出了关于 VICReg 目标的信息论视角。我们首先推导确定性网络的信息理论量，作为不切实际的随机网络假设的替代方案。然后，我们将 VICReg 目标的优化与互信息优化联系起来，突出基本假设并促进与其他 SSL 算法的建设性比较，并得出 VICReg 的泛化界限，揭示其对下游任务的固有优势。基于这些结果，我们引入了一系列源自信息论原理的 SSL 方法，这些方法优于现有的 SSL 技术。

AI.tldr: 从信息论角度分析VICReg方法，并提出基于信息论原理的新型自监督学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VICReg方法的机制未被充分理解，需从信息论角度解析其原理并优化自监督学习算法。
AI.method: 通过推导确定性网络的信息论指标，关联VICReg优化目标与互信息优化，建立泛化界，并设计新型信息论SSL方法。
AI.result: 提出的新SSL方法在多个任务上优于现有技术，验证了信息论视角的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 从信息论角度揭示了VICReg的理论优势，提出了更高效的自监督学习方法，推动了SSL理论发展。

authors_text: Stefano De Giorgis,Aldo Gangemi
title: That's All Folks: a KG of Values as Commonsense Social Norms and Behaviors
title_zh: 这就是大家：作为常识性社会规范和行为的价值观知识图谱
abstract: Values, as intended in ethics, determine the shape and validity of moral and social norms, grounding our everyday individual and community behavior on commonsense knowledge. Formalising latent moral content in human interaction is an appealing perspective that would enable a deeper understanding of both social dynamics and individual cognitive and behavioral dimension. To tackle this problem, several theoretical frameworks offer different values models, and organize them into different taxonomies. The problem of the most used theories is that they adopt a cultural-independent perspective while many entities that are considered "values" are grounded in commonsense knowledge and expressed in everyday life interaction. We propose here two ontological modules, FOLK, an ontology for values intended in their broad sense, and That's All Folks, a module for lexical and factual folk value triggers, whose purpose is to complement the main theories, providing a method for identifying the values that are not contemplated by the major value theories, but which nonetheless play a key role in daily human interactions, and shape social structures, cultural biases, and personal beliefs. The resource is tested via performing automatic detection of values from text with a frame-based approach.
summary: Values, as intended in ethics, determine the shape and validity of moral and social norms, grounding our everyday individual and community behavior on commonsense knowledge. Formalising latent moral content in human interaction is an appealing perspective that would enable a deeper understanding of both social dynamics and individual cognitive and behavioral dimension. To tackle this problem, several theoretical frameworks offer different values models, and organize them into different taxonomies. The problem of the most used theories is that they adopt a cultural-independent perspective while many entities that are considered "values" are grounded in commonsense knowledge and expressed in everyday life interaction. We propose here two ontological modules, FOLK, an ontology for values intended in their broad sense, and That's All Folks, a module for lexical and factual folk value triggers, whose purpose is to complement the main theories, providing a method for identifying the values that are not contemplated by the major value theories, but which nonetheless play a key role in daily human interactions, and shape social structures, cultural biases, and personal beliefs. The resource is tested via performing automatic detection of values from text with a frame-based approach.
abstract_zh: 正如伦理学所意图的那样，价值观决定了道德和社会规范的形式和有效性，将我们日常的个人和社区行为建立在常识知识的基础上。将人类互动中潜在的道德内容形式化是一个有吸引力的观点，它将有助于更深入地理解社会动态以及个人认知和行为维度。为了解决这个问题，一些理论框架提供了不同的价值模型，并将它们组织成不同的分类法。最常用的理论的问题在于，它们采用了独立于文化的视角，而许多被认为是“价值”的实体却扎根于常识知识并在日常生活互动中表达。我们在这里提出两个本体论模块：FOLK，一个广义上的价值本体论；以及 That's All Folks，一个用于词汇和事实民间价值触发的模块，其目的是补充主要理论，提供一种方法来识别主要价值理论未考虑到的价值观，但这些价值观在日常人类互动中发挥着关键作用，并塑造社会结构、文化偏见和个人信仰。通过使用基于框架的方法自动检测文本中的值来测试资源。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个知识图谱（KG），用于捕捉作为常识性社会规范和行为的‘价值观’，以补充现有理论中未涵盖的日常互动中的价值观。
AI.motivation: 现有价值观理论多采用文化无关视角，忽略了嵌入日常互动中的常识性价值观，这些价值观对社会结构、文化偏见和个人信念有重要影响。
AI.method: 构建两个本体模块：FOLK（广义价值观本体）和That's All Folks（日常价值观触发词模块），并采用基于框架的方法从文本中自动检测价值观。
AI.result: 开发了两个本体模块，并通过文本分析验证了其自动检测价值观的有效性，识别出主流理论未涵盖但影响日常互动的价值观。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过捕捉文化相关的常识性价值观，为理解社会动态和个体行为提供了补充视角，丰富了现有价值观理论体系。

search_text: That's All Folks: a KG of Values as Commonsense Social Norms and Behaviors 这就是大家：作为常识性社会规范和行为的价值观知识图谱 Values, as intended in ethics, determine the shape and validity of moral and social norms, grounding our everyday individual and community behavior on commonsense knowledge. Formalising latent moral content in human interaction is an appealing perspective that would enable a deeper understanding of both social dynamics and individual cognitive and behavioral dimension. To tackle this problem, several theoretical frameworks offer different values models, and organize them into different taxonomies. The problem of the most used theories is that they adopt a cultural-independent perspective while many entities that are considered "values" are grounded in commonsense knowledge and expressed in everyday life interaction. We propose here two ontological modules, FOLK, an ontology for values intended in their broad sense, and That's All Folks, a module for lexical and factual folk value triggers, whose purpose is to complement the main theories, providing a method for identifying the values that are not contemplated by the major value theories, but which nonetheless play a key role in daily human interactions, and shape social structures, cultural biases, and personal beliefs. The resource is tested via performing automatic detection of values from text with a frame-based approach. 正如伦理学所意图的那样，价值观决定了道德和社会规范的形式和有效性，将我们日常的个人和社区行为建立在常识知识的基础上。将人类互动中潜在的道德内容形式化是一个有吸引力的观点，它将有助于更深入地理解社会动态以及个人认知和行为维度。为了解决这个问题，一些理论框架提供了不同的价值模型，并将它们组织成不同的分类法。最常用的理论的问题在于，它们采用了独立于文化的视角，而许多被认为是“价值”的实体却扎根于常识知识并在日常生活互动中表达。我们在这里提出两个本体论模块：FOLK，一个广义上的价值本体论；以及 That's All Folks，一个用于词汇和事实民间价值触发的模块，其目的是补充主要理论，提供一种方法来识别主要价值理论未考虑到的价值观，但这些价值观在日常人类互动中发挥着关键作用，并塑造社会结构、文化偏见和个人信仰。通过使用基于框架的方法自动检测文本中的值来测试资源。 该论文提出一个知识图谱（KG），用于捕捉作为常识性社会规范和行为的‘价值观’，以补充现有理论中未涵盖的日常互动中的价值观。 Stefano De Giorgis,Aldo Gangemi cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.SC

authors_text: Robert P. Spang,Karl El Hajal,Sebastian Möller,Milos Cernak
title: Personalized Task Load Prediction in Speech Communication
title_zh: 语音通信中的个性化任务负载预测
abstract: Estimating the quality of remote speech communication is a complex task influenced by the speaker, transmission channel, and listener. For example, the degradation of transmission quality can increase listeners' cognitive load, which can influence the overall perceived quality of the conversation. This paper presents a framework that isolates quality-dependent changes and controls most outside influencing factors like personal preference in a simulated conversational environment. The performed statistical analysis finds significant relationships between stimulus quality and the listener's valence and personality (agreeableness and openness) and, similarly, between the perceived task load during the listening task and the listener's personality and frustration intolerance. The machine learning model of the task load prediction improves the correlation coefficients from 0.48 to 0.76 when listeners' individuality is considered. The proposed evaluation framework and results pave the way for personalized audio quality assessment that includes speakers' and listeners' individuality beyond conventional channel modeling.
summary: Estimating the quality of remote speech communication is a complex task influenced by the speaker, transmission channel, and listener. For example, the degradation of transmission quality can increase listeners' cognitive load, which can influence the overall perceived quality of the conversation. This paper presents a framework that isolates quality-dependent changes and controls most outside influencing factors like personal preference in a simulated conversational environment. The performed statistical analysis finds significant relationships between stimulus quality and the listener's valence and personality (agreeableness and openness) and, similarly, between the perceived task load during the listening task and the listener's personality and frustration intolerance. The machine learning model of the task load prediction improves the correlation coefficients from 0.48 to 0.76 when listeners' individuality is considered. The proposed evaluation framework and results pave the way for personalized audio quality assessment that includes speakers' and listeners' individuality beyond conventional channel modeling.
abstract_zh: 评估远程语音通信的质量是一项复杂的任务，受到说话者、传输通道和收听者的影响。例如，传输质量的下降会增加听众的认知负荷，从而影响对话的整体感知质量。本文提出了一个框架，该框架可以隔离与质量相关的变化并控制大多数外部影响因素，例如模拟对话环境中的个人偏好。进行的统计分析发现刺激质量与听者的效价和个性（宜人性和开放性）之间存在显着关系，类似地，在听任务期间感知的任务负载与听者的个性和挫折耐受力之间也存在显着关系。当考虑听众的个性时，任务负载预测的机器学习模型将相关系数从 0.48 提高到 0.76。所提出的评估框架和结果为个性化音频质量评估铺平了道路，其中包括超越传统通道建模的扬声器和听众的个性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种个性化任务负载预测框架，通过考虑听众的个体差异来评估语音通信质量。
AI.motivation: 传统通信质量评估方法忽视了听众的个性特征，导致预测准确性不足。本文旨在通过整合个体差异因素提升评估效果。
AI.method: 构建模拟对话环境以隔离外部干扰因素，结合统计分析与机器学习模型，分析刺激质量与听众情绪、性格及挫败容忍度的关系。
AI.result: 引入个体特征后，任务负载预测相关系数从0.48提升至0.76，证实了个性特征对感知质量的显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为个性化音频质量评估提供了新方法，突破了传统仅依赖信道建模的局限性。

authors_text: Mohamed Anwar,Bowen Shi,Vedanuj Goswami,Wei-Ning Hsu,Juan Pino,Changhan Wang
title: MuAViC: A Multilingual Audio-Visual Corpus for Robust Speech Recognition and Robust Speech-to-Text Translation
title_zh: MuAViC：用于鲁棒语音识别和鲁棒语音到文本翻译的多语言视听语料库
abstract: We introduce MuAViC, a multilingual audio-visual corpus for robust speech recognition and robust speech-to-text translation providing 1200 hours of audio-visual speech in 9 languages. It is fully transcribed and covers 6 English-to-X translation as well as 6 X-to-English translation directions. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first open benchmark for audio-visual speech-to-text translation and the largest open benchmark for multilingual audio-visual speech recognition. Our baseline results show that MuAViC is effective for building noise-robust speech recognition and translation models. We make the corpus available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/muavic.
summary: We introduce MuAViC, a multilingual audio-visual corpus for robust speech recognition and robust speech-to-text translation providing 1200 hours of audio-visual speech in 9 languages. It is fully transcribed and covers 6 English-to-X translation as well as 6 X-to-English translation directions. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first open benchmark for audio-visual speech-to-text translation and the largest open benchmark for multilingual audio-visual speech recognition. Our baseline results show that MuAViC is effective for building noise-robust speech recognition and translation models. We make the corpus available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/muavic.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 MuAViC，这是一个多语言视听语料库，用于强大的语音识别和强大的语音到文本翻译，提供 9 种语言的 1200 小时视听语音。它是完全转录的，涵盖 6 个英语到 X 的翻译以及 6 个 X 到英语的翻译方向。据我们所知，这是第一个视听语音到文本翻译的开放基准，也是最大的多语言视听语音识别开放基准。我们的基线结果表明 MuAViC 对于构建抗噪声语音识别和翻译模型是有效的。我们在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/muavic 提供该语料库。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MuAViC，一个包含1200小时9种语言视听数据的多语言语料库，用于提升语音识别和语音到文本翻译的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏多语言视听对齐资源，且难以支持噪声环境下的鲁棒模型训练，需构建更大规模开放基准以推动相关技术发展。
AI.method: 收集并转录1200小时多语言视听数据，涵盖6种英译其他语言及6种其他语言译英方向，构建完整标注的开放语料库。
AI.result: 基线实验表明，MuAViC能有效提升噪声场景下的语音识别与翻译模型性能，验证了数据集的可靠性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: MuAViC为多语言鲁棒语音处理提供了关键资源，将促进视听语义理解与跨语言翻译技术的创新研究。

motivation: 现有数据集缺乏多语言视听对齐资源，且难以支持噪声环境下的鲁棒模型训练，需构建更大规模开放基准以推动相关技术发展。
method: 收集并转录1200小时多语言视听数据，涵盖6种英译其他语言及6种其他语言译英方向，构建完整标注的开放语料库。
result: 基线实验表明，MuAViC能有效提升噪声场景下的语音识别与翻译模型性能，验证了数据集的可靠性与实用性。
conclusion: MuAViC为多语言鲁棒语音处理提供了关键资源，将促进视听语义理解与跨语言翻译技术的创新研究。
search_text: MuAViC: A Multilingual Audio-Visual Corpus for Robust Speech Recognition and Robust Speech-to-Text Translation MuAViC：用于鲁棒语音识别和鲁棒语音到文本翻译的多语言视听语料库 We introduce MuAViC, a multilingual audio-visual corpus for robust speech recognition and robust speech-to-text translation providing 1200 hours of audio-visual speech in 9 languages. It is fully transcribed and covers 6 English-to-X translation as well as 6 X-to-English translation directions. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first open benchmark for audio-visual speech-to-text translation and the largest open benchmark for multilingual audio-visual speech recognition. Our baseline results show that MuAViC is effective for building noise-robust speech recognition and translation models. We make the corpus available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/muavic. 我们推出 MuAViC，这是一个多语言视听语料库，用于强大的语音识别和强大的语音到文本翻译，提供 9 种语言的 1200 小时视听语音。它是完全转录的，涵盖 6 个英语到 X 的翻译以及 6 个 X 到英语的翻译方向。据我们所知，这是第一个视听语音到文本翻译的开放基准，也是最大的多语言视听语音识别开放基准。我们的基线结果表明 MuAViC 对于构建抗噪声语音识别和翻译模型是有效的。我们在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/muavic 提供该语料库。 本文提出MuAViC，一个包含1200小时9种语言视听数据的多语言语料库，用于提升语音识别和语音到文本翻译的鲁棒性。 Mohamed Anwar,Bowen Shi,Vedanuj Goswami,Wei-Ning Hsu,Juan Pino,Changhan Wang cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Wentao Chen,Youcan Yan,Zeqing Zhang,Lei Yang,Jia Pan
title: Polymer-Based Self-Calibrated Optical Fiber Tactile Sensor
title_zh: 基于聚合物的自校准光纤触觉传感器
abstract: Human skin can accurately sense the self-decoupled normal and shear forces when in contact with objects of different sizes. Although there exist many soft and conformable tactile sensors on robotic applications able to decouple the normal force and shear forces, the impact of the size of object in contact on the force calibration model has been commonly ignored. Here, using the principle that contact force can be derived from the light power loss in the soft optical fiber core, we present a soft tactile sensor that decouples normal and shear forces and calibrates the measurement results based on the object size, by designing a two-layered weaved polymer-based optical fiber anisotropic structure embedded in a soft elastomer. Based on the anisotropic response of optical fibers, we developed a linear calibration algorithm to simultaneously measure the size of the contact object and the decoupled normal and shear forces calibrated the object size. By calibrating the sensor at the robotic arm tip, we show that robots can reconstruct the force vector at an average accuracy of 0.15N for normal forces, 0.17N for shear forces in X-axis , and 0.18N for shear forces in Y-axis, within the sensing range of 0-2N in all directions, and the average accuracy of object size measurement of 0.4mm, within the test indenter diameter range of 5-12mm.
summary: Human skin can accurately sense the self-decoupled normal and shear forces when in contact with objects of different sizes. Although there exist many soft and conformable tactile sensors on robotic applications able to decouple the normal force and shear forces, the impact of the size of object in contact on the force calibration model has been commonly ignored. Here, using the principle that contact force can be derived from the light power loss in the soft optical fiber core, we present a soft tactile sensor that decouples normal and shear forces and calibrates the measurement results based on the object size, by designing a two-layered weaved polymer-based optical fiber anisotropic structure embedded in a soft elastomer. Based on the anisotropic response of optical fibers, we developed a linear calibration algorithm to simultaneously measure the size of the contact object and the decoupled normal and shear forces calibrated the object size. By calibrating the sensor at the robotic arm tip, we show that robots can reconstruct the force vector at an average accuracy of 0.15N for normal forces, 0.17N for shear forces in X-axis , and 0.18N for shear forces in Y-axis, within the sensing range of 0-2N in all directions, and the average accuracy of object size measurement of 0.4mm, within the test indenter diameter range of 5-12mm.
abstract_zh: 人体皮肤在与不同尺寸的物体接触时，可以准确地感知自解耦的法向力和剪切力。尽管机器人应用中存在许多柔软且舒适的触觉传感器，能够解耦法向力和剪切力，但接触物体的尺寸对力校准模型的影响通常被忽略。在这里，利用接触力可以从软光纤芯中的光功率损耗中导出的原理，我们提出了一种软触觉传感器，通过设计嵌入软弹性体中的两层编织的基于聚合物的光纤各向异性结构，该传感器可以解耦法向力和剪切力，并根据物体尺寸校准测量结果。基于光纤的各向异性响应，我们开发了一种线性校准算法，可以同时测量接触物体的尺寸，并用解耦的法向力和剪切力校准物体尺寸。通过校准机械臂尖端的传感器，我们表明，在所有方向0-2N的传感范围内，机器人可以以平均精度为0.15N的法向力、0.17N的X轴剪切力和0.18N的Y轴剪切力重建力矢量，并且在5-12mm的测试压头直径范围内，物体尺寸测量的平均精度为0.4mm。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于聚合物的自校准光纤触觉传感器，用于解耦法向力和剪切力并根据接触物体尺寸进行校准。
AI.motivation: 现有软体触觉传感器在解耦法向力和剪切力时未考虑接触物体尺寸对校准模型的影响，导致测量精度不足。
AI.method: 利用光纤光功率损耗原理，设计双层编织聚合物基光纤各向异性结构，嵌入软弹性体中，并开发线性校准算法同步测量物体尺寸及解耦力。
AI.result: 在机器人手臂末端校准后，法向力测量精度达0.15N，X/Y轴剪切力精度分别为0.17N/0.18N，物体尺寸测量精度为0.4mm。
AI.conclusion: 该传感器通过尺寸自校准机制显著提升测量精度，为机器人触觉应用提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Grace Guo,Ehud Karavani,Alex Endert,Bum Chul Kwon
title: Causalvis: Visualizations for Causal Inference
title_zh: Causalvis：因果推理的可视化
abstract: Causal inference is a statistical paradigm for quantifying causal effects using observational data. It is a complex process, requiring multiple steps, iterations, and collaborations with domain experts. Analysts often rely on visualizations to evaluate the accuracy of each step. However, existing visualization toolkits are not designed to support the entire causal inference process within computational environments familiar to analysts. In this paper, we address this gap with Causalvis, a Python visualization package for causal inference. Working closely with causal inference experts, we adopted an iterative design process to develop four interactive visualization modules to support causal inference analysis tasks. The modules are then presented back to the experts for feedback and evaluation. We found that Causalvis effectively supported the iterative causal inference process. We discuss the implications of our findings for designing visualizations for causal inference, particularly for tasks of communication and collaboration.
summary: Causal inference is a statistical paradigm for quantifying causal effects using observational data. It is a complex process, requiring multiple steps, iterations, and collaborations with domain experts. Analysts often rely on visualizations to evaluate the accuracy of each step. However, existing visualization toolkits are not designed to support the entire causal inference process within computational environments familiar to analysts. In this paper, we address this gap with Causalvis, a Python visualization package for causal inference. Working closely with causal inference experts, we adopted an iterative design process to develop four interactive visualization modules to support causal inference analysis tasks. The modules are then presented back to the experts for feedback and evaluation. We found that Causalvis effectively supported the iterative causal inference process. We discuss the implications of our findings for designing visualizations for causal inference, particularly for tasks of communication and collaboration.
abstract_zh: 因果推断是一种使用观察数据量化因果效应的统计范式。这是一个复杂的过程，需要多个步骤、迭代以及与领域专家的协作。分析师通常依靠可视化来评估每个步骤的准确性。然而，现有的可视化工具包并非旨在支持分析师熟悉的计算环境中的整个因果推理过程。在本文中，我们使用 Causalvis（一个用于因果推理的 Python 可视化包）解决了这一差距。我们与因果推理专家密切合作，采用迭代设计流程开发了四个交互式可视化模块来支持因果推理分析任务。然后将这些模块提交给专家进行反馈和评估。我们发现 Causalvis 有效地支持了迭代因果推理过程。我们讨论了我们的发现对于设计因果推理可视化的影响，特别是对于沟通和协作任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Causalvis，一个用于因果推断的Python可视化工具包，旨在支持分析过程中的多步骤迭代与专家协作。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化工具无法在分析者熟悉的计算环境中支持完整的因果推断流程，导致步骤评估和专家协作困难。
AI.method: 通过与因果推断专家的迭代设计过程，开发了四个交互式可视化模块，并收集专家反馈进行评估。
AI.result: Causalvis有效支持了因果推断的迭代过程，提升了分析准确性与协作效率。
AI.conclusion: 可视化设计需注重通信与协作需求，以支持复杂因果推断任务的全流程分析。

authors_text: Islam Ali,Bingqing,Wan,Hong Zhang
title: Prediction of SLAM ATE Using an Ensemble Learning Regression Model and 1-D Global Pooling of Data Characterization
title_zh: 使用集成学习回归模型和数据表征的一维全局池来预测 SLAM ATE
abstract: Robustness and resilience of simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) are critical requirements for modern autonomous robotic systems. One of the essential steps to achieve robustness and resilience is the ability of SLAM to have an integrity measure for its localization estimates, and thus, have internal fault tolerance mechanisms to deal with performance degradation. In this work, we introduce a novel method for predicting SLAM localization error based on the characterization of raw sensor inputs. The proposed method relies on using a random forest regression model trained on 1-D global pooled features that are generated from characterized raw sensor data. The model is validated by using it to predict the performance of ORB-SLAM3 on three different datasets running on four different operating modes, resulting in an average prediction accuracy of up to 94.7\%. The paper also studies the impact of 12 different 1-D global pooling functions on regression quality, and the superiority of 1-D global averaging is quantitatively proven. Finally, the paper studies the quality of prediction with limited training data, and proves that we are able to maintain proper prediction quality when only 20 \% of the training examples are used for training, which highlights how the proposed model can optimize the evaluation footprint of SLAM systems.
summary: Robustness and resilience of simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) are critical requirements for modern autonomous robotic systems. One of the essential steps to achieve robustness and resilience is the ability of SLAM to have an integrity measure for its localization estimates, and thus, have internal fault tolerance mechanisms to deal with performance degradation. In this work, we introduce a novel method for predicting SLAM localization error based on the characterization of raw sensor inputs. The proposed method relies on using a random forest regression model trained on 1-D global pooled features that are generated from characterized raw sensor data. The model is validated by using it to predict the performance of ORB-SLAM3 on three different datasets running on four different operating modes, resulting in an average prediction accuracy of up to 94.7\%. The paper also studies the impact of 12 different 1-D global pooling functions on regression quality, and the superiority of 1-D global averaging is quantitatively proven. Finally, the paper studies the quality of prediction with limited training data, and proves that we are able to maintain proper prediction quality when only 20 \% of the training examples are used for training, which highlights how the proposed model can optimize the evaluation footprint of SLAM systems.
abstract_zh: 同时定位与建图 (SLAM) 的稳健性和弹性是现代自主机器人系统的关键要求。实现鲁棒性和弹性的重要步骤之一是 SLAM 能够对其定位估计进行完整性测量，从而具有内部容错机制来应对性能下降。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种基于原始传感器输入特征来预测 SLAM 定位误差的新方法。所提出的方法依赖于使用随机森林回归模型，该模型在一维全局池化特征上进行训练，这些特征是从表征的原始传感器数据生成的。该模型通过在四种不同操作模式下运行的三个不同数据集上预测 ORB-SLAM3 的性能进行了验证，平均预测精度高达 94.7%。论文还研究了12种不同的一维全局池化函数对回归质量的影响，定量证明了一维全局平均的优越性。最后，本文研究了有限训练数据下的预测质量，并证明当仅使用 20% 的训练样本进行训练时，我们能够保持适当的预测质量，这凸显了所提出的模型如何优化 SLAM 系统的评估足迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于集成学习回归模型和一维全局池化特征的SLAM定位误差预测方法。
AI.motivation: 为提高SLAM系统的鲁棒性与容错能力，需建立有效的定位误差预测机制以实现性能退化预警。
AI.method: 采用随机森林回归模型，结合原始传感器数据的一维全局池化特征进行训练，并验证不同池化函数及小样本训练效果。
AI.result: 在ORB-SLAM3的多数据集测试中达到94.7%预测准确率，证明一维平均池化最优且20%训练数据即可保持预测质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了SLAM误差预测，可优化系统评估效率并增强自主机器人系统的可靠性。

search_text: Prediction of SLAM ATE Using an Ensemble Learning Regression Model and 1-D Global Pooling of Data Characterization 使用集成学习回归模型和数据表征的一维全局池来预测 SLAM ATE Robustness and resilience of simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) are critical requirements for modern autonomous robotic systems. One of the essential steps to achieve robustness and resilience is the ability of SLAM to have an integrity measure for its localization estimates, and thus, have internal fault tolerance mechanisms to deal with performance degradation. In this work, we introduce a novel method for predicting SLAM localization error based on the characterization of raw sensor inputs. The proposed method relies on using a random forest regression model trained on 1-D global pooled features that are generated from characterized raw sensor data. The model is validated by using it to predict the performance of ORB-SLAM3 on three different datasets running on four different operating modes, resulting in an average prediction accuracy of up to 94.7\%. The paper also studies the impact of 12 different 1-D global pooling functions on regression quality, and the superiority of 1-D global averaging is quantitatively proven. Finally, the paper studies the quality of prediction with limited training data, and proves that we are able to maintain proper prediction quality when only 20 \% of the training examples are used for training, which highlights how the proposed model can optimize the evaluation footprint of SLAM systems. 同时定位与建图 (SLAM) 的稳健性和弹性是现代自主机器人系统的关键要求。实现鲁棒性和弹性的重要步骤之一是 SLAM 能够对其定位估计进行完整性测量，从而具有内部容错机制来应对性能下降。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种基于原始传感器输入特征来预测 SLAM 定位误差的新方法。所提出的方法依赖于使用随机森林回归模型，该模型在一维全局池化特征上进行训练，这些特征是从表征的原始传感器数据生成的。该模型通过在四种不同操作模式下运行的三个不同数据集上预测 ORB-SLAM3 的性能进行了验证，平均预测精度高达 94.7%。论文还研究了12种不同的一维全局池化函数对回归质量的影响，定量证明了一维全局平均的优越性。最后，本文研究了有限训练数据下的预测质量，并证明当仅使用 20% 的训练样本进行训练时，我们能够保持适当的预测质量，这凸显了所提出的模型如何优化 SLAM 系统的评估足迹。 本文提出一种基于集成学习回归模型和一维全局池化特征的SLAM定位误差预测方法。 Islam Ali,Bingqing,Wan,Hong Zhang cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Sasan Mahmoudinazlou,Changhyun Kwon
title: A Hybrid Genetic Algorithm with Type-Aware Chromosomes for Traveling Salesman Problems with Drone
title_zh: 一种具有类型感知染色体的混合遗传算法，用于解决无人机旅行商问题
abstract: There are emerging transportation problems known as the Traveling Salesman Problem with Drone (TSPD) and the Flying Sidekick Traveling Salesman Problem (FSTSP) that involve using a drone in conjunction with a truck for package delivery. This study presents a hybrid genetic algorithm for solving TSPD and FSTSP by incorporating local search and dynamic programming. Similar algorithms exist in the literature. Our algorithm, however, considers more sophisticated chromosomes and less computationally complex dynamic programming to enable broader exploration by the genetic algorithm and efficient exploitation through dynamic programming and local search. The key contribution of this paper is the discovery of how decision-making processes for solving TSPD and FSTSP should be divided among the layers of genetic algorithm, dynamic programming, and local search. In particular, our genetic algorithm generates the truck and the drone sequences separately and encodes them in a type-aware chromosome, wherein each customer is assigned to either the truck or the drone. We apply local search to each chromosome, which is decoded by dynamic programming for fitness evaluation. Our new algorithm is shown to outperform existing algorithms on most benchmark instances in both quality and time. Our algorithms found the new best solutions for 538 TSPD instances out of 920 and 74 FSTSP instances out of 132.
summary: There are emerging transportation problems known as the Traveling Salesman Problem with Drone (TSPD) and the Flying Sidekick Traveling Salesman Problem (FSTSP) that involve using a drone in conjunction with a truck for package delivery. This study presents a hybrid genetic algorithm for solving TSPD and FSTSP by incorporating local search and dynamic programming. Similar algorithms exist in the literature. Our algorithm, however, considers more sophisticated chromosomes and less computationally complex dynamic programming to enable broader exploration by the genetic algorithm and efficient exploitation through dynamic programming and local search. The key contribution of this paper is the discovery of how decision-making processes for solving TSPD and FSTSP should be divided among the layers of genetic algorithm, dynamic programming, and local search. In particular, our genetic algorithm generates the truck and the drone sequences separately and encodes them in a type-aware chromosome, wherein each customer is assigned to either the truck or the drone. We apply local search to each chromosome, which is decoded by dynamic programming for fitness evaluation. Our new algorithm is shown to outperform existing algorithms on most benchmark instances in both quality and time. Our algorithms found the new best solutions for 538 TSPD instances out of 920 and 74 FSTSP instances out of 132.
abstract_zh: 新兴的运输问题被称为无人机旅行推销员问题 (TSPD) 和飞行伙伴旅行推销员问题 (FSTSP)，涉及使用无人机与卡车结合进行包裹递送。本研究提出了一种混合遗传算法，通过结合局部搜索和动态规划来求解 TSPD 和 FSTSP。文献中存在类似的算法。然而，我们的算法考虑了更复杂的染色体和计算复杂度较低的动态编程，以便通过遗传算法进行更广泛的探索，并通过动态编程和局部搜索进行有效的利用。本文的主要贡献是发现了如何在遗传算法、动态规划和局部搜索层之间划分求解 TSPD 和 FSTSP 的决策过程。特别是，我们的遗传算法分别生成卡车和无人机序列，并将它们编码在类型感知染色体中，其中每个客户都被分配给卡车或无人机。我们对每条染色体应用局部搜索，通过动态规划对其进行解码以进行适应度评估。我们的新算法在大多数基准实例上在质量和时间上都优于现有算法。我们的算法为 920 个实例中的 538 个 TSPD 实例找到了新的最佳解决方案，并为 132 个实例中的 74 个 FSTSP 实例找到了新的最佳解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合遗传算法解决带有无人机的旅行商问题（TSPD）和飞行助手旅行商问题（FSTSP），通过类型感知染色体和动态规划优化求解效率。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在解决TSPD/FSTSP时存在计算复杂度高、探索效率不足的问题，需更高效的分层决策机制以平衡全局探索与局部优化。
AI.method: 设计类型感知染色体独立编码卡车与无人机路径，结合动态规划解码与局部搜索优化，分层处理遗传算法、动态规划和局部搜索的决策过程。
AI.result: 新算法在920个TSPD基准实例中找到538个新最优解，在132个FSTSP实例中找到74个新最优解，优于现有算法的求解质量与时间效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过分层决策机制与类型感知染色体设计，算法显著提升了TSPD/FSTSP的求解性能，为无人机协同路径规划提供新思路。
