authors_text: Louisa Conwill,Sam English Anthony,Walter J. Scheirer
title: Has the Virtualization of the Face Changed Facial Perception? A Study of the Impact of Photo Editing and Augmented Reality on Facial Perception
title_zh: 面部虚拟化是否改变了面部感知？照片编辑和增强现实对面部感知影响的研究
abstract: Augmented reality and other photo editing filters are popular methods used to modify faces online. Considering the important role of facial perception in communication, how do we perceive this increasing number of modified faces? In this paper we present the results of six surveys that measure familiarity with different styles of facial filters, perceived strangeness of faces edited with different filters, and ability to discern whether images are filtered. Our results demonstrate that faces modified with more traditional face filters are perceived similarly to unmodified faces, and faces filtered with augmented reality filters are perceived differently from unmodified faces. We discuss possible explanations for these results, including a societal adjustment to traditional photo editing techniques or the inherent differences in the different types of filters. We conclude with a discussion of how to build online spaces more responsibly based on our results.
summary: Augmented reality and other photo editing filters are popular methods used to modify faces online. Considering the important role of facial perception in communication, how do we perceive this increasing number of modified faces? In this paper we present the results of six surveys that measure familiarity with different styles of facial filters, perceived strangeness of faces edited with different filters, and ability to discern whether images are filtered. Our results demonstrate that faces modified with more traditional face filters are perceived similarly to unmodified faces, and faces filtered with augmented reality filters are perceived differently from unmodified faces. We discuss possible explanations for these results, including a societal adjustment to traditional photo editing techniques or the inherent differences in the different types of filters. We conclude with a discussion of how to build online spaces more responsibly based on our results.
abstract_zh: 增强现实和其他照片编辑滤镜是在线修改脸部的流行方法。考虑到面部感知在交流中的重要作用，我们如何看待越来越多的经过修饰的面部？在本文中，我们展示了六项调查的结果，这些调查测量了对不同风格的面部滤镜的熟悉程度、使用不同滤镜编辑的面部的陌生感以及辨别图像是否经过过滤的能力。我们的结果表明，使用更传统的面部过滤器修改的面部与未修改的面部的感知相似，而使用增强现实过滤器过滤的面部的感知与未修改的面部不同。我们讨论了这些结果的可能解释，包括对传统照片编辑技术的社会调整或不同类型滤镜的固有差异。最后，我们讨论了如何根据我们的结果更负责任地构建在线空间。

AI.tldr: 研究虚拟化技术（如照片编辑和增强现实滤镜）对面部感知的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着面部修改技术的普及，探讨其如何影响人类面部感知及社会交流的可靠性，以指导构建更负责任的在线环境。
AI.method: 通过六项调查，测量参与者对不同滤镜风格的熟悉度、对修改后面部的陌生感感知，以及识别图像是否经过滤镜处理的能力。
AI.result: 传统滤镜修改的面部与原图感知相似，而增强现实滤镜修改的面部被显著区别于原图，可能因社会适应性差异或技术特性差异。
AI.conclusion: 需基于技术特性与社会适应性差异，制定更合理的在线内容规范与用户教育策略。

ai_content.tldr: 研究虚拟化技术（如照片编辑和增强现实滤镜）对面部感知的影响。
ai_content.motivation: 随着面部修改技术的普及，探讨其如何影响人类面部感知及社会交流的可靠性，以指导构建更负责任的在线环境。

ai_content.conclusion: 需基于技术特性与社会适应性差异，制定更合理的在线内容规范与用户教育策略。

search_text: Has the Virtualization of the Face Changed Facial Perception? A Study of the Impact of Photo Editing and Augmented Reality on Facial Perception 面部虚拟化是否改变了面部感知？照片编辑和增强现实对面部感知影响的研究 Augmented reality and other photo editing filters are popular methods used to modify faces online. Considering the important role of facial perception in communication, how do we perceive this increasing number of modified faces? In this paper we present the results of six surveys that measure familiarity with different styles of facial filters, perceived strangeness of faces edited with different filters, and ability to discern whether images are filtered. Our results demonstrate that faces modified with more traditional face filters are perceived similarly to unmodified faces, and faces filtered with augmented reality filters are perceived differently from unmodified faces. We discuss possible explanations for these results, including a societal adjustment to traditional photo editing techniques or the inherent differences in the different types of filters. We conclude with a discussion of how to build online spaces more responsibly based on our results. 增强现实和其他照片编辑滤镜是在线修改脸部的流行方法。考虑到面部感知在交流中的重要作用，我们如何看待越来越多的经过修饰的面部？在本文中，我们展示了六项调查的结果，这些调查测量了对不同风格的面部滤镜的熟悉程度、使用不同滤镜编辑的面部的陌生感以及辨别图像是否经过过滤的能力。我们的结果表明，使用更传统的面部过滤器修改的面部与未修改的面部的感知相似，而使用增强现实过滤器过滤的面部的感知与未修改的面部不同。我们讨论了这些结果的可能解释，包括对传统照片编辑技术的社会调整或不同类型滤镜的固有差异。最后，我们讨论了如何根据我们的结果更负责任地构建在线空间。 研究虚拟化技术（如照片编辑和增强现实滤镜）对面部感知的影响。 Louisa Conwill,Sam English Anthony,Walter J. Scheirer cs.HC,cs.CV

authors_text: Ioannis Lagogiannis,Felix Meissen,Georgios Kaissis,Daniel Rueckert
title: Unsupervised Pathology Detection: A Deep Dive Into the State of the Art
title_zh: 无监督病理检测：深入研究最先进的技术
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (added copyright, DOI information)
comments: 12 pages, 4 figures, accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (added copyright, DOI information)
abstract: Deep unsupervised approaches are gathering increased attention for applications such as pathology detection and segmentation in medical images since they promise to alleviate the need for large labeled datasets and are more generalizable than their supervised counterparts in detecting any kind of rare pathology. As the Unsupervised Anomaly Detection (UAD) literature continuously grows and new paradigms emerge, it is vital to continuously evaluate and benchmark new methods in a common framework, in order to reassess the state-of-the-art (SOTA) and identify promising research directions. To this end, we evaluate a diverse selection of cutting-edge UAD methods on multiple medical datasets, comparing them against the established SOTA in UAD for brain MRI. Our experiments demonstrate that newly developed feature-modeling methods from the industrial and medical literature achieve increased performance compared to previous work and set the new SOTA in a variety of modalities and datasets. Additionally, we show that such methods are capable of benefiting from recently developed self-supervised pre-training algorithms, further increasing their performance. Finally, we perform a series of experiments in order to gain further insights into some unique characteristics of selected models and datasets. Our code can be found under https://github.com/iolag/UPD_study/.
summary: Deep unsupervised approaches are gathering increased attention for applications such as pathology detection and segmentation in medical images since they promise to alleviate the need for large labeled datasets and are more generalizable than their supervised counterparts in detecting any kind of rare pathology. As the Unsupervised Anomaly Detection (UAD) literature continuously grows and new paradigms emerge, it is vital to continuously evaluate and benchmark new methods in a common framework, in order to reassess the state-of-the-art (SOTA) and identify promising research directions. To this end, we evaluate a diverse selection of cutting-edge UAD methods on multiple medical datasets, comparing them against the established SOTA in UAD for brain MRI. Our experiments demonstrate that newly developed feature-modeling methods from the industrial and medical literature achieve increased performance compared to previous work and set the new SOTA in a variety of modalities and datasets. Additionally, we show that such methods are capable of benefiting from recently developed self-supervised pre-training algorithms, further increasing their performance. Finally, we perform a series of experiments in order to gain further insights into some unique characteristics of selected models and datasets. Our code can be found under https://github.com/iolag/UPD_study/.
abstract_zh: 深度无监督方法越来越受到医学图像中病理检测和分割等应用的关注，因为它们有望减轻对大型标记数据集的需求，并且在检测任何类型的罕见病理方面比有监督方法更通用。随着无监督异常检测（UAD）文献的不断增长和新范式的出现，在通用框架中不断评估和基准测试新方法至关重要，以便重新评估最先进的（SOTA）并确定有前途的研究方向。为此，我们在多个医学数据集上评估了多种选择的尖端 UAD 方法，并将它们与脑 MRI UAD 中已建立的 SOTA 进行比较。我们的实验表明，与之前的工作相比，来自工业和医学文献的新开发的特征建模方法实现了更高的性能，并在各种模式和数据集中设置了新的 SOTA。此外，我们表明此类方法能够受益于最近开发的自监督预训练算法，进一步提高其性能。最后，我们进行了一系列实验，以便进一步了解所选模型和数据集的一些独特特征。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/iolag/UPD_study/ 下找到。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了多种无监督异常检测方法在医学图像病理检测中的性能，旨在确定当前最先进的技术。
AI.motivation: 无监督方法能减少对标注数据的依赖且更具泛化性，但需持续评估新方法以更新领域内最佳实践并探索研究方向。
AI.method: 在多个医学数据集上测试前沿无监督异常检测方法，对比现有最佳模型，并结合自监督预训练技术优化性能。
AI.result: 新型特征建模方法在多种模态和数据集上超越了现有最佳性能，且自监督预训练进一步提升了效果。
AI.conclusion: 新方法在无监督病理检测中表现优异，结合自监督预训练可显著提升性能，未来需深入探索模型与数据集特性。

authors_text: Luca Guarnera,Oliver Giudice,Sebastiano Battiato
title: Level Up the Deepfake Detection: a Method to Effectively Discriminate Images Generated by GAN Architectures and Diffusion Models
title_zh: 提升 Deepfake 检测水平：一种有效区分 GAN 架构和扩散模型生成图像的方法
abstract: The image deepfake detection task has been greatly addressed by the scientific community to discriminate real images from those generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) models: a binary classification task. In this work, the deepfake detection and recognition task was investigated by collecting a dedicated dataset of pristine images and fake ones generated by 9 different Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) architectures and by 4 additional Diffusion Models (DM). A hierarchical multi-level approach was then introduced to solve three different deepfake detection and recognition tasks: (i) Real Vs AI generated; (ii) GANs Vs DMs; (iii) AI specific architecture recognition. Experimental results demonstrated, in each case, more than 97% classification accuracy, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The image deepfake detection task has been greatly addressed by the scientific community to discriminate real images from those generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) models: a binary classification task. In this work, the deepfake detection and recognition task was investigated by collecting a dedicated dataset of pristine images and fake ones generated by 9 different Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) architectures and by 4 additional Diffusion Models (DM). A hierarchical multi-level approach was then introduced to solve three different deepfake detection and recognition tasks: (i) Real Vs AI generated; (ii) GANs Vs DMs; (iii) AI specific architecture recognition. Experimental results demonstrated, in each case, more than 97% classification accuracy, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 图像深度伪造检测任务已得到科学界的大力关注，以区分真实图像与人工智能 (AI) 模型生成的图像：二元分类任务。在这项工作中，通过收集由 9 种不同的生成对抗网络 (GAN) 架构和 4 个附加扩散模型 (DM) 生成的原始图像和伪造图像的专用数据集，研究了深度伪造检测和识别任务。然后引入分层多级方法来解决三种不同的深度伪造检测和识别任务：（i）真实与人工智能生成； (ii) GAN 与 DM； (iii) AI 特定架构识别。实验结果表明，在每种情况下，分类准确率均超过 97%，优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层多级方法，有效区分由GAN架构和扩散模型生成的图像，提升深度伪造检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测主要聚焦于真实与AI生成图像的二分类，缺乏对不同AI模型（如GAN与扩散模型）及具体架构的细粒度区分能力。
AI.method: 构建包含9种GAN和4种扩散模型生成图像的专用数据集，设计分层多级框架解决三类任务：真实/AI生成、GAN/扩散模型、具体模型架构识别。
AI.result: 在三个任务中均实现超过97%的分类准确率，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过层次化建模有效捕捉不同生成模型的特征差异，在细粒度深度伪造检测中具有显著优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种分层多级方法，有效区分由GAN架构和扩散模型生成的图像，提升深度伪造检测性能。

authors_text: Dominik Kowald,Gregor Mayr,Markus Schedl,Elisabeth Lex
title: A Study on Accuracy, Miscalibration, and Popularity Bias in Recommendations
title_zh: 关于推荐中的准确性、错误校准和流行度偏差的研究
abstract: Recent research has suggested different metrics to measure the inconsistency of recommendation performance, including the accuracy difference between user groups, miscalibration, and popularity lift. However, a study that relates miscalibration and popularity lift to recommendation accuracy across different user groups is still missing. Additionally, it is unclear if particular genres contribute to the emergence of inconsistency in recommendation performance across user groups. In this paper, we present an analysis of these three aspects of five well-known recommendation algorithms for user groups that differ in their preference for popular content. Additionally, we study how different genres affect the inconsistency of recommendation performance, and how this is aligned with the popularity of the genres. Using data from LastFm, MovieLens, and MyAnimeList, we present two key findings. First, we find that users with little interest in popular content receive the worst recommendation accuracy, and that this is aligned with miscalibration and popularity lift. Second, our experiments show that particular genres contribute to a different extent to the inconsistency of recommendation performance, especially in terms of miscalibration in the case of the MyAnimeList dataset.
summary: Recent research has suggested different metrics to measure the inconsistency of recommendation performance, including the accuracy difference between user groups, miscalibration, and popularity lift. However, a study that relates miscalibration and popularity lift to recommendation accuracy across different user groups is still missing. Additionally, it is unclear if particular genres contribute to the emergence of inconsistency in recommendation performance across user groups. In this paper, we present an analysis of these three aspects of five well-known recommendation algorithms for user groups that differ in their preference for popular content. Additionally, we study how different genres affect the inconsistency of recommendation performance, and how this is aligned with the popularity of the genres. Using data from LastFm, MovieLens, and MyAnimeList, we present two key findings. First, we find that users with little interest in popular content receive the worst recommendation accuracy, and that this is aligned with miscalibration and popularity lift. Second, our experiments show that particular genres contribute to a different extent to the inconsistency of recommendation performance, especially in terms of miscalibration in the case of the MyAnimeList dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究提出了不同的指标来衡量推荐性能的不一致，包括用户组之间的准确性差异、错误校准和受欢迎程度提升。 However, a study that relates miscalibration and popularity lift to recommendation accuracy across different user groups is still missing. Additionally, it is unclear if particular genres contribute to the emergence of inconsistency in recommendation performance across user groups.在本文中，我们针对对流行内容的偏好不同的用户群体，对五种著名的推荐算法的这三个方面进行了分析。此外，我们研究了不同类型如何影响推荐性能的不一致，以及这如何与类型的受欢迎程度保持一致。 Using data from LastFm, MovieLens, and MyAnimeList, we present two key findings.首先，我们发现对流行内容不感兴趣的用户获得的推荐准确性最差，这与错误校准和流行度提升是一致的。其次，我们的实验表明，特定类型在不同程度上导致了推荐性能的不一致，特别是在 MyAnimeList 数据集的错误校准方面。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究推荐系统中准确性、校准误差与流行度偏差的关系，分析不同用户群体及内容类型对推荐性能不一致性的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏将校准误差和流行度提升与推荐准确性关联的分析，且未明确特定内容类型如何导致用户群体间的推荐性能差异。
AI.method: 基于LastFm、MovieLens和MyAnimeList数据集，分析五种推荐算法在不同用户群体（按流行内容偏好划分）及内容类型下的性能表现。
AI.result: 发现对流行内容兴趣较低的用户推荐准确性最差，且与校准误差和流行度提升相关；特定内容类型在不同数据集中对推荐性能不一致性的贡献存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了用户偏好与内容类型对推荐系统偏差的影响，为缓解推荐不公提供新视角，未来需进一步探索类型特性与算法优化的关联。

search_text: A Study on Accuracy, Miscalibration, and Popularity Bias in Recommendations 关于推荐中的准确性、错误校准和流行度偏差的研究 Recent research has suggested different metrics to measure the inconsistency of recommendation performance, including the accuracy difference between user groups, miscalibration, and popularity lift. However, a study that relates miscalibration and popularity lift to recommendation accuracy across different user groups is still missing. Additionally, it is unclear if particular genres contribute to the emergence of inconsistency in recommendation performance across user groups. In this paper, we present an analysis of these three aspects of five well-known recommendation algorithms for user groups that differ in their preference for popular content. Additionally, we study how different genres affect the inconsistency of recommendation performance, and how this is aligned with the popularity of the genres. Using data from LastFm, MovieLens, and MyAnimeList, we present two key findings. First, we find that users with little interest in popular content receive the worst recommendation accuracy, and that this is aligned with miscalibration and popularity lift. Second, our experiments show that particular genres contribute to a different extent to the inconsistency of recommendation performance, especially in terms of miscalibration in the case of the MyAnimeList dataset. 最近的研究提出了不同的指标来衡量推荐性能的不一致，包括用户组之间的准确性差异、错误校准和受欢迎程度提升。 However, a study that relates miscalibration and popularity lift to recommendation accuracy across different user groups is still missing. Additionally, it is unclear if particular genres contribute to the emergence of inconsistency in recommendation performance across user groups.在本文中，我们针对对流行内容的偏好不同的用户群体，对五种著名的推荐算法的这三个方面进行了分析。此外，我们研究了不同类型如何影响推荐性能的不一致，以及这如何与类型的受欢迎程度保持一致。 Using data from LastFm, MovieLens, and MyAnimeList, we present two key findings.首先，我们发现对流行内容不感兴趣的用户获得的推荐准确性最差，这与错误校准和流行度提升是一致的。其次，我们的实验表明，特定类型在不同程度上导致了推荐性能的不一致，特别是在 MyAnimeList 数据集的错误校准方面。 本论文研究推荐系统中准确性、校准误差与流行度偏差的关系，分析不同用户群体及内容类型对推荐性能不一致性的影响。 Dominik Kowald,Gregor Mayr,Markus Schedl,Elisabeth Lex cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Cong Wang,Zhiwei Jiang,Yafeng Yin,Zifeng Cheng,Shiping Ge,Qing Gu
title: Controlling Class Layout for Deep Ordinal Classification via Constrained Proxies Learning
title_zh: 通过约束代理学习控制深度序数分类的类布局
abstract: For deep ordinal classification, learning a well-structured feature space specific to ordinal classification is helpful to properly capture the ordinal nature among classes. Intuitively, when Euclidean distance metric is used, an ideal ordinal layout in feature space would be that the sample clusters are arranged in class order along a straight line in space. However, enforcing samples to conform to a specific layout in the feature space is a challenging problem. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose a novel Constrained Proxies Learning (CPL) method, which can learn a proxy for each ordinal class and then adjusts the global layout of classes by constraining these proxies. Specifically, we propose two kinds of strategies: hard layout constraint and soft layout constraint. The hard layout constraint is realized by directly controlling the generation of proxies to force them to be placed in a strict linear layout or semicircular layout (i.e., two instantiations of strict ordinal layout). The soft layout constraint is realized by constraining that the proxy layout should always produce unimodal proxy-to-proxies similarity distribution for each proxy (i.e., to be a relaxed ordinal layout). Experiments show that the proposed CPL method outperforms previous deep ordinal classification methods under the same setting of feature extractor.
summary: For deep ordinal classification, learning a well-structured feature space specific to ordinal classification is helpful to properly capture the ordinal nature among classes. Intuitively, when Euclidean distance metric is used, an ideal ordinal layout in feature space would be that the sample clusters are arranged in class order along a straight line in space. However, enforcing samples to conform to a specific layout in the feature space is a challenging problem. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose a novel Constrained Proxies Learning (CPL) method, which can learn a proxy for each ordinal class and then adjusts the global layout of classes by constraining these proxies. Specifically, we propose two kinds of strategies: hard layout constraint and soft layout constraint. The hard layout constraint is realized by directly controlling the generation of proxies to force them to be placed in a strict linear layout or semicircular layout (i.e., two instantiations of strict ordinal layout). The soft layout constraint is realized by constraining that the proxy layout should always produce unimodal proxy-to-proxies similarity distribution for each proxy (i.e., to be a relaxed ordinal layout). Experiments show that the proposed CPL method outperforms previous deep ordinal classification methods under the same setting of feature extractor.
abstract_zh: 对于深度序数分类，学习特定于序数分类的结构良好的特征空间有助于正确捕获类之间的序数性质。直观上，当使用欧几里德距离度量时，特征空间中的理想序数布局将是样本簇沿着空间中的直线按类顺序排列。然而，强制样本符合特征空间中的特定布局是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的约束代理学习（CPL）方法，该方法可以为每个序数类学习一个代理，然后通过约束这些代理来调整类的全局布局。具体来说，我们提出了两种策略：硬布局约束和软布局约束。硬布局约束是通过直接控制代理的生成来强制它们放置在严格的线性布局或半圆形布局（即严格序数布局的两个实例）中来实现的。软布局约束是通过约束代理布局应始终为每个代理产生单峰代理到代理相似性分布（即，成为宽松的序数布局）来实现的。实验表明，在相同的特征提取器设置下，所提出的 CPL 方法优于以前的深度顺序分类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种约束代理学习方法（CPL），通过控制特征空间中类别的布局来改进深度序数分类。
AI.motivation: 现有深度序数分类方法难以有效捕捉类别间的序数关系，特征空间布局缺乏结构化约束。
AI.method: 设计CPL方法，为每个序数类学习代理，并通过硬约束（强制线性/半圆布局）和软约束（单峰相似性分布）调整全局类别布局。
AI.result: 在相同特征提取器设置下，CPL方法优于现有深度序数分类方法。
AI.conclusion: 约束代理学习能有效捕捉序数关系，提升分类性能。

authors_text: Runchuan Zhu,Naye Ji,Youbing Zhao,Fan Zhang
title: Few-shots Portrait Generation with Style Enhancement and Identity Preservation
title_zh: 具有风格增强和身份保护的少镜头肖像生成
abstract: Nowadays, the wide application of virtual digital human promotes the comprehensive prosperity and development of digital culture supported by digital economy. The personalized portrait automatically generated by AI technology needs both the natural artistic style and human sentiment. In this paper, we propose a novel StyleIdentityGAN model, which can ensure the identity and artistry of the generated portrait at the same time. Specifically, the style-enhanced module focuses on artistic style features decoupling and transferring to improve the artistry of generated virtual face images. Meanwhile, the identity-enhanced module preserves the significant features extracted from the input photo. Furthermore, the proposed method requires a small number of reference style data. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of StyleIdentityGAN over state-of-art methods in artistry and identity effects, with comparisons done qualitatively, quantitatively and through a perceptual user study. Code has been released on Github3.
summary: Nowadays, the wide application of virtual digital human promotes the comprehensive prosperity and development of digital culture supported by digital economy. The personalized portrait automatically generated by AI technology needs both the natural artistic style and human sentiment. In this paper, we propose a novel StyleIdentityGAN model, which can ensure the identity and artistry of the generated portrait at the same time. Specifically, the style-enhanced module focuses on artistic style features decoupling and transferring to improve the artistry of generated virtual face images. Meanwhile, the identity-enhanced module preserves the significant features extracted from the input photo. Furthermore, the proposed method requires a small number of reference style data. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of StyleIdentityGAN over state-of-art methods in artistry and identity effects, with comparisons done qualitatively, quantitatively and through a perceptual user study. Code has been released on Github3.
abstract_zh: 如今，虚拟数字人的广泛应用促进了以数字经济为支撑的数字文化的全面繁荣发展。人工智能技术自动生成的个性化肖像，既需要自然的艺术风格，又需要人文情怀。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的StyleIdentityGAN模型，它可以同时保证生成的肖像的身份性和艺术性。具体来说，风格增强模块专注于艺术风格特征的解耦和转移，以提高生成的虚拟人脸图像的艺术性。同时，身份增强模块保留了从输入照片中提取的重要特征。此外，所提出的方法需要少量的参考风格数据。实验通过定性、定量和感知用户研究进行比较，证明了 StyleIdentityGAN 在艺术性和身份效果方面优于最先进的方法。代码已发布在Github3上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于少量参考样式的肖像生成模型StyleIdentityGAN，在保持身份特征的同时增强艺术风格。
AI.motivation: 虚拟数字人应用需求推动个性化AI肖像生成，需兼顾艺术性与身份真实性，现有方法难以同时满足两者且依赖大量数据。
AI.method: 设计StyleIdentityGAN网络，包含风格增强模块（解耦艺术特征）和身份增强模块（保留输入人脸关键特征），仅需少量参考风格数据。
AI.result: 在艺术性、身份保持度指标及用户感知实验中均优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的双模块架构有效平衡了肖像生成的艺术表现力与身份真实性，适用于少量样本场景。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于少量参考样式的肖像生成模型StyleIdentityGAN，在保持身份特征的同时增强艺术风格。
motivation: 虚拟数字人应用需求推动个性化AI肖像生成，需兼顾艺术性与身份真实性，现有方法难以同时满足两者且依赖大量数据。
method: 设计StyleIdentityGAN网络，包含风格增强模块（解耦艺术特征）和身份增强模块（保留输入人脸关键特征），仅需少量参考风格数据。

conclusion: 提出的双模块架构有效平衡了肖像生成的艺术表现力与身份真实性，适用于少量样本场景。
search_text: Few-shots Portrait Generation with Style Enhancement and Identity Preservation 具有风格增强和身份保护的少镜头肖像生成 Nowadays, the wide application of virtual digital human promotes the comprehensive prosperity and development of digital culture supported by digital economy. The personalized portrait automatically generated by AI technology needs both the natural artistic style and human sentiment. In this paper, we propose a novel StyleIdentityGAN model, which can ensure the identity and artistry of the generated portrait at the same time. Specifically, the style-enhanced module focuses on artistic style features decoupling and transferring to improve the artistry of generated virtual face images. Meanwhile, the identity-enhanced module preserves the significant features extracted from the input photo. Furthermore, the proposed method requires a small number of reference style data. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of StyleIdentityGAN over state-of-art methods in artistry and identity effects, with comparisons done qualitatively, quantitatively and through a perceptual user study. Code has been released on Github3. 如今，虚拟数字人的广泛应用促进了以数字经济为支撑的数字文化的全面繁荣发展。人工智能技术自动生成的个性化肖像，既需要自然的艺术风格，又需要人文情怀。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的StyleIdentityGAN模型，它可以同时保证生成的肖像的身份性和艺术性。具体来说，风格增强模块专注于艺术风格特征的解耦和转移，以提高生成的虚拟人脸图像的艺术性。同时，身份增强模块保留了从输入照片中提取的重要特征。此外，所提出的方法需要少量的参考风格数据。实验通过定性、定量和感知用户研究进行比较，证明了 StyleIdentityGAN 在艺术性和身份效果方面优于最先进的方法。代码已发布在Github3上。 本文提出一种基于少量参考样式的肖像生成模型StyleIdentityGAN，在保持身份特征的同时增强艺术风格。 Runchuan Zhu,Naye Ji,Youbing Zhao,Fan Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Thomas Jantos,Christian Brommer,Eren Allak,Stephan Weiss,Jan Steinbrener
title: AI-Based Multi-Object Relative State Estimation with Self-Calibration Capabilities
title_zh: 具有自校准功能的基于人工智能的多目标相对状态估计
abstract: The capability to extract task specific, semantic information from raw sensory data is a crucial requirement for many applications of mobile robotics. Autonomous inspection of critical infrastructure with Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), for example, requires precise navigation relative to the structure that is to be inspected. Recently, Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based methods have been shown to excel at extracting semantic information such as 6 degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) poses of objects from images. In this paper, we propose a method combining a state-of-the-art AI-based pose estimator for objects in camera images with data from an inertial measurement unit (IMU) for 6-DoF multi-object relative state estimation of a mobile robot. The AI-based pose estimator detects multiple objects of interest in camera images along with their relative poses. These measurements are fused with IMU data in a state-of-the-art sensor fusion framework. We illustrate the feasibility of our proposed method with real world experiments for different trajectories and number of arbitrarily placed objects. We show that the results can be reliably reproduced due to the self-calibrating capabilities of our approach.
summary: The capability to extract task specific, semantic information from raw sensory data is a crucial requirement for many applications of mobile robotics. Autonomous inspection of critical infrastructure with Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), for example, requires precise navigation relative to the structure that is to be inspected. Recently, Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based methods have been shown to excel at extracting semantic information such as 6 degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) poses of objects from images. In this paper, we propose a method combining a state-of-the-art AI-based pose estimator for objects in camera images with data from an inertial measurement unit (IMU) for 6-DoF multi-object relative state estimation of a mobile robot. The AI-based pose estimator detects multiple objects of interest in camera images along with their relative poses. These measurements are fused with IMU data in a state-of-the-art sensor fusion framework. We illustrate the feasibility of our proposed method with real world experiments for different trajectories and number of arbitrarily placed objects. We show that the results can be reliably reproduced due to the self-calibrating capabilities of our approach.
abstract_zh: 从原始感知数据中提取任务特定的语义信息的能力是移动机器人许多应用的关键要求。例如，使用无人机 (UAV) 对关键基础设施进行自主检查需要相对于待检查结构进行精确导航。最近，基于人工智能 (AI) 的方法已被证明擅长提取语义信息，例如从图像中提取物体的 6 个自由度 (6-DoF) 姿势。在本文中，我们提出了一种方法，将最先进的基于人工智能的相机图像中的物体姿态估计器与来自惯性测量单元（IMU）的数据相结合，用于移动机器人的 6-DoF 多物体相对状态估计。基于人工智能的姿势估计器可以检测相机图像中的多个感兴趣的对象及其相对姿势。这些测量结果与最先进的传感器融合框架中的 IMU 数据融合。我们通过针对不同轨迹和任意放置物体数量的现实世界实验来说明我们提出的方法的可行性。我们证明，由于我们的方法具有自校准功能，结果可以可靠地重现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合AI视觉估计与IMU数据的六自由度多目标相对状态估计方法，并具备自校准能力。
AI.motivation: 无人机等移动机器人在关键基础设施检测中需要精确的相对定位能力，传统方法难以同时处理多目标语义信息与传感器数据融合。
AI.method: 将先进AI目标姿态估计器与IMU数据结合，通过传感器融合框架实现多目标相对状态估计，系统具备自校准特性以提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 真实场景实验验证了方法在不同轨迹和任意放置目标数量下的可行性，结果具有可重复性且依赖于自校准机制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过AI与IMU的协同融合，实现了具备自校准能力的多目标相对状态估计，为移动机器人应用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Lingke Kong,X. Sharon Qi,Qijin Shen,Jiacheng Wang,Jingyi Zhang,Yanle Hu,Qichao Zhou
title: Indescribable Multi-modal Spatial Evaluator
title_zh: 难以描述的多模态空间评估器
abstract: Multi-modal image registration spatially aligns two images with different distributions. One of its major challenges is that images acquired from different imaging machines have different imaging distributions, making it difficult to focus only on the spatial aspect of the images and ignore differences in distributions. In this study, we developed a self-supervised approach, Indescribable Multi-model Spatial Evaluator (IMSE), to address multi-modal image registration. IMSE creates an accurate multi-modal spatial evaluator to measure spatial differences between two images, and then optimizes registration by minimizing the error predicted of the evaluator. To optimize IMSE performance, we also proposed a new style enhancement method called Shuffle Remap which randomizes the image distribution into multiple segments, and then randomly disorders and remaps these segments, so that the distribution of the original image is changed. Shuffle Remap can help IMSE to predict the difference in spatial location from unseen target distributions. Our results show that IMSE outperformed the existing methods for registration using T1-T2 and CT-MRI datasets. IMSE also can be easily integrated into the traditional registration process, and can provide a convenient way to evaluate and visualize registration results. IMSE also has the potential to be used as a new paradigm for image-to-image translation. Our code is available at https://github.com/Kid-Liet/IMSE.
summary: Multi-modal image registration spatially aligns two images with different distributions. One of its major challenges is that images acquired from different imaging machines have different imaging distributions, making it difficult to focus only on the spatial aspect of the images and ignore differences in distributions. In this study, we developed a self-supervised approach, Indescribable Multi-model Spatial Evaluator (IMSE), to address multi-modal image registration. IMSE creates an accurate multi-modal spatial evaluator to measure spatial differences between two images, and then optimizes registration by minimizing the error predicted of the evaluator. To optimize IMSE performance, we also proposed a new style enhancement method called Shuffle Remap which randomizes the image distribution into multiple segments, and then randomly disorders and remaps these segments, so that the distribution of the original image is changed. Shuffle Remap can help IMSE to predict the difference in spatial location from unseen target distributions. Our results show that IMSE outperformed the existing methods for registration using T1-T2 and CT-MRI datasets. IMSE also can be easily integrated into the traditional registration process, and can provide a convenient way to evaluate and visualize registration results. IMSE also has the potential to be used as a new paradigm for image-to-image translation. Our code is available at https://github.com/Kid-Liet/IMSE.
abstract_zh: 多模态图像配准在空间上对齐具有不同分布的两个图像。其主要挑战之一是从不同成像机器获取的图像具有不同的成像分布，使得很难仅关注图像的空间方面而忽略分布的差异。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种自监督方法，即不可描述的多模型空间评估器（IMSE），来解决多模态图像配准问题。 IMSE 创建精确的多模态空间评估器来测量两个图像之间的空间差异，然后通过最小化评估器的预测误差来优化配准。为了优化 IMSE 性能，我们还提出了一种名为 Shuffle Remap 的新风格增强方法，该方法将图像分布随机化为多个片段，然后随机打乱并重新映射这些片段，从而改变原始图像的分布。 Shuffle Remap 可以帮助 IMSE 预测未见过的目标分布的空间位置差异。我们的结果表明，IMSE 优于使用 T1-T2 和 CT-MRI 数据集的现有配准方法。 IMSE还可以轻松集成到传统的注册流程中，并可以提供一种便捷的方式来评估和可视化注册结果。 IMSE 还有潜力被用作图像到图像转换的新范例。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Kid-Liet/IMSE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督方法IMSE，用于解决多模态图像配准问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态图像配准面临来自不同成像设备的图像分布差异问题，使得仅关注空间对齐变得困难。
AI.method: 本文开发了IMSE方法，通过创建多模态空间评估器来衡量图像间的空间差异，并优化配准过程。还提出了一种新的风格增强方法Shuffle Remap，用于改变图像分布。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，IMSE在T1-T2和CT-MRI数据集上的配准效果优于现有方法，并可集成到传统配准流程中。
AI.conclusion: IMSE为多模态图像配准提供了一种新范式，并具有图像到图像翻译的潜力。

authors_text: Martin Feder,Michal Horovitz,Assaf Chen,Raphael Linker,Ofer M. Shir
title: Lessons Learned Report: Super-Resolution for Detection Tasks in Engineering Problem-Solving
title_zh: 经验教训报告：工程问题解决中检测任务的超分辨率
abstract: We describe the lessons learned from targeting agricultural detection problem-solving, when subject to low resolution input maps, by means of Machine Learning-based super-resolution approaches. The underlying domain is the so-called agro-detection class of problems, and the specific objective is to learn a complementary ensemble of sporadic input maps. While super-resolution algorithms are branded with the capacity to enhance various attractive features in generic photography, we argue that they must meet certain requirements, and more importantly, that their outcome does not necessarily guarantee an improvement in engineering detection problem-solving (unlike so-called aesthetics/artistic super-resolution in ImageNet-like datasets). By presenting specific data-driven case studies, we outline a set of limitations and recommendations for deploying super-resolution algorithms for agro-detection problems. Another conclusion states that super-resolution algorithms can be used for learning missing spectral channels, and that their usage may result in some desired side-effects such as channels' synchronization.
summary: We describe the lessons learned from targeting agricultural detection problem-solving, when subject to low resolution input maps, by means of Machine Learning-based super-resolution approaches. The underlying domain is the so-called agro-detection class of problems, and the specific objective is to learn a complementary ensemble of sporadic input maps. While super-resolution algorithms are branded with the capacity to enhance various attractive features in generic photography, we argue that they must meet certain requirements, and more importantly, that their outcome does not necessarily guarantee an improvement in engineering detection problem-solving (unlike so-called aesthetics/artistic super-resolution in ImageNet-like datasets). By presenting specific data-driven case studies, we outline a set of limitations and recommendations for deploying super-resolution algorithms for agro-detection problems. Another conclusion states that super-resolution algorithms can be used for learning missing spectral channels, and that their usage may result in some desired side-effects such as channels' synchronization.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了通过基于机器学习的超分辨率方法，在低分辨率输入地图的情况下，从针对农业检测问题解决中吸取的经验教训。底层领域是所谓的农业检测类问题，具体目标是学习零星输入图的互补集合。虽然超分辨率算法被认为能够增强通用摄影中各种有吸引力的特征，但我们认为它们必须满足某些要求，更重要的是，它们的结果不一定能保证工程检测问题解决的改进（与 ImageNet 类数据集中所谓的美学/艺术超分辨率不同）。通过提供具体的数据驱动案例研究，我们概述了针对农业检测问题部署超分辨率算法的一系列限制和建议。另一个结论指出，超分辨率算法可用于学习丢失的光谱通道，并且它们的使用可能会导致一些所需的副作用，例如通道同步。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在农业检测工程问题中应用超分辨率技术的经验教训，分析其有效性及限制。
AI.motivation: 低分辨率输入地图影响农业检测任务效果，但超分辨率算法在工程检测中的实际效益存在不确定性，需针对性研究。
AI.method: 通过机器学习超分辨率方法处理农业检测的低分辨率输入地图，并结合案例研究验证其效果。
AI.result: 发现超分辨率算法在农业检测中存在局限性，需满足特定条件；同时可辅助学习缺失光谱通道并实现通道同步等附加效果。
AI.conclusion: 超分辨率技术在工程检测中的应用需谨慎评估需求，其效果依赖于具体场景，可能产生非预期的附加价值。

authors_text: Max Pascher,Uwe Gruenefeld,Stefan Schneegass,Jens Gerken
title: How to Communicate Robot Motion Intent: A Scoping Review
title_zh: 如何传达机器人运动意图：范围界定审查
comment: Interactive Data Visualization of the Paper Corpus: https://rmi.robot-research.de
comments: Interactive Data Visualization of the Paper Corpus: https://rmi.robot-research.de
abstract: Robots are becoming increasingly omnipresent in our daily lives, supporting us and carrying out autonomous tasks. In Human-Robot Interaction, human actors benefit from understanding the robot's motion intent to avoid task failures and foster collaboration. Finding effective ways to communicate this intent to users has recently received increased research interest. However, no common language has been established to systematize robot motion intent. This work presents a scoping review aimed at unifying existing knowledge. Based on our analysis, we present an intent communication model that depicts the relationship between robot and human through different intent dimensions (intent type, intent information, intent location). We discuss these different intent dimensions and their interrelationships with different kinds of robots and human roles. Throughout our analysis, we classify the existing research literature along our intent communication model, allowing us to identify key patterns and possible directions for future research.
summary: Robots are becoming increasingly omnipresent in our daily lives, supporting us and carrying out autonomous tasks. In Human-Robot Interaction, human actors benefit from understanding the robot's motion intent to avoid task failures and foster collaboration. Finding effective ways to communicate this intent to users has recently received increased research interest. However, no common language has been established to systematize robot motion intent. This work presents a scoping review aimed at unifying existing knowledge. Based on our analysis, we present an intent communication model that depicts the relationship between robot and human through different intent dimensions (intent type, intent information, intent location). We discuss these different intent dimensions and their interrelationships with different kinds of robots and human roles. Throughout our analysis, we classify the existing research literature along our intent communication model, allowing us to identify key patterns and possible directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 机器人在我们的日常生活中变得越来越普遍，为我们提供支持并执行自主任务。在人机交互中，人类参与者受益于理解机器人的运动意图，以避免任务失败并促进协作。最近，寻找有效的方法向用户传达这一意图引起了越来越多的研究兴趣。然而，尚未建立通用语言来系统化机器人运动意图。这项工作提出了旨在统一现有知识的范围界定审查。根据我们的分析，我们提出了一个意图通信模型，通过不同的意图维度（意图类型、意图信息、意图位置）来描述机器人和人类之间的关系。我们讨论这些不同的意图维度及其与不同类型的机器人和人类角色的相互关系。在整个分析过程中，我们按照意图沟通模型对现有研究文献进行分类，从而使我们能够确定未来研究的关键模式和可能的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统综述方法，构建了一个机器人运动意图通信模型，以统一现有知识并明确未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人应用的普及，人类需理解机器人运动意图以避免任务失败并促进协作，但目前缺乏统一的描述框架。
AI.method: 采用系统综述方法，分析现有文献并按意图类型、信息和位置三个维度分类，建立意图通信模型。
AI.result: 提出包含三个意图维度的通信模型，分类现有研究并识别关键模式及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为机器人意图通信提供了系统化框架，揭示了不同机器人类型与人类角色间的交互关系，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Chenyang Liu,Jiajun Yang,Zipeng Qi,Zhengxia Zou,Zhenwei Shi
title: Progressive Scale-aware Network for Remote sensing Image Change Captioning
title_zh: 用于遥感图像变化字幕的渐进式尺度感知网络
comment: IGARSS 2023 - 2023 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium
comments: IGARSS 2023 - 2023 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium
abstract: Remote sensing (RS) images contain numerous objects of different scales, which poses significant challenges for the RS image change captioning (RSICC) task to identify visual changes of interest in complex scenes and describe them via language. However, current methods still have some weaknesses in sufficiently extracting and utilizing multi-scale information. In this paper, we propose a progressive scale-aware network (PSNet) to address the problem. PSNet is a pure Transformer-based model. To sufficiently extract multi-scale visual features, multiple progressive difference perception (PDP) layers are stacked to progressively exploit the differencing features of bitemporal features. To sufficiently utilize the extracted multi-scale features for captioning, we propose a scale-aware reinforcement (SR) module and combine it with the Transformer decoding layer to progressively utilize the features from different PDP layers. Experiments show that the PDP layer and SR module are effective and our PSNet outperforms previous methods. Our code is public at https://github.com/Chen-Yang-Liu/PSNet
summary: Remote sensing (RS) images contain numerous objects of different scales, which poses significant challenges for the RS image change captioning (RSICC) task to identify visual changes of interest in complex scenes and describe them via language. However, current methods still have some weaknesses in sufficiently extracting and utilizing multi-scale information. In this paper, we propose a progressive scale-aware network (PSNet) to address the problem. PSNet is a pure Transformer-based model. To sufficiently extract multi-scale visual features, multiple progressive difference perception (PDP) layers are stacked to progressively exploit the differencing features of bitemporal features. To sufficiently utilize the extracted multi-scale features for captioning, we propose a scale-aware reinforcement (SR) module and combine it with the Transformer decoding layer to progressively utilize the features from different PDP layers. Experiments show that the PDP layer and SR module are effective and our PSNet outperforms previous methods. Our code is public at https://github.com/Chen-Yang-Liu/PSNet
abstract_zh: 遥感（RS）图像包含大量不同尺度的物体，这对遥感图像变化字幕（RSICC）任务识别复杂场景中感兴趣的视觉变化并通过语言描述它们提出了重大挑战。然而，当前的方法在充分提取和利用多尺度信息方面仍然存在一些弱点。在本文中，我们提出了一种渐进式尺度感知网络（PSNet）来解决该问题。 PSNet 是一个纯粹基于 Transformer 的模型。为了充分提取多尺度视觉特征，堆叠多个渐进差异感知（PDP）层以逐步利用双时态特征的差异特征。为了充分利用提取的多尺度特征进行字幕，我们提出了一个尺度感知强化（SR）模块，并将其与 Transformer 解码层相结合，以逐步利用来自不同 PDP 层的特征。实验表明 PDP 层和 SR 模块是有效的，我们的 PSNet 优于以前的方法。我们的代码公开于 https://github.com/Chen-Yang-Liu/PSNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的渐进式尺度感知网络（PSNet），用于解决遥感图像变化描述任务中多尺度信息提取和利用不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像包含不同尺度的复杂目标，现有方法在充分提取和利用多尺度信息以准确描述变化方面存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计了渐进式差异感知（PDP）层堆叠以逐步提取双时相特征差异，并结合尺度感知强化（SR）模块与Transformer解码层，实现多尺度特征的渐进式利用。
AI.result: 实验表明PDP层和SR模块有效，PSNet在多个指标上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PSNet通过多尺度特征的渐进式处理，显著提升了遥感图像变化描述的性能。

result: 实验表明PDP层和SR模块有效，PSNet在多个指标上优于现有方法。
conclusion: PSNet通过多尺度特征的渐进式处理，显著提升了遥感图像变化描述的性能。
search_text: Progressive Scale-aware Network for Remote sensing Image Change Captioning 用于遥感图像变化字幕的渐进式尺度感知网络 Remote sensing (RS) images contain numerous objects of different scales, which poses significant challenges for the RS image change captioning (RSICC) task to identify visual changes of interest in complex scenes and describe them via language. However, current methods still have some weaknesses in sufficiently extracting and utilizing multi-scale information. In this paper, we propose a progressive scale-aware network (PSNet) to address the problem. PSNet is a pure Transformer-based model. To sufficiently extract multi-scale visual features, multiple progressive difference perception (PDP) layers are stacked to progressively exploit the differencing features of bitemporal features. To sufficiently utilize the extracted multi-scale features for captioning, we propose a scale-aware reinforcement (SR) module and combine it with the Transformer decoding layer to progressively utilize the features from different PDP layers. Experiments show that the PDP layer and SR module are effective and our PSNet outperforms previous methods. Our code is public at https://github.com/Chen-Yang-Liu/PSNet 遥感（RS）图像包含大量不同尺度的物体，这对遥感图像变化字幕（RSICC）任务识别复杂场景中感兴趣的视觉变化并通过语言描述它们提出了重大挑战。然而，当前的方法在充分提取和利用多尺度信息方面仍然存在一些弱点。在本文中，我们提出了一种渐进式尺度感知网络（PSNet）来解决该问题。 PSNet 是一个纯粹基于 Transformer 的模型。为了充分提取多尺度视觉特征，堆叠多个渐进差异感知（PDP）层以逐步利用双时态特征的差异特征。为了充分利用提取的多尺度特征进行字幕，我们提出了一个尺度感知强化（SR）模块，并将其与 Transformer 解码层相结合，以逐步利用来自不同 PDP 层的特征。实验表明 PDP 层和 SR 模块是有效的，我们的 PSNet 优于以前的方法。我们的代码公开于 https://github.com/Chen-Yang-Liu/PSNet 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的渐进式尺度感知网络（PSNet），用于解决遥感图像变化描述任务中多尺度信息提取和利用不足的问题。 Chenyang Liu,Jiajun Yang,Zipeng Qi,Zhengxia Zou,Zhenwei Shi cs.CV

authors_text: Yinhuai Wang,Jiwen Yu,Runyi Yu,Jian Zhang
title: Unlimited-Size Diffusion Restoration
title_zh: 无限尺寸扩散恢复
abstract: Recently, using diffusion models for zero-shot image restoration (IR) has become a new hot paradigm. This type of method only needs to use the pre-trained off-the-shelf diffusion models, without any finetuning, and can directly handle various IR tasks. The upper limit of the restoration performance depends on the pre-trained diffusion models, which are in rapid evolution. However, current methods only discuss how to deal with fixed-size images, but dealing with images of arbitrary sizes is very important for practical applications. This paper focuses on how to use those diffusion-based zero-shot IR methods to deal with any size while maintaining the excellent characteristics of zero-shot. A simple way to solve arbitrary size is to divide it into fixed-size patches and solve each patch independently. But this may yield significant artifacts since it neither considers the global semantics of all patches nor the local information of adjacent patches. Inspired by the Range-Null space Decomposition, we propose the Mask-Shift Restoration to address local incoherence and propose the Hierarchical Restoration to alleviate out-of-domain issues. Our simple, parameter-free approaches can be used not only for image restoration but also for image generation of unlimited sizes, with the potential to be a general tool for diffusion models. Code: https://github.com/wyhuai/DDNM/tree/main/hq_demo
summary: Recently, using diffusion models for zero-shot image restoration (IR) has become a new hot paradigm. This type of method only needs to use the pre-trained off-the-shelf diffusion models, without any finetuning, and can directly handle various IR tasks. However, current methods only discuss how to deal with fixed-size images, but dealing with images of arbitrary sizes is very important for practical applications. This paper focuses on how to use those diffusion-based zero-shot IR methods to deal with any size while maintaining the excellent characteristics of zero-shot. A simple way to solve arbitrary size is to divide it into fixed-size patches and solve each patch independently. But this may yield significant artifacts since it neither considers the global semantics of all patches nor the local information of adjacent patches. Inspired by the Range-Null space Decomposition, we propose the Mask-Shift Restoration to address local incoherence and propose the Hierarchical Restoration to alleviate out-of-domain issues. Our simple, parameter-free approaches can be used not only for image restoration but also for image generation of unlimited sizes, with the potential to be a general tool for diffusion models. Code: https://github.com/wyhuai/DDNM/tree/main/hq_demo
abstract_zh: 最近，使用扩散模型进行零样本图像恢复（IR）已成为新的热门范例。这类方法只需要使用预先训练好的现成扩散模型，无需任何微调，可以直接处理各种IR任务。恢复性能的上限取决于预训练的扩散模型，该模型正在快速演化。然而，当前的方法只讨论如何处理固定尺寸的图像，而处理任意尺寸的图像对于实际应用来说非常重要。本文重点讨论如何使用基于扩散的零射击红外方法来处理任何尺寸，同时保持零射击的优良特性。解决任意大小的一个简单方法是将其划分为固定大小的补丁并独立求解每个补丁。但这可能会产生显着的伪影，因为它既没有考虑所有补丁的全局语义，也没有考虑相邻补丁的局部信息。受范围-零空间分解的启发，我们提出掩模移位恢复来解决局部不连贯性，并提出分层恢复来缓解域外问题。我们简单、无参数的方法不仅可以用于图像恢复，还可以用于生成无限大小的图像，有可能成为扩散模型的通用工具。代码：https://github.com/wyhuai/DDNM/tree/main/hq_demo

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的无限尺寸图像修复方法，解决任意尺寸图像处理中的局部不一致和领域外问题。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本图像修复方法仅适用于固定尺寸图像，难以处理实际应用中任意尺寸的图像，且简单分块处理会导致显著伪影。
AI.method: 提出Mask-Shift修复（解决局部不一致性）和分层修复（缓解领域外问题）两种参数-free方法，结合范围-零空间分解思想实现无限尺寸处理。
AI.result: 方法在保持零样本特性的同时，可处理任意尺寸图像修复与生成，验证了其作为扩散模型通用工具的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究突破了传统方法的尺寸限制，为扩散模型在无限尺寸场景下的应用提供了简单有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Ivan Diaz,Mario Geiger,Richard Iain McKinley
title: Leveraging SO(3)-steerable convolutions for pose-robust semantic segmentation in 3D medical data
title_zh: 利用 SO(3) 可控卷积在 3D 医学数据中实现姿势鲁棒语义分割
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2024:010
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2024:010
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) allow for parameter sharing and translational equivariance by using convolutional kernels in their linear layers. By restricting these kernels to be SO(3)-steerable, CNNs can further improve parameter sharing. These rotationally-equivariant convolutional layers have several advantages over standard convolutional layers, including increased robustness to unseen poses, smaller network size, and improved sample efficiency. Despite this, most segmentation networks used in medical image analysis continue to rely on standard convolutional kernels. In this paper, we present a new family of segmentation networks that use equivariant voxel convolutions based on spherical harmonics. These networks are robust to data poses not seen during training, and do not require rotation-based data augmentation during training. In addition, we demonstrate improved segmentation performance in MRI brain tumor and healthy brain structure segmentation tasks, with enhanced robustness to reduced amounts of training data and improved parameter efficiency. Code to reproduce our results, and to implement the equivariant segmentation networks for other tasks is available at http://github.com/SCAN-NRAD/e3nn_Unet
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) allow for parameter sharing and translational equivariance by using convolutional kernels in their linear layers. By restricting these kernels to be SO(3)-steerable, CNNs can further improve parameter sharing. These rotationally-equivariant convolutional layers have several advantages over standard convolutional layers, including increased robustness to unseen poses, smaller network size, and improved sample efficiency. Despite this, most segmentation networks used in medical image analysis continue to rely on standard convolutional kernels. In this paper, we present a new family of segmentation networks that use equivariant voxel convolutions based on spherical harmonics. These networks are robust to data poses not seen during training, and do not require rotation-based data augmentation during training. In addition, we demonstrate improved segmentation performance in MRI brain tumor and healthy brain structure segmentation tasks, with enhanced robustness to reduced amounts of training data and improved parameter efficiency. Code to reproduce our results, and to implement the equivariant segmentation networks for other tasks is available at http://github.com/SCAN-NRAD/e3nn_Unet
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 通过在其线性层中使用卷积核来实现参数共享和平移等变。通过将这些内核限制为 SO(3) 可操纵，CNN 可以进一步改进参数共享。 These rotationally-equivariant convolutional layers have several advantages over standard convolutional layers, including increased robustness to unseen poses, smaller network size, and improved sample efficiency.尽管如此，医学图像分析中使用的大多数分割网络仍然依赖于标准卷积核。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的分割网络家族，它使用基于球谐函数的等变体素卷积。这些网络对于训练期间未见的数据姿势具有鲁棒性，并且在训练期间不需要基于旋转的数据增强。 In addition, we demonstrate improved segmentation performance in MRI brain tumor and healthy brain structure segmentation tasks, with enhanced robustness to reduced amounts of training data and improved parameter efficiency. Code to reproduce our results, and to implement the equivariant segmentation networks for other tasks is available at http://github.com/SCAN-NRAD/e3nn_Unet

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SO(3)-可旋转卷积的3D医学图像语义分割方法，通过球谐函数实现等变体素卷积，提升对未见姿态的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统医学图像分割网络依赖标准卷积核，难以处理训练中未见的3D姿态变化，且需依赖旋转数据增强，限制了模型效率与泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计基于球谐函数的等变体素卷积层，构建参数共享的SO(3)-可旋转网络架构，无需旋转增强即可实现姿态鲁棒的分割。
AI.result: 在脑肿瘤及健康脑结构分割任务中，相较基准模型在少量训练数据下提升分割性能，同时减少参数量并保持高效推理。
AI.conclusion: 等变卷积为医学图像分析提供了姿态鲁棒且参数高效的解决方案，代码开源便于扩展至其他任务。

authors_text: Fan Wang,Adams Wai-Kin Kong
title: A Practical Upper Bound for the Worst-Case Attribution Deviations
title_zh: 最坏情况归因偏差的实用上限
abstract: Model attribution is a critical component of deep neural networks (DNNs) for its interpretability to complex models. Recent studies bring up attention to the security of attribution methods as they are vulnerable to attribution attacks that generate similar images with dramatically different attributions. Existing works have been investigating empirically improving the robustness of DNNs against those attacks; however, none of them explicitly quantifies the actual deviations of attributions. In this work, for the first time, a constrained optimization problem is formulated to derive an upper bound that measures the largest dissimilarity of attributions after the samples are perturbed by any noises within a certain region while the classification results remain the same. Based on the formulation, different practical approaches are introduced to bound the attributions above using Euclidean distance and cosine similarity under both $\ell_2$ and $\ell_\infty$-norm perturbations constraints. The bounds developed by our theoretical study are validated on various datasets and two different types of attacks (PGD attack and IFIA attribution attack). Over 10 million attacks in the experiments indicate that the proposed upper bounds effectively quantify the robustness of models based on the worst-case attribution dissimilarities.
summary: Model attribution is a critical component of deep neural networks (DNNs) for its interpretability to complex models. Recent studies bring up attention to the security of attribution methods as they are vulnerable to attribution attacks that generate similar images with dramatically different attributions. Existing works have been investigating empirically improving the robustness of DNNs against those attacks; however, none of them explicitly quantifies the actual deviations of attributions. In this work, for the first time, a constrained optimization problem is formulated to derive an upper bound that measures the largest dissimilarity of attributions after the samples are perturbed by any noises within a certain region while the classification results remain the same. Based on the formulation, different practical approaches are introduced to bound the attributions above using Euclidean distance and cosine similarity under both $\ell_2$ and $\ell_\infty$-norm perturbations constraints. The bounds developed by our theoretical study are validated on various datasets and two different types of attacks (PGD attack and IFIA attribution attack). Over 10 million attacks in the experiments indicate that the proposed upper bounds effectively quantify the robustness of models based on the worst-case attribution dissimilarities.
abstract_zh: 模型归因因其对复杂模型的可解释性而成为深度神经网络 (DNN) 的关键组成部分。最近的研究引起了人们对归因方法安全性的关注，因为它们很容易受到归因攻击，这些攻击会生成具有显着不同归因的相似图像。现有的工作一直在实证研究如何提高 DNN 针对这些攻击的鲁棒性；然而，它们都没有明确量化归因的实际偏差。在这项工作中，首次制定了约束优化问题来推导出一个上限，该上限衡量样本受到某个区域内的任何噪声的干扰而分类结果保持不变后属性的最大差异。基于该公式，引入了不同的实用方法，在 $\ell_2$ 和 $\ell_\infty$-范数扰动约束下使用欧几里德距离和余弦相似度来限制上述属性。我们的理论研究开发的界限在各种数据集和两种不同类型的攻击（PGD 攻击和 IFIA 归因攻击）上得到了验证。实验中超过 1000 万次攻击表明，所提出的上限有效地量化了基于最坏情况归因差异的模型的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实际可行的上界方法，用于量化深度神经网络在最坏情况下归因偏差的最大值，以评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法易受攻击导致归因结果大幅波动，但缺乏对归因偏差的量化分析，难以有效提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建约束优化问题推导归因偏差上界，基于欧氏距离和余弦相似度，在ℓ₂和ℓ∞范数扰动下进行理论分析与实验验证。
AI.result: 在多个数据集及PGD/IFIA攻击下，超过1000万次实验表明所提上界能有效量化模型对归因攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 首次建立理论框架明确归因偏差上限，为模型安全性和可解释性研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Bilel Benjdira,Anis Koubaa,Ahmad Taher Azar,Zahid Khan,Adel Ammar,Wadii Boulila
title: TAU: A Framework for Video-Based Traffic Analytics Leveraging Artificial Intelligence and Unmanned Aerial Systems
title_zh: TAU：利用人工智能和无人机系统的基于视频的交通分析框架
comment: This is the final proofread version submitted to Elsevier EAAI: please see the published version at: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.engappai.2022.105095
comments: This is the final proofread version submitted to Elsevier EAAI: please see the published version at: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.engappai.2022.105095
abstract: Smart traffic engineering and intelligent transportation services are in increasing demand from governmental authorities to optimize traffic performance and thus reduce energy costs, increase the drivers' safety and comfort, ensure traffic laws enforcement, and detect traffic violations. In this paper, we address this challenge, and we leverage the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) to develop an AI-integrated video analytics framework, called TAU (Traffic Analysis from UAVs), for automated traffic analytics and understanding. Unlike previous works on traffic video analytics, we propose an automated object detection and tracking pipeline from video processing to advanced traffic understanding using high-resolution UAV images. TAU combines six main contributions. First, it proposes a pre-processing algorithm to adapt the high-resolution UAV image as input to the object detector without lowering the resolution. This ensures an excellent detection accuracy from high-quality features, particularly the small size of detected objects from UAV images. Second, it introduces an algorithm for recalibrating the vehicle coordinates to ensure that vehicles are uniquely identified and tracked across the multiple crops of the same frame. Third, it presents a speed calculation algorithm based on accumulating information from successive frames. Fourth, TAU counts the number of vehicles per traffic zone based on the Ray Tracing algorithm. Fifth, TAU has a fully independent algorithm for crossroad arbitration based on the data gathered from the different zones surrounding it. Sixth, TAU introduces a set of algorithms for extracting twenty-four types of insights from the raw data collected. The code is shared here: https://github.com/bilel-bj/TAU. Video demonstrations are provided here: https://youtu.be/wXJV0H7LviU and here: https://youtu.be/kGv0gmtVEbI.

This ensures an excellent detection accuracy from high-quality features, particularly the small size of detected objects from UAV images. Third, it presents a speed calculation algorithm based on accumulating information from successive frames. Fourth, TAU counts the number of vehicles per traffic zone based on the Ray Tracing algorithm. abstract_zh: 政府当局对智能交通工程和智能交通服务的需求越来越大，以优化交通性能，从而降低能源成本，提高驾驶员的安全性和舒适度，确保交通执法并检测交通违法行为。在本文中，我们应对这一挑战，并利用人工智能 (AI) 和无人机 (UAV) 开发人工智能集成视频分析框架，称为 TAU（无人机流量分析），用于自动流量分析和理解。与之前的交通视频分析工作不同，我们提出了一种自动对象检测和跟踪管道，从视频处理到使用高分辨率无人机图像的高级交通理解。 TAU 结合了六项主要贡献。首先，它提出了一种预处理算法，在不降低分辨率的情况下将高分辨率无人机图像调整为目标检测器的输入。这确保了高质量特征的出色检测精度，特别是从无人机图像中检测到的小尺寸物体。其次，它引入了一种重新校准车辆坐标的算法，以确保在同一帧的多个裁剪中唯一地识别和跟踪车辆。第三，提出了一种基于累积连续帧信息的速度计算算法。第四，TAU 基于光线追踪算法计算每个交通区域的车辆数量。第五，TAU 拥有完全独立的交叉仲裁算法，该算法基于从其周围不同区域收集的数据。第六，TAU 引入了一组算法，用于从收集的原始数据中提取 24 种类型的见解。代码在这里共享：https://github.com/bilel-bj/TAU。此处提供视频演示：https://youtu.be/wXJV0H7LviU 和此处：https://youtu.be/kGv0gmtVEbI。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAU框架，结合人工智能与无人机系统，实现基于视频的自动化交通分析与理解。
AI.motivation: 政府亟需优化交通性能以降低能耗、提升驾驶安全与舒适度、确保法规执行及违规检测，传统方法存在局限性。
AI.method: TAU包含六大贡献：高分辨率图像预处理算法、车辆坐标校准、基于多帧信息的速度计算、基于射线追踪的车辆计数、交叉路口仲裁算法及24类洞察提取算法。
AI.result: 实现自动化交通分析功能，提供代码库与视频演示，验证框架在交通监控与数据分析中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TAU通过整合AI与无人机技术，为智能交通管理提供高效解决方案，推动未来智慧城市交通系统发展。

authors_text: Guanghao Yin,Zefan Qu,Xinyang Jiang,Shan Jiang,Zhenhua Han,Ningxin Zheng,Xiaohong Liu,Huan Yang,Yuqing Yang,Dongsheng Li,Lili Qiu
title: Online Streaming Video Super-Resolution with Convolutional Look-Up Table
title_zh: 具有卷积查找表的在线流视频超分辨率
abstract: Online video streaming has fundamental limitations on the transmission bandwidth and computational capacity and super-resolution is a promising potential solution. However, applying existing video super-resolution methods to online streaming is non-trivial. Existing video codecs and streaming protocols (\eg, WebRTC) dynamically change the video quality both spatially and temporally, which leads to diverse and dynamic degradations. Furthermore, online streaming has a strict requirement for latency that most existing methods are less applicable. As a result, this paper focuses on the rarely exploited problem setting of online streaming video super resolution. To facilitate the research on this problem, a new benchmark dataset named LDV-WebRTC is constructed based on a real-world online streaming system. Leveraging the new benchmark dataset, we proposed a novel method specifically for online video streaming, which contains a convolution and Look-Up Table (LUT) hybrid model to achieve better performance-latency trade-off. To tackle the changing degradations, we propose a mixture-of-expert-LUT module, where a set of LUT specialized in different degradations are built and adaptively combined to handle different degradations. Experiments show our method achieves 720P video SR around 100 FPS, while significantly outperforms existing LUT-based methods and offers competitive performance compared to efficient CNN-based methods.
summary: Online video streaming has fundamental limitations on the transmission bandwidth and computational capacity and super-resolution is a promising potential solution. However, applying existing video super-resolution methods to online streaming is non-trivial. Existing video codecs and streaming protocols (\eg, WebRTC) dynamically change the video quality both spatially and temporally, which leads to diverse and dynamic degradations. Furthermore, online streaming has a strict requirement for latency that most existing methods are less applicable. As a result, this paper focuses on the rarely exploited problem setting of online streaming video super resolution. To facilitate the research on this problem, a new benchmark dataset named LDV-WebRTC is constructed based on a real-world online streaming system. Leveraging the new benchmark dataset, we proposed a novel method specifically for online video streaming, which contains a convolution and Look-Up Table (LUT) hybrid model to achieve better performance-latency trade-off. To tackle the changing degradations, we propose a mixture-of-expert-LUT module, where a set of LUT specialized in different degradations are built and adaptively combined to handle different degradations. Experiments show our method achieves 720P video SR around 100 FPS, while significantly outperforms existing LUT-based methods and offers competitive performance compared to efficient CNN-based methods.
abstract_zh: 在线视频流在传输带宽和计算能力方面存在根本限制，超分辨率是一种有前途的潜在解决方案。然而，将现有的视频超分辨率方法应用于在线流媒体并非易事。现有的视频编解码器和流协议（例如 WebRTC）会在空间和时间上动态改变视频质量，从而导致多样化的动态降级。此外，在线流媒体对延迟有严格的要求，大多数现有方法不太适用。因此，本文重点关注在线流视频超分辨率的很少被利用的问题设置。为了促进这一问题的研究，基于真实的在线流媒体系统构建了一个名为 LDV-WebRTC 的新基准数据集。利用新的基准数据集，我们提出了一种专门用于在线视频流的新颖方法，其中包含卷积和查找表（LUT）混合模型，以实现更好的性能与延迟权衡。为了应对不断变化的退化，我们提出了一个混合专家LUT模块，其中构建了一组专门针对不同退化的LUT并自适应组合以处理不同的退化。实验表明，我们的方法实现了 100 FPS 左右的 720P 视频 SR，同时显着优于现有的基于 LUT 的方法，并且与高效的基于 CNN 的方法相比，提供了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对在线流媒体视频的超分辨率方法，结合卷积神经网络与查找表（LUT）以解决带宽和延迟限制下的动态退化问题。
AI.motivation: 在线视频流媒体受带宽和计算能力限制，现有超分辨率方法难以应对动态质量变化和严格延迟要求，需专门优化。
AI.method: 设计卷积与LUT混合模型，并引入混合专家-LUT模块，通过不同退化专用LUT的自适应组合实现性能-延迟平衡。
AI.result: 在LDV-WebRTC数据集上实现720P视频超分辨率约100 FPS，显著优于现有LUT方法且性能接近高效CNN方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效应对在线流媒体的动态退化与低延迟需求，为该领域提供新的研究基准与解决方案。

search_text: Online Streaming Video Super-Resolution with Convolutional Look-Up Table 具有卷积查找表的在线流视频超分辨率 Online video streaming has fundamental limitations on the transmission bandwidth and computational capacity and super-resolution is a promising potential solution. However, applying existing video super-resolution methods to online streaming is non-trivial. Existing video codecs and streaming protocols (\eg, WebRTC) dynamically change the video quality both spatially and temporally, which leads to diverse and dynamic degradations. Furthermore, online streaming has a strict requirement for latency that most existing methods are less applicable. As a result, this paper focuses on the rarely exploited problem setting of online streaming video super resolution. To facilitate the research on this problem, a new benchmark dataset named LDV-WebRTC is constructed based on a real-world online streaming system. Leveraging the new benchmark dataset, we proposed a novel method specifically for online video streaming, which contains a convolution and Look-Up Table (LUT) hybrid model to achieve better performance-latency trade-off. To tackle the changing degradations, we propose a mixture-of-expert-LUT module, where a set of LUT specialized in different degradations are built and adaptively combined to handle different degradations. Experiments show our method achieves 720P video SR around 100 FPS, while significantly outperforms existing LUT-based methods and offers competitive performance compared to efficient CNN-based methods. 在线视频流在传输带宽和计算能力方面存在根本限制，超分辨率是一种有前途的潜在解决方案。然而，将现有的视频超分辨率方法应用于在线流媒体并非易事。现有的视频编解码器和流协议（例如 WebRTC）会在空间和时间上动态改变视频质量，从而导致多样化的动态降级。此外，在线流媒体对延迟有严格的要求，大多数现有方法不太适用。因此，本文重点关注在线流视频超分辨率的很少被利用的问题设置。为了促进这一问题的研究，基于真实的在线流媒体系统构建了一个名为 LDV-WebRTC 的新基准数据集。利用新的基准数据集，我们提出了一种专门用于在线视频流的新颖方法，其中包含卷积和查找表（LUT）混合模型，以实现更好的性能与延迟权衡。为了应对不断变化的退化，我们提出了一个混合专家LUT模块，其中构建了一组专门针对不同退化的LUT并自适应组合以处理不同的退化。实验表明，我们的方法实现了 100 FPS 左右的 720P 视频 SR，同时显着优于现有的基于 LUT 的方法，并且与高效的基于 CNN 的方法相比，提供了具有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种针对在线流媒体视频的超分辨率方法，结合卷积神经网络与查找表（LUT）以解决带宽和延迟限制下的动态退化问题。 Guanghao Yin,Zefan Qu,Xinyang Jiang,Shan Jiang,Zhenhua Han,Ningxin Zheng,Xiaohong Liu,Huan Yang,Yuqing Yang,Dongsheng Li,Lili Qiu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Hui Wang,Siqi Zheng,Yafeng Chen,Luyao Cheng,Qian Chen
title: CAM++: A Fast and Efficient Network for Speaker Verification Using Context-Aware Masking
title_zh: CAM++：使用上下文感知掩蔽的快速高效的说话人验证网络
abstract: Time delay neural network (TDNN) has been proven to be efficient for speaker verification. One of its successful variants, ECAPA-TDNN, achieved state-of-the-art performance at the cost of much higher computational complexity and slower inference speed. This makes it inadequate for scenarios with demanding inference rate and limited computational resources. We are thus interested in finding an architecture that can achieve the performance of ECAPA-TDNN and the efficiency of vanilla TDNN. In this paper, we propose an efficient network based on context-aware masking, namely CAM++, which uses densely connected time delay neural network (D-TDNN) as backbone and adopts a novel multi-granularity pooling to capture contextual information at different levels. Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks, VoxCeleb and CN-Celeb, demonstrate that the proposed architecture outperforms other mainstream speaker verification systems with lower computational cost and faster inference speed.
summary: Time delay neural network (TDNN) has been proven to be efficient for speaker verification. One of its successful variants, ECAPA-TDNN, achieved state-of-the-art performance at the cost of much higher computational complexity and slower inference speed. This makes it inadequate for scenarios with demanding inference rate and limited computational resources. We are thus interested in finding an architecture that can achieve the performance of ECAPA-TDNN and the efficiency of vanilla TDNN. In this paper, we propose an efficient network based on context-aware masking, namely CAM++, which uses densely connected time delay neural network (D-TDNN) as backbone and adopts a novel multi-granularity pooling to capture contextual information at different levels. Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks, VoxCeleb and CN-Celeb, demonstrate that the proposed architecture outperforms other mainstream speaker verification systems with lower computational cost and faster inference speed.
abstract_zh: 时延神经网络 (TDNN) 已被证明对于说话人验证非常有效。它的成功变体之一 ECAPA-TDNN 以更高的计算复杂性和更慢的推理速度为代价实现了最先进的性能。这使得它不足以满足推理速率要求高且计算资源有限的场景。因此，我们有兴趣找到一种能够实现 ECAPA-TDNN 性能和普通 TDNN 效率的架构。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于上下文感知掩码的高效网络，即 CAM++，它使用密集连接的时延神经网络（D-TDNN）作为骨干，并采用新颖的多粒度池化来捕获不同级别的上下文信息。对 VoxCeleb 和 CN-Celeb 两个公共基准的大量实验表明，所提出的架构以更低的计算成本和更快的推理速度优于其他主流说话人验证系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAM++网络，通过上下文感知掩码技术提升说话人验证的效率与性能。
AI.motivation: ECAPA-TDNN虽性能优异但计算复杂度高、推理速度慢，难以满足实时性要求和资源受限场景的需求。
AI.method: 基于密集连接的时延神经网络（D-TDNN）框架，引入多粒度池化模块以捕捉不同层次的上下文信息，并采用上下文感知掩码机制优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb和CN-Celeb数据集上，CAM++在保持ECAPA-TDNN性能的同时，计算成本降低且推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: CAM++通过上下文感知掩码与多粒度池化设计，在说话人验证任务中实现了性能与效率的平衡，适用于资源受限场景。

authors_text: Zikai Sun,Thierry Blu
title: Empowering Networks With Scale and Rotation Equivariance Using A Similarity Convolution
title_zh: 使用相似卷积为网络提供尺度和旋转等变性
abstract: The translational equivariant nature of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is a reason for its great success in computer vision. However, networks do not enjoy more general equivariance properties such as rotation or scaling, ultimately limiting their generalization performance. To address this limitation, we devise a method that endows CNNs with simultaneous equivariance with respect to translation, rotation, and scaling. Our approach defines a convolution-like operation and ensures equivariance based on our proposed scalable Fourier-Argand representation. The method maintains similar efficiency as a traditional network and hardly introduces any additional learnable parameters, since it does not face the computational issue that often occurs in group-convolution operators. We validate the efficacy of our approach in the image classification task, demonstrating its robustness and the generalization ability to both scaled and rotated inputs.
summary: The translational equivariant nature of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is a reason for its great success in computer vision. However, networks do not enjoy more general equivariance properties such as rotation or scaling, ultimately limiting their generalization performance. To address this limitation, we devise a method that endows CNNs with simultaneous equivariance with respect to translation, rotation, and scaling. Our approach defines a convolution-like operation and ensures equivariance based on our proposed scalable Fourier-Argand representation. The method maintains similar efficiency as a traditional network and hardly introduces any additional learnable parameters, since it does not face the computational issue that often occurs in group-convolution operators. We validate the efficacy of our approach in the image classification task, demonstrating its robustness and the generalization ability to both scaled and rotated inputs.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）的平移等变性质是其在计算机视觉领域取得巨大成功的原因。然而，网络不具有更一般的等方差属性，例如旋转或缩放，最终限制了它们的泛化性能。为了解决这个限制，我们设计了一种方法，赋予 CNN 在平移、旋转和缩放方面同时等方差的能力。我们的方法定义了类似卷积的运算，并确保基于我们提出的可扩展傅立叶-阿甘表示的等方差。该方法保持与传统网络相似的效率，并且几乎不引入任何额外的可学习参数，因为它不面临组卷积算子中经常出现的计算问题。我们验证了我们的方法在图像分类任务中的有效性，证明了其鲁棒性以及对缩放和旋转输入的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型卷积方法，使卷积神经网络同时具备平移、旋转和尺度等变性，以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN仅具备平移等变性，缺乏对旋转和尺度变换的鲁棒性，导致在面对形变输入时泛化性能受限。
AI.method: 基于可扩展的傅里叶-阿朗德表示，设计相似性卷积操作，在保持计算效率的同时实现多尺度旋转等变性，无需引入额外可学习参数。
AI.result: 在图像分类任务中验证了方法有效性，模型对缩放和旋转输入展现出更强的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论严谨的等变性设计，在保持计算效率的前提下显著提升了CNN对几何变换的适应能力。

method: 基于可扩展的傅里叶-阿朗德表示，设计相似性卷积操作，在保持计算效率的同时实现多尺度旋转等变性，无需引入额外可学习参数。
result: 在图像分类任务中验证了方法有效性，模型对缩放和旋转输入展现出更强的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
conclusion: 该方法通过理论严谨的等变性设计，在保持计算效率的前提下显著提升了CNN对几何变换的适应能力。
search_text: Empowering Networks With Scale and Rotation Equivariance Using A Similarity Convolution 使用相似卷积为网络提供尺度和旋转等变性 The translational equivariant nature of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is a reason for its great success in computer vision. However, networks do not enjoy more general equivariance properties such as rotation or scaling, ultimately limiting their generalization performance. To address this limitation, we devise a method that endows CNNs with simultaneous equivariance with respect to translation, rotation, and scaling. Our approach defines a convolution-like operation and ensures equivariance based on our proposed scalable Fourier-Argand representation. The method maintains similar efficiency as a traditional network and hardly introduces any additional learnable parameters, since it does not face the computational issue that often occurs in group-convolution operators. We validate the efficacy of our approach in the image classification task, demonstrating its robustness and the generalization ability to both scaled and rotated inputs. 卷积神经网络（CNN）的平移等变性质是其在计算机视觉领域取得巨大成功的原因。然而，网络不具有更一般的等方差属性，例如旋转或缩放，最终限制了它们的泛化性能。为了解决这个限制，我们设计了一种方法，赋予 CNN 在平移、旋转和缩放方面同时等方差的能力。我们的方法定义了类似卷积的运算，并确保基于我们提出的可扩展傅立叶-阿甘表示的等方差。该方法保持与传统网络相似的效率，并且几乎不引入任何额外的可学习参数，因为它不面临组卷积算子中经常出现的计算问题。我们验证了我们的方法在图像分类任务中的有效性，证明了其鲁棒性以及对缩放和旋转输入的泛化能力。 本文提出一种新型卷积方法，使卷积神经网络同时具备平移、旋转和尺度等变性，以提升模型泛化能力。 Zikai Sun,Thierry Blu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ningquan Gu,Ruhan He,Lianqing Yu
title: DeFNet: Deconstructed Strategy for Multi-step Fabric Folding Tasks
title_zh: DefNet：多步织物折叠任务的解构策略
abstract: Fabric folding through robots is complex and challenging due to the deformability of fabric. Based on deconstruction strategy, we split the complex fabric folding task into three relatively simple sub-tasks, and propose a Deconstructed Fabric Folding Network (DeFNet), including corresponding three modules to solve them. (1) We use the Folding Planning Module (FPM), which is based on Latent Space Roadmap, to infer the most straight folding intermediate states from the start to the goal in latent space. (2) We utilize the flow-based approach, Folding Action Module (FAM), to calculate the action coordinates and execute them to reach the inferred intermediate state. (3) We introduce an Iterative Interactive Module (IIM) for fabric folding tasks, which can iteratively execute the FPM and FAM after every grasp-and-place action until the fabric reaches the goal. Experimentally, We demonstrated our method on multi-step fabric folding tasks against three baselines in simulation. We also apply the method to an existing robotic system and present its performance.
summary: Fabric folding through robots is complex and challenging due to the deformability of fabric. Based on deconstruction strategy, we split the complex fabric folding task into three relatively simple sub-tasks, and propose a Deconstructed Fabric Folding Network (DeFNet), including corresponding three modules to solve them. (1) We use the Folding Planning Module (FPM), which is based on Latent Space Roadmap, to infer the most straight folding intermediate states from the start to the goal in latent space. (2) We utilize the flow-based approach, Folding Action Module (FAM), to calculate the action coordinates and execute them to reach the inferred intermediate state. (3) We introduce an Iterative Interactive Module (IIM) for fabric folding tasks, which can iteratively execute the FPM and FAM after every grasp-and-place action until the fabric reaches the goal. Experimentally, We demonstrated our method on multi-step fabric folding tasks against three baselines in simulation. We also apply the method to an existing robotic system and present its performance.
abstract_zh: 由于织物的可变形性，通过机器人折叠织物是复杂且具有挑战性的。基于解构策略，我们将复杂的织物折叠任务拆分为三个相对简单的子任务，并提出了解构织物折叠网络（DeFNet），包括相应的三个模块来解决它们。 （1）我们使用基于潜在空间路线图的折叠规划模块（FPM）来推断潜在空间中从开始到目标的最直接的折叠中间状态。 （2）我们利用基于流的方法，折叠动作模块（FAM）来计算动作坐标并执行它们以达到推断的中间状态。 (3)我们为织物折叠任务引入了迭代交互模块(IIM)，它可以在每次抓取和放置动作后迭代执行FPM和FAM，直到织物到达目标。通过实验，我们在模拟中针对三个基线演示了我们的多步骤织物折叠任务方法。我们还将该方法应用于现有的机器人系统并展示其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分解策略的多步骤布料折叠方法DeFNet，通过三个模块化网络解决复杂折叠任务。
AI.motivation: 布料因可变形性导致机器人折叠任务复杂，传统方法难以处理多步骤折叠过程。
AI.method: 设计包含三个模块的DeFNet：1）基于潜在空间路线图的折叠规划模块（FPM）生成中间状态；2）基于流模型的动作计算模块（FAM）执行折叠动作；3）迭代交互模块（IIM）循环执行规划与动作直至完成。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中优于三个基线方法，并成功部署于现有机器人系统验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 分解策略与模块化设计有效解决了多步骤布料折叠难题，为复杂柔性物体操作提供新思路。

authors_text: Jiayuan Li,Pengcheng Shi,Qingwu Hu,Yongjun Zhang
title: RIFT2: Speeding-up RIFT with A New Rotation-Invariance Technique
title_zh: RIFT2：利用新的旋转不变技术加速 RIFT
abstract: Multimodal image matching is an important prerequisite for multisource image information fusion. Compared with the traditional matching problem, multimodal feature matching is more challenging due to the severe nonlinear radiation distortion (NRD). Radiation-variation insensitive feature transform (RIFT)~\cite{li2019rift} has shown very good robustness to NRD and become a baseline method in multimodal feature matching. However, the high computational cost for rotation invariance largely limits its usage in practice. In this paper, we propose an improved RIFT method, called RIFT2. We develop a new rotation invariance technique based on dominant index value, which avoids the construction process of convolution sequence ring. Hence, it can speed up the running time and reduce the memory consumption of the original RIFT by almost 3 times in theory. Extensive experiments show that RIFT2 achieves similar matching performance to RIFT while being much faster and having less memory consumption. The source code will be made publicly available in \url{https://github.com/LJY-RS/RIFT2-multimodal-matching-rotation}
summary: Multimodal image matching is an important prerequisite for multisource image information fusion. Compared with the traditional matching problem, multimodal feature matching is more challenging due to the severe nonlinear radiation distortion (NRD). Radiation-variation insensitive feature transform (RIFT)~\cite{li2019rift} has shown very good robustness to NRD and become a baseline method in multimodal feature matching. However, the high computational cost for rotation invariance largely limits its usage in practice. In this paper, we propose an improved RIFT method, called RIFT2. We develop a new rotation invariance technique based on dominant index value, which avoids the construction process of convolution sequence ring. Hence, it can speed up the running time and reduce the memory consumption of the original RIFT by almost 3 times in theory. Extensive experiments show that RIFT2 achieves similar matching performance to RIFT while being much faster and having less memory consumption. The source code will be made publicly available in \url{https://github.com/LJY-RS/RIFT2-multimodal-matching-rotation}
abstract_zh: Multimodal image matching is an important prerequisite for multisource image information fusion.与传统的匹配问题相比，由于严重的非线性辐射失真（NRD），多模态特征匹配更具挑战性。辐射变化不敏感特征变换（RIFT）~\cite{li2019rift} 对 NRD 表现出非常好的鲁棒性，并成为多模态特征匹配中的基线方法。 However, the high computational cost for rotation invariance largely limits its usage in practice. In this paper, we propose an improved RIFT method, called RIFT2.我们开发了一种基于主导索引值的新旋转不变性技术，避免了卷积序列环的构造过程。 Hence, it can speed up the running time and reduce the memory consumption of the original RIFT by almost 3 times in theory. Extensive experiments show that RIFT2 achieves similar matching performance to RIFT while being much faster and having less memory consumption. The source code will be made publicly available in \url{https://github.com/LJY-RS/RIFT2-multimodal-matching-rotation}

AI.tldr: 本文提出RIFT2方法，通过改进旋转不变性技术加速多模态图像匹配。
AI.motivation: 传统RIFT方法在处理非线性辐射失真时表现优异，但其旋转不变性计算成本过高限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 基于主导索引值设计新型旋转不变性技术，避免构建卷积序列环，理论可使运行时间减少3倍。
AI.result: 实验表明RIFT2在保持匹配性能的同时，显著提升运算速度并降低内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: RIFT2有效解决了RIFT的计算瓶颈，为多模态图像匹配提供了更高效的解决方案。
