authors_text: Yuka Okuda,Katsuhito Sudoh,Seitaro Shinagawa,Satoshi Nakamura
title: Modeling Multiple User Interests using Hierarchical Knowledge for Conversational Recommender System
title_zh: 使用会话推荐系统的分层知识对多个用户兴趣进行建模
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at IWSDS 2023
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at IWSDS 2023
abstract: A conversational recommender system (CRS) is a practical application for item recommendation through natural language conversation. Such a system estimates user interests for appropriate personalized recommendations. Users sometimes have various interests in different categories or genres, but existing studies assume a unique user interest that can be covered by closely related items. In this work, we propose to model such multiple user interests in CRS. We investigated its effects in experiments using the ReDial dataset and found that the proposed method can recommend a wider variety of items than that of the baseline CR-Walker.
summary: A conversational recommender system (CRS) is a practical application for item recommendation through natural language conversation. Such a system estimates user interests for appropriate personalized recommendations. Users sometimes have various interests in different categories or genres, but existing studies assume a unique user interest that can be covered by closely related items. In this work, we propose to model such multiple user interests in CRS. We investigated its effects in experiments using the ReDial dataset and found that the proposed method can recommend a wider variety of items than that of the baseline CR-Walker.
abstract_zh: A conversational recommender system (CRS) is a practical application for item recommendation through natural language conversation. Such a system estimates user interests for appropriate personalized recommendations.用户有时对不同的类别或类型有不同的兴趣，但现有的研究假设独特的用户兴趣可以被密切相关的项目覆盖。 In this work, we propose to model such multiple user interests in CRS.我们使用 ReDial 数据集在实验中研究了其效果，发现所提出的方法可以推荐比基线 CR-Walker 更广泛的项目。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层知识的对话推荐系统方法，用于建模用户的多重兴趣以实现更个性化的推荐。
AI.motivation: 现有对话推荐系统假设用户兴趣单一，但实际用户可能具有跨类别的多样化兴趣，需改进以提升推荐多样性。
AI.method: 通过分层知识结构建模用户多重兴趣，结合对话上下文和物品类别信息进行个性化推荐。
AI.result: 在ReDial数据集实验中，该方法相比基线CR-Walker能推荐更多样化的物品，验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 分层建模用户多重兴趣可提升对话推荐系统的多样性，为个性化推荐提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.result: 在ReDial数据集实验中，该方法相比基线CR-Walker能推荐更多样化的物品，验证了有效性。

search_text: Modeling Multiple User Interests using Hierarchical Knowledge for Conversational Recommender System 使用会话推荐系统的分层知识对多个用户兴趣进行建模 A conversational recommender system (CRS) is a practical application for item recommendation through natural language conversation. Such a system estimates user interests for appropriate personalized recommendations. Users sometimes have various interests in different categories or genres, but existing studies assume a unique user interest that can be covered by closely related items. In this work, we propose to model such multiple user interests in CRS. We investigated its effects in experiments using the ReDial dataset and found that the proposed method can recommend a wider variety of items than that of the baseline CR-Walker. A conversational recommender system (CRS) is a practical application for item recommendation through natural language conversation. Such a system estimates user interests for appropriate personalized recommendations.用户有时对不同的类别或类型有不同的兴趣，但现有的研究假设独特的用户兴趣可以被密切相关的项目覆盖。 In this work, we propose to model such multiple user interests in CRS.我们使用 ReDial 数据集在实验中研究了其效果，发现所提出的方法可以推荐比基线 CR-Walker 更广泛的项目。 本文提出一种基于分层知识的对话推荐系统方法，用于建模用户的多重兴趣以实现更个性化的推荐。 Yuka Okuda,Katsuhito Sudoh,Seitaro Shinagawa,Satoshi Nakamura cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Wonjeong Ryoo,Giljoo Nam,Jae-Sang Hyun,Sangpil Kim
title: Event Fusion Photometric Stereo Network
title_zh: 事件融合光度立体网络
abstract: We present a novel method to estimate the surface normal of an object in an ambient light environment using RGB and event cameras. Modern photometric stereo methods rely on an RGB camera, mainly in a dark room, to avoid ambient illumination. To alleviate the limitations of the darkroom environment and to use essential light information, we employ an event camera with a high dynamic range and low latency. This is the first study that uses an event camera for the photometric stereo task, which works on continuous light sources and ambient light environment. In this work, we also curate a novel photometric stereo dataset that is constructed by capturing objects with event and RGB cameras under numerous ambient lights environment. Additionally, we propose a novel framework named Event Fusion Photometric Stereo Network~(EFPS-Net), which estimates the surface normals of an object using both RGB frames and event signals. Our proposed method interpolates event observation maps that generate light information with sparse event signals to acquire fluent light information. Subsequently, the event-interpolated observation maps are fused with the RGB observation maps. Our numerous experiments showed that EFPS-Net outperforms state-of-the-art methods on a dataset captured in the real world where ambient lights exist. Consequently, we demonstrate that incorporating additional modalities with EFPS-Net alleviates the limitations that occurred from ambient illumination.

abstract_zh: We present a novel method to estimate the surface normal of an object in an ambient light environment using RGB and event cameras. Modern photometric stereo methods rely on an RGB camera, mainly in a dark room, to avoid ambient illumination.为了减轻暗室环境的限制并使用必要的光信息，我们采用了具有高动态范围和低延迟的事件相机。这是第一项使用事件相机进行光度立体任务的研究，该任务适用于连续光源和环境光环境。在这项工作中，我们还策划了一个新颖的光度立体数据集，该数据集是通过在众多环境光环境下使用事件和 RGB 相机捕获对象而构建的。此外，我们提出了一种名为事件融合光度立体网络（EFPS-Net）的新颖框架，它使用 RGB 帧和事件信号来估计物体的表面法线。我们提出的方法对事件观测图进行插值，利用稀疏事件信号生成光信息，以获取流畅的光信息。 Subsequently, the event-interpolated observation maps are fused with the RGB observation maps.我们的大量实验表明，在存在环境光的现实世界中捕获的数据集上，EFPS-Net 的性能优于最先进的方法。因此，我们证明将附加模式与 EFPS-Net 结合可以减轻环境照明带来的限制。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合RGB和事件相机的新方法，在环境光下估计物体表面法线。
AI.motivation: 传统光度立体方法依赖暗室避免环境光，限制了其应用。事件相机具有高动态范围和低延迟，可有效利用环境光信息，从而解决暗室限制。
AI.method: 提出EFPS-Net框架，通过插值事件信号生成流畅光照信息，并与RGB观测图融合，以估计表面法线。
AI.result: 在包含环境光的真实世界数据集上，EFPS-Net优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合RGB和事件相机多模态数据能有效缓解环境光对表面法线估计的限制。

authors_text: Obin Kwon,Jeongho Park,Songhwai Oh
title: Renderable Neural Radiance Map for Visual Navigation
title_zh: 用于视觉导航的可渲染神经辐射图
comment: Preprint version. CVPR 2023 accepted, highlight paper. Project page: https://rllab-snu.github.io/projects/RNR-Map/
comments: Preprint version. CVPR 2023 accepted, highlight paper. Project page: https://rllab-snu.github.io/projects/RNR-Map/
abstract: We propose a novel type of map for visual navigation, a renderable neural radiance map (RNR-Map), which is designed to contain the overall visual information of a 3D environment. The RNR-Map has a grid form and consists of latent codes at each pixel. These latent codes are embedded from image observations, and can be converted to the neural radiance field which enables image rendering given a camera pose. The recorded latent codes implicitly contain visual information about the environment, which makes the RNR-Map visually descriptive. This visual information in RNR-Map can be a useful guideline for visual localization and navigation. We develop localization and navigation frameworks that can effectively utilize the RNR-Map. We evaluate the proposed frameworks on camera tracking, visual localization, and image-goal navigation. Experimental results show that the RNR-Map-based localization framework can find the target location based on a single query image with fast speed and competitive accuracy compared to other baselines. Also, this localization framework is robust to environmental changes, and even finds the most visually similar places when a query image from a different environment is given. The proposed navigation framework outperforms the existing image-goal navigation methods in difficult scenarios, under odometry and actuation noises. The navigation framework shows 65.7% success rate in curved scenarios of the NRNS dataset, which is an improvement of 18.6% over the current state-of-the-art. Project page: https://rllab-snu.github.io/projects/RNR-Map/

The RNR-Map has a grid form and consists of latent codes at each pixel. These latent codes are embedded from image observations, and can be converted to the neural radiance field which enables image rendering given a camera pose. The recorded latent codes implicitly contain visual information about the environment, which makes the RNR-Map visually descriptive. This visual information in RNR-Map can be a useful guideline for visual localization and navigation. We develop localization and navigation frameworks that can effectively utilize the RNR-Map. We evaluate the proposed frameworks on camera tracking, visual localization, and image-goal navigation. Experimental results show that the RNR-Map-based localization framework can find the target location based on a single query image with fast speed and competitive accuracy compared to other baselines. Also, this localization framework is robust to environmental changes, and even finds the most visually similar places when a query image from a different environment is given. The proposed navigation framework outperforms the existing image-goal navigation methods in difficult scenarios, under odometry and actuation noises. The navigation framework shows 65.7% success rate in curved scenarios of the NRNS dataset, which is an improvement of 18.6% over the current state-of-the-art. Project page: https://rllab-snu.github.io/projects/RNR-Map/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于视觉导航的新型地图，即可渲染神经辐射图（RNR-Map），其旨在包含 3D 环境的整体视觉信息。 The RNR-Map has a grid form and consists of latent codes at each pixel.这些潜在代码是从图像观察中嵌入的，并且可以转换为神经辐射场，从而能够在给定相机姿势的情况下渲染图像。 The recorded latent codes implicitly contain visual information about the environment, which makes the RNR-Map visually descriptive. RNR-Map 中的视觉信息可以为视觉定位和导航提供有用的指导。 We develop localization and navigation frameworks that can effectively utilize the RNR-Map.我们评估了所提出的相机跟踪、视觉定位和图像目标导航框架。实验结果表明，与其他基线相比，基于 RNR-Map 的定位框架可以基于单个查询图像找到目标位置，速度快，精度高。此外，该定位框架对环境变化具有鲁棒性，甚至在给出来自不同环境的查询图像时找到视觉上最相似的位置。在里程计和驱动噪声的困难场景中，所提出的导航框架优于现有的图像目标导航方法。该导航框架在 NRNS 数据集的弯曲场景中显示出 65.7% 的成功率，比当前最先进的技术提高了 18.6%。项目页面：https://rllab-snu.github.io/projects/RNR-Map/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可渲染的神经辐射图（RNR-Map），用于视觉导航任务，通过将环境视觉信息编码为网格中的潜在代码，实现高效定位与导航。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉导航方法在复杂环境和动态变化下存在定位精度低、鲁棒性差的问题，需一种能高效存储和利用视觉信息的新型地图表示。
AI.method: 构建网格结构的RNR-Map，每个像素存储从图像中嵌入的潜在代码，通过神经辐射场实现图像渲染；开发基于该地图的定位与导航框架，利用潜在代码进行视觉匹配与路径规划。
AI.result: 定位框架在单图像查询下达到竞争性精度，环境变化下仍能识别相似位置；导航框架在NRNS数据集曲率场景中成功率65.7%，较现有方法提升18.6%。
AI.conclusion: RNR-Map通过紧凑的视觉信息编码和高效渲染能力，显著提升了视觉导航的准确性与鲁棒性，为复杂环境下的自主导航提供了新思路。

The navigation framework shows 65.7% success rate in curved scenarios of the NRNS dataset, which is an improvement of 18.6% over the current state-of-the-art. RNR-Map 中的视觉信息可以为视觉定位和导航提供有用的指导。 We develop localization and navigation frameworks that can effectively utilize the RNR-Map.我们评估了所提出的相机跟踪、视觉定位和图像目标导航框架。实验结果表明，与其他基线相比，基于 RNR-Map 的定位框架可以基于单个查询图像找到目标位置，速度快，精度高。此外，该定位框架对环境变化具有鲁棒性，甚至在给出来自不同环境的查询图像时找到视觉上最相似的位置。在里程计和驱动噪声的困难场景中，所提出的导航框架优于现有的图像目标导航方法。该导航框架在 NRNS 数据集的弯曲场景中显示出 65.7% 的成功率，比当前最先进的技术提高了 18.6%。项目页面：https://rllab-snu.github.io/projects/RNR-Map/ 本文提出了一种可渲染的神经辐射图（RNR-Map），用于视觉导航任务，通过将环境视觉信息编码为网格中的潜在代码，实现高效定位与导航。 Obin Kwon,Jeongho Park,Songhwai Oh cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Mingming Zhang,Ye Du,Zhenghui Hu,Qingjie Liu,Yunhong Wang
title: BiSVP: Building Footprint Extraction via Bidirectional Serialized Vertex Prediction
title_zh: BiSVP：通过双向序列化顶点预测构建足迹提取
abstract: Extracting building footprints from remote sensing images has been attracting extensive attention recently. Dominant approaches address this challenging problem by generating vectorized building masks with cumbersome refinement stages, which limits the application of such methods. In this paper, we introduce a new refinement-free and end-to-end building footprint extraction method, which is conceptually intuitive, simple, and effective. Our method, termed as BiSVP, represents a building instance with ordered vertices and formulates the building footprint extraction as predicting the serialized vertices directly in a bidirectional fashion. Moreover, we propose a cross-scale feature fusion (CSFF) module to facilitate high resolution and rich semantic feature learning, which is essential for the dense building vertex prediction task. Without bells and whistles, our BiSVP outperforms state-of-the-art methods by considerable margins on three building instance segmentation benchmarks, clearly demonstrating its superiority. The code and datasets will be made public available.
summary: Extracting building footprints from remote sensing images has been attracting extensive attention recently. Dominant approaches address this challenging problem by generating vectorized building masks with cumbersome refinement stages, which limits the application of such methods. In this paper, we introduce a new refinement-free and end-to-end building footprint extraction method, which is conceptually intuitive, simple, and effective. Our method, termed as BiSVP, represents a building instance with ordered vertices and formulates the building footprint extraction as predicting the serialized vertices directly in a bidirectional fashion. Moreover, we propose a cross-scale feature fusion (CSFF) module to facilitate high resolution and rich semantic feature learning, which is essential for the dense building vertex prediction task. Without bells and whistles, our BiSVP outperforms state-of-the-art methods by considerable margins on three building instance segmentation benchmarks, clearly demonstrating its superiority. The code and datasets will be made public available.
abstract_zh: 从遥感图像中提取建筑物足迹最近引起了广泛的关注。主要方法通过生成具有繁琐细化阶段的矢量化建筑掩模来解决这一具有挑战性的问题，这限制了此类方法的应用。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新的无细化和端到端的建筑足迹提取方法，该方法在概念上直观、简单且有效。我们的方法称为 BiSVP，表示具有有序顶点的建筑实例，并将建筑占地面积提取公式化为直接以双向方式预测序列化顶点。此外，我们提出了一种跨尺度特征融合（CSFF）模块，以促进高分辨率和丰富的语义特征学习，这对于密集建筑顶点预测任务至关重要。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的 BiSVP 在三个建筑实例分割基准上明显优于最先进的方法，清楚地展示了其优越性。代码和数据集将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需精炼阶段的端到端建筑轮廓提取方法BiSVP，通过双向序列顶点预测直接生成建筑实例的有序顶点。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑轮廓提取方法依赖复杂的矢量化掩码精炼步骤，限制了方法的应用性，需开发更简洁有效的解决方案。
AI.method: BiSVP将建筑表示为有序顶点序列，采用双向预测方式直接生成顶点，并引入跨尺度特征融合模块（CSFF）以提升高分辨率和语义特征学习能力。
AI.result: 在三个建筑实例分割基准数据集上，BiSVP在无需额外优化的情况下显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: BiSVP通过简洁的双向顶点预测和跨尺度特征融合，证明了其在建筑轮廓提取任务中的优越性和有效性。

authors_text: Sen Yang,Wen Heng,Gang Liu,Guozhong Luo,Wankou Yang,Gang Yu
title: Capturing the motion of every joint: 3D human pose and shape estimation with independent tokens
title_zh: 捕获每个关节的运动：使用独立标记进行 3D 人体姿势和形状估计
abstract: In this paper we present a novel method to estimate 3D human pose and shape from monocular videos. This task requires directly recovering pixel-alignment 3D human pose and body shape from monocular images or videos, which is challenging due to its inherent ambiguity. To improve precision, existing methods highly rely on the initialized mean pose and shape as prior estimates and parameter regression with an iterative error feedback manner. In addition, video-based approaches model the overall change over the image-level features to temporally enhance the single-frame feature, but fail to capture the rotational motion at the joint level, and cannot guarantee local temporal consistency. To address these issues, we propose a novel Transformer-based model with a design of independent tokens. First, we introduce three types of tokens independent of the image feature: \textit{joint rotation tokens, shape token, and camera token}. By progressively interacting with image features through Transformer layers, these tokens learn to encode the prior knowledge of human 3D joint rotations, body shape, and position information from large-scale data, and are updated to estimate SMPL parameters conditioned on a given image. Second, benefiting from the proposed token-based representation, we further use a temporal model to focus on capturing the rotational temporal information of each joint, which is empirically conducive to preventing large jitters in local parts. Despite being conceptually simple, the proposed method attains superior performances on the 3DPW and Human3.6M datasets. Using ResNet-50 and Transformer architectures, it obtains 42.0 mm error on the PA-MPJPE metric of the challenging 3DPW, outperforming state-of-the-art counterparts by a large margin. Code will be publicly available at https://github.com/yangsenius/INT_HMR_Model
summary: In this paper we present a novel method to estimate 3D human pose and shape from monocular videos. This task requires directly recovering pixel-alignment 3D human pose and body shape from monocular images or videos, which is challenging due to its inherent ambiguity. To improve precision, existing methods highly rely on the initialized mean pose and shape as prior estimates and parameter regression with an iterative error feedback manner. In addition, video-based approaches model the overall change over the image-level features to temporally enhance the single-frame feature, but fail to capture the rotational motion at the joint level, and cannot guarantee local temporal consistency. To address these issues, we propose a novel Transformer-based model with a design of independent tokens. First, we introduce three types of tokens independent of the image feature: \textit{joint rotation tokens, shape token, and camera token}. By progressively interacting with image features through Transformer layers, these tokens learn to encode the prior knowledge of human 3D joint rotations, body shape, and position information from large-scale data, and are updated to estimate SMPL parameters conditioned on a given image. Second, benefiting from the proposed token-based representation, we further use a temporal model to focus on capturing the rotational temporal information of each joint, which is empirically conducive to preventing large jitters in local parts. Despite being conceptually simple, the proposed method attains superior performances on the 3DPW and Human3.6M datasets. Using ResNet-50 and Transformer architectures, it obtains 42.0 mm error on the PA-MPJPE metric of the challenging 3DPW, outperforming state-of-the-art counterparts by a large margin. Code will be publicly available at https://github.com/yangsenius/INT_HMR_Model
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种从单目视频估计 3D 人体姿势和形状的新方法。该任务需要直接从单目图像或视频中恢复像素对齐的 3D 人体姿势和身体形状，由于其固有的模糊性，这具有挑战性。为了提高精度，现有方法高度依赖于初始化的平均姿态和形状作为先前估计和具有迭代误差反馈方式的参数回归。此外，基于视频的方法对图像级特征的整体变化进行建模，以在时间上增强单帧特征，但无法捕获联合级别的旋转运动，并且无法保证局部时间一致性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新颖模型，并设计了独立的代币。首先，我们引入与图像特征无关的三种类型的标记：\textit{关节旋转标记、形状标记和相机标记}。通过 Transformer 层逐步与图像特征交互，这些标记学习对来自大规模数据的人类 3D 关节旋转、身体形状和位置信息的先验知识进行编码，并进行更新以估计给定图像条件下的 SMPL 参数。其次，受益于所提出的基于标记的表示，我们进一步使用时间模型来专注于捕获每个关节的旋转时间信息，这在经验上有利于防止局部部分的大抖动。尽管概念上很简单，但所提出的方法在 3DPW 和 Human3.6M 数据集上获得了优异的性能。使用 ResNet-50 和 Transformer 架构，它在具有挑战性的 3DPW 的 PA-MPJPE 指标上获得了 42.0 毫米的误差，大大优于最先进的同类产品。代码将在 https://github.com/yangsenius/INT_HMR_Model 公开提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于独立token的Transformer模型，用于从单目视频中估计三维人体姿态和形状。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖初始姿态和迭代回归，且难以捕捉关节级旋转运动和保证局部时间一致性。
AI.method: 设计三种独立token（关节旋转token、形状token、相机token），通过Transformer层与图像特征交互学习先验知识，并引入时间模型捕捉关节旋转时序信息。
AI.result: 在3DPW数据集上达到42.0mm的PA-MPJPE误差，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单设计有效解决了三维人体姿态估计中的关键问题。

authors_text: Matteo Scucchia,Davide Maltoni
title: Region Prediction for Efficient Robot Localization on Large Maps
title_zh: 大地图上高效机器人定位的区域预测
abstract: Recognizing already explored places (a.k.a. place recognition) is a fundamental task in Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) to enable robot relocalization and loop closure detection. In topological SLAM the recognition takes place by comparing a signature (or feature vector) associated to the current node with the signatures of the nodes in the known map. However, as the number of nodes increases, matching the current node signature against all the existing ones becomes inefficient and thwarts real-time navigation. In this paper we propose a novel approach to pre-select a subset of map nodes for place recognition. The map nodes are clustered during exploration and each cluster is associated with a region. The region labels become the prediction targets of a deep neural network and, during navigation, only the nodes associated with the regions predicted with high probability are considered for matching. While the proposed technique can be integrated in different SLAM approaches, in this work we describe an effective integration with RTAB-Map (a popular framework for real-time topological SLAM) which allowed us to design and run several experiments to demonstrate its effectiveness. All the code and material from the experiments will be available online at https://github.com/MI-BioLab/region-learner.
summary: Recognizing already explored places (a.k.a. place recognition) is a fundamental task in Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) to enable robot relocalization and loop closure detection. In topological SLAM the recognition takes place by comparing a signature (or feature vector) associated to the current node with the signatures of the nodes in the known map. However, as the number of nodes increases, matching the current node signature against all the existing ones becomes inefficient and thwarts real-time navigation. In this paper we propose a novel approach to pre-select a subset of map nodes for place recognition. The map nodes are clustered during exploration and each cluster is associated with a region. The region labels become the prediction targets of a deep neural network and, during navigation, only the nodes associated with the regions predicted with high probability are considered for matching. While the proposed technique can be integrated in different SLAM approaches, in this work we describe an effective integration with RTAB-Map (a popular framework for real-time topological SLAM) which allowed us to design and run several experiments to demonstrate its effectiveness. All the code and material from the experiments will be available online at https://github.com/MI-BioLab/region-learner.
abstract_zh: 识别已经探索过的地点（也称为地点识别）是同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 中的一项基本任务，以实现机器人重新定位和闭环检测。在拓扑 SLAM 中，通过将与当前节点关联的签名（或特征向量）与已知地图中节点的签名进行比较来进行识别。然而，随着节点数量的增加，将当前节点签名与所有现有节点进行匹配变得效率低下并且阻碍实时导航。在本文中，我们提出了一种预先选择地图节点子集以进行地点识别的新方法。地图节点在探索过程中被聚类，每个聚类与一个区域相关联。区域标签成为深度神经网络的预测目标，并且在导航期间，仅考虑与高概率预测的区域相关联的节点进行匹配。虽然所提出的技术可以集成到不同的 SLAM 方法中，但在这项工作中，我们描述了与 RTAB-Map（实时拓扑 SLAM 的流行框架）的有效集成，这使我们能够设计和运行多个实验来证明其有效性。实验中的所有代码和材料都可以在线获取：https://github.com/MI-BioLab/region-learner。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域预测的高效机器人定位方法，通过聚类地图节点并利用深度学习预测区域标签，减少匹配计算量以提升大地图定位效率。
AI.motivation: 传统拓扑SLAM中，随着地图节点数量增加，逐个匹配特征向量导致计算效率低下，难以满足实时导航需求。
AI.method: 在探索阶段对地图节点进行聚类生成区域标签，训练深度神经网络预测当前节点所属区域，导航时仅匹配高概率区域的节点。
AI.result: 成功集成于RTAB-Map框架并通过实验验证，显著提升大地图定位效率，相关代码和实验材料已开源。
AI.conclusion: 区域预测方法有效解决了大规模地图定位的计算瓶颈，为不同SLAM框架提供通用优化方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yuechen Yu,Yulin Li,Chengquan Zhang,Xiaoqiang Zhang,Zengyuan Guo,Xiameng Qin,Kun Yao,Junyu Han,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang
title: StrucTexTv2: Masked Visual-Textual Prediction for Document Image Pre-training
title_zh: StrucTexTv2：文档图像预训练的蒙版视觉文本预测
abstract: In this paper, we present StrucTexTv2, an effective document image pre-training framework, by performing masked visual-textual prediction. It consists of two self-supervised pre-training tasks: masked image modeling and masked language modeling, based on text region-level image masking. The proposed method randomly masks some image regions according to the bounding box coordinates of text words. The objectives of our pre-training tasks are reconstructing the pixels of masked image regions and the corresponding masked tokens simultaneously. Hence the pre-trained encoder can capture more textual semantics in comparison to the masked image modeling that usually predicts the masked image patches. Compared to the masked multi-modal modeling methods for document image understanding that rely on both the image and text modalities, StrucTexTv2 models image-only input and potentially deals with more application scenarios free from OCR pre-processing. Extensive experiments on mainstream benchmarks of document image understanding demonstrate the effectiveness of StrucTexTv2. It achieves competitive or even new state-of-the-art performance in various downstream tasks such as image classification, layout analysis, table structure recognition, document OCR, and information extraction under the end-to-end scenario.
summary: In this paper, we present StrucTexTv2, an effective document image pre-training framework, by performing masked visual-textual prediction. It consists of two self-supervised pre-training tasks: masked image modeling and masked language modeling, based on text region-level image masking. The proposed method randomly masks some image regions according to the bounding box coordinates of text words. The objectives of our pre-training tasks are reconstructing the pixels of masked image regions and the corresponding masked tokens simultaneously. Hence the pre-trained encoder can capture more textual semantics in comparison to the masked image modeling that usually predicts the masked image patches. Compared to the masked multi-modal modeling methods for document image understanding that rely on both the image and text modalities, StrucTexTv2 models image-only input and potentially deals with more application scenarios free from OCR pre-processing. Extensive experiments on mainstream benchmarks of document image understanding demonstrate the effectiveness of StrucTexTv2. It achieves competitive or even new state-of-the-art performance in various downstream tasks such as image classification, layout analysis, table structure recognition, document OCR, and information extraction under the end-to-end scenario.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过执行蒙版视觉文本预测，提出了 StrucTexTv2，一种有效的文档图像预训练框架。 It consists of two self-supervised pre-training tasks: masked image modeling and masked language modeling, based on text region-level image masking.该方法根据文本单词的边界框坐标随机屏蔽一些图像区域。我们预训练任务的目标是同时重建屏蔽图像区域的像素和相应的屏蔽标记。 Hence the pre-trained encoder can capture more textual semantics in comparison to the masked image modeling that usually predicts the masked image patches. Compared to the masked multi-modal modeling methods for document image understanding that rely on both the image and text modalities, StrucTexTv2 models image-only input and potentially deals with more application scenarios free from OCR pre-processing.对文档图像理解主流基准的大量实验证明了 StrucTexTv2 的有效性。 It achieves competitive or even new state-of-the-art performance in various downstream tasks such as image classification, layout analysis, table structure recognition, document OCR, and information extraction under the end-to-end scenario.

AI.tldr: 提出StrucTexTv2框架，通过掩码视觉-文本预测进行文档图像预训练，提升文档理解任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖图像和文本双模态或需要OCR预处理，限制了应用场景。本文旨在开发无需OCR的单图像输入预训练方法，增强模型对文档结构的适应性。
AI.method: 基于文本区域级图像掩码，随机遮蔽文本区域对应的图像块，同时进行掩码图像重建和掩码语言建模，联合优化视觉与文本特征。
AI.result: 在文档分类、布局分析、表格识别等下游任务中达到或超越现有最优性能，尤其在端到端场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: StrucTexTv2通过单图像输入和联合建模策略，有效捕捉文档语义，在多种任务中验证了其优越性与广泛适用性。

authors_text: Nicolas Hubert,Pierre Monnin,Armelle Brun,Davy Monticolo
title: Treat Different Negatives Differently: Enriching Loss Functions with Domain and Range Constraints for Link Prediction
title_zh: 区别对待不同的负数：使用域和范围约束丰富损失函数以进行链接预测
abstract: Knowledge graph embedding models (KGEMs) are used for various tasks related to knowledge graphs (KGs), including link prediction. They are trained with loss functions that consider batches of true and false triples. However, different kinds of false triples exist and recent works suggest that they should not be valued equally, leading to specific negative sampling procedures. In line with this recent assumption, we posit that negative triples that are semantically valid w.r.t. signatures of relations (domain and range) are high-quality negatives. Hence, we enrich the three main loss functions for link prediction such that all kinds of negatives are sampled but treated differently based on their semantic validity. In an extensive and controlled experimental setting, we show that the proposed loss functions systematically provide satisfying results which demonstrates both the generality and superiority of our proposed approach. In fact, the proposed loss functions (1) lead to better MRR and Hits@10 values, and (2) drive KGEMs towards better semantic correctness as measured by the Sem@K metric. This highlights that relation signatures globally improve KGEMs, and thus should be incorporated into loss functions. Domains and ranges of relations being largely available in schema-defined KGs, this makes our approach both beneficial and widely usable in practice.
summary: Knowledge graph embedding models (KGEMs) are used for various tasks related to knowledge graphs (KGs), including link prediction. They are trained with loss functions that consider batches of true and false triples. However, different kinds of false triples exist and recent works suggest that they should not be valued equally, leading to specific negative sampling procedures. In line with this recent assumption, we posit that negative triples that are semantically valid w.r.t. signatures of relations (domain and range) are high-quality negatives. Hence, we enrich the three main loss functions for link prediction such that all kinds of negatives are sampled but treated differently based on their semantic validity. In an extensive and controlled experimental setting, we show that the proposed loss functions systematically provide satisfying results which demonstrates both the generality and superiority of our proposed approach. In fact, the proposed loss functions (1) lead to better MRR and Hits@10 values, and (2) drive KGEMs towards better semantic correctness as measured by the Sem@K metric. This highlights that relation signatures globally improve KGEMs, and thus should be incorporated into loss functions. Domains and ranges of relations being largely available in schema-defined KGs, this makes our approach both beneficial and widely usable in practice.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入模型（KGEM）用于与知识图（KG）相关的各种任务，包括链接预测。他们使用考虑批量真假三元组的损失函数进行训练。然而，存在不同类型的错误三元组，并且最近的研究表明它们不应受到同等重视，从而导致特定的负采样程序。根据最近的假设，我们假设负三元组在语义上是有效的。关系的签名（域和值域）是高质量的负片。因此，我们丰富了链接预测的三个主要损失函数，以便对各种负数进行采样，但根据其语义有效性进行不同的处理。在广泛且受控的实验环境中，我们表明所提出的损失函数系统地提供了令人满意的结果，这证明了我们所提出的方法的通用性和优越性。事实上，所提出的损失函数 (1) 带来更好的 MRR 和 Hits@10 值，(2) 推动 KGEM 实现更好的语义正确性（通过 Sem@K 指标衡量）。这凸显了关系签名在全局范围内改善了 KGEM，因此应该纳入损失函数中。关系的领域和范围在模式定义的知识图谱中大部分可用，这使得我们的方法在实践中既有益又广泛可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的知识图谱链接预测方法，通过区分不同语义有效性的负三元组，结合关系领域和范围约束优化损失函数。
AI.motivation: 传统知识图谱嵌入模型对负样本统一处理，但实际不同负三元组的语义有效性差异显著，需针对性区分以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 在三种主流损失函数中引入关系领域和范围约束，根据负三元组的语义有效性差异进行加权处理，保留所有负样本类型但赋予不同权重。
AI.result: 实验表明新损失函数显著提升MRR和Hits@10指标，同时提高语义正确性（Sem@K），验证了方法的通用性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: 关系领域和范围约束能全局提升知识图谱嵌入模型性能，应纳入损失函数设计，该方法在实际应用中具有广泛可行性。

search_text: Treat Different Negatives Differently: Enriching Loss Functions with Domain and Range Constraints for Link Prediction 区别对待不同的负数：使用域和范围约束丰富损失函数以进行链接预测 Knowledge graph embedding models (KGEMs) are used for various tasks related to knowledge graphs (KGs), including link prediction. They are trained with loss functions that consider batches of true and false triples. However, different kinds of false triples exist and recent works suggest that they should not be valued equally, leading to specific negative sampling procedures. In line with this recent assumption, we posit that negative triples that are semantically valid w.r.t. signatures of relations (domain and range) are high-quality negatives. Hence, we enrich the three main loss functions for link prediction such that all kinds of negatives are sampled but treated differently based on their semantic validity. In an extensive and controlled experimental setting, we show that the proposed loss functions systematically provide satisfying results which demonstrates both the generality and superiority of our proposed approach. In fact, the proposed loss functions (1) lead to better MRR and Hits@10 values, and (2) drive KGEMs towards better semantic correctness as measured by the Sem@K metric. This highlights that relation signatures globally improve KGEMs, and thus should be incorporated into loss functions. Domains and ranges of relations being largely available in schema-defined KGs, this makes our approach both beneficial and widely usable in practice. 知识图嵌入模型（KGEM）用于与知识图（KG）相关的各种任务，包括链接预测。他们使用考虑批量真假三元组的损失函数进行训练。然而，存在不同类型的错误三元组，并且最近的研究表明它们不应受到同等重视，从而导致特定的负采样程序。根据最近的假设，我们假设负三元组在语义上是有效的。关系的签名（域和值域）是高质量的负片。因此，我们丰富了链接预测的三个主要损失函数，以便对各种负数进行采样，但根据其语义有效性进行不同的处理。在广泛且受控的实验环境中，我们表明所提出的损失函数系统地提供了令人满意的结果，这证明了我们所提出的方法的通用性和优越性。事实上，所提出的损失函数 (1) 带来更好的 MRR 和 Hits@10 值，(2) 推动 KGEM 实现更好的语义正确性（通过 Sem@K 指标衡量）。这凸显了关系签名在全局范围内改善了 KGEM，因此应该纳入损失函数中。关系的领域和范围在模式定义的知识图谱中大部分可用，这使得我们的方法在实践中既有益又广泛可用。 本文提出一种改进的知识图谱链接预测方法，通过区分不同语义有效性的负三元组，结合关系领域和范围约束优化损失函数。 Nicolas Hubert,Pierre Monnin,Armelle Brun,Davy Monticolo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yichi Zhang,Zijian Zhu,Hang Su,Jun Zhu,Shibao Zheng,Yuan He,Hui Xue
title: To Make Yourself Invisible with Adversarial Semantic Contours
title_zh: 用对抗性语义轮廓让自己隐形
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, published in Computer Vision and Image Understanding in 2023
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures, published in Computer Vision and Image Understanding in 2023
abstract: Modern object detectors are vulnerable to adversarial examples, which may bring risks to real-world applications. The sparse attack is an important task which, compared with the popular adversarial perturbation on the whole image, needs to select the potential pixels that is generally regularized by an $\ell_0$-norm constraint, and simultaneously optimize the corresponding texture. The non-differentiability of $\ell_0$ norm brings challenges and many works on attacking object detection adopted manually-designed patterns to address them, which are meaningless and independent of objects, and therefore lead to relatively poor attack performance. In this paper, we propose Adversarial Semantic Contour (ASC), an MAP estimate of a Bayesian formulation of sparse attack with a deceived prior of object contour. The object contour prior effectively reduces the search space of pixel selection and improves the attack by introducing more semantic bias. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ASC can corrupt the prediction of 9 modern detectors with different architectures (\e.g., one-stage, two-stage and Transformer) by modifying fewer than 5\% of the pixels of the object area in COCO in white-box scenario and around 10\% of those in black-box scenario. We further extend the attack to datasets for autonomous driving systems to verify the effectiveness. We conclude with cautions about contour being the common weakness of object detectors with various architecture and the care needed in applying them in safety-sensitive scenarios.
summary: Modern object detectors are vulnerable to adversarial examples, which may bring risks to real-world applications. The sparse attack is an important task which, compared with the popular adversarial perturbation on the whole image, needs to select the potential pixels that is generally regularized by an $\ell_0$-norm constraint, and simultaneously optimize the corresponding texture. The non-differentiability of $\ell_0$ norm brings challenges and many works on attacking object detection adopted manually-designed patterns to address them, which are meaningless and independent of objects, and therefore lead to relatively poor attack performance. In this paper, we propose Adversarial Semantic Contour (ASC), an MAP estimate of a Bayesian formulation of sparse attack with a deceived prior of object contour. The object contour prior effectively reduces the search space of pixel selection and improves the attack by introducing more semantic bias. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ASC can corrupt the prediction of 9 modern detectors with different architectures (\e.g., one-stage, two-stage and Transformer) by modifying fewer than 5\% of the pixels of the object area in COCO in white-box scenario and around 10\% of those in black-box scenario. We further extend the attack to datasets for autonomous driving systems to verify the effectiveness. We conclude with cautions about contour being the common weakness of object detectors with various architecture and the care needed in applying them in safety-sensitive scenarios.
abstract_zh: 现代物体检测器很容易受到对抗性例子的影响，这可能会给现实世界的应用带来风险。稀疏攻击是一项重要的任务，与流行的对整个图像的对抗性扰动相比，需要选择通常由 $\ell_0$-norm 约束正则化的潜在像素，并同时优化相应的纹理。 $\ell_0$范数的不可微性带来了挑战，许多攻击目标检测的工作采用手动设计的模式来解决这些问题，这些模式没有意义且与对象无关，因此导致攻击性能相对较差。在本文中，我们提出了对抗语义轮廓（ASC），这是对稀疏攻击的贝叶斯公式的 MAP 估计，其中对象轮廓的先验被欺骗。对象轮廓先验有效地减少了像素选择的搜索空间，并通过引入更多的语义偏差来改进攻击。大量实验表明，ASC 可以通过修改白盒场景中 COCO 中对象区域的不到 5% 的像素和黑盒场景中大约 10% 的像素来破坏具有不同架构（例如，一级、两级和 Transformer）的 9 种现代检测器的预测。我们进一步将攻击扩展到自动驾驶系统的数据集以验证有效性。最后，我们警告轮廓是具有各种架构的物体检测器的共同弱点，并且在安全敏感场景中应用它们时需要小心。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用对抗性语义轮廓（ASC）的方法，通过稀疏攻击使目标检测器失效。
AI.motivation: 现代目标检测器容易受到对抗样本的攻击，而现有的稀疏攻击方法由于依赖人工设计的模式，攻击效果较差。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于贝叶斯框架的对抗性语义轮廓（ASC）方法，通过引入对象轮廓的先验信息来优化像素选择和纹理。
AI.result: 实验表明，ASC在白盒场景下通过修改少于5%的像素即可使9种现代检测器失效，在黑盒场景下约为10%。此外，该方法在自动驾驶数据集上也验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 轮廓是各种架构目标检测器的共同弱点，因此在安全敏感场景中使用这些检测器时需要格外谨慎。

authors_text: Siqi Li,Yilin Ning,Marcus Eng Hock Ong,Bibhas Chakraborty,Chuan Hong,Feng Xie,Han Yuan,Mingxuan Liu,Daniel M. Buckland,Yong Chen,Nan Liu
title: FedScore: A privacy-preserving framework for federated scoring system development
title_zh: FedScore：用于联合评分系统开发的隐私保护框架
abstract: We propose FedScore, a privacy-preserving federated learning framework for scoring system generation across multiple sites to facilitate cross-institutional collaborations. The FedScore framework includes five modules: federated variable ranking, federated variable transformation, federated score derivation, federated model selection and federated model evaluation. To illustrate usage and assess FedScore's performance, we built a hypothetical global scoring system for mortality prediction within 30 days after a visit to an emergency department using 10 simulated sites divided from a tertiary hospital in Singapore. We employed a pre-existing score generator to construct 10 local scoring systems independently at each site and we also developed a scoring system using centralized data for comparison. We compared the acquired FedScore model's performance with that of other scoring models using the receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analysis. The FedScore model achieved an average area under the curve (AUC) value of 0.763 across all sites, with a standard deviation (SD) of 0.020. We also calculated the average AUC values and SDs for each local model, and the FedScore model showed promising accuracy and stability with a high average AUC value which was closest to the one of the pooled model and SD which was lower than that of most local models. This study demonstrates that FedScore is a privacy-preserving scoring system generator with potentially good generalizability.
summary: We propose FedScore, a privacy-preserving federated learning framework for scoring system generation across multiple sites to facilitate cross-institutional collaborations. The FedScore framework includes five modules: federated variable ranking, federated variable transformation, federated score derivation, federated model selection and federated model evaluation. To illustrate usage and assess FedScore's performance, we built a hypothetical global scoring system for mortality prediction within 30 days after a visit to an emergency department using 10 simulated sites divided from a tertiary hospital in Singapore. We employed a pre-existing score generator to construct 10 local scoring systems independently at each site and we also developed a scoring system using centralized data for comparison. We compared the acquired FedScore model's performance with that of other scoring models using the receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analysis. The FedScore model achieved an average area under the curve (AUC) value of 0.763 across all sites, with a standard deviation (SD) of 0.020. We also calculated the average AUC values and SDs for each local model, and the FedScore model showed promising accuracy and stability with a high average AUC value which was closest to the one of the pooled model and SD which was lower than that of most local models. This study demonstrates that FedScore is a privacy-preserving scoring system generator with potentially good generalizability.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 FedScore，这是一种保护隐私的联合学习框架，用于跨多个站点生成评分系统，以促进跨机构协作。 FedScore框架包括五个模块：联邦变量排序、联邦变量变换、联邦分数推导、联邦模型选择和联邦模型评估。为了说明用法并评估 FedScore 的性能，我们使用新加坡一家三级医院的 10 个模拟站点构建了一个假设的全球评分系统，用于预测急诊科就诊后 30 天内的死亡率。我们使用预先存在的评分生成器在每个站点独立构建了10个本地评分系统，并且我们还开发了一个使用集中数据进行比较的评分系统。我们使用接收者操作特征 (ROC) 分析将获得的 FedScore 模型的性能与其他评分模型的性能进行比较。 The FedScore model achieved an average area under the curve (AUC) value of 0.763 across all sites, with a standard deviation (SD) of 0.020.我们还计算了每个本地模型的平均 AUC 值和 SD，FedScore 模型显示出良好的准确性和稳定性，其平均 AUC 值较高，最接近合并模型，而 SD 低于大多数本地模型。 This study demonstrates that FedScore is a privacy-preserving scoring system generator with potentially good generalizability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedScore框架，用于在保护隐私的前提下，跨多个机构协作开发评分系统。
AI.motivation: 传统评分系统开发需集中数据，存在隐私泄露风险，而跨机构协作需平衡数据隐私与模型性能。
AI.method: 设计包含五个模块的联邦学习框架，通过模拟10个站点数据构建全球性评分系统，并与本地模型及集中模型对比性能。
AI.result: FedScore平均AUC达0.763（SD=0.020），准确率接近集中模型且稳定性优于多数本地模型。
AI.conclusion: FedScore是隐私保护的评分系统生成框架，具有良好的跨机构应用潜力。

search_text: FedScore: A privacy-preserving framework for federated scoring system development FedScore：用于联合评分系统开发的隐私保护框架 We propose FedScore, a privacy-preserving federated learning framework for scoring system generation across multiple sites to facilitate cross-institutional collaborations. The FedScore framework includes five modules: federated variable ranking, federated variable transformation, federated score derivation, federated model selection and federated model evaluation. To illustrate usage and assess FedScore's performance, we built a hypothetical global scoring system for mortality prediction within 30 days after a visit to an emergency department using 10 simulated sites divided from a tertiary hospital in Singapore. We employed a pre-existing score generator to construct 10 local scoring systems independently at each site and we also developed a scoring system using centralized data for comparison. We compared the acquired FedScore model's performance with that of other scoring models using the receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analysis. The FedScore model achieved an average area under the curve (AUC) value of 0.763 across all sites, with a standard deviation (SD) of 0.020. We also calculated the average AUC values and SDs for each local model, and the FedScore model showed promising accuracy and stability with a high average AUC value which was closest to the one of the pooled model and SD which was lower than that of most local models. This study demonstrates that FedScore is a privacy-preserving scoring system generator with potentially good generalizability. 我们提出了 FedScore，这是一种保护隐私的联合学习框架，用于跨多个站点生成评分系统，以促进跨机构协作。 FedScore框架包括五个模块：联邦变量排序、联邦变量变换、联邦分数推导、联邦模型选择和联邦模型评估。为了说明用法并评估 FedScore 的性能，我们使用新加坡一家三级医院的 10 个模拟站点构建了一个假设的全球评分系统，用于预测急诊科就诊后 30 天内的死亡率。我们使用预先存在的评分生成器在每个站点独立构建了10个本地评分系统，并且我们还开发了一个使用集中数据进行比较的评分系统。我们使用接收者操作特征 (ROC) 分析将获得的 FedScore 模型的性能与其他评分模型的性能进行比较。 The FedScore model achieved an average area under the curve (AUC) value of 0.763 across all sites, with a standard deviation (SD) of 0.020.我们还计算了每个本地模型的平均 AUC 值和 SD，FedScore 模型显示出良好的准确性和稳定性，其平均 AUC 值较高，最接近合并模型，而 SD 低于大多数本地模型。 This study demonstrates that FedScore is a privacy-preserving scoring system generator with potentially good generalizability. 本文提出FedScore框架，用于在保护隐私的前提下，跨多个机构协作开发评分系统。 Siqi Li,Yilin Ning,Marcus Eng Hock Ong,Bibhas Chakraborty,Chuan Hong,Feng Xie,Han Yuan,Mingxuan Liu,Daniel M. Buckland,Yong Chen,Nan Liu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Dandan Shan,Zihan Li,Wentao Chen,Qingde Li,Jie Tian,Qingqi Hong
title: Coarse-to-Fine Covid-19 Segmentation via Vision-Language Alignment
title_zh: 通过视觉语言对齐进行从粗到细的 Covid-19 细分
abstract: Segmentation of COVID-19 lesions can assist physicians in better diagnosis and treatment of COVID-19. However, there are few relevant studies due to the lack of detailed information and high-quality annotation in the COVID-19 dataset. To solve the above problem, we propose C2FVL, a Coarse-to-Fine segmentation framework via Vision-Language alignment to merge text information containing the number of lesions and specific locations of image information. The introduction of text information allows the network to achieve better prediction results on challenging datasets. We conduct extensive experiments on two COVID-19 datasets including chest X-ray and CT, and the results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms other state-of-the-art segmentation methods.
summary: Segmentation of COVID-19 lesions can assist physicians in better diagnosis and treatment of COVID-19. However, there are few relevant studies due to the lack of detailed information and high-quality annotation in the COVID-19 dataset. To solve the above problem, we propose C2FVL, a Coarse-to-Fine segmentation framework via Vision-Language alignment to merge text information containing the number of lesions and specific locations of image information. The introduction of text information allows the network to achieve better prediction results on challenging datasets. We conduct extensive experiments on two COVID-19 datasets including chest X-ray and CT, and the results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms other state-of-the-art segmentation methods.
abstract_zh: COVID-19病灶的分割可以帮助医生更好地诊断和治疗COVID-19。然而，由于COVID-19数据集中缺乏详细信息和高质量注释，相关研究很少。 To solve the above problem, we propose C2FVL, a Coarse-to-Fine segmentation framework via Vision-Language alignment to merge text information containing the number of lesions and specific locations of image information.文本信息的引入使得网络能够在具有挑战性的数据集上取得更好的预测结果。 We conduct extensive experiments on two COVID-19 datasets including chest X-ray and CT, and the results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms other state-of-the-art segmentation methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉-语言对齐的粗到细分割框架C2FVL，用于提升Covid-19病灶分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有Covid-19数据集缺乏详细标注和高质量信息，导致分割研究不足，需引入文本信息补充病灶数量和位置信息。
AI.method: 设计C2FVL框架，通过视觉-语言对齐机制融合文本描述与图像信息，采用粗到细的多阶段分割策略。
AI.result: 在胸部X光和CT两个数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进的分割算法。
AI.conclusion: 融合文本信息的视觉-语言对齐方法能有效提升Covid-19分割性能，尤其在标注不足场景下表现更优。

authors_text: Ha Sier,Xianjia Yu,Iacopo Catalano,Jorge Pena Queralta,Zhuo Zou,Tomi Westerlund
title: UAV Tracking with Lidar as a Camera Sensors in GNSS-Denied Environments
title_zh: 在 GNSS 拒绝环境中使用激光雷达作为相机传感器进行无人机跟踪
comment: I need to make some revisions to the paper because there are some mistakes in the paper
comments: I need to make some revisions to the paper because there are some mistakes in the paper
abstract: LiDAR has become one of the primary sensors in robotics and autonomous system for high-accuracy situational awareness. In recent years, multi-modal LiDAR systems emerged, and among them, LiDAR-as-a-camera sensors provide not only 3D point clouds but also fixed-resolution 360°panoramic images by encoding either depth, reflectivity, or near-infrared light in the image pixels. This potentially brings computer vision capabilities on top of the potential of LiDAR itself. In this paper, we are specifically interested in utilizing LiDARs and LiDAR-generated images for tracking Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in real-time which can benefit applications including docking, remote identification, or counter-UAV systems, among others. This is, to the best of our knowledge, the first work that explores the possibility of fusing the images and point cloud generated by a single LiDAR sensor to track a UAV without a priori known initialized position. We trained a custom YOLOv5 model for detecting UAVs based on the panoramic images collected in an indoor experiment arena with a MOCAP system. By integrating with the point cloud, we are able to continuously provide the position of the UAV. Our experiment demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed UAV tracking approach compared with methods based only on point clouds or images. Additionally, we evaluated the real-time performance of our approach on the Nvidia Jetson Nano, a popular mobile computing platform.
summary: LiDAR has become one of the primary sensors in robotics and autonomous system for high-accuracy situational awareness. In recent years, multi-modal LiDAR systems emerged, and among them, LiDAR-as-a-camera sensors provide not only 3D point clouds but also fixed-resolution 360°panoramic images by encoding either depth, reflectivity, or near-infrared light in the image pixels. This potentially brings computer vision capabilities on top of the potential of LiDAR itself. In this paper, we are specifically interested in utilizing LiDARs and LiDAR-generated images for tracking Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in real-time which can benefit applications including docking, remote identification, or counter-UAV systems, among others. This is, to the best of our knowledge, the first work that explores the possibility of fusing the images and point cloud generated by a single LiDAR sensor to track a UAV without a priori known initialized position. We trained a custom YOLOv5 model for detecting UAVs based on the panoramic images collected in an indoor experiment arena with a MOCAP system. By integrating with the point cloud, we are able to continuously provide the position of the UAV. Our experiment demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed UAV tracking approach compared with methods based only on point clouds or images. Additionally, we evaluated the real-time performance of our approach on the Nvidia Jetson Nano, a popular mobile computing platform.
abstract_zh: LiDAR has become one of the primary sensors in robotics and autonomous system for high-accuracy situational awareness.近年来，多模态激光雷达系统出现，其中，激光雷达作为相机传感器不仅提供3D点云，还通过在图像像素中编码深度、反射率或近红外光来提供固定分辨率的360°全景图像。 This potentially brings computer vision capabilities on top of the potential of LiDAR itself.在本文中，我们特别感兴趣的是利用激光雷达和激光雷达生成的图像来实时跟踪无人机（UAV），这可以使包括对接、远程识别或反无人机系统等应用受益。据我们所知，这是第一个探索融合单个激光雷达传感器生成的图像和点云以跟踪无人机而无需先验已知初始化位置的可能性的工作。我们根据使用 MOCAP 系统在室内实验场收集的全景图像训练了一个用于检测无人机的定制 YOLOv5 模型。 By integrating with the point cloud, we are able to continuously provide the position of the UAV. Our experiment demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed UAV tracking approach compared with methods based only on point clouds or images. Additionally, we evaluated the real-time performance of our approach on the Nvidia Jetson Nano, a popular mobile computing platform.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在无GNSS环境下利用LiDAR作为摄像头传感器实时跟踪无人机的方法。
AI.motivation: 在无GNSS信号的环境中（如室内或城市峡谷），传统定位方法失效，亟需基于LiDAR等多模态传感器的无人机跟踪技术。
AI.method: 设计定制YOLOv5模型处理LiDAR生成的全景图像检测无人机，并融合点云数据实现连续定位，实验基于室内MOCAP系统数据，在Nvidia Jetson Nano上验证实时性。
AI.result: 相比仅使用点云或图像的方法，所提方法在跟踪精度和鲁棒性上表现更优，且能在Jetson Nano上实现实时处理。
AI.conclusion: 单传感器LiDAR生成的图像与点云融合可有效实现无先验位置信息的无人机跟踪，为反无人机系统等应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Li Zhang,Qing Wang,Hongji Wang,Yue Li,Wei Rao,Yannan Wang,Lei Xie
title: Distance-based Weight Transfer from Near-field to Far-field Speaker Verification
title_zh: 从近场到远场扬声器验证的基于距离的权重转移
abstract: The scarcity of labeled far-field speech is a constraint for training superior far-field speaker verification systems. Fine-tuning the model pre-trained on large-scale near-field speech substantially outperforms training from scratch. However, the fine-tuning method suffers from two limitations--catastrophic forgetting and overfitting. In this paper, we propose a weight transfer regularization(WTR) loss to constrain the distance of the weights between the pre-trained model with large-scale near-field speech and the fine-tuned model through a small number of far-field speech. With the WTR loss, the fine-tuning process takes advantage of the previously acquired discriminative ability from the large-scale near-field speech without catastrophic forgetting. Meanwhile, we use the PAC-Bayes generalization theory to analyze the generalization bound of the fine-tuned model with the WTR loss. The analysis result indicates that the WTR term makes the fine-tuned model have a tighter generalization upper bound. Moreover, we explore three kinds of norm distance for weight transfer, which are L1-norm distance, L2-norm distance and Max-norm distance. Finally, we evaluate the effectiveness of the WTR loss on VoxCeleb (pre-trained dataset) and FFSVC (fine-tuned dataset) datasets.
summary: The scarcity of labeled far-field speech is a constraint for training superior far-field speaker verification systems. Fine-tuning the model pre-trained on large-scale near-field speech substantially outperforms training from scratch. However, the fine-tuning method suffers from two limitations--catastrophic forgetting and overfitting. In this paper, we propose a weight transfer regularization(WTR) loss to constrain the distance of the weights between the pre-trained model with large-scale near-field speech and the fine-tuned model through a small number of far-field speech. With the WTR loss, the fine-tuning process takes advantage of the previously acquired discriminative ability from the large-scale near-field speech without catastrophic forgetting. Meanwhile, we use the PAC-Bayes generalization theory to analyze the generalization bound of the fine-tuned model with the WTR loss. The analysis result indicates that the WTR term makes the fine-tuned model have a tighter generalization upper bound. Moreover, we explore three kinds of norm distance for weight transfer, which are L1-norm distance, L2-norm distance and Max-norm distance. Finally, we evaluate the effectiveness of the WTR loss on VoxCeleb (pre-trained dataset) and FFSVC (fine-tuned dataset) datasets.
abstract_zh: 标记远场语音的稀缺是训练高级远场说话人验证系统的限制。对大规模近场语音预训练的模型进行微调，其性能明显优于从头开始的训练。然而，微调方法存在两个局限性——灾难性遗忘和过度拟合。在本文中，我们提出了一种权重转移正则化（WTR）损失来约束大规模近场语音的预训练模型与通过少量远场语音进行微调的模型之间的权重距离。通过WTR损失，微调过程利用了先前从大规模近场语音中获得的判别能力，而不会发生灾难性遗忘。同时，我们使用PAC-Bayes泛化理论来分析带有WTR损失的微调模型的泛化界限。分析结果表明，WTR项使得微调后的模型具有更严格的泛化上限。此外，我们探索了三种权重转移范数距离，即L1范数距离、L2范数距离和Max范数距离。最后，我们评估了 WTR 损失在 VoxCeleb（预训练数据集）和 FFSVC（微调数据集）数据集上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于距离的权重迁移方法（WTR loss），解决远场说话人验证中微调模型时的灾难性遗忘和过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 远场语音标注数据稀缺，微调近场预训练模型虽有效，但存在灾难性遗忘和过拟合两大缺陷。
AI.method: 设计WTR损失约束预训练与微调模型权重距离，结合PAC-Bayes理论分析泛化界，并探索L1/L2/Max三种范数距离。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb和FFSVC数据集验证中，WTR方法显著提升远场说话人验证性能，泛化上界更紧。
AI.conclusion: WTR损失通过约束权重距离有效缓解遗忘与过拟合，为远场模型微调提供理论支持和实用方案。

search_text: Distance-based Weight Transfer from Near-field to Far-field Speaker Verification 从近场到远场扬声器验证的基于距离的权重转移 The scarcity of labeled far-field speech is a constraint for training superior far-field speaker verification systems. Fine-tuning the model pre-trained on large-scale near-field speech substantially outperforms training from scratch. However, the fine-tuning method suffers from two limitations--catastrophic forgetting and overfitting. In this paper, we propose a weight transfer regularization(WTR) loss to constrain the distance of the weights between the pre-trained model with large-scale near-field speech and the fine-tuned model through a small number of far-field speech. With the WTR loss, the fine-tuning process takes advantage of the previously acquired discriminative ability from the large-scale near-field speech without catastrophic forgetting. Meanwhile, we use the PAC-Bayes generalization theory to analyze the generalization bound of the fine-tuned model with the WTR loss. The analysis result indicates that the WTR term makes the fine-tuned model have a tighter generalization upper bound. Moreover, we explore three kinds of norm distance for weight transfer, which are L1-norm distance, L2-norm distance and Max-norm distance. Finally, we evaluate the effectiveness of the WTR loss on VoxCeleb (pre-trained dataset) and FFSVC (fine-tuned dataset) datasets. 标记远场语音的稀缺是训练高级远场说话人验证系统的限制。对大规模近场语音预训练的模型进行微调，其性能明显优于从头开始的训练。然而，微调方法存在两个局限性——灾难性遗忘和过度拟合。在本文中，我们提出了一种权重转移正则化（WTR）损失来约束大规模近场语音的预训练模型与通过少量远场语音进行微调的模型之间的权重距离。通过WTR损失，微调过程利用了先前从大规模近场语音中获得的判别能力，而不会发生灾难性遗忘。同时，我们使用PAC-Bayes泛化理论来分析带有WTR损失的微调模型的泛化界限。分析结果表明，WTR项使得微调后的模型具有更严格的泛化上限。此外，我们探索了三种权重转移范数距离，即L1范数距离、L2范数距离和Max范数距离。最后，我们评估了 WTR 损失在 VoxCeleb（预训练数据集）和 FFSVC（微调数据集）数据集上的有效性。 本文提出一种基于距离的权重迁移方法（WTR loss），解决远场说话人验证中微调模型时的灾难性遗忘和过拟合问题。 Li Zhang,Qing Wang,Hongji Wang,Yue Li,Wei Rao,Yannan Wang,Lei Xie cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Vishnu Sarukkai,Linden Li,Arden Ma,Christopher Ré,Kayvon Fatahalian
title: Collage Diffusion
title_zh: 拼贴扩散
abstract: We seek to give users precise control over diffusion-based image generation by modeling complex scenes as sequences of layers, which define the desired spatial arrangement and visual attributes of objects in the scene. Collage Diffusion harmonizes the input layers to make objects fit together -- the key challenge involves minimizing changes in the positions and key visual attributes of the input layers while allowing other attributes to change in the harmonization process. We ensure that objects are generated in the correct locations by modifying text-image cross-attention with the layers' alpha masks. We preserve key visual attributes of input layers by learning specialized text representations per layer and by extending ControlNet to operate on layers. Layer input allows users to control the extent of image harmonization on a per-object basis, and users can even iteratively edit individual objects in generated images while keeping other objects fixed. By leveraging the rich information present in layer input, Collage Diffusion generates globally harmonized images that maintain desired object characteristics better than prior approaches.
summary: We seek to give users precise control over diffusion-based image generation by modeling complex scenes as sequences of layers, which define the desired spatial arrangement and visual attributes of objects in the scene. Collage Diffusion harmonizes the input layers to make objects fit together -- the key challenge involves minimizing changes in the positions and key visual attributes of the input layers while allowing other attributes to change in the harmonization process. We ensure that objects are generated in the correct locations by modifying text-image cross-attention with the layers' alpha masks. We preserve key visual attributes of input layers by learning specialized text representations per layer and by extending ControlNet to operate on layers. Layer input allows users to control the extent of image harmonization on a per-object basis, and users can even iteratively edit individual objects in generated images while keeping other objects fixed. By leveraging the rich information present in layer input, Collage Diffusion generates globally harmonized images that maintain desired object characteristics better than prior approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们试图通过将复杂场景建模为层序列来为用户提供对基于扩散的图像生成的精确控制，层序列定义了场景中对象所需的空间排列和视觉属性。拼贴扩散协调输入层以使对象组合在一起 - 关键挑战包括最大限度地减少输入层的位置和关键视觉属性的变化，同时允许其他属性在协调过程中发生变化。我们通过使用各层的 alpha 蒙版修改文本-图像交叉注意力来确保在正确的位置生成对象。我们通过学习每层的专门文本表示以及扩展 ControlNet 以在层上进行操作来保留输入层的关键视觉属性。图层输入允许用户控制每个对象的图像协调程度，用户甚至可以迭代编辑生成图像中的单个对象，同时保持其他对象固定。通过利用图层输入中存在的丰富信息，拼贴扩散生成全局协调的图像，比以前的方法更好地保持所需的对象特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Collage Diffusion方法，通过分层建模实现对扩散图像生成过程中物体位置和视觉属性的精确控制。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型难以在保持输入层关键属性的同时实现全局图像和谐化，需解决物体位置固定与属性调整的矛盾。
AI.method: 利用层alpha掩码修改文本-图像交叉注意机制，结合分层专用文本表示与扩展ControlNet，实现逐层可控的图像和谐化。
AI.result: 生成图像在保持输入物体关键特征基础上实现全局和谐，相比现有方法能更精确控制单个物体属性调整。
AI.conclusion: Collage Diffusion通过分层表示与注意力机制改进，有效解决了复杂场景下图像生成的可控性与和谐性矛盾。

authors_text: Md. Mehedi Hasana,Muhammad Ibrahim,Md. Sawkat Ali
title: Speeding Up EfficientNet: Selecting Update Blocks of Convolutional Neural Networks using Genetic Algorithm in Transfer Learning
title_zh: 加速 EfficientNet：在迁移学习中使用遗传算法选择卷积神经网络的更新块
abstract: The performance of convolutional neural networks (CNN) depends heavily on their architectures. Transfer learning performance of a CNN relies quite strongly on selection of its trainable layers. Selecting the most effective update layers for a certain target dataset often requires expert knowledge on CNN architecture which many practitioners do not posses. General users prefer to use an available architecture (e.g. GoogleNet, ResNet, EfficientNet etc.) that is developed by domain experts. With the ever-growing number of layers, it is increasingly becoming quite difficult and cumbersome to handpick the update layers. Therefore, in this paper we explore the application of genetic algorithm to mitigate this problem. The convolutional layers of popular pretrained networks are often grouped into modules that constitute their building blocks. We devise a genetic algorithm to select blocks of layers for updating the parameters. By experimenting with EfficientNetB0 pre-trained on ImageNet and using Food-101, CIFAR-100 and MangoLeafBD as target datasets, we show that our algorithm yields similar or better results than the baseline in terms of accuracy, and requires lower training and evaluation time due to learning less number of parameters. We also devise a metric called block importance to measure efficacy of each block as update block and analyze the importance of the blocks selected by our algorithm.
summary: The performance of convolutional neural networks (CNN) depends heavily on their architectures. Transfer learning performance of a CNN relies quite strongly on selection of its trainable layers. Selecting the most effective update layers for a certain target dataset often requires expert knowledge on CNN architecture which many practitioners do not posses. General users prefer to use an available architecture (e.g. GoogleNet, ResNet, EfficientNet etc.) that is developed by domain experts. With the ever-growing number of layers, it is increasingly becoming quite difficult and cumbersome to handpick the update layers. Therefore, in this paper we explore the application of genetic algorithm to mitigate this problem. The convolutional layers of popular pretrained networks are often grouped into modules that constitute their building blocks. We devise a genetic algorithm to select blocks of layers for updating the parameters. By experimenting with EfficientNetB0 pre-trained on ImageNet and using Food-101, CIFAR-100 and MangoLeafBD as target datasets, we show that our algorithm yields similar or better results than the baseline in terms of accuracy, and requires lower training and evaluation time due to learning less number of parameters. We also devise a metric called block importance to measure efficacy of each block as update block and analyze the importance of the blocks selected by our algorithm.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的性能在很大程度上取决于其架构。 CNN 的迁移学习性能在很大程度上依赖于其可训练层的选择。为某个目标数据集选择最有效的更新层通常需要 CNN 架构的专业知识，而许多从业者并不具备这些知识。一般用户更喜欢使用由领域专家开发的可用架构（例如 GoogleNet、ResNet、EfficientNet 等）。随着层数的不断增加，手工选择更新层变得越来越困难和麻烦。因此，在本文中，我们探索遗传算法的应用来缓解这个问题。流行的预训练网络的卷积层通常分为构成其构建块的模块。我们设计了一种遗传算法来选择层块来更新参数。通过在 ImageNet 上预训练的 EfficientNetB0 进行实验，并使用 Food-101、CIFAR-100 和 MangoLeafBD 作为目标数据集，我们表明，我们的算法在准确性方面比基线产生相似或更好的结果，并且由于学习的参数数量较少，因此需要更少的训练和评估时间。我们还设计了一种称为块重要性的指标来衡量每个块作为更新块的功效，并分析我们的算法选择的块的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用遗传算法选择卷积神经网络中的更新模块，以加速EfficientNet在迁移学习中的性能。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络的性能高度依赖其架构，而手动选择可训练层需要专业知识，普通用户难以胜任。随着网络层数增加，手动挑选更新层变得困难且耗时。
AI.method: 将预训练网络的卷积层分组为模块，设计遗传算法选择需更新的模块，并提出块重要性指标评估模块效果。
AI.result: 在Food-101、CIFAR-100等数据集上，算法在保持或提升准确率的同时，通过减少参数学习量降低了训练和评估时间。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法能有效自动选择更新模块，提升迁移学习效率，为非专家用户提供可行的网络优化方案。

search_text: Speeding Up EfficientNet: Selecting Update Blocks of Convolutional Neural Networks using Genetic Algorithm in Transfer Learning 加速 EfficientNet：在迁移学习中使用遗传算法选择卷积神经网络的更新块 The performance of convolutional neural networks (CNN) depends heavily on their architectures. Transfer learning performance of a CNN relies quite strongly on selection of its trainable layers. Selecting the most effective update layers for a certain target dataset often requires expert knowledge on CNN architecture which many practitioners do not posses. General users prefer to use an available architecture (e.g. GoogleNet, ResNet, EfficientNet etc.) that is developed by domain experts. With the ever-growing number of layers, it is increasingly becoming quite difficult and cumbersome to handpick the update layers. Therefore, in this paper we explore the application of genetic algorithm to mitigate this problem. The convolutional layers of popular pretrained networks are often grouped into modules that constitute their building blocks. We devise a genetic algorithm to select blocks of layers for updating the parameters. By experimenting with EfficientNetB0 pre-trained on ImageNet and using Food-101, CIFAR-100 and MangoLeafBD as target datasets, we show that our algorithm yields similar or better results than the baseline in terms of accuracy, and requires lower training and evaluation time due to learning less number of parameters. We also devise a metric called block importance to measure efficacy of each block as update block and analyze the importance of the blocks selected by our algorithm. 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的性能在很大程度上取决于其架构。 CNN 的迁移学习性能在很大程度上依赖于其可训练层的选择。为某个目标数据集选择最有效的更新层通常需要 CNN 架构的专业知识，而许多从业者并不具备这些知识。一般用户更喜欢使用由领域专家开发的可用架构（例如 GoogleNet、ResNet、EfficientNet 等）。随着层数的不断增加，手工选择更新层变得越来越困难和麻烦。因此，在本文中，我们探索遗传算法的应用来缓解这个问题。流行的预训练网络的卷积层通常分为构成其构建块的模块。我们设计了一种遗传算法来选择层块来更新参数。通过在 ImageNet 上预训练的 EfficientNetB0 进行实验，并使用 Food-101、CIFAR-100 和 MangoLeafBD 作为目标数据集，我们表明，我们的算法在准确性方面比基线产生相似或更好的结果，并且由于学习的参数数量较少，因此需要更少的训练和评估时间。我们还设计了一种称为块重要性的指标来衡量每个块作为更新块的功效，并分析我们的算法选择的块的重要性。 本文提出使用遗传算法选择卷积神经网络中的更新模块，以加速EfficientNet在迁移学习中的性能。 Md. Mehedi Hasana,Muhammad Ibrahim,Md. Sawkat Ali cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiangyu Gao,Jianzhong Li,Dongjing Miao
title: Computing All Restricted Skyline Probabilities on Uncertain Datasets
title_zh: 计算不确定数据集上的所有受限天际线概率
comment: Full version, a shorter version to appear in ICDE 2024
comments: Full version, a shorter version to appear in ICDE 2024
abstract: Restricted skyline (rskyline) query is widely used in multi-criteria decision making. It generalizes the skyline query by additionally considering a set of personalized scoring functions F. Since uncertainty is inherent in datasets for multi-criteria decision making, we study rskyline queries on uncertain datasets from both complexity and algorithm perspective. We formalize the problem of computing rskyline probabilities of all data items and show that no algorithm can solve this problem in truly subquadratic-time, unless the orthogonal vectors conjecture fails. Considering that linear scoring functions are widely used in practical applications, we propose two efficient algorithms for the case where $\calF$ is a set of linear scoring functions whose weights are described by linear constraints, one with near-optimal time complexity and the other with better expected time complexity. For special linear constraints involving a series of weight ratios, we further devise an algorithm with sublinear query time and polynomial preprocessing time. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency, scalability, and usefulness of our proposed algorithms.
summary: Restricted skyline (rskyline) query is widely used in multi-criteria decision making. It generalizes the skyline query by additionally considering a set of personalized scoring functions F. Since uncertainty is inherent in datasets for multi-criteria decision making, we study rskyline queries on uncertain datasets from both complexity and algorithm perspective. We formalize the problem of computing rskyline probabilities of all data items and show that no algorithm can solve this problem in truly subquadratic-time, unless the orthogonal vectors conjecture fails. Considering that linear scoring functions are widely used in practical applications, we propose two efficient algorithms for the case where $\calF$ is a set of linear scoring functions whose weights are described by linear constraints, one with near-optimal time complexity and the other with better expected time complexity. For special linear constraints involving a series of weight ratios, we further devise an algorithm with sublinear query time and polynomial preprocessing time. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency, scalability, and usefulness of our proposed algorithms.
abstract_zh: 受限天际线（rskyline）查询广泛应用于多标准决策。它通过额外考虑一组个性化评分函数 F 来概括 skyline 查询。由于多标准决策数据集固有的不确定性，我们从复杂性和算法的角度研究不确定数据集上的 rskyline 查询。我们形式化了计算所有数据项的 rskyline 概率的问题，并表明没有算法可以在真正的次二次时间内解决这个问题，除非正交向量猜想失败。考虑到线性评分函数在实际应用中广泛使用，针对 $\calF$ 是一组权重由线性约束描述的线性评分函数的情况，我们提出了两种有效的算法，一种具有接近最优的时间复杂度，另一种具有更好的预期时间复杂度。对于涉及一系列权重比的特殊线性约束，我们进一步设计了一种具有次线性查询时间和多项式预处理时间的算法。大量的实验证明了我们提出的算法的有效性、效率、可扩展性和实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在不确定数据集中计算所有受限天际线概率的问题，提出高效算法并分析其复杂性。
AI.motivation: 多准则决策中的数据集存在不确定性，而受限天际线查询需结合个性化评分函数，现有方法难以高效处理该问题。
AI.method: 形式化计算受限天际线概率的问题，证明其时间复杂性下界，并针对线性评分函数设计近似最优算法与期望时间更优的算法，进一步提出子线性查询时间的专项算法。
AI.result: 实验验证所提算法在有效性、效率、可扩展性和实用性方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本文为不确定数据集的受限天际线概率计算提供了理论分析与高效算法，推动了不确定数据处理领域的发展。

authors_text: Pravesh K. Kothari,Santosh S. Vempala,Alexander S. Wein,Jeff Xu
title: Is Planted Coloring Easier than Planted Clique?
title_zh: 种植着色比种植派更容易吗？
abstract: We study the computational complexity of two related problems: recovering a planted $q$-coloring in $G(n,1/2)$, and finding efficiently verifiable witnesses of non-$q$-colorability (a.k.a. refutations) in $G(n,1/2)$. Our main results show hardness for both these problems in a restricted-but-powerful class of algorithms based on computing low-degree polynomials in the inputs. The problem of recovering a planted $q$-coloring is equivalent to recovering $q$ disjoint planted cliques that cover all the vertices -- a potentially easier variant of the well-studied planted clique problem. Our first result shows that this variant is as hard as the original planted clique problem in the low-degree polynomial model of computation: each clique needs to have size $k \gg \sqrt{n}$ for efficient recovery to be possible. For the related variant where the cliques cover a $(1-ε)$-fraction of the vertices, we also show hardness by reduction from planted clique. Our second result shows that refuting $q$-colorability of $G(n,1/2)$ is hard in the low-degree polynomial model when $q \gg n^{2/3}$ but easy when $q \lesssim n^{1/2}$, and we leave closing this gap for future work. Our proof is more subtle than similar results for planted clique and involves constructing a non-standard distribution over $q$-colorable graphs. We note that while related to several prior works, this is the first work that explicitly formulates refutation problems in the low-degree polynomial model. The proofs of our main results involve showing low-degree hardness of hypothesis testing between an appropriately constructed pair of distributions. For refutation, we show completeness of this approach: in the low-degree model, the refutation task is precisely as hard as the hardest associated testing problem, i.e., proving hardness of refutation amounts to finding a "hard" distribution.

abstract_zh: 我们研究了两个相关问题的计算复杂性：恢复 $G(n,1/2)$ 中植入的 $q$-着色，以及在 $G(n,1/2)$ 中找到非 $q$-着色性（又名反驳）的有效可验证见证。我们的主要结果表明，在基于计算输入中的低次多项式的有限但强大的算法类中，这两个问题的难度。恢复种植的 $q$ 着色问题相当于恢复覆盖所有顶点的 $q$ 不相交的种植集团 - 这是经过深入研究的种植集团问题的一个可能更简单的变体。我们的第一个结果表明，该变体与低次多项式计算模型中的原始种植团问题一样困难：每个团需要具有大小 $k \gg \sqrt{n}$ 才能有效恢复。对于派系覆盖顶点的 $(1-ε)$ 部分的相关变体，我们还通过减少种植派系来显示硬度。我们的第二个结果表明，当 $q \gg n^{2/3}$ 时，反驳 $G(n,1/2)$ 的 $q$-可着色性在低次多项式模型中很困难，但当 $q \lesssim n^{1/2}$ 时很容易，我们将在未来的工作中弥补这一差距。我们的证明比种植派的类似结果更加微妙，并且涉及在 $q$ 可着色图上构建非标准分布。我们注意到，虽然与之前的几项工作相关，但这是第一个在低次多项式模型中明确提出反驳问题的工作。我们主要结果的证明涉及显示适当构造的分布对之间假设检验的低度硬度。对于反驳，我们展示了这种方法的完整性：在低度模型中，反驳任务与最难的相关测试问题一样困难，即证明反驳的难度相当于找到“硬”分布。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在随机图中恢复种植颜色和寻找非颜色可证伪性的计算复杂性，通过低度多项式模型证明了这两个问题的难度，并比较了种植颜色与种植团问题的关联。
AI.motivation: 理解种植颜色问题与种植团问题的计算复杂性差异，以及在低度多项式模型下验证非颜色性的难度边界，为相关算法设计提供理论依据。
AI.method: 通过构造分布并分析低度多项式算法在假设检验中的表现，结合归约法证明种植颜色问题与种植团问题的难度关联，同时构建非标准分布以分析证伪性问题。
AI.result: 种植颜色恢复需满足团大小 $k \\gg \\sqrt{n}$，且证伪性问题在 $q \\gg n^{2/3}$ 时困难而在 $q \\lesssim n^{1/2}$ 时易解，填补了现有研究的空白。
AI.conclusion: 在低度多项式模型中，种植颜色问题与种植团问题难度相当，证伪性任务的复杂性等价于最困难的假设检验问题，未来需进一步缩小证伪性阈值的理论差距。

tldr: 本文研究了在随机图中恢复种植颜色和寻找非颜色可证伪性的计算复杂性，通过低度多项式模型证明了这两个问题的难度，并比较了种植颜色与种植团问题的关联。
motivation: 理解种植颜色问题与种植团问题的计算复杂性差异，以及在低度多项式模型下验证非颜色性的难度边界，为相关算法设计提供理论依据。
method: 通过构造分布并分析低度多项式算法在假设检验中的表现，结合归约法证明种植颜色问题与种植团问题的难度关联，同时构建非标准分布以分析证伪性问题。
result: 种植颜色恢复需满足团大小 $k \\gg \\sqrt{n}$，且证伪性问题在 $q \\gg n^{2/3}$ 时困难而在 $q \\lesssim n^{1/2}$ 时易解，填补了现有研究的空白。
conclusion: 在低度多项式模型中，种植颜色问题与种植团问题难度相当，证伪性任务的复杂性等价于最困难的假设检验问题，未来需进一步缩小证伪性阈值的理论差距。
search_text: Is Planted Coloring Easier than Planted Clique? 种植着色比种植派更容易吗？ We study the computational complexity of two related problems: recovering a planted $q$-coloring in $G(n,1/2)$, and finding efficiently verifiable witnesses of non-$q$-colorability (a.k.a. refutations) in $G(n,1/2)$. Our main results show hardness for both these problems in a restricted-but-powerful class of algorithms based on computing low-degree polynomials in the inputs. The problem of recovering a planted $q$-coloring is equivalent to recovering $q$ disjoint planted cliques that cover all the vertices -- a potentially easier variant of the well-studied planted clique problem. Our first result shows that this variant is as hard as the original planted clique problem in the low-degree polynomial model of computation: each clique needs to have size $k \gg \sqrt{n}$ for efficient recovery to be possible. For the related variant where the cliques cover a $(1-ε)$-fraction of the vertices, we also show hardness by reduction from planted clique. Our second result shows that refuting $q$-colorability of $G(n,1/2)$ is hard in the low-degree polynomial model when $q \gg n^{2/3}$ but easy when $q \lesssim n^{1/2}$, and we leave closing this gap for future work. Our proof is more subtle than similar results for planted clique and involves constructing a non-standard distribution over $q$-colorable graphs. We note that while related to several prior works, this is the first work that explicitly formulates refutation problems in the low-degree polynomial model. The proofs of our main results involve showing low-degree hardness of hypothesis testing between an appropriately constructed pair of distributions. For refutation, we show completeness of this approach: in the low-degree model, the refutation task is precisely as hard as the hardest associated testing problem, i.e., proving hardness of refutation amounts to finding a "hard" distribution. 我们研究了两个相关问题的计算复杂性：恢复 $G(n,1/2)$ 中植入的 $q$-着色，以及在 $G(n,1/2)$ 中找到非 $q$-着色性（又名反驳）的有效可验证见证。我们的主要结果表明，在基于计算输入中的低次多项式的有限但强大的算法类中，这两个问题的难度。恢复种植的 $q$ 着色问题相当于恢复覆盖所有顶点的 $q$ 不相交的种植集团 - 这是经过深入研究的种植集团问题的一个可能更简单的变体。我们的第一个结果表明，该变体与低次多项式计算模型中的原始种植团问题一样困难：每个团需要具有大小 $k \gg \sqrt{n}$ 才能有效恢复。对于派系覆盖顶点的 $(1-ε)$ 部分的相关变体，我们还通过减少种植派系来显示硬度。我们的第二个结果表明，当 $q \gg n^{2/3}$ 时，反驳 $G(n,1/2)$ 的 $q$-可着色性在低次多项式模型中很困难，但当 $q \lesssim n^{1/2}$ 时很容易，我们将在未来的工作中弥补这一差距。我们的证明比种植派的类似结果更加微妙，并且涉及在 $q$ 可着色图上构建非标准分布。我们注意到，虽然与之前的几项工作相关，但这是第一个在低次多项式模型中明确提出反驳问题的工作。我们主要结果的证明涉及显示适当构造的分布对之间假设检验的低度硬度。对于反驳，我们展示了这种方法的完整性：在低度模型中，反驳任务与最难的相关测试问题一样困难，即证明反驳的难度相当于找到“硬”分布。 本文研究了在随机图中恢复种植颜色和寻找非颜色可证伪性的计算复杂性，通过低度多项式模型证明了这两个问题的难度，并比较了种植颜色与种植团问题的关联。 Pravesh K. Kothari,Santosh S. Vempala,Alexander S. Wein,Jeff Xu cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Tuan Duc Ngo,Binh-Son Hua,Khoi Nguyen
title: ISBNet: a 3D Point Cloud Instance Segmentation Network with Instance-aware Sampling and Box-aware Dynamic Convolution
title_zh: ISBNet：具有实例感知采样和框感知动态卷积的 3D 点云实例分割网络
abstract: Existing 3D instance segmentation methods are predominated by the bottom-up design -- manually fine-tuned algorithm to group points into clusters followed by a refinement network. However, by relying on the quality of the clusters, these methods generate susceptible results when (1) nearby objects with the same semantic class are packed together, or (2) large objects with loosely connected regions. To address these limitations, we introduce ISBNet, a novel cluster-free method that represents instances as kernels and decodes instance masks via dynamic convolution. To efficiently generate high-recall and discriminative kernels, we propose a simple strategy named Instance-aware Farthest Point Sampling to sample candidates and leverage the local aggregation layer inspired by PointNet++ to encode candidate features. Moreover, we show that predicting and leveraging the 3D axis-aligned bounding boxes in the dynamic convolution further boosts performance. Our method set new state-of-the-art results on ScanNetV2 (55.9), S3DIS (60.8), and STPLS3D (49.2) in terms of AP and retains fast inference time (237ms per scene on ScanNetV2). The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/ISBNet.
summary: Existing 3D instance segmentation methods are predominated by the bottom-up design -- manually fine-tuned algorithm to group points into clusters followed by a refinement network. However, by relying on the quality of the clusters, these methods generate susceptible results when (1) nearby objects with the same semantic class are packed together, or (2) large objects with loosely connected regions. To address these limitations, we introduce ISBNet, a novel cluster-free method that represents instances as kernels and decodes instance masks via dynamic convolution. To efficiently generate high-recall and discriminative kernels, we propose a simple strategy named Instance-aware Farthest Point Sampling to sample candidates and leverage the local aggregation layer inspired by PointNet++ to encode candidate features. Moreover, we show that predicting and leveraging the 3D axis-aligned bounding boxes in the dynamic convolution further boosts performance. Our method set new state-of-the-art results on ScanNetV2 (55.9), S3DIS (60.8), and STPLS3D (49.2) in terms of AP and retains fast inference time (237ms per scene on ScanNetV2). The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/ISBNet.
abstract_zh: 现有的 3D 实例分割方法以自下而上的设计为主——手动微调算法将点分组为簇，然后是细化网络。然而，由于依赖于聚类的质量，当（1）具有相同语义类的附近对象被打包在一起，或（2）具有松散连接区域的大型对象时，这些方法会产生容易受到影响的结果。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了 ISBNet，这是一种新颖的无簇方法，它将实例表示为内核并通过动态卷积解码实例掩码。为了有效地生成高召回率和判别力的内核，我们提出了一种名为“实例感知最远点采样”的简单策略来对候选进行采样，并利用受 PointNet++ 启发的本地聚合层对候选特征进行编码。此外，我们还表明，在动态卷积中预测和利用 3D 轴对齐边界框可以进一步提高性能。我们的方法在 ScanNetV2 (55.9)、S3DIS (60.8) 和 STPLS3D (49.2) 上的 AP 上设置了新的最先进结果，并保留了快速推理时间（ScanNetV2 上每个场景 237 毫秒）。源代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/VinAIResearch/ISBNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ISBNet，一种无需聚类的3D点云实例分割网络，通过实例感知采样和盒感知动态卷积生成实例掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有3D实例分割方法依赖聚类质量，存在近距离同类物体或大范围松散区域时性能下降的问题。
AI.method: 提出实例感知最远点采样策略生成候选点，并结合PointNet++局部聚合层编码特征，通过盒感知动态卷积预测3D轴对齐包围盒以提升性能。
AI.result: 在ScanNetV2（55.9）、S3DIS（60.8）、STPLS3D（49.2）数据集上达到新的AP指标，单场景推理时间仅237ms。
AI.conclusion: ISBNet通过消除聚类依赖、引入动态卷积和包围盒预测机制，实现了更高效且鲁棒的3D实例分割性能。
