authors_text: Xiwei Xuan,Ziquan Deng,Hsuan-Tien Lin,Zhaodan Kong,Kwan-Liu Ma
title: SUNY: A Visual Interpretation Framework for Convolutional Neural Networks from a Necessary and Sufficient Perspective
title_zh: SUNY：从必要性和充分性角度构建卷积神经网络的视觉解释框架
abstract: Researchers have proposed various methods for visually interpreting the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) via saliency maps, which include Class-Activation-Map (CAM) based approaches as a leading family. However, in terms of the internal design logic, existing CAM-based approaches often overlook the causal perspective that answers the core "why" question to help humans understand the explanation. Additionally, current CNN explanations lack the consideration of both necessity and sufficiency, two complementary sides of a desirable explanation. This paper presents a causality-driven framework, SUNY, designed to rationalize the explanations toward better human understanding. Using the CNN model's input features or internal filters as hypothetical causes, SUNY generates explanations by bi-directional quantifications on both the necessary and sufficient perspectives. Extensive evaluations justify that SUNY not only produces more informative and convincing explanations from the angles of necessity and sufficiency, but also achieves performances competitive to other approaches across different CNN architectures over large-scale datasets, including ILSVRC2012 and CUB-200-2011.
summary: Researchers have proposed various methods for visually interpreting the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) via saliency maps, which include Class-Activation-Map (CAM) based approaches as a leading family. However, in terms of the internal design logic, existing CAM-based approaches often overlook the causal perspective that answers the core "why" question to help humans understand the explanation. Additionally, current CNN explanations lack the consideration of both necessity and sufficiency, two complementary sides of a desirable explanation. This paper presents a causality-driven framework, SUNY, designed to rationalize the explanations toward better human understanding. Using the CNN model's input features or internal filters as hypothetical causes, SUNY generates explanations by bi-directional quantifications on both the necessary and sufficient perspectives. Extensive evaluations justify that SUNY not only produces more informative and convincing explanations from the angles of necessity and sufficiency, but also achieves performances competitive to other approaches across different CNN architectures over large-scale datasets, including ILSVRC2012 and CUB-200-2011.
abstract_zh: 研究人员提出了各种通过显着图直观地解释卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法，其中包括基于类激活图（CAM）的方法作为主要家族。然而，就内部设计逻辑而言，现有的基于 CAM 的方法往往忽视了因果视角，即回答核心“为什么”问题以帮助人类理解解释。此外，当前 CNN 的解释缺乏对必要性和充分性的考虑，而这两个方面是理想解释的互补方面。本文提出了一个因果驱动的框架，SUNY，旨在合理化解释以实现更好的人类理解。使用 CNN 模型的输入特征或内部过滤器作为假设原因，纽约州立大学通过双向量化从必要和充分的角度生成解释。广泛的评估证明，SUNY 不仅从必要性和充分性的角度提供了更丰富、更有说服力的解释，而且在大规模数据集（包括 ILSVRC2012 和 CUB-200-2011）上实现了与不同 CNN 架构的其他方法相媲美的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SUNY框架，从必要性和充分性角度提供卷积神经网络的可视化解释。
AI.motivation: 现有基于类激活图的方法缺乏因果解释，未能同时考虑必要性和充分性，导致解释不够全面。
AI.method: 通过将输入特征或内部滤波器视为潜在原因，采用双向量化方法分别从必要性和充分性视角生成解释。
AI.result: 在ILSVRC2012和CUB-200-2011等大规模数据集上，SUNY生成的解释更具信息量且性能与现有方法相当。
AI.conclusion: SUNY通过整合必要性与充分性视角，显著提升了CNN解释的可理解性与有效性。

This paper presents a causality-driven framework, SUNY, designed to rationalize the explanations toward better human understanding. Using the CNN model's input features or internal filters as hypothetical causes, SUNY generates explanations by bi-directional quantifications on both the necessary and sufficient perspectives. Extensive evaluations justify that SUNY not only produces more informative and convincing explanations from the angles of necessity and sufficiency, but also achieves performances competitive to other approaches across different CNN architectures over large-scale datasets, including ILSVRC2012 and CUB-200-2011. 研究人员提出了各种通过显着图直观地解释卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法，其中包括基于类激活图（CAM）的方法作为主要家族。然而，就内部设计逻辑而言，现有的基于 CAM 的方法往往忽视了因果视角，即回答核心“为什么”问题以帮助人类理解解释。此外，当前 CNN 的解释缺乏对必要性和充分性的考虑，而这两个方面是理想解释的互补方面。本文提出了一个因果驱动的框架，SUNY，旨在合理化解释以实现更好的人类理解。使用 CNN 模型的输入特征或内部过滤器作为假设原因，纽约州立大学通过双向量化从必要和充分的角度生成解释。广泛的评估证明，SUNY 不仅从必要性和充分性的角度提供了更丰富、更有说服力的解释，而且在大规模数据集（包括 ILSVRC2012 和 CUB-200-2011）上实现了与不同 CNN 架构的其他方法相媲美的性能。 本文提出SUNY框架，从必要性和充分性角度提供卷积神经网络的可视化解释。 Xiwei Xuan,Ziquan Deng,Hsuan-Tien Lin,Zhaodan Kong,Kwan-Liu Ma cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yongqiang Han,Likang Wu,Hao Wang,Guifeng Wang,Mengdi Zhang,Zhi Li,Defu Lian,Enhong Chen
title: GUESR: A Global Unsupervised Data-Enhancement with Bucket-Cluster Sampling for Sequential Recommendation
title_zh: GUESR：通过桶簇采样进行顺序推荐的全局无监督数据增强
abstract: Sequential Recommendation is a widely studied paradigm for learning users' dynamic interests from historical interactions for predicting the next potential item. Although lots of research work has achieved remarkable progress, they are still plagued by the common issues: data sparsity of limited supervised signals and data noise of accidentally clicking. To this end, several works have attempted to address these issues, which ignored the complex association of items across several sequences. Along this line, with the aim of learning representative item embedding to alleviate this dilemma, we propose GUESR, from the view of graph contrastive learning. Specifically, we first construct the Global Item Relationship Graph (GIRG) from all interaction sequences and present the Bucket-Cluster Sampling (BCS) method to conduct the sub-graphs. Then, graph contrastive learning on this reduced graph is developed to enhance item representations with complex associations from the global view. We subsequently extend the CapsNet module with the elaborately introduced target-attention mechanism to derive users' dynamic preferences. Extensive experimental results have demonstrated our proposed GUESR could not only achieve significant improvements but also could be regarded as a general enhancement strategy to improve the performance in combination with other sequential recommendation methods.
summary: Sequential Recommendation is a widely studied paradigm for learning users' dynamic interests from historical interactions for predicting the next potential item. Although lots of research work has achieved remarkable progress, they are still plagued by the common issues: data sparsity of limited supervised signals and data noise of accidentally clicking. To this end, several works have attempted to address these issues, which ignored the complex association of items across several sequences. Along this line, with the aim of learning representative item embedding to alleviate this dilemma, we propose GUESR, from the view of graph contrastive learning. Specifically, we first construct the Global Item Relationship Graph (GIRG) from all interaction sequences and present the Bucket-Cluster Sampling (BCS) method to conduct the sub-graphs. Then, graph contrastive learning on this reduced graph is developed to enhance item representations with complex associations from the global view. We subsequently extend the CapsNet module with the elaborately introduced target-attention mechanism to derive users' dynamic preferences. Extensive experimental results have demonstrated our proposed GUESR could not only achieve significant improvements but also could be regarded as a general enhancement strategy to improve the performance in combination with other sequential recommendation methods.
abstract_zh: 顺序推荐是一种广泛研究的范例，用于从历史交互中学习用户的动态兴趣以预测下一个潜在项目。尽管许多研究工作取得了显着进展，但仍然受到共同问题的困扰：有限监督信号的数据稀疏性和意外点击的数据噪声。为此，一些工作试图解决这些问题，但忽略了跨多个序列的项目的复杂关联。沿着这个思路，为了通过学习代表性项目嵌入来缓解这一困境，我们从图对比学习的角度提出了 GUESR。具体来说，我们首先从所有交互序列构建全局项目关系图（GIRG），并提出桶簇采样（BCS）方法来进行子图。然后，在这个简化图上开发图对比学习，以从全局角度增强具有复杂关联的项目表示。随后，我们通过精心引入的目标注意机制扩展了 CapsNet 模块，以导出用户的动态偏好。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的 GUESR 不仅可以实现显着的改进，而且可以被视为与其他顺序推荐方法结合提高性能的通用增强策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GUESR的全局无监督数据增强方法，通过构建物品关系图和聚类采样技术改进序列推荐。
AI.motivation: 现有序列推荐方法面临数据稀疏性和偶然点击噪声的问题，且未充分挖掘跨序列的物品关联性。
AI.method: 构建全局物品关系图（GIRG），采用桶聚类采样（BCS）生成子图，结合图对比学习增强物品表示，并引入目标注意力机制改进用户动态偏好建模。
AI.result: 实验表明GUESR在多个数据集上显著优于现有方法，且可作为通用增强策略与其他序列推荐方法结合使用。
AI.conclusion: 通过图结构建模和注意力机制，GUESR有效缓解了数据稀疏性与噪声问题，提升了序列推荐的性能与泛化能力。

authors_text: Jing Li,Jinpeng Yu,Ruoyu Wang,Zhengxin Li,Zhengyu Zhang,Lina Cao,Shenghua Gao
title: P$^2$SDF for Neural Indoor Scene Reconstruction
title_zh: P$^2$SDF 用于神经室内场景重建
abstract: Given only a set of images, neural implicit surface representation has shown its capability in 3D surface reconstruction. However, as the nature of per-scene optimization is based on the volumetric rendering of color, previous neural implicit surface reconstruction methods usually fail in low-textured regions, including the floors, walls, etc., which commonly exist for indoor scenes. Being aware of the fact that these low-textured regions usually correspond to planes, without introducing additional ground-truth supervisory signals or making additional assumptions about the room layout, we propose to leverage a novel Pseudo Plane-regularized Signed Distance Field (P$^2$SDF) for indoor scene reconstruction. Specifically, we consider adjacent pixels with similar colors to be on the same pseudo planes. The plane parameters are then estimated on the fly during training by an efficient and effective two-step scheme. Then the signed distances of the points on the planes are regularized by the estimated plane parameters in the training phase. As the unsupervised plane segments are usually noisy and inaccurate, we propose to assign different weights to the sampled points on the plane in plane estimation as well as the regularization loss. The weights come by fusing the plane segments from different views. As the sampled rays in the planar regions are redundant, leading to inefficient training, we further propose a keypoint-guided rays sampling strategy that attends to the informative textured regions with large color variations, and the implicit network gets a better reconstruction, compared with the original uniform ray sampling strategy. Experiments show that our P$^2$SDF achieves competitive reconstruction performance in Manhattan scenes. Further, as we do not introduce any additional room layout assumption, our P$^2$SDF generalizes well to the reconstruction of non-Manhattan scenes.

However, as the nature of per-scene optimization is based on the volumetric rendering of color, previous neural implicit surface reconstruction methods usually fail in low-textured regions, including the floors, walls, etc., which commonly exist for indoor scenes. Specifically, we consider adjacent pixels with similar colors to be on the same pseudo planes. The plane parameters are then estimated on the fly during training by an efficient and effective two-step scheme. Then the signed distances of the points on the planes are regularized by the estimated plane parameters in the training phase. As the unsupervised plane segments are usually noisy and inaccurate, we propose to assign different weights to the sampled points on the plane in plane estimation as well as the regularization loss. The weights come by fusing the plane segments from different views. As the sampled rays in the planar regions are redundant, leading to inefficient training, we further propose a keypoint-guided rays sampling strategy that attends to the informative textured regions with large color variations, and the implicit network gets a better reconstruction, compared with the original uniform ray sampling strategy. Experiments show that our P$^2$SDF achieves competitive reconstruction performance in Manhattan scenes. abstract_zh: 仅给定一组图像，神经隐式表面表示就显示了其在 3D 表面重建中的能力。然而，由于每场景优化的本质是基于颜色的体积渲染，以前的神经隐式表面重建方法通常在低纹理区域失败，包括室内场景中常见的地板、墙壁等。意识到这些低纹理区域通常对应于平面这一事实，无需引入额外的地面实况监控信号或对房间布局进行额外的假设，我们建议利用一种新颖的伪平面正则化符号距离场（P$^2$SDF）进行室内场景重建。具体来说，我们认为具有相似颜色的相邻像素位于相同的伪平面上。然后，通过高效且有效的两步方案在训练期间动态估计平面参数。然后通过训练阶段估计的平面参数对平面上点的有符号距离进行正则化。由于无监督平面段通常有噪声且不准确，因此我们建议在平面估计和正则化损失中为平面上的采样点分配不同的权重。权重是通过融合不同视图的平面片段来获得的。由于平面区域中的采样光线是冗余的，导致训练效率低下，我们进一步提出了一种关键点引导的光线采样策略，该策略关注具有大颜色变化的信息纹理区域，并且与原始均匀光线采样策略相比，隐式网络得到了更好的重建。实验表明，我们的 P$^2$SDF 在曼哈顿场景中实现了有竞争力的重建性能。此外，由于我们没有引入任何额外的房间布局假设，因此我们的 P$^2$SDF 可以很好地推广到非曼哈顿场景的重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪平面正则化符号距离场（P²SDF）的神经室内场景重建方法，旨在解决低纹理区域重建效果差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式表面重建方法在室内场景的低纹理区域（如地板、墙壁）表现不佳，而这些区域通常具有平面特性，但传统方法依赖额外监督或布局假设。
AI.method: 通过相邻像素颜色相似性构建伪平面，采用两步方案实时估计平面参数，并利用多视角融合权重进行正则化；结合关键点引导的采样策略优化训练效率。
AI.result: 在曼哈顿场景中取得竞争力重建效果，且无需额外布局假设，可推广至非曼哈顿场景。
AI.conclusion: P²SDF通过伪平面正则化有效提升室内场景重建质量，尤其在低纹理区域表现优异，且具有良好的泛化能力。

As the sampled rays in the planar regions are redundant, leading to inefficient training, we further propose a keypoint-guided rays sampling strategy that attends to the informative textured regions with large color variations, and the implicit network gets a better reconstruction, compared with the original uniform ray sampling strategy. Experiments show that our P$^2$SDF achieves competitive reconstruction performance in Manhattan scenes. Further, as we do not introduce any additional room layout assumption, our P$^2$SDF generalizes well to the reconstruction of non-Manhattan scenes. 仅给定一组图像，神经隐式表面表示就显示了其在 3D 表面重建中的能力。然而，由于每场景优化的本质是基于颜色的体积渲染，以前的神经隐式表面重建方法通常在低纹理区域失败，包括室内场景中常见的地板、墙壁等。意识到这些低纹理区域通常对应于平面这一事实，无需引入额外的地面实况监控信号或对房间布局进行额外的假设，我们建议利用一种新颖的伪平面正则化符号距离场（P$^2$SDF）进行室内场景重建。具体来说，我们认为具有相似颜色的相邻像素位于相同的伪平面上。然后，通过高效且有效的两步方案在训练期间动态估计平面参数。然后通过训练阶段估计的平面参数对平面上点的有符号距离进行正则化。由于无监督平面段通常有噪声且不准确，因此我们建议在平面估计和正则化损失中为平面上的采样点分配不同的权重。权重是通过融合不同视图的平面片段来获得的。由于平面区域中的采样光线是冗余的，导致训练效率低下，我们进一步提出了一种关键点引导的光线采样策略，该策略关注具有大颜色变化的信息纹理区域，并且与原始均匀光线采样策略相比，隐式网络得到了更好的重建。实验表明，我们的 P$^2$SDF 在曼哈顿场景中实现了有竞争力的重建性能。此外，由于我们没有引入任何额外的房间布局假设，因此我们的 P$^2$SDF 可以很好地推广到非曼哈顿场景的重建。 本文提出一种基于伪平面正则化符号距离场（P²SDF）的神经室内场景重建方法，旨在解决低纹理区域重建效果差的问题。 Jing Li,Jinpeng Yu,Ruoyu Wang,Zhengxin Li,Zhengyu Zhang,Lina Cao,Shenghua Gao cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaoyu Liu,Linhao Qu,Ziyue Xie,Jiayue Zhao,Yonghong Shi,Zhijian Song
title: Towards more precise automatic analysis: a comprehensive survey of deep learning-based multi-organ segmentation
title_zh: 迈向更精确的自动分析：基于深度学习的多器官分割的全面调查
abstract: Accurate segmentation of multiple organs of the head, neck, chest, and abdomen from medical images is an essential step in computer-aided diagnosis, surgical navigation, and radiation therapy. In the past few years, with a data-driven feature extraction approach and end-to-end training, automatic deep learning-based multi-organ segmentation method has far outperformed traditional methods and become a new research topic. This review systematically summarizes the latest research in this field. For the first time, from the perspective of full and imperfect annotation, we comprehensively compile 161 studies on deep learning-based multi-organ segmentation in multiple regions such as the head and neck, chest, and abdomen, containing a total of 214 related references. The method based on full annotation summarizes the existing methods from four aspects: network architecture, network dimension, network dedicated modules, and network loss function. The method based on imperfect annotation summarizes the existing methods from two aspects: weak annotation-based methods and semi annotation-based methods. We also summarize frequently used datasets for multi-organ segmentation and discuss new challenges and new research trends in this field.
summary: Accurate segmentation of multiple organs of the head, neck, chest, and abdomen from medical images is an essential step in computer-aided diagnosis, surgical navigation, and radiation therapy. In the past few years, with a data-driven feature extraction approach and end-to-end training, automatic deep learning-based multi-organ segmentation method has far outperformed traditional methods and become a new research topic. This review systematically summarizes the latest research in this field. For the first time, from the perspective of full and imperfect annotation, we comprehensively compile 161 studies on deep learning-based multi-organ segmentation in multiple regions such as the head and neck, chest, and abdomen, containing a total of 214 related references. The method based on full annotation summarizes the existing methods from four aspects: network architecture, network dimension, network dedicated modules, and network loss function. The method based on imperfect annotation summarizes the existing methods from two aspects: weak annotation-based methods and semi annotation-based methods. We also summarize frequently used datasets for multi-organ segmentation and discuss new challenges and new research trends in this field.
abstract_zh: 从医学图像中准确分割头部、颈部、胸部和腹部的多个器官是计算机辅助诊断、手术导航和放射治疗的重要步骤。在过去的几年里，凭借数据驱动的特征提取方法和端到端的训练，基于深度学习的自动多器官分割方法远远优于传统方法，成为一个新的研究课题。 This review systematically summarizes the latest research in this field.我们首次从完整标注和不完善标注的角度，综合整理了161篇基于深度学习的头颈、胸部、腹部等多个区域的多器官分割研究，共包含214篇相关参考文献。基于全标注的方法从网络架构、网络维度、网络专用模块、网络损失函数四个方面总结了现有的方法。基于不完善标注的方法从两个方面总结了现有的方法：基于弱标注的方法和半基于标注的方法。 We also summarize frequently used datasets for multi-organ segmentation and discuss new challenges and new research trends in this field.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了基于深度学习的多器官分割方法，涵盖完整与不完整标注场景，并总结相关数据集与研究趋势。
AI.motivation: 传统多器官分割方法精度不足，而深度学习方法在端到端训练下表现优异，但缺乏系统性综述，尤其在标注完整性分类上存在空白。
AI.method: 从完整标注与不完整标注两个角度分类，总结161项研究，涵盖网络架构、损失函数等四方面，并汇总214篇参考文献及常用数据集。
AI.result: 全面梳理了多器官分割领域方法体系，明确了不同标注条件下技术路线，并指出数据标注质量、模型泛化能力等新挑战。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升分割精度，但需进一步解决标注不完善场景下的方法鲁棒性，未来研究应关注跨模态数据融合与自监督学习。

authors_text: Hassan M. Ahmed,Souhail Maraoui,Muhammed Abd Elnaby Sadek,Bessam Abdulrazak,Camille Vandenberghe,Stephen C. Cunnane,F. Guillaume Blanchet
title: Meal-time Detection by Means of Long Periods Blood Glucose Level Monitoring via IoT Technology
title_zh: 通过物联网技术进行长时间血糖水平监测的进餐时间检测
abstract: Blood glucose level monitoring is of great importance, especially for subjects experiencing type 1 diabetes. Accurate monitoring of their blood glucose level prevents dangerous and life-threatening situations that might be experienced by those subjects. In addition, precise monitoring of blood glucose levels over long periods of time helps establishing knowledge about the daily mealtime routine which aids the medical staff to monitor subjects and properly intervene in hazardous cases such as hypo- or hyperglycemia. Establishing such knowledge will play a potential role when designing proper treatment intervention plan. In this research, we present a complete IoT framework, starting from hardware acquisition system to data analysis approaches that gives a hand for medical staff when long periods of blood glucose monitoring are essential for subjects. Also, this framework is validated with real-time data collection from 7 subjects over 10 successive days with temporal resolution of 5 minutes allowing for near real-time monitoring and analysis. Our results show the precisely estimated daily mealtime routines for 4 subjects out of the 7 with discard of 3 subjects due to huge data loss mainly. The daily mealtime routines for the 4 subjects are found to be matching to have a pattern of 4 periods of blood glucose level changes corresponding to the breakfast around 8 AM, the lunch around 5 PM, the dinner around 8 PM, and finally a within-day snack around 12 PM. The research shows the potential of IoT ecosystem in support for medically related studies.
summary: Blood glucose level monitoring is of great importance, especially for subjects experiencing type 1 diabetes. Accurate monitoring of their blood glucose level prevents dangerous and life-threatening situations that might be experienced by those subjects. In addition, precise monitoring of blood glucose levels over long periods of time helps establishing knowledge about the daily mealtime routine which aids the medical staff to monitor subjects and properly intervene in hazardous cases such as hypo- or hyperglycemia. Establishing such knowledge will play a potential role when designing proper treatment intervention plan. In this research, we present a complete IoT framework, starting from hardware acquisition system to data analysis approaches that gives a hand for medical staff when long periods of blood glucose monitoring are essential for subjects. Also, this framework is validated with real-time data collection from 7 subjects over 10 successive days with temporal resolution of 5 minutes allowing for near real-time monitoring and analysis. Our results show the precisely estimated daily mealtime routines for 4 subjects out of the 7 with discard of 3 subjects due to huge data loss mainly. The daily mealtime routines for the 4 subjects are found to be matching to have a pattern of 4 periods of blood glucose level changes corresponding to the breakfast around 8 AM, the lunch around 5 PM, the dinner around 8 PM, and finally a within-day snack around 12 PM. The research shows the potential of IoT ecosystem in support for medically related studies.
abstract_zh: 血糖水平监测非常重要，尤其是对于患有 1 型糖尿病的受试者。准确监测他们的血糖水平可以防止这些受试者可能遇到危险和危及生命的情况。此外，长时间精确监测血糖水平有助于建立有关每日进餐时间的知识，从而帮助医务人员监测受试者并适当干预低血糖或高血糖等危险情况。建立这些知识将在设计适当的治疗干预计划时发挥潜在作用。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个完整的物联网框架，从硬件采集系统到数据分析方法，当受试者需要长时间的血糖监测时，该框架可以为医务人员提供帮助。此外，该框架还通过连续 10 天从 7 位受试者收集的实时数据进行了验证，时间分辨率为 5 分钟，可实现近乎实时的监测和分析。我们的结果显示了 7 名受试者中 4 名受试者的精确估计的每日进餐时间，其中 3 名受试者主要由于大量数据丢失而被丢弃。研究发现，4 名受试者的日常进餐时间与 4 个血糖水平变化模式相匹配，分别对应于上午 8 点左右吃早餐、下午 5 点左右吃午餐、晚上 8 点左右吃晚餐，最后是中午 12 点左右吃点心。该研究显示了物联网生态系统在支持医学相关研究方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物联网技术的长期血糖水平监测框架，用于检测糖尿病患者的用餐时间。
AI.motivation: 准确监测血糖水平对1型糖尿病患者至关重要，有助于预防危险情况并制定治疗计划，而长期监测可揭示日常用餐规律以辅助医疗干预。
AI.method: 构建从硬件采集到数据分析的物联网系统，通过7名受试者连续10天的实时数据（5分钟采样间隔）验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 4名受试者的用餐时间被准确识别，呈现早餐（8AM）、午餐（5PM）、晚餐（8PM）及加餐（12PM）对应的血糖变化模式，其余3名因数据丢失被剔除。
AI.conclusion: 物联网生态系统在医疗研究中展现出潜力，尤其在长期生理数据监测与行为模式分析方面具有应用价值。

The research shows the potential of IoT ecosystem in support for medically related studies. 血糖水平监测非常重要，尤其是对于患有 1 型糖尿病的受试者。准确监测他们的血糖水平可以防止这些受试者可能遇到危险和危及生命的情况。此外，长时间精确监测血糖水平有助于建立有关每日进餐时间的知识，从而帮助医务人员监测受试者并适当干预低血糖或高血糖等危险情况。建立这些知识将在设计适当的治疗干预计划时发挥潜在作用。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个完整的物联网框架，从硬件采集系统到数据分析方法，当受试者需要长时间的血糖监测时，该框架可以为医务人员提供帮助。此外，该框架还通过连续 10 天从 7 位受试者收集的实时数据进行了验证，时间分辨率为 5 分钟，可实现近乎实时的监测和分析。我们的结果显示了 7 名受试者中 4 名受试者的精确估计的每日进餐时间，其中 3 名受试者主要由于大量数据丢失而被丢弃。研究发现，4 名受试者的日常进餐时间与 4 个血糖水平变化模式相匹配，分别对应于上午 8 点左右吃早餐、下午 5 点左右吃午餐、晚上 8 点左右吃晚餐，最后是中午 12 点左右吃点心。该研究显示了物联网生态系统在支持医学相关研究方面的潜力。 本文提出了一种基于物联网技术的长期血糖水平监测框架，用于检测糖尿病患者的用餐时间。 Hassan M. Ahmed,Souhail Maraoui,Muhammed Abd Elnaby Sadek,Bessam Abdulrazak,Camille Vandenberghe,Stephen C. Cunnane,F. Guillaume Blanchet cs.HC

authors_text: Noel T. Anderson,Jay-U Chung,Shelby Kimmel,Da-Yeon Koh,Xiaohan Ye
title: Improved Quantum Query Complexity on Easier Inputs
title_zh: 通过更简单的输入提高了量子查询复杂性
comment: v2) New explicit description and analysis of distributions leading to average quantum advantages, accepted to Quantum. v1) 35 pages, 2 figures. This article supersedes arXiv/2012.01276 (expanded author list, new application, improved algorithm)
comments: v2) New explicit description and analysis of distributions leading to average quantum advantages, accepted to Quantum. v1) 35 pages, 2 figures. This article supersedes arXiv/2012.01276 (expanded author list, new application, improved algorithm)
abstract: Quantum span program algorithms for function evaluation sometimes have reduced query complexity when promised that the input has a certain structure. We design a modified span program algorithm to show these improvements persist even without a promise ahead of time, and we extend this approach to the more general problem of state conversion. As an application, we prove exponential and superpolynomial quantum advantages in average query complexity for several search problems, generalizing Montanaro's Search with Advice [Montanaro, TQC 2010].
summary: Quantum span program algorithms for function evaluation sometimes have reduced query complexity when promised that the input has a certain structure. We design a modified span program algorithm to show these improvements persist even without a promise ahead of time, and we extend this approach to the more general problem of state conversion. As an application, we prove exponential and superpolynomial quantum advantages in average query complexity for several search problems, generalizing Montanaro's Search with Advice [Montanaro, TQC 2010].
abstract_zh: 当承诺输入具有一定的结构时，用于函数评估的量子跨度程序算法有时会降低查询复杂性。我们设计了一种修改后的跨度程序算法，以表明即使没有提前承诺，这些改进仍然存在，并且我们将这种方法扩展到更普遍的状态转换问题。作为一个应用，我们证明了几个搜索问题的平均查询复杂度上的指数和超多项式量子优势，概括了 Montanaro 的搜索建议 [Montanaro, TQC 2010]。

AI.motivation: 现有量子算法在特定结构输入下表现更优，但需证明其优势在无承诺情况下依然存在，并推广到更一般问题
AI.method: 设计改进的跨度程序算法，并扩展到态转换问题
AI.result: 证明多个搜索问题的指数级和超多项式量子优势，推广Montanaro的成果
AI.conclusion: 改进算法提升量子查询效率，扩展应用范围，展示量子计算优势

authors_text: Naoki Akai
title: Efficient Solution to 3D-LiDAR-based Monte Carlo Localization with Fusion of Measurement Model Optimization via Importance Sampling
title_zh: 基于 3D-LiDAR 的蒙特卡罗定位的有效解决方案，通过重要性采样融合测量模型优化
abstract: This paper presents an efficient solution to 3D-LiDAR-based Monte Carlo localization (MCL). MCL robustly works if particles are exactly sampled around the ground truth. An inertial navigation system (INS) can be used for accurate sampling, but many particles are still needed to be used for solving the 3D localization problem even if INS is available. In particular, huge number of particles are necessary if INS is not available and it makes infeasible to perform 3D MCL in terms of the computational cost. Scan matching (SM), that is optimization-based localization, efficiently works even though INS is not available because SM can ignore movement constraints of a robot and/or device in its optimization process. However, SM sometimes determines an infeasible estimate against movement. We consider that MCL and SM have complemental advantages and disadvantages and propose a fusion method of MCL and SM. Because SM is considered as optimization of a measurement model in terms of the probabilistic modeling, we perform measurement model optimization as SM. The optimization result is then used to approximate the measurement model distribution and the approximated distribution is used to sample particles. The sampled particles are fused with MCL via importance sampling. As a result, the advantages of MCL and SM can be simultaneously utilized while mitigating their disadvantages. Experiments are conducted on the KITTI dataset and other two open datasets. Results show that the presented method can be run on a single CPU thread and accurately perform localization even if INS is not available.
summary: This paper presents an efficient solution to 3D-LiDAR-based Monte Carlo localization (MCL). MCL robustly works if particles are exactly sampled around the ground truth. An inertial navigation system (INS) can be used for accurate sampling, but many particles are still needed to be used for solving the 3D localization problem even if INS is available. In particular, huge number of particles are necessary if INS is not available and it makes infeasible to perform 3D MCL in terms of the computational cost. Scan matching (SM), that is optimization-based localization, efficiently works even though INS is not available because SM can ignore movement constraints of a robot and/or device in its optimization process. However, SM sometimes determines an infeasible estimate against movement. We consider that MCL and SM have complemental advantages and disadvantages and propose a fusion method of MCL and SM. Because SM is considered as optimization of a measurement model in terms of the probabilistic modeling, we perform measurement model optimization as SM. The optimization result is then used to approximate the measurement model distribution and the approximated distribution is used to sample particles. The sampled particles are fused with MCL via importance sampling. As a result, the advantages of MCL and SM can be simultaneously utilized while mitigating their disadvantages. Experiments are conducted on the KITTI dataset and other two open datasets. Results show that the presented method can be run on a single CPU thread and accurately perform localization even if INS is not available.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 3D-LiDAR 的蒙特卡罗定位 (MCL) 的有效解决方案。如果粒子是在真实情况周围精确采样的，那么 MCL 就能稳健地工作。惯性导航系统（INS）可用于精确采样，但即使有INS，仍然需要使用许多粒子来解决3D定位问题。特别是，如果 INS 不可用，则需要大量粒子，并且在计算成本方面无法执行 3D MCL。扫描匹配 (SM) 是基于优化的定位，即使 INS 不可用，也能有效地工作，因为 SM 在其优化过程中可以忽略机器人和/或设备的运动约束。然而，SM 有时会针对移动做出不可行的估计。我们认为MCL和SM具有互补的优缺点，并提出了MCL和SM的融合方法。由于SM在概率建模方面被认为是测量模型的优化，因此我们将测量模型优化作为SM来执行。然后使用优化结果来近似测量模型分布，并使用近似分布来对颗粒进行采样。采样的粒子通过重要性采样与 MCL 融合。因此，可以同时利用 MCL 和 SM 的优点，同时减轻它们的缺点。在KITTI数据集和其他两个开放数据集上进行了实验。结果表明，即使 INS 不可用，所提出的方法也可以在单个 CPU 线程上运行并准确地执行定位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的3D-LiDAR蒙特卡洛定位方法，通过融合扫描匹配优化的测量模型与重要性抽样技术，提升计算效率与定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统MCL依赖大量粒子导致计算成本高，而扫描匹配（SM）虽无需INS但可能产生不可行估计，需融合二者优势以解决3D定位问题。
AI.method: 将SM视为测量模型优化过程，利用其优化结果近似分布并生成粒子，通过重要性抽样与MCL融合，减少粒子数量并提升定位鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在KITTI等数据集实验表明，该方法可在单线程CPU上运行，且在无INS条件下仍能实现高精度定位。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合MCL与SM优势，提出的方法有效降低了计算负担，为无INS场景下的3D LiDAR定位提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Mingjie Sun,J. Zico Kolter
title: Single Image Backdoor Inversion via Robust Smoothed Classifiers
title_zh: 通过鲁棒平滑分类器的单图像后门反演
abstract: Backdoor inversion, a central step in many backdoor defenses, is a reverse-engineering process to recover the hidden backdoor trigger inserted into a machine learning model. Existing approaches tackle this problem by searching for a backdoor pattern that is able to flip a set of clean images into the target class, while the exact size needed of this support set is rarely investigated. In this work, we present a new approach for backdoor inversion, which is able to recover the hidden backdoor with as few as a single image. Insipired by recent advances in adversarial robustness, our method SmoothInv starts from a single clean image, and then performs projected gradient descent towards the target class on a robust smoothed version of the original backdoored classifier. We find that backdoor patterns emerge naturally from such optimization process. Compared to existing backdoor inversion methods, SmoothInv introduces minimum optimization variables and does not require complex regularization schemes. We perform a comprehensive quantitative and qualitative study on backdoored classifiers obtained from existing backdoor attacks. We demonstrate that SmoothInv consistently recovers successful backdoors from single images: for backdoored ImageNet classifiers, our reconstructed backdoors have close to 100% attack success rates. We also show that they maintain high fidelity to the underlying true backdoors. Last, we propose and analyze two countermeasures to our approach and show that SmoothInv remains robust in the face of an adaptive attacker. Our code is available at https://github.com/locuslab/smoothinv.
summary: Backdoor inversion, a central step in many backdoor defenses, is a reverse-engineering process to recover the hidden backdoor trigger inserted into a machine learning model. Existing approaches tackle this problem by searching for a backdoor pattern that is able to flip a set of clean images into the target class, while the exact size needed of this support set is rarely investigated. In this work, we present a new approach for backdoor inversion, which is able to recover the hidden backdoor with as few as a single image. Insipired by recent advances in adversarial robustness, our method SmoothInv starts from a single clean image, and then performs projected gradient descent towards the target class on a robust smoothed version of the original backdoored classifier. We find that backdoor patterns emerge naturally from such optimization process. Compared to existing backdoor inversion methods, SmoothInv introduces minimum optimization variables and does not require complex regularization schemes. We perform a comprehensive quantitative and qualitative study on backdoored classifiers obtained from existing backdoor attacks. We demonstrate that SmoothInv consistently recovers successful backdoors from single images: for backdoored ImageNet classifiers, our reconstructed backdoors have close to 100% attack success rates. We also show that they maintain high fidelity to the underlying true backdoors. Last, we propose and analyze two countermeasures to our approach and show that SmoothInv remains robust in the face of an adaptive attacker. Our code is available at https://github.com/locuslab/smoothinv.
abstract_zh: 后门反转是许多后门防御的核心步骤，是一种逆向工程过程，用于恢复插入机器学习模型中的隐藏后门触发器。现有的方法通过搜索能够将一组干净图像翻转到目标类的后门模式来解决这个问题，而很少研究该支持集所需的确切大小。 In this work, we present a new approach for backdoor inversion, which is able to recover the hidden backdoor with as few as a single image.受对抗鲁棒性方面最新进展的启发，我们的方法 SmoothInv 从单个干净图像开始，然后在原始后门分类器的鲁棒平滑版本上执行朝向目标类的投影梯度下降。 We find that backdoor patterns emerge naturally from such optimization process.与现有的后门反演方法相比，SmoothInv 引入了最少的优化变量，并且不需要复杂的正则化方案。 We perform a comprehensive quantitative and qualitative study on backdoored classifiers obtained from existing backdoor attacks.我们证明了 SmoothInv 始终能够从单个图像中恢复成功的后门：对于后门 ImageNet 分类器，我们重建的后门具有接近 100% 的攻击成功率。 We also show that they maintain high fidelity to the underlying true backdoors. Last, we propose and analyze two countermeasures to our approach and show that SmoothInv remains robust in the face of an adaptive attacker. Our code is available at https://github.com/locuslab/smoothinv.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SmoothInv的新方法，通过鲁棒平滑分类器从单张图像中恢复隐藏的后门触发器。
AI.motivation: 现有后门逆向方法需要大量干净图像作为支持集，且未深入研究所需样本数量。作者旨在以最少样本（单张图像）高效恢复后门，并借鉴对抗鲁棒性领域的最新进展。
AI.method: SmoothInv基于投影梯度下降法，在原始后门分类器的鲁棒平滑版本上优化目标类别方向。通过最小化优化变量和无需复杂正则化方案，从单张干净图像中自然生成后门模式。
AI.result: 在ImageNet后门分类器上，SmoothInv重建的后门攻击成功率接近100%，且保持高保真度。同时提出两种防御措施并验证其对适应性攻击者的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SmoothInv证明了单图像后门逆向的可行性，为后门防御提供了高效且鲁棒的新思路，同时揭示了现有防御体系的潜在脆弱性。

search_text: Single Image Backdoor Inversion via Robust Smoothed Classifiers 通过鲁棒平滑分类器的单图像后门反演 Backdoor inversion, a central step in many backdoor defenses, is a reverse-engineering process to recover the hidden backdoor trigger inserted into a machine learning model. Existing approaches tackle this problem by searching for a backdoor pattern that is able to flip a set of clean images into the target class, while the exact size needed of this support set is rarely investigated. In this work, we present a new approach for backdoor inversion, which is able to recover the hidden backdoor with as few as a single image. Insipired by recent advances in adversarial robustness, our method SmoothInv starts from a single clean image, and then performs projected gradient descent towards the target class on a robust smoothed version of the original backdoored classifier. We find that backdoor patterns emerge naturally from such optimization process. Compared to existing backdoor inversion methods, SmoothInv introduces minimum optimization variables and does not require complex regularization schemes. We perform a comprehensive quantitative and qualitative study on backdoored classifiers obtained from existing backdoor attacks. We demonstrate that SmoothInv consistently recovers successful backdoors from single images: for backdoored ImageNet classifiers, our reconstructed backdoors have close to 100% attack success rates. We also show that they maintain high fidelity to the underlying true backdoors. Last, we propose and analyze two countermeasures to our approach and show that SmoothInv remains robust in the face of an adaptive attacker. Our code is available at https://github.com/locuslab/smoothinv. 后门反转是许多后门防御的核心步骤，是一种逆向工程过程，用于恢复插入机器学习模型中的隐藏后门触发器。现有的方法通过搜索能够将一组干净图像翻转到目标类的后门模式来解决这个问题，而很少研究该支持集所需的确切大小。 In this work, we present a new approach for backdoor inversion, which is able to recover the hidden backdoor with as few as a single image.受对抗鲁棒性方面最新进展的启发，我们的方法 SmoothInv 从单个干净图像开始，然后在原始后门分类器的鲁棒平滑版本上执行朝向目标类的投影梯度下降。 We find that backdoor patterns emerge naturally from such optimization process.与现有的后门反演方法相比，SmoothInv 引入了最少的优化变量，并且不需要复杂的正则化方案。 We perform a comprehensive quantitative and qualitative study on backdoored classifiers obtained from existing backdoor attacks.我们证明了 SmoothInv 始终能够从单个图像中恢复成功的后门：对于后门 ImageNet 分类器，我们重建的后门具有接近 100% 的攻击成功率。 We also show that they maintain high fidelity to the underlying true backdoors. Last, we propose and analyze two countermeasures to our approach and show that SmoothInv remains robust in the face of an adaptive attacker. Our code is available at https://github.com/locuslab/smoothinv. 本文提出一种名为SmoothInv的新方法，通过鲁棒平滑分类器从单张图像中恢复隐藏的后门触发器。 Mingjie Sun,J. Zico Kolter cs.CV

authors_text: Md Ashequr Rahman,Zitong Yu,Barry A. Siegel,Abhinav K. Jha
title: A task-specific deep-learning-based denoising approach for myocardial perfusion SPECT
title_zh: 基于任务特定深度学习的心肌灌注 SPECT 去噪方法
abstract: Deep-learning (DL)-based methods have shown significant promise in denoising myocardial perfusion SPECT images acquired at low dose. For clinical application of these methods, evaluation on clinical tasks is crucial. Typically, these methods are designed to minimize some fidelity-based criterion between the predicted denoised image and some reference normal-dose image. However, while promising, studies have shown that these methods may have limited impact on the performance of clinical tasks in SPECT. To address this issue, we use concepts from the literature on model observers and our understanding of the human visual system to propose a DL-based denoising approach designed to preserve observer-related information for detection tasks. The proposed method was objectively evaluated on the task of detecting perfusion defect in myocardial perfusion SPECT images using a retrospective study with anonymized clinical data. Our results demonstrate that the proposed method yields improved performance on this detection task compared to using low-dose images. The results show that by preserving task-specific information, DL may provide a mechanism to improve observer performance in low-dose myocardial perfusion SPECT.
summary: Deep-learning (DL)-based methods have shown significant promise in denoising myocardial perfusion SPECT images acquired at low dose. For clinical application of these methods, evaluation on clinical tasks is crucial. Typically, these methods are designed to minimize some fidelity-based criterion between the predicted denoised image and some reference normal-dose image. However, while promising, studies have shown that these methods may have limited impact on the performance of clinical tasks in SPECT. To address this issue, we use concepts from the literature on model observers and our understanding of the human visual system to propose a DL-based denoising approach designed to preserve observer-related information for detection tasks. The proposed method was objectively evaluated on the task of detecting perfusion defect in myocardial perfusion SPECT images using a retrospective study with anonymized clinical data. Our results demonstrate that the proposed method yields improved performance on this detection task compared to using low-dose images. The results show that by preserving task-specific information, DL may provide a mechanism to improve observer performance in low-dose myocardial perfusion SPECT.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习 (DL) 的方法在低剂量采集的心肌灌注 SPECT 图像去噪方面显示出巨大的前景。对于这些方法的临床应用，对临床任务的评估至关重要。通常，这些方法旨在最小化预测去噪图像和一些参考正常剂量图像之间的一些基于保真度的标准。然而，尽管前景光明，但研究表明这些方法可能对 SPECT 临床任务的执行影响有限。为了解决这个问题，我们利用模型观察者文献中的概念以及我们对人类视觉系统的理解，提出了一种基于深度学习的去噪方法，旨在为检测任务保留与观察者相关的信息。通过匿名临床数据的回顾性研究，对所提出的方法在心肌灌注 SPECT 图像中检测灌注缺陷的任务进行了客观评估。我们的结果表明，与使用低剂量图像相比，所提出的方法在此检测任务上的性能得到了提高。结果表明，通过保留任务特定信息，深度学习可以提供一种提高观察者在低剂量心肌灌注 SPECT 中的表现的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的特定任务去噪方法，旨在提升低剂量心肌灌注SPECT图像中灌注缺损检测的临床任务性能。
AI.motivation: 传统去噪方法侧重于图像保真度，但可能无法有效提升临床检测任务性能，需设计保留与观察者相关检测信息的去噪模型。
AI.method: 结合模型观测器理论与人类视觉系统特性，构建以检测任务为导向的深度学习去噪框架，并基于临床数据进行回顾性验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在灌注缺损检测任务中显著优于原始低剂量图像，验证了任务特异性信息保留的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过保留临床检测任务关键信息，深度学习可有效提升低剂量心肌灌注SPECT的观察者检测性能。

authors_text: Lianyu Zhou,Dong Wei,Donghuan Lu,Wei Xue,Liansheng Wang,Yefeng Zheng
title: RECIST Weakly Supervised Lesion Segmentation via Label-Space Co-Training
title_zh: 通过标签空间联合训练进行 RECIST 弱监督病变分割
abstract: As an essential indicator for cancer progression and treatment response, tumor size is often measured following the response evaluation criteria in solid tumors (RECIST) guideline in CT slices. By marking each lesion with its longest axis and the longest perpendicular one, laborious pixel-wise manual annotation can be avoided. However, such a coarse substitute cannot provide a rich and accurate base to allow versatile quantitative analysis of lesions. To this end, we propose a novel weakly supervised framework to exploit the existing rich RECIST annotations for pixel-wise lesion segmentation. Specifically, a pair of under- and over-segmenting masks are constructed for each lesion based on its RECIST annotation and served as the label for co-training a pair of subnets, respectively, along with the proposed label-space perturbation induced consistency loss to bridge the gap between the two subnets and enable effective co-training. Extensive experiments are conducted on a public dataset to demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework regarding the RECIST-based weakly supervised segmentation task and its universal applicability to various backbone networks.
summary: As an essential indicator for cancer progression and treatment response, tumor size is often measured following the response evaluation criteria in solid tumors (RECIST) guideline in CT slices. By marking each lesion with its longest axis and the longest perpendicular one, laborious pixel-wise manual annotation can be avoided. However, such a coarse substitute cannot provide a rich and accurate base to allow versatile quantitative analysis of lesions. To this end, we propose a novel weakly supervised framework to exploit the existing rich RECIST annotations for pixel-wise lesion segmentation. Specifically, a pair of under- and over-segmenting masks are constructed for each lesion based on its RECIST annotation and served as the label for co-training a pair of subnets, respectively, along with the proposed label-space perturbation induced consistency loss to bridge the gap between the two subnets and enable effective co-training. Extensive experiments are conducted on a public dataset to demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework regarding the RECIST-based weakly supervised segmentation task and its universal applicability to various backbone networks.
abstract_zh: As an essential indicator for cancer progression and treatment response, tumor size is often measured following the response evaluation criteria in solid tumors (RECIST) guideline in CT slices.通过用最长轴和最长垂直轴标记每个病变，可以避免费力的逐像素手动注释。然而，这种粗略的替代品无法提供丰富而准确的基础来对病变进行多功能定量分析。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的弱监督框架，以利用现有丰富的 RECIST 注释进行像素级病变分割。 Specifically, a pair of under- and over-segmenting masks are constructed for each lesion based on its RECIST annotation and served as the label for co-training a pair of subnets, respectively, along with the proposed label-space perturbation induced consistency loss to bridge the gap between the two subnets and enable effective co-training. Extensive experiments are conducted on a public dataset to demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework regarding the RECIST-based weakly supervised segmentation task and its universal applicability to various backbone networks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于RECIST标注的弱监督病灶分割框架，实现像素级病变分割
AI.motivation: RECIST标注无法提供精确的像素级信息，限制了定量分析，需利用现有标注提升分割精度
AI.method: 构建欠/过分割掩码作为标签，共训练两个子网络，并引入标签空间扰动一致性损失，缩小子网络差距
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证了框架在RECIST弱监督分割任务中的优越性及对多种骨干网络的适用性
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效利用RECIST标注进行弱监督分割，适用于不同网络结构

By marking each lesion with its longest axis and the longest perpendicular one, laborious pixel-wise manual annotation can be avoided. However, such a coarse substitute cannot provide a rich and accurate base to allow versatile quantitative analysis of lesions. To this end, we propose a novel weakly supervised framework to exploit the existing rich RECIST annotations for pixel-wise lesion segmentation. Specifically, a pair of under- and over-segmenting masks are constructed for each lesion based on its RECIST annotation and served as the label for co-training a pair of subnets, respectively, along with the proposed label-space perturbation induced consistency loss to bridge the gap between the two subnets and enable effective co-training. Extensive experiments are conducted on a public dataset to demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework regarding the RECIST-based weakly supervised segmentation task and its universal applicability to various backbone networks. As an essential indicator for cancer progression and treatment response, tumor size is often measured following the response evaluation criteria in solid tumors (RECIST) guideline in CT slices.通过用最长轴和最长垂直轴标记每个病变，可以避免费力的逐像素手动注释。然而，这种粗略的替代品无法提供丰富而准确的基础来对病变进行多功能定量分析。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的弱监督框架，以利用现有丰富的 RECIST 注释进行像素级病变分割。 Specifically, a pair of under- and over-segmenting masks are constructed for each lesion based on its RECIST annotation and served as the label for co-training a pair of subnets, respectively, along with the proposed label-space perturbation induced consistency loss to bridge the gap between the two subnets and enable effective co-training. Extensive experiments are conducted on a public dataset to demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework regarding the RECIST-based weakly supervised segmentation task and its universal applicability to various backbone networks. 提出一种基于RECIST标注的弱监督病灶分割框架，实现像素级病变分割 Lianyu Zhou,Dong Wei,Donghuan Lu,Wei Xue,Liansheng Wang,Yefeng Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Zhenduo Zhao,Zhuo Li,Wenchao Wang,Pengyuan Zhang
title: PCF: ECAPA-TDNN with Progressive Channel Fusion for Speaker Verification
title_zh: PCF：具有渐进式通道融合的 ECAPA-TDNN，用于说话人验证
abstract: ECAPA-TDNN is currently the most popular TDNN-series model for speaker verification, which refreshed the state-of-the-art(SOTA) performance of TDNN models. However, one-dimensional convolution has a global receptive field over the feature channel. It destroys the time-frequency relevance of the spectrogram. Besides, as ECAPA-TDNN only has five layers, a much shallower structure compared to ResNet restricts the capability to generate deep representations. To further improve ECAPA-TDNN, we propose a progressive channel fusion strategy that splits the spectrogram across the feature channel and gradually expands the receptive field through the network. Secondly, we enlarge the model by extending the depth and adding branches. Our proposed model achieves EER with 0.718 and minDCF(0.01) with 0.0858 on vox1o, relatively improved 16.1\% and 19.5\% compared with ECAPA-TDNN-large.
summary: ECAPA-TDNN is currently the most popular TDNN-series model for speaker verification, which refreshed the state-of-the-art(SOTA) performance of TDNN models. However, one-dimensional convolution has a global receptive field over the feature channel. It destroys the time-frequency relevance of the spectrogram. Besides, as ECAPA-TDNN only has five layers, a much shallower structure compared to ResNet restricts the capability to generate deep representations. To further improve ECAPA-TDNN, we propose a progressive channel fusion strategy that splits the spectrogram across the feature channel and gradually expands the receptive field through the network. Secondly, we enlarge the model by extending the depth and adding branches. Our proposed model achieves EER with 0.718 and minDCF(0.01) with 0.0858 on vox1o, relatively improved 16.1\% and 19.5\% compared with ECAPA-TDNN-large.
abstract_zh: ECAPA-TDNN是目前最流行的用于说话人验证的TDNN系列模型，它刷新了TDNN模型的最先进（SOTA）性能。然而，一维卷积在特征通道上具有全局感受野。它破坏了频谱图的时频相关性。此外，由于 ECAPA-TDNN 只有五层，与 ResNet 相比，其更浅的结构限制了生成深度表示的能力。为了进一步改进 ECAPA-TDNN，我们提出了一种渐进通道融合策略，该策略将频谱图跨特征通道分割，并通过网络逐渐扩大感受野。其次，我们通过扩展深度和添加分支来扩大模型。我们提出的模型在 vox1o 上实现了 0.718 的 EER 和 0.0858 的 minDCF(0.01)，与 ECAPA-TDNN-large 相比相对提高了 16.1% 和 19.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的ECAPA-TDNN模型（PCF），通过渐进式通道融合策略和模型结构扩展，提升说话人验证任务的性能。
AI.motivation: ECAPA-TDNN虽为当前主流模型，但其一维卷积破坏了频谱的时间-频率相关性，且网络深度不足限制了深度表征能力。
AI.method: 设计渐进式通道融合策略，分阶段扩展感受野；通过增加网络深度和添加分支结构扩展模型规模。
AI.result: 在Vox1o数据集上，PCF模型的EER为0.718（提升16.1%），minDCF为0.0858（提升19.5%），优于ECAPA-TDNN-large。
AI.conclusion: 渐进式通道融合与深度扩展相结合，有效提升了说话人验证性能，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Long Tang,Dengpan Ye,Zhenhao Lu,Yunming Zhang,Shengshan Hu,Yue Xu,Chuanxi Chen
title: Feature Extraction Matters More: Universal Deepfake Disruption through Attacking Ensemble Feature Extractors
title_zh: 特征提取更重要：通过攻击集成特征提取器实现普遍的 Deepfake 破坏
abstract: Adversarial example is a rising way of protecting facial privacy security from deepfake modification. To prevent massive facial images from being illegally modified by various deepfake models, it is essential to design a universal deepfake disruptor. However, existing works treat deepfake disruption as an End-to-End process, ignoring the functional difference between feature extraction and image reconstruction, which makes it difficult to generate a cross-model universal disruptor. In this work, we propose a novel Feature-Output ensemble UNiversal Disruptor (FOUND) against deepfake networks, which explores a new opinion that considers attacking feature extractors as the more critical and general task in deepfake disruption. We conduct an effective two-stage disruption process. We first disrupt multi-model feature extractors through multi-feature aggregation and individual-feature maintenance, and then develop a gradient-ensemble algorithm to enhance the disruption effect by simplifying the complex optimization problem of disrupting multiple End-to-End models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FOUND can significantly boost the disruption effect against ensemble deepfake benchmark models. Besides, our method can fast obtain a cross-attribute, cross-image, and cross-model universal deepfake disruptor with only a few training images, surpassing state-of-the-art universal disruptors in both success rate and efficiency.
summary: Adversarial example is a rising way of protecting facial privacy security from deepfake modification. To prevent massive facial images from being illegally modified by various deepfake models, it is essential to design a universal deepfake disruptor. However, existing works treat deepfake disruption as an End-to-End process, ignoring the functional difference between feature extraction and image reconstruction, which makes it difficult to generate a cross-model universal disruptor. In this work, we propose a novel Feature-Output ensemble UNiversal Disruptor (FOUND) against deepfake networks, which explores a new opinion that considers attacking feature extractors as the more critical and general task in deepfake disruption. We conduct an effective two-stage disruption process. We first disrupt multi-model feature extractors through multi-feature aggregation and individual-feature maintenance, and then develop a gradient-ensemble algorithm to enhance the disruption effect by simplifying the complex optimization problem of disrupting multiple End-to-End models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FOUND can significantly boost the disruption effect against ensemble deepfake benchmark models. Besides, our method can fast obtain a cross-attribute, cross-image, and cross-model universal deepfake disruptor with only a few training images, surpassing state-of-the-art universal disruptors in both success rate and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 对抗性例子是一种保护面部隐私安全免受深度伪造修改的新兴方法。 To prevent massive facial images from being illegally modified by various deepfake models, it is essential to design a universal deepfake disruptor. However, existing works treat deepfake disruption as an End-to-End process, ignoring the functional difference between feature extraction and image reconstruction, which makes it difficult to generate a cross-model universal disruptor. In this work, we propose a novel Feature-Output ensemble UNiversal Disruptor (FOUND) against deepfake networks, which explores a new opinion that considers attacking feature extractors as the more critical and general task in deepfake disruption.我们实施有效的两阶段中断流程。 We first disrupt multi-model feature extractors through multi-feature aggregation and individual-feature maintenance, and then develop a gradient-ensemble algorithm to enhance the disruption effect by simplifying the complex optimization problem of disrupting multiple End-to-End models.大量实验表明，FOUND 可以显着增强对 ensemble deepfake 基准模型的破坏效果。 Besides, our method can fast obtain a cross-attribute, cross-image, and cross-model universal deepfake disruptor with only a few training images, surpassing state-of-the-art universal disruptors in both success rate and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对深度伪造网络的通用破坏方法FOUND，通过攻击特征提取器而非端到端过程实现跨模型、跨属性的深度伪造破坏。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造破坏方法将任务视为端到端过程，忽视了特征提取与图像重建的功能差异，导致难以生成跨模型通用破坏器。
AI.method: 采用两阶段破坏流程：首先通过多特征聚合与单特征维护破坏多模型特征提取器，再利用梯度集成算法简化多模型破坏优化问题。
AI.result: 实验表明FOUND在跨属性、跨图像、跨模型场景下显著提升破坏效果，仅需少量训练图像即可生成通用破坏器，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 攻击特征提取器比端到端破坏更关键且普适，FOUND方法为通用深度伪造防御提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kun Yang,Jun Lu
title: DMSA: Dynamic Multi-scale Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation Based on Adaptive Affinity
title_zh: DMSA：基于自适应亲和力的动态多尺度无监督语义分割
abstract: The proposed method in this paper proposes an end-to-end unsupervised semantic segmentation architecture DMSA based on four loss functions. The framework uses Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) module to enhance feature extraction. At the same time, a dynamic dilation strategy is designed to better capture multi-scale context information. Secondly, a Pixel-Adaptive Refinement (PAR) module is introduced, which can adaptively refine the initial pseudo labels after feature fusion to obtain high quality pseudo labels. Experiments show that the proposed DSMA framework is superior to the existing methods on the saliency dataset. On the COCO 80 dataset, the MIoU is improved by 2.0, and the accuracy is improved by 5.39. On the Pascal VOC 2012 Augmented dataset, the MIoU is improved by 4.9, and the accuracy is improved by 3.4. In addition, the convergence speed of the model is also greatly improved after the introduction of the PAR module.
summary: The proposed method in this paper proposes an end-to-end unsupervised semantic segmentation architecture DMSA based on four loss functions. The framework uses Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) module to enhance feature extraction. At the same time, a dynamic dilation strategy is designed to better capture multi-scale context information. Secondly, a Pixel-Adaptive Refinement (PAR) module is introduced, which can adaptively refine the initial pseudo labels after feature fusion to obtain high quality pseudo labels. Experiments show that the proposed DSMA framework is superior to the existing methods on the saliency dataset. On the COCO 80 dataset, the MIoU is improved by 2.0, and the accuracy is improved by 5.39. On the Pascal VOC 2012 Augmented dataset, the MIoU is improved by 4.9, and the accuracy is improved by 3.4. In addition, the convergence speed of the model is also greatly improved after the introduction of the PAR module.
abstract_zh: 本文提出的方法提出了一种基于四个损失函数的端到端无监督语义分割架构DMSA。该框架使用 Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) 模块来增强特征提取。同时，设计了动态扩张策略以更好地捕获多尺度上下文信息。其次，引入了像素自适应细化（PAR）模块，该模块可以自适应地细化特征融合后的初始伪标签，以获得高质量的伪标签。实验表明，所提出的 DSMA 框架优于显着性数据集上的现有方法。在COCO 80数据集上，MIoU提升了2.0，准确率提升了5.39。在 Pascal VOC 2012 Augmented 数据集上，MIoU 提高了 4.9，准确率提高了 3.4。此外，引入PAR模块后模型的收敛速度也得到了很大的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应亲和力的动态多尺度无监督语义分割方法DMSA，通过改进特征提取和伪标签优化提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督语义分割方法在多尺度上下文建模和伪标签质量方面存在不足，导致分割精度和收敛速度受限。
AI.method: 结合ASPP模块增强特征提取，设计动态空洞策略捕捉多尺度信息，并引入像素自适应优化模块（PAR）迭代精炼伪标签。
AI.result: 在Saliency数据集上优于现有方法，COCO80数据集MIoU提升2.0，准确率提升5.39；Pascal VOC2012数据集MIoU提升4.9，准确率提升3.4，且收敛速度显著加快。
AI.conclusion: DMSA通过多尺度特征建模与伪标签优化有效提升了无监督语义分割性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: DMSA: Dynamic Multi-scale Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation Based on Adaptive Affinity DMSA：基于自适应亲和力的动态多尺度无监督语义分割 The proposed method in this paper proposes an end-to-end unsupervised semantic segmentation architecture DMSA based on four loss functions. The framework uses Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) module to enhance feature extraction. At the same time, a dynamic dilation strategy is designed to better capture multi-scale context information. Secondly, a Pixel-Adaptive Refinement (PAR) module is introduced, which can adaptively refine the initial pseudo labels after feature fusion to obtain high quality pseudo labels. Experiments show that the proposed DSMA framework is superior to the existing methods on the saliency dataset. On the COCO 80 dataset, the MIoU is improved by 2.0, and the accuracy is improved by 5.39. On the Pascal VOC 2012 Augmented dataset, the MIoU is improved by 4.9, and the accuracy is improved by 3.4. In addition, the convergence speed of the model is also greatly improved after the introduction of the PAR module. 本文提出的方法提出了一种基于四个损失函数的端到端无监督语义分割架构DMSA。该框架使用 Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) 模块来增强特征提取。同时，设计了动态扩张策略以更好地捕获多尺度上下文信息。其次，引入了像素自适应细化（PAR）模块，该模块可以自适应地细化特征融合后的初始伪标签，以获得高质量的伪标签。实验表明，所提出的 DSMA 框架优于显着性数据集上的现有方法。在COCO 80数据集上，MIoU提升了2.0，准确率提升了5.39。在 Pascal VOC 2012 Augmented 数据集上，MIoU 提高了 4.9，准确率提高了 3.4。此外，引入PAR模块后模型的收敛速度也得到了很大的提高。 本文提出了一种基于自适应亲和力的动态多尺度无监督语义分割方法DMSA，通过改进特征提取和伪标签优化提升分割效果。 Kun Yang,Jun Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Yun-Yun Tsai,Chengzhi Mao,Junfeng Yang
title: Convolutional Visual Prompt for Robust Visual Perception
title_zh: 用于稳健视觉感知的卷积视觉提示
abstract: Vision models are often vulnerable to out-of-distribution (OOD) samples without adapting. While visual prompts offer a lightweight method of input-space adaptation for large-scale vision models, they rely on a high-dimensional additive vector and labeled data. This leads to overfitting when adapting models in a self-supervised test-time setting without labels. We introduce convolutional visual prompts (CVP) for label-free test-time adaptation for robust visual perception. The structured nature of CVP demands fewer trainable parameters, less than 1\% compared to standard visual prompts, combating overfitting. Extensive experiments and analysis on a wide variety of OOD visual perception tasks show that our approach is effective, improving robustness by up to 5.87% over several large-scale models.
summary: Vision models are often vulnerable to out-of-distribution (OOD) samples without adapting. While visual prompts offer a lightweight method of input-space adaptation for large-scale vision models, they rely on a high-dimensional additive vector and labeled data. This leads to overfitting when adapting models in a self-supervised test-time setting without labels. We introduce convolutional visual prompts (CVP) for label-free test-time adaptation for robust visual perception. The structured nature of CVP demands fewer trainable parameters, less than 1\% compared to standard visual prompts, combating overfitting. Extensive experiments and analysis on a wide variety of OOD visual perception tasks show that our approach is effective, improving robustness by up to 5.87% over several large-scale models.
abstract_zh: Vision models are often vulnerable to out-of-distribution (OOD) samples without adapting.虽然视觉提示为大规模视觉模型提供了一种轻量级的输入空间适应方法，但它们依赖于高维加性向量和标记数据。 This leads to overfitting when adapting models in a self-supervised test-time setting without labels. We introduce convolutional visual prompts (CVP) for label-free test-time adaptation for robust visual perception. The structured nature of CVP demands fewer trainable parameters, less than 1\% compared to standard visual prompts, combating overfitting.对各种 OOD 视觉感知任务的大量实验和分析表明，我们的方法是有效的，与多个大型模型相比，鲁棒性提高了高达 5.87%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出卷积视觉提示（CVP），用于在无标签的测试时适应场景下提升视觉模型对分布外样本的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉提示方法依赖高维向量和标签数据，在无标签自监督适应场景下易过拟合，需更轻量且有效的适应方案。
AI.method: 设计结构化卷积视觉提示，通过卷积操作减少参数量（低于标准方法1%），实现无标签测试时的模型适应。
AI.result: 在多种分布外视觉任务中，CVP相较大型模型提升鲁棒性最高达5.87%。
AI.conclusion: CVP以低参数量有效解决无标签适应问题，为鲁棒视觉感知提供新方法，适用于多样化视觉任务。

authors_text: Andong Wang,Chao Li,Mingyuan Bai,Zhong Jin,Guoxu Zhou,Qibin Zhao
title: Transformed Low-Rank Parameterization Can Help Robust Generalization for Tensor Neural Networks
title_zh: 转换后的低秩参数化可以帮助张量神经网络的鲁棒泛化
abstract: Achieving efficient and robust multi-channel data learning is a challenging task in data science. By exploiting low-rankness in the transformed domain, i.e., transformed low-rankness, tensor Singular Value Decomposition (t-SVD) has achieved extensive success in multi-channel data representation and has recently been extended to function representation such as Neural Networks with t-product layers (t-NNs). However, it still remains unclear how t-SVD theoretically affects the learning behavior of t-NNs. This paper is the first to answer this question by deriving the upper bounds of the generalization error of both standard and adversarially trained t-NNs. It reveals that the t-NNs compressed by exact transformed low-rank parameterization can achieve a sharper adversarial generalization bound. In practice, although t-NNs rarely have exactly transformed low-rank weights, our analysis further shows that by adversarial training with gradient flow (GF), the over-parameterized t-NNs with ReLU activations are trained with implicit regularization towards transformed low-rank parameterization under certain conditions. We also establish adversarial generalization bounds for t-NNs with approximately transformed low-rank weights. Our analysis indicates that the transformed low-rank parameterization can promisingly enhance robust generalization for t-NNs.
summary: Achieving efficient and robust multi-channel data learning is a challenging task in data science. By exploiting low-rankness in the transformed domain, i.e., transformed low-rankness, tensor Singular Value Decomposition (t-SVD) has achieved extensive success in multi-channel data representation and has recently been extended to function representation such as Neural Networks with t-product layers (t-NNs). However, it still remains unclear how t-SVD theoretically affects the learning behavior of t-NNs. This paper is the first to answer this question by deriving the upper bounds of the generalization error of both standard and adversarially trained t-NNs. It reveals that the t-NNs compressed by exact transformed low-rank parameterization can achieve a sharper adversarial generalization bound. In practice, although t-NNs rarely have exactly transformed low-rank weights, our analysis further shows that by adversarial training with gradient flow (GF), the over-parameterized t-NNs with ReLU activations are trained with implicit regularization towards transformed low-rank parameterization under certain conditions. We also establish adversarial generalization bounds for t-NNs with approximately transformed low-rank weights. Our analysis indicates that the transformed low-rank parameterization can promisingly enhance robust generalization for t-NNs.
abstract_zh: 实现高效、稳健的多通道数据学习是数据科学中的一项具有挑战性的任务。通过利用变换域中的低秩，即变换后的低秩，张量奇异值分解 (t-SVD) 在多通道数据表示方面取得了广泛的成功，并且最近已扩展到函数表示，例如具有 t 乘积层的神经网络 (t-NN)。然而，t-SVD 理论上如何影响 t-NN 的学习行为仍不清楚。本文首次通过推导标准和对抗训练 t-NN 的泛化误差上限来回答这个问题。它揭示了通过精确变换的低秩参数化压缩的 t-NN 可以实现更清晰的对抗泛化界限。在实践中，虽然 t-NN 很少能够精确地转换低秩权重，但我们的分析进一步表明，通过梯度流 (GF) 的对抗训练，具有 ReLU 激活的过参数化 t-NN 在某些条件下通过隐式正则化进行训练，以实现转换的低秩参数化。我们还利用近似变换的低秩权重建立了 t-NN 的对抗泛化界限。我们的分析表明，转换后的低秩参数化有望增强 t-NN 的鲁棒泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究通过变换低秩参数化提升张量神经网络（t-NNs）的鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 多通道数据学习面临效率与鲁棒性挑战，现有理论未明确t-SVD如何影响t-NNs的学习行为。
AI.method: 推导标准及对抗训练t-NNs的泛化误差上界，分析梯度流（GF）下ReLU激活的过参数化t-NNs隐式正则化机制。
AI.result: 精确变换低秩参数化可获得更尖锐的对抗泛化界，近似低秩权重的t-NNs也具备相似优势。
AI.conclusion: 变换低秩参数化能有效增强t-NNs的鲁棒泛化性能，为多通道数据学习提供理论支持。
